takes the stage to rapturous applause","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52629","datePublished":"2024-08-20T03:28:48.368Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:29:45.198Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"The president, tonight's final speaker, walked up to the podium to sustained applause and a standing ovation from the delegates in the crowd.\n\nThe song selection: Jackie Wilson's \"(Your Love Keeps Lifting Me) Higher and Higher.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52623"},"headline":"Ashley Biden introduces her father as the 'O.G. girl dad'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52623","datePublished":"2024-08-20T03:28:23.056Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:49:26.162Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"}],"articleBody":"Joe Bidenâs daughter, Ashley Biden, introduced him in deeply personal remarks that honored his career, as well as his family life. \n\n\"Joe Biden is the O.G. girl dad,\" Ashley Biden said, following her mother, the first lady. \"And he wasn't just a girl dad. I could see that he valued and trusted women. How he listened to his mother. How he believed his sister. Most of all, how he respected my mother's career.\"\n\nAshley Biden was one of Bidenâs family members who sat to the side of the Resolute Desk as Biden announced his decision to step aside as the presidential nominee less than a month ago.\n\n\"Dad, you always tell us, but we don't tell you enough, that you are the love of our lives and the life of our love,\" she said.\n\nShe called her father \"one of the most consequential leaders in American history\" and said he knew that \"family was everything.\" \n\nAshley Biden recounted losing her brother Beau Biden to brain cancer in 2015, saying it had felt like the grief would \"never end.\"\n\n\"I know that Beau is here with us tonight,\" she said. \"He is always here with us.\"\n\nBiden called the election \"the fight of our lifetimes,\" characterizing it as a fight for freedom, democracy and reproductive rights.\n\n\"After Beau passed, I got this tattoo on my wrist. It says 'Courage, dear heart,'\" Biden said. \"And now, this election requires the courageous hearts of all of us.\"\n\n\"Tonight I am asking you, if you stood with us in 2020, call upon your courageous heart. Stand with us today,\" she said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724125086065_f_mo_dnc_ashley_girldad_240819_1920x1080-90i8ej.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52615"},"headline":"First lady praises Biden's service, recounts his withdrawing from race","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52615","datePublished":"2024-08-20T03:19:30.844Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:38:59.828Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"First lady Jill Biden took the stage as the crowd waved \"Jill\" signs and applauded and chanted her name.\n\nShe praised her husband's service and recounted his decision to exit the presidential race last month.\n\nShe said there \"are moments when I fall in love with him all over again,\" going on to list examples. \n\n\"And weeks ago, when I saw him dig deep into his soul and decide to no longer seek re-election and endorse Kamala Harris,\" she said at the end of her list.\n\nShe also recounted Beau Biden's telling her and her husband about Harris.\n\n\"Our son Beau first worked with Kamala when he was attorney general of Delaware. He told me at the dinner table one night, 'Mom, sheâs special. Someone to keep your eye on,'\" she said. \"And he was right. Joe and I know Kamala. We have seen her courage, her determination and her leadership up close.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124711879_f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819_1920x1080-uzsxjl.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52627"},"headline":"Sen. Chris Coons praises and thanks Biden for his leadership","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52627","datePublished":"2024-08-20T03:19:17.354Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:49:52.326Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Sen. Chris Coons, D-Del., who was a co-chair of the Biden campaign and is a close friend of the president's, praised Biden's leadership in the White House.\n\n\"Biden's courage, Joe Biden's faith in us, Joe Biden's determination to heal the soul of our nation gave us hope and gave us confidence. Someone who has himself been knocked down by life, time and again. Joe Biden knows the grit and determination of the American people. He believed in us, and Joe Biden helped us get back up again,\" he said.\n\n\"Joe and Kamala helped rebuild our economy from the middle up, from the bottom up and the middle out, not from the top down,\" he said. \"And they made our families safer and our country stronger at home and abroad. Today, we are so much better off because they believed in us, in our democracy and our incredible first lady, Jill Biden.\"\n\nCoons said he has \"never known a more compassionate man than Joe Biden\" and has \"never known a man who has taken from his own loss and his own faith and delivered so much for the future of so many others.\"\n\n\"Mr. President, you were my senator as a Delawarean, you are my president as an American, and you will always be my friend on behalf of our nation, Joe, for your courage in fighting for our democracy,\" he said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_1920x1080-caert2.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52625"},"headline":"WarnockÂ delivers impromptu sermon on Israel, Gaza","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52625","datePublished":"2024-08-20T03:17:21.142Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:20:35.741Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"WarnockÂ got a standing ovation after he called for peace in Israel and Gaza.\n\nâI need my neighborâs children to be OK so that my children will be OK,\" he said before he launched into an impassioned plea for justice.\n\n\"I need the poor children of Israel and the poor children of Gaza, I need Israelis and Palestinians ... those in Ukraine, I need American children on both sides of the tracks to be OK,\" he said as the crowd erupted in applause. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52622"},"headline":"Sen. Warnock, a Baptist pastor, says Trump should 'try reading' the Bible","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52622","datePublished":"2024-08-20T03:10:56.475Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:37:07.467Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"ZoÃ« Richards","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"ZoÃ« Richards is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously covered breaking news at The Daily Beast and Talking Points Memo.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151","sameAs":["https://x.com/zarichards"]}],"articleBody":"Sen. Raphael Warnock, D-Ga., suggested Trump ought to \"try reading\" the Bible in remarks tonight that took aim at the former president for what Warnock described as efforts to divide Americans. \n\n\"He is a clear and present threat to the precious covenant we share with one another. And yes, I saw him. I saw him holding the Bible and endorsing a Bible as if it needed his endorsement. He should try reading it,\" Warnock, a Baptist pastor, said. \n\nNBC News reported last week that the former president's financial disclosure showed that he had made $300,000 onÂ branded Bibles.\n\nIn his speech, Warnock also referred to the Capitol riot and efforts in the wake of Trump's 2020 electoral defeat to change election laws. \n\n\"Behind the big lie was an even bigger lie. It is the lie that this increasingly diverse American electorate does not get to determine the future of the country, the lie and the logic of Jan. 6 is a sickness,\" Warnock said. \"It is a kind of cancer that then metastasized into dozens of voter suppression laws, all across our country.\"  \n\nThe Georgia election board today approved an effort that could allow county election administrators more paths to delay the certification of the vote. ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123947440_f_mo_dnc_warnock_bible_240819_1920x1080-vdyny9.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52618"},"headline":"Rep. Jasmine Crockett jokes about viral moment ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52618","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:58:21.143Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:00:24.747Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Jasmine Crockett, D-Texas, who went viral last year after she used colorful language to describe Trumpâs hoarding of classified documents, was back at it tonight.\n\nâShe became a career prosecutor, while he became a career criminal with 34 felonies, two impeachments and one porn star to prove it,â Crockett said of Harris and Trump.\n\nâShe presides over the Senate, while he keeps national secrets next to his thinking chair â yâall know what I said the other time â in Mar-a-Lago,\" she added.\n\nCrockett said that when she took office, she was nervous and doubted her place in Congress. She said Harris saw her in distress and comforted her when they met for the first time.\n\nâThe most powerful woman in the world wiped my tears and listened,â Crockett said, tearing up onstage. âThe brief but impactful interaction gave me my legislative legs, and Iâve been running ever since.â","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121970188_f_mo_dnc_crockett_harris_240819_1920x1080-gkbuhb.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52619"},"headline":"Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear highlights women's rights","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52619","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:56:18.702Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:11:02.089Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear began his remarks by saying Hadley Duvall was one of the bravest people he has met.\n\nDuvall had spoken out in a pro-Beshear advertisement about surviving sexual abuse, and many credited the ad with having a large impact on Beshear's being re-elected as a Democratic governor in a deep red state.\n\nBeshear said that women should have \"freedom over their own bodies,\" arguing that freedom should include whether women want to pursue in vitro fertilization or have children.\n\nHe also made an appeal to people across the political spectrum, telling them \"you are welcome here,\" while adding that Democrats want to move beyond \"us versus them.\"\n\nBeshear was initially reported to have been considered to be Harris' running mate.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123227033_f_mo_dnc_andy_beshear_240819_1920x1080-leqnbx.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52617"},"headline":"Women share personal stories of abortion onstage","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52617","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:54:15.377Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T03:09:51.595Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"Four people whose lives were jeopardized because of abortion bans enacted at the state level since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade shared their personal stories with the delegates.\n\nDemocrats have sought to put human faces on the debate over reproductive freedom as the Harris-Walz campaign goes after Trump for appointing three of the five conservative justices who voted to reverse Roe.\n\nThe speakers included Hadley Duvall, a Kentucky woman who was raped and impregnated by her stepfather. Duvall has been featured in ads from Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear, who spoke after her remarks.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123087903_f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819_1920x1080-vpklke.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52616"},"headline":"Democrats hit Trump on abortion with women who say they were denied emergency abortions","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52616","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:51:43.556Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:57:16.693Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Ben Kamisar","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653062/240627-ben-kamisar.jpg","jobTitle":"National Politics Reporter","description":"Ben Kamisar is a national political reporter for NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously worked as the deputy political editor at NBC News and a campaign reporter at The Hill newspaper in Washington, D.C. Prior to that, I covered Texas politics for The Dallas Morning News and the Austin American-Statesman. A Connecticut native, I graduated from Northwestern University and live in Washington, D.C.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986","sameAs":["https://x.com/bkamisar"]}],"articleBody":"The convention just showed an emotional video of a woman discussing how she was denied emergency abortions because of state abortion bans.\n\n\"I was punished for three days having to wait for either my baby to die or me to die or both,\" a mother named Amanda Zurawski says in the video. \"I almost died because doctors were forced to follow Trump's abortion ban.\"\n\nZurawski's story has been featured in news media and Democratic campaign ads. She says doctors told her her pregnancy was no longer viable but wouldn't provide the medical care she says she needed because of the state's near-total ban on abortion. She unsuccessfully sued the state in response. \n\nAmanda and her husband, Josh, appeared on the convention stage, both sharing their stories, warning that a second Trump term would lead to even more restrictions on abortion and reproductive freedom. \n\nKaitlyn Joshua and Hadley Duvall, two other women who have shared their stories in recent years, also spoke. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52612"},"headline":"Rep. Jamie Raskin recounts Jan. 6 attack","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52612","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:37:19.168Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:46:30.687Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., recounted the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol and laid blame at Trump's feet, calling him a \"career criminal.\"\n\nHe highlighted how the rioters called to \"hang Mike Pence,\" noting that Pence, Trump's vice president, did not endorse him. \n\nRaskin served on the House Jan. 6 committee. \n\n\"Are we going to go back to the days of election suppression and violent insurrection?\" he asked. \n\n\"No!\" the crowd yelled before breaking into chants of \"not going back.\"\n\nRaskin criticized Trump's saying he would pardon convicted Jan. 6 rioters as the crowd booed in response. ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121520300_f_mo_dnc_raskin_jan6_240819_1920x1080-g9iyzm.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52611"},"headline":"'Law & Order' pastiche mocks Trump's being a convicted felon","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52611","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:29:28.847Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T04:59:51.221Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"A video pastiche of the introduction to the television show \"Law & Order\" mocked Trump for his felony conviction.\n\nIt was a marked shift in tone for Democrats, who have shed the \"take the high road\" approach to Trump and have repeatedly sought to lambaste him for his criminal conviction during the first day of the convention. \n\n\"In the criminal justice system, the people are represented by two separate yet equally important groups: the police, who investigate crime, and the district attorneys, who prosecute the offenders. This is the story of Donald Trump,\" the narrator said. \n\nThe video continued: \"His entire life, Trump has believed he's above the law, but no one would ever dare hold him accountable. He lies. He rips off workers. He sexually abuses women ... in business. He cheated on his wife with a porn star and paid her off so the American people wouldn't find out during an election. But in the criminal justice system, ordinary Americans have had the courage to find him accountable time and time again: guilty, guilty, guilty. Donald Trump guilty on all 34 felony counts.\"\n\nIt finished by saying voters have to \"render our own verdict\" on Trump in November. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52609"},"headline":"Rep. James Clyburn expresses gratitude for Biden","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52609","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:21:30.423Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:40:54.925Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"A top Biden ally, Rep. James Clyburn, D-S.C., used part of his speech to thank the president, saying, \"We owe him a great debt of gratitude,\" before he delivered forceful praise of Harris.\n\nâAnd weâre all grateful for one of the best decisions he made: selecting Kamala Harris as his vice president and endorsing her to succeed him,\" he said. \n\nClyburn is often credited with helping revive Bidenâs 2020 campaign during the primary season. \n\n\"Our great democracy has been tested, and so has the basic goodness of the American people,\" Clyburn said, adding that Americans would continue to work toward \"a more perfect union.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121373698_f_mo_dnc_jim_clyburn_240819_1920x1080-ilorob.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52610"},"headline":"Clinton plays the hits","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52610","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:17:08.155Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:17:46.152Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Amanda Terkel","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_28/3654616/240613-amanda-terkel.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Managing Editor","description":"Amanda Terkel is politics managing editor for NBC News Digital.","disambiguatingDescription":"I spent 12 years at HuffPost, where I reported on politics and served as Washington bureau chief and editorial director. I was a frequent guest on radio and television and moderated one of the largest candidate forums in the 2020 Democratic presidential primary. Before that, I was a reporter at the site ThinkProgress. My bylines have appeared in The New York Times, Politico, The Daily Beast, The Guardian and other publications. I attended Colgate University and grew up in western New York.","award":"The Hillman Prize for Journalism, Washingtonian Women in Journalism Award","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/amanda-terkel-ncpn1300953","sameAs":["https://x.com/aterkel"]}],"articleBody":"Clintonâs speech was full of Easter eggs for her fans, with some of her biggest applause lines calling back to her past speeches and work.\n\nShe referred to shattering the highest glass ceiling â a theme of her 2016 presidential campaign. She also talked about how âit takes a villageâ â a throwback to her famous 1996 book. She turned her âthe future is femaleâ line into âthe future is here,â adding, âI wish my mother and Kamalaâs mother were here to see this.â\n\nAnd as she left the stage, âFight Songâ played â the earworm that was the theme of her 2016 run and will now be stuck in everyoneâs head all night.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52604"},"headline":"Hillary Clinton says 'the future is here' and Democrats have to 'keep going' ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52604","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:09:46.014Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:30:39.956Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Hillary Clinton said in her remarks that it was the honor of her life to accept the Democratic Party's nomination for president in 2016. \n\n\"And nearly 66 million Americans voted for a future where there are no ceilings on our dreams,\" she said, alluding to her winning the popular vote in that election. \"Afterwards we refused to give up on America. Millions marched. Many ran for office. We kept our eyes on the future. Well, my friends, the future is here.\"\n\nClinton said she wishes her mother and Harris' mother were there to see them â \"they would say keep going.\" She said people like Shirley Chisholm, who paved the way for women running for president, would say keep going.\n\n\"Families, buildings that are lives, parents stretching to afford child care, young people struggling to pay the rent. Theyâre all asking us to keep going,\" she said. \"With faith in each other and joy in our hearts, letâs send Kamala Harris and Tim Walz to the White House.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52605"},"headline":"Clinton nods while crowd chants 'Lock him up' â a reference to the anti-Clinton chant in 2016 ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52605","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:07:18.697Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:14:28.772Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"Clinton took aim at Trump's legal woes, mocking him for appearing to fall asleep at his hush money trial in New York. \"When he woke up,\" she said, \"he made his own kind of history: the first person to run for president with 34 felony convictions.\"\n\nThe crowd went wild and started chanting: \"Lock him up!\" \n\nEight years ago, Trump supporters routinely chanted \"Lock her up!\" at rallies in reference to Clinton as Trump vowed to put her jail if he was elected. \n\nHarris has sought to tamp down \"Lock him up\" chants at her rallies. Clinton tried to talk over the crowd for a moment when the chant began. But as the chants continued, she stood at the podium until the audience calmed. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC is wowed as Hillary Clinton takes to the stage","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52599","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:03:00.000Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:05:23.062Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Christopher Cicchiello","description":"Christopher Cicchiello is an NBC News researcher in Washington D.C.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/christopher-cicchiello-ncpn1248427"}],"articleBody":"Clinton walked onto the stage to thunderous applause. Everyone was on their feet, and Pelosi beamed with admiration. \n\nIt was the longest sustained applause of the convention so far. \n\nBut Walz seemed seriously starstruck as the camera caught him mouthing the word \"Wow!\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC begins speech honoring Biden","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52601","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:01:01.156Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:02:51.953Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Clinton kicked off her speech by honoring Biden, saying, \"First, though, let's salute President Biden.\"\n\n\"He has been democracy's champion at home and abroad,\" she said. \n\nBiden will address the convention later tonight.\n\n\"Thank you, Joe, for your lifetime of service and leadership,\" she said.\n\nThe audience broke into chants of \"thank you, Joe.\" Nancy Pelosi appeared to mouth, \"Thank you, Joe,\" too.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Clinton walked out to 'Brave'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52600","datePublished":"2024-08-20T02:00:46.865Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:02:28.837Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"The former secretary of state took the stage to Sara Bareilles' song \"Brave,\" a track that became synonymous with her 2016 presidential campaign.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52594"},"headline":"Kamala Harris' childhood friend and her mother speak: 'Your mom would be so proud'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52594","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:52:37.048Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:03:19.320Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"}],"articleBody":"Stacey Johnson-Batiste, Harris' childhood friend who wrote \"Friends From the Beginning: The Berkeley Village That Raised Kamala and Me,\" spoke with her mother, Doris Johnson, who was the best friend of Harris' late mother.\n\n\"Kamala has always been a protector,\" Johnson-Batiste said.\n\nJohnson-Batiste retold a story about a boy in their class who broke a sculpture she made. \n\n\"Kamala jumped in between him and me and said something that made him so mad he picked up a rock or something and hit her on the head,\" Johnson-Batiste said. \"Blood came streaming down.\"\n\nThe stitches left a scar that Harris still has, Johnson-Batiste said.\n\n\"That's the kind of person Kamala has always been, from the very beginning. Someone who doesn't hesitate to stand up for what's right, to take up for the underdog and to stand up to bullies,\" she said.\n\nJohnson said, \"Kamala, your mom would be so proud of you.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119285597_f_mo_dnc_child_friend_protector_240819_1920x1080-l0wr0o.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52592"},"headline":"AOC calls for an Israel-Hamas cease-fire deal in her remarks ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52592","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:48:42.595Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T02:08:38.322Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., said in her remarks that Harris is \"working tirelessly\" to secure a cease-fire deal in Gaza that would also bring the hostages home. \n\n\"In Kamala Harris, I see a leader who understands. I see a leader with a real commitment to a better future for working families and Chicago. We have to help her win, because we know that Donald Trump would sell this country for $1 if it meant lining his own pockets and greasing the palms of his Wall Street friends,\" Ocasio-Cortez said. \n\nShe said she's tired of hearing Trump, \"a union buster,\" thinking \"of himself as more of a patriot than the woman who fights every single day.\"\n\n\"The truth is, Don, you cannot love this country if you only fight for the wealthy and big business,\" she continued. \"To love this country is to fight for its people, all people, working people, everyday Americans, like bartenders and factory workers and fast food cashiers who punch a clock and are on their feet all day in some of the toughest jobs out there.\"\n\nOcasio-Cortez finished her speech by saying that they can't send just Harris and Walz alone to the White House. \n\n\"We must also elect strong Democratic majorities in the House and in the Senate so that we can deliver on an ambitious agenda for the people,\" she said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_1920x1080-qylgkd.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52593"},"headline":"Biden stopped by reception with longtime Delaware supportersÂ tonight","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52593","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:42:09.160Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:45:20.441Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Mike Memoli","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653074/240627-mike-memoli.jpg","description":"Mike Memoli is an NBC News correspondent.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/mike-memoli-ncpn793901"}],"articleBody":"After he conducted his walk-through at the United Center, Biden has spent some of his downtime back at his hotel preparing for tonightâs address â but also catching up with some of his longest-term supporters.\n\nAt his downtown hotel, Biden surprised some of the several dozen supporters who flew on a chartered plane from Delaware today to attend his speech.\n\nBiden âworked the room like he was still running for office,â joked the Rev. Christopher Bullock, the pastor of Canaan Baptist Church in New Castle.Â ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC sings a message to Trump: âYou canât always get what you wantâ ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52591","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:39:48.790Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:40:41.216Z","author":[{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com"}],"articleBody":"Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., decided to sing one of Trump's favorite campaign rally songs: \"You Can't Always Get What You Want.\" ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724117692594_now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819_1920x1080-j72m1d.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC
