Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52588"},"headline":"'Trump's a scab': UAW head throws muscle behind Harris-Walz ticket","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52588","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:35:14.033Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:56:52.052Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"Shawn Fain, the president of the United Auto Workers, praised Harris and Walz for standing \"shoulder to shoulder with the working class\" â and dissed Trump and Vance as \"two lapdogs for the billionaire class who only serve themselves.\"\n\n\"It's real simple: Kamala Harris is one of us,\" Fain said to cheers. \"She's a fighter for the working class â and Donald Trump is a scab!\"\n\nThe crowd broke out into loud chants of \"Trump's a scab\" â union slang for a person who refuses to join up or go on strike. Fain later removed his jacket to reveal a red T-shirt that read: \"Trump Is A Scab. Vote Harris.\"\n\nThe influential UAW has roughly 370,000 members nationwide, including in key Midwestern battleground states like Michigan and Wisconsin.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724118646509_f_mo_dnc_shawn_fain_240819_1920x1080-tk5caz.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52587"},"headline":"Hollywood takes the stage ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52587","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:32:50.409Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:38:58.539Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"Actor Tony Goldwyn, of \"Scandal\" fame, rolled out the proverbial Hollywood red carpet after Harris' surprise address.  \n\nHe touted her vision of unity, optimism and opportunity, saying, \"Americas are not a cynical people.\"\n\n\"We are not small-minded,\" he added. \"We can dream as big as we want.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52567"},"headline":"NBA coach Steve Kerr jokes about Walz's coaching background","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52567","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:28:45.323Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:39:16.799Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Christopher Cicchiello","description":"Christopher Cicchiello is an NBC News researcher in Washington D.C.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/christopher-cicchiello-ncpn1248427"}],"articleBody":"Fresh off of coaching Team USA's men's basketball squad to a gold medal at the Paris Olympics, legendary NBA coach Steve Kerr endorsed Harris and Walz and brought a hopeful tone to the convention.\n\n\"Think about what our team achieved with 12 Americans in Paris â putting aside rivalries to represent our country. Now imagine what we could do with all 350 million of us playing on the same team,\" Kerr said.\n\nAs he stepped into the political arena, his remarks focused on the qualities of what it takes to lead, including dignity, commitment to the truth andÂ an ability to laugh at yourself â attributes he said both Harris and Walz have. \n\n\"They have devoted their lives to serving other people, whether Vice President Harris was defending her community in the courtroom or Gov. Walz was inspiring the next generation in the classroom, or on the field, for that matter.\"Â \n\nWalz was an assistant football coach at Mankato West High School and helped bring back a winning tradition to the school in the form of a state championship.\n\n\"Coach to coach: That guy's awesome,\" Kerr said, though he joked that Walz had \"way too much reliance on the blitz\" as a coach.\n\nAnd, he added, quoting \"the great Steph Curry: We can tell Donald Trump, night night.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-steve-kerr-ac-1157p__138874-upnxa3.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52582"},"headline":"Walz says it's an important night to honor Biden","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52582","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:24:33.969Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:26:09.687Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Walz said in a brief interview with MSNBC that it's an \"important night for Democrats tonight to honor Joe Biden.\"\n\nAsked about his role as the VP candidate, Walz said, \"I can tell you this ticket, feeling that energy ... just a privilege.\"\n\nWalz said of the campaign's bus tour in Pennsylvania over the weekend that there was \"energy out there\" and that it was \"exciting.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116922370_n_msnbc_jacobwalz9p_240819_1920x1080-uh9xqr.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52575"},"headline":"Hillary Clinton to highlight Harris' \"heart and her integrity\" in tonight's speech","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52575","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:20:11.122Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:24:06.893Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton will use her speech tonight to highlight Harris' \"heart and her integrity,\" underscoring how Harris' experience sets her apart.\n\n\"We both got our start as young lawyers helping children who were abused or neglected. That kind of work changes you,\" Clinton will say, according to selected prepared remarks released by the Democratic National Convention Committee. \"Those kids stay with you. Kamala carries with her the hopes of every child she protected, every family she helped, every community she served.\"\n\nClinton, who lost to Trump in 2016, will argue that Harris \"has the character, experience and vision to lead us forward.\"\n\nShe will also take jabs at Trump, arguing that Harris \"cares about kids, families and America\" but that \"Donald only cares about himself.\"\n\n\"On her first day in court, Kamala said five words that guide her still: âKamala Harris, for the people,'\" Clinton will say, according to the prepared remarks. \"Thatâs something Donald Trump will never understand.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52581"},"headline":"Harris makes surprise early appearance, thanks Biden for his service","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52581","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:16:24.687Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:29:21.072Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Harris made a surprise early appearance tonight, speaking for a few minutes and thanking Biden for his \"historic leadership\" and service.\n\n\"We are forever grateful to you,\" she said.\n\nHarris said that \"this is going to be a great week,\" emphasizing later that in November \"we are moving forward.\"\n\nShe closed her brief remarks with her frequent refrain: \"When we fight, we win.\" The audience joined in on the final two words.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724117078437_f_mo_dnc_harris_biden_thank_240819_1920x1080-7smezy.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52577"},"headline":"Harris campaign pounces on Trump's saying he has 'no regrets' over the overturning of Roe v. Wade","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52577","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:13:17.767Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:15:04.100Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"The Harris campaign responded to Trumpâs saying today in an interview with CBS News that he has \"no regrets\" about having played a major role in the Supreme Court's reversal of Roe v. Wade.\n\nâDonald Trump overturnedÂ Roe v. Wade, ripped away womenâs freedoms in all 50 states, and wears it like a badge of honor. Give him the chance, and heâll go even further and ban abortion nationwide,\" campaign spokesperson Sarafina Chitika said in a statement. \n\nâThe American people have no regrets about making Donald a one-term president. Theyâll make him a two-time loser this November,\" she said. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC onstage","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52578","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:10:32.436Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:11:33.698Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Harris made a surprise appearance on the convention stage to roaring applause.\n\nShe delivers her acceptance speech Thursday.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC York governor on Trump: 'We've had to deal with him for 78 long years'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52573","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:09:30.516Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:30:53.662Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"New York Gov. Kathy Hochul slammed Trump in her remarks, depicting him as a fraudster who doesn't understand working-class Americans.\n\n\"Trust me, America: If you think you're tired of Donald Trump, talk to a New Yorker,\" Hochul said to cheers. \"Weâve had to deal with him for 78 long years.\"\n\n\"The fraud, the tax-dodging, the sham university, the shady universities. We've seen him stiff contractors, rip off workers,\" Hochul said. \"He abuses women, brags about it and then takes away their rights â and New Yorkers are sick of it.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Kathy-Hochul-ac-1159p-ubrmwx.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52566"},"headline":"Influencer and activist Deja Foxx speaks at the DNC","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52566","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:08:50.583Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:12:36.467Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alana Satlin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_44/3667207/241028-alana-satlin.jpg","description":"Alana is the deputy politics editor for breaking news on the digital team at NBC News.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alana-satlin-ncpn1072966"}],"articleBody":"Deja Foxx, a blogger and activist, became the first influencer to speak at the convention â one of several this week as the Harris campaign courts young voters. \n\nFoxx, who worked with Harris' presidential campaign in 2019 and now posts regularly about the election to her 140,000 TikTok followers, spoke about reproductive rights and her upbringing as a \"free lunch kid.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52563"},"headline":"Singer-songwriter Jason Isbell performs at DNC","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52563","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:08:26.184Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:14:51.912Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Ben Kamisar","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653062/240627-ben-kamisar.jpg","jobTitle":"National Politics Reporter","description":"Ben Kamisar is a national political reporter for NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously worked as the deputy political editor at NBC News and a campaign reporter at The Hill newspaper in Washington, D.C. Prior to that, I covered Texas politics for The Dallas Morning News and the Austin American-Statesman. A Connecticut native, I graduated from Northwestern University and live in Washington, D.C.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986","sameAs":["https://x.com/bkamisar"]}],"articleBody":"Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Isbell performed tonight at the convention.\n\nAside from his solo career, Isbell, a native Alabamian, is known for his work with the 400 Unit and as a former member of the Drive-By Truckers.\n\nHe has been politically outspoken for some time, having performed a concert for former Sen. Doug Jones, a Democrat, during the 2017 special election in Alabama, which Jones won.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC slips into convention hall with little fanfare","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52574","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:04:49.255Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:13:52.243Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Katherine Koretski","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656898/240729-katherine-koretski.jpg","description":"Katherine KoretskiÂ is a producer in the New York bureau.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/katherine-koretski-ncpn1295523"}],"articleBody":"Walz arrived inside the United Center a few moments ago. \n\nThere was no fanfare in the room and no shot of his entrance on the big screen. Unlike the Republican National Convention last month in Milwaukee, where the Trump campaign had a box labeled \"Make America Great Once Again,\" this VIP box has no signs.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52568"},"headline":"Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo touts Harris' economic agenda","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52568","datePublished":"2024-08-20T01:04:44.193Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:26:55.220Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo spoke about Harris' economic agenda, arguing that she would \"make building up the middle class a defining goal of her presidency.\"\n\nRaimondo, the former governor of Rhode Island, discussed her own work in turning around the state's economy with a \"pro-business, pro-worker agenda.\"\n\n\"Kamala Harris has that same agenda,\" she said.\n\nShe said \"Kamala Harris gets it\" when it comes to understanding that many Americans work very hard but are \"barely getting by, and that's not right.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116381249_f_mo_dnc_raimondo_econ_240819_1920x1080-i0v8ec.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52561"},"headline":"Harris has always 'understood the assignment' of holding fraudsters to account","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52561","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:59:43.306Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:28:29.741Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"A key Harris ally, Sen. Laphonza Butler, of California, echoed the vice president's previous remarks about \"knowing the type\" in reference to Trump and his ilk. \n\n\"We deserve a president who is tough, not just tough-talking; one who shatters the boundaries of what's possible, not the boundaries of what's legal; one who wipes the floor with cheats and fraudsters because, well, Democrats, she knows the type,\" Butler said. \n\nButler said Harris, a former prosecutor, has always \"understood the assignment\" and never doubted the future would be brighter. \n\n\"Every time she walked into a courtroom she would say 'Kamala Harris for the people.' It was a battle cry,\" Butler said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Laphonza-Butler-ac-1159p-wclois.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52559"},"headline":"Here's the deal about Project 2025","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52559","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:57:09.016Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:03:23.184Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Ben Kamisar","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653062/240627-ben-kamisar.jpg","jobTitle":"National Politics Reporter","description":"Ben Kamisar is a national political reporter for NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously worked as the deputy political editor at NBC News and a campaign reporter at The Hill newspaper in Washington, D.C. Prior to that, I covered Texas politics for The Dallas Morning News and the Austin American-Statesman. A Connecticut native, I graduated from Northwestern University and live in Washington, D.C.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986","sameAs":["https://x.com/bkamisar"]}],"articleBody":"Democrats keep mentioning Project 2025 tonight, using it interchangeably with Trump's platform for a second term. That's not exactly the case â while Trump and his allies have deep ties to the Heritage Foundation's policy road map, Trump has furiously tried to distance himself from it in recent weeks. \n\nMy colleagues Vaughn Hillyard and Alexandra Marquez dove deeper into those ties between Project 2025 and Trump, what the plan says and who's involved last month. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52554"},"headline":"Pelosi addresses tension with Biden in interview","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52554","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:46:54.385Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:59:50.722Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., the former House speaker, tonight addressed the tension between her and Biden and his White House aides after she played a key role in his decision to drop his re-election bid.\n\nShe was asked in a CNN interview to respond to longtime Biden adviser Anita Dunn's saying earlier on CNN that ânobody wants to have a fight with Nancy Pelosi at this time\" and whether Pelosi has spoken to Biden since he withdrew from the race.\n\n\"Sometimes you just have to take a punch for the children,\" said Pelosi, who didn't say whether she has spoken to Biden but said recently that she hasn't spoken to him since he dropped out.\n\n\"He made the decision for the country. My concern was not about the president. It was about his campaign,\" Pelosi said tonight.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52550"},"headline":"Remembering the water bottles left behind","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52550","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:46:32.826Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:47:20.352Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alex Seitz-Wald","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2020_02/3181306/alex-seitz-wald-circle-byline-template.jpg","description":"Alex Seitz-Wald was a former national politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-seitz-wald-ncpn385646"}],"articleBody":"A large pile of fancy metal water bottles, which are prohibited from entering the United Center, stands in silent vigil to the unquenched thirsts of those inside.\n\nThe Secret Service would not allow metal bottles inside, but plastic disposable water bottles are OK â even if they are filled with water (unlike at airports).","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-2024-wm-543p-475ab2.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52555"},"headline":"Protester describes moment some entered the breached security area","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52555","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:46:25.840Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:50:30.673Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Justin Cheong was among the protesters who quickly dipped into the street barrier that became exposed after some protesters tore down security fencing at Park 578 today.\n\nCheong said he and some other protesters went inside what had been a protected buffer street for a few minutes and chanted, âBiden, Harris, you canât hide, stop funding the genocide.â\n\nâThen we left and went on with the route,â he said.\n\nCheong, who said he didnât know who was responsible for tearing down the security fencing, said the moment of defiance made him feel âmore connected to the intifadaâ â a word that refers to the Palestiniansâ uprising against Israel.\n\nHe said he was emboldened by being even closer to the United Center and chanting at DNC attendees inside an arena several hundred yards away.\n\nâThey had to listen and not take us for granted,â he said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-protest-justin-cheong-ac-841p-52ca10.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52556"},"headline":"Speaker reads from giant Project 2025 book, saying 'that is not how it works in America.'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52556","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:45:32.932Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:59:32.879Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"}],"articleBody":"Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow is speaking, and she has a giant book titled \"Project 2025\" with her, calling it \"the Republican blueprint for a second Trump term.\"\n\n\"That's right, they went ahead and wrote down all the extreme things that Donald Trump wants to do in the next four years, and then they just tweeted it out, putting it out on the internet for everybody to read,\" McMorrow said. \"So we read it.\"\n\nMcMorrow flipped to a page in the book, saying she wanted to tell the crowd about Project 2025's plan to \"turn Donald Trump into a dictator.\"\n\n\"They're talking about replacing the entire federal government with an army of loyalists who answer only to Donald Trump,\" she said. \"Under Project 2025 Donald Trump would be able to weaponize the Department of Justice to go after his political opponents. He could even turn the FBI into his own personal police force.\"\n\n\"That is not how it works in America,\" McMorrow said to cheers.\n\nMcMorrow concluded by saying she would return the next night to explain what Project 2025 would mean for people's pocketbooks.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_1920x1080-ozn3ek.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52551"},"headline":"Four state politicians vouch for Democrats' impact on their states","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52551","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:45:05.221Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T01:07:57.570Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Four state politicians took the stage to vouch for the Biden-Harris administrationâs impact on their states. \n\nPennsylvania Lt. Gov. Austin Davis focused on infrastructure, arguing that Harris is âlooking forwardâ and \"committed to keeping our infrastructure safe and modern.â\n\nWisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez, a former nurse and health care executive, focused her remarks on the Harris-Walz health agenda. \n\nRodriguez touted Harris' support for women's reproductive rights, her pledges to protect Medicare and Medicare and the Biden administration's cap on the price of insulin for seniors.\n\n\"It's about freedom, the freedom to make your own choices and the freedom to get the care you need without worrying about the cost. Kamala Harris is fighting for that healthy future,\" Rodriguez said.\n\nLina Hidalgo, the judge, or executive, of Harris County, Texas, touted the Biden-Harris administration's work to address extreme weather and climate change. She also said that when the Texas power grid went dark, Harris called her personally to make sure Texans had what they needed.\n\nCalifornia Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis recounted her friendship with Harris and told a story about Harris' giving her advice when she dealt with sexism in the workplace. ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_1920x1080-q87gf5.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52546"},"headline":"L.A mayor touts Harris' commitment to next generation","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52546","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:35:26.864Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:41:38.861Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"Harris and Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass have a lot of things in common, starting with their shared history of shattering ceilings. Both ascended to be the first women to hold their respective offices, and both did so while championing the next generation of leaders, Bass said. \n\n\"Kamala knows that each generation has an obligation to the next,\" Bass said.\n\nWhen Bass was speaker of the California Assembly and Harris was a prosecutor, they fought to address youth homelessness and reform the child welfare system, she said. When Harris was state attorney general, she supported reforms to the juvenile justice system that are still in place today.\n\n\"You can feel her heart, and you can feel her fearlessness,\" Bass went on.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-karen-bass-ac-1159p__552774-x67wme.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52547"},"headline":"Country singer Mickey Guyton performs","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52547","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:33:04.139Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:41:10.787Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Michelle Garcia","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_14/3644400/240407-michelle-garcia-byline-headshot-vl-322p.jpg","description":"Michelle Garcia is the editorial director of NBCBLK","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/michelle-garcia-ncpn1237383"}],"articleBody":"Country singer Mickey Guyton sang \"All American,\" a unity anthem.\n\n\"James Brown and James Dean,\" the song goes. \"Weâre cold beer, champagne, millionaires, spare some change. ... Ain't we all American?\"\n\nGuyton grew up in Texas listening to her grandma play Dolly Parton and decided to pursue country music after she heard LeAnn Rimes sing the national anthem at a Texas Rangers baseball game when she was 8 years old. \n\nGuytonâs career didnât gain the momentum she wanted it to, which she largely attributes to her being held to a different set of standards as a Black woman in the industry.\n\nâI had heard so many noes. Iâd heard people say, âOh, I donât know if you can do that.â âYou canât sing that.â âThatâs a little too pop,ââ Guyton told NBC News in 2020. âMeanwhile, Iâm seeing all these dudes with trap beats and R&B melodies in their songs, making all this money and selling out tours, but Iâm not allowed to do that.â\n\nGuyton signed with Capitol Records in 2011, becoming the only Black female country artist signed to a major label. However, she didn't have her breakout moment until 2020 after she released âBlack Like Meâ in the wake of the death of George Floyd.\n\nSheâs made a name for herself since then, blazing a trail as a Black country star in Nashville. \n\nFor more on Guyton, check our 2020 profile. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52545"},"headline":"After security incident, police superintendent says: âIâm not going to associate this with the march as a wholeâ ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52545","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:29:29.695Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:42:24.371Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniella Silva","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2019_29/2934766/190619-daniella-silva-byline2558.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Daniella Silva is a national reporter for NBC News, focusing on immigration and education.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have traveled to the U.S.-Mexico border, as well as Mexico and Venezuela, for on-the-ground coverage of immigration. I have covered multiple natural disasters, traveling to Puerto Rico to cover Hurricanes Maria and Fiona and the Bahamas to cover Hurricane Dorian. Recently, Iâve reported from New York, Chicago and Denver to cover how those cities are dealing with an increase of migrants who were bused in from Texas beginning in 2022. I have also written about how the pandemic affected education around the country and how schools dealt with and attempted to recover from the unprecedented disruption in schooling. I have been with NBC News since 2013.","award":"I received a Deadline Club Award in 2021 in the category âNewspaper or Digital Enterprise Reportingâ for âLured to America â then trapped,â an investigation into abuses of a federal visa program for temporary farm workers that left legal workers vulnerable to labor trafficking and other abuse with little oversight.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211","sameAs":["https://x.com/DaniellaLSilva"]}],"articleBody":"Chicago's top cop said tonight that while the police department was ânot going to tolerateâ vandalism and acts of violence after a small group of protesters breached a security barrier and encountered police, âIâm not going to associate this with the march as a whole.â\n\nâYou have people who just wanted to have their voices heard,â Police Superintendent Larry Snelling said.\n\nâThey did that, but you had a portion of that group who decided that they were going to stand behind and breach the fence and try to get to the other side â and we cannot let that happen,â he said.\n\nHe said officers âresponded swiftlyâ to make sure the group of protesters was not able to reach the inner perimeter separating them from the arena where the convention is taking place.\n\nâWe have no idea what they would have done if they had gotten onto the other side, but as I said before, weâre not going to tolerate anyone who is going to vandalize things in our city,â Snelling said. âWeâre not going to tolerate anyone who is going to commit acts of violence, and we will act swiftly on that. As you saw today, our officers acted professionally.â\n\nâOur job here is to make sure that we keep the DNC safe, keep our city safe and keep our people safe,â he said. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52543"},"headline":"'Union Yes!': Labor leaders rally behind Harris-Walz ticket","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52543","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:19:24.687Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:42:53.880Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"The heads of some of the country's largest and most influential labor unions took the stage tonight to tout the economic agenda and accomplishments of the Biden-Harris administration and rail against Trump, painting him as a foe of organized labor.\n\nTrump's appeal to working-class voters has been key to his political appeal since his 2016 campaign, but Democrats have been aggressively courting union members this cycle, championing populist economic policies and workers' rights.\n\nLabor leaders at tonight's convention session included:\n\nLee Saunders,Â president of the American Federation of State, County, and Municipal EmployeesApril Verrett, president of the Service Employees International UnionBrent Booker, general president of the Laborersâ International Union of North AmericaKenneth Cooper, international president of the International Brotherhood of Electrical WorkersClaude Cummings Jr., president of the Communications Workers of AmericaElizabeth Shuler,Â president of the AFL-CIO\n\nNoticeably absent: Teamsters head Sean O'Brien, who gave a fiery speech at the Republican National Convention last month assailing corporatism. O'Brien has not endorsed a candidate in the presidential race.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724113880756_f_mo_dnc_union_leaders_240819_1920x1080-5jgwf0.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52541"},"headline":"Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest ends peacefully where it began","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52541","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:11:55.464Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:38:11.677Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"While the situation that unfolded in Park 578 stole a lot of attention from the Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest, the march continued beyond the park afterward and ended peacefully where it started: in Union Park.\n\nAfter it became clear at Park 578 that a breakaway group of protesters was looking to tear down security fencing, organizers urged demonstrators to exit the park and continue on the march route.\n\nMost did.
