After leaving Park 578, marchers walked for another 45 minutes, chanting pro-Palestinian messages. They returned to Union Park around 5:45 p.m. local time, just a bit later than they had planned, and ended the day with speeches.\n\nDespite the chaos at Park 578, organizers said they were pleased with how things went.\n\nâExtremely happyâ is how Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the coalitionâs main organizers, put it.\n\nAbudayyeh and other organizers said they believe the people responsible for the violent behavior in Park 578 were not part of any of the groups involved with the coalition.\n\nâI have no idea who those people were,â Abudayyeh said.\n\nHe acknowledged that the protest dwindled after Park 578 and that it lost numbers during the melee after people âscattered,â but he said, âWe still came back to Union Park in big numbers.â\n\nBy 6:45 local time, a few hundred protesters remained in Union Park, mostly celebrating the protest and cleaning up.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52540"},"headline":"Rep. Joyce Beatty says Democrats have helped Ohio more than Vance has","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52540","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:11:04.352Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:26:51.119Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Joyce Beatty, D-Ohio, criticized Vance, saying he \"ran away\" from his home state to go to Yale and Silicon Valley the moment he could.\n\nShe argued that Trump and Vance like to \"talk about states like Ohio\" but that \"Kamala and Joe actually get stuff done for us.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Joyce-Beatty-ac-1052p-kn2joa.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52539"},"headline":"Sen. Dick Durbin says Trump is 'like a bad boss'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52539","datePublished":"2024-08-20T00:06:28.360Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:28:33.314Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Sen. Dick Durbin, D-Ill., said in his convention remarks that Trump had promised to bring back manufacturing jobs and to deliver infrastructure \"but he failed.\"\n\n\"His record was defined by failure. To put it another way, Donald Trump is like a bad boss. You want time off to take care of your sick parents? Ask Donald Trump. Denied. In Donald Trump's America, there is no paid family leave. Want to have a child but need IVF? Too bad; that's shut down. ... Want a pay raise? Too bad; the boss just gave himself one, so there's nothing left for you.\"\n\nDurbin quipped that Trump did make history and should be given credit: \"He is one of only two presidents in the history of the United States to leave office with fewer Americans working than when he started.\"\n\nHe then praised the Biden administration's record, saying, \"Today, more roads are getting fixed, more factories are being built, more Americans are working construction, and more autoworkers are making cars than on any month when Trump was president.\"\n\nDurbin said Harris and Walz would \"fight for the places that are too often left behind.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-dick-durbin-ac-1159p__881045-5xfeub.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52533"},"headline":"Rep. Robert Garcia recalls Harris conversation after his parents died of Covid","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52533","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:56:03.017Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:05:30.781Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"ZoÃ« Richards","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"ZoÃ« Richards is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously covered breaking news at The Daily Beast and Talking Points Memo.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151","sameAs":["https://x.com/zarichards"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Robert Garcia, D-Calif., tonight talked about how Harris called him after his mother and stepfather died from Covid.\n\n\"I will never forget when Kamala Harris called me after my parents died,\" Garcia said. \"She told me about her own story, about losing her own mother, and that she was praying for me at that very moment.\"\n\nGarcia criticized Trump over his handling of the virus, pointing to his suggestion that the âinjectionâ of disinfectant might help clean the lungs and defeat the virus.\n\nGarcia also described his experience immigrating to the U.S. as a young child.\n\n\"Iâll never forget the day that I became a United States citizen. I raised my right hand and I pledge an oath to protect and to love this country. It was the proudest day of my life,\" Garcia said, adding that his mother instilled in him the notion that true patriotism \"is not about screaming and yelling America first.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-robert-garcia-ac-1006p__826562-eu0gvc.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52535"},"headline":"Ex-MAGA commentator calls on Republicans to leave 'MAGA echo chamber'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52535","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:54:46.680Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:01:19.102Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"Rich Logis once styled himself as an \"ultra-MAGA\" conservative commentator and Trump defender. He started a pro-Trump podcast, wrote for conservative media outlets and regularly assailed liberal Democrats.\n\nBut as Logis told Democratic delegates in a recorded video tonight, he \"finally stepped outside the MAGA echo chamber\" and \"looked around with my own eyes.\" He determined that Trump was a serial liar who failed the country in the early months of the Covid crisis.\n\nLogis, speaking straight to the camera, delivered a pointed message to \"all the Republicans and independents\" watching the convention: \"I made a grave mistake, but it's never too late to change your mind.\"\n\nHe called on anti-Trump Republicans and independents to vote for the Harris-Walz ticket.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52537"},"headline":"4 arrests made after security breach during March on the DNC protest","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52537","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:53:42.077Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:02:02.649Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniella Silva","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2019_29/2934766/190619-daniella-silva-byline2558.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Daniella Silva is a national reporter for NBC News, focusing on immigration and education.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have traveled to the U.S.-Mexico border, as well as Mexico and Venezuela, for on-the-ground coverage of immigration. I have covered multiple natural disasters, traveling to Puerto Rico to cover Hurricanes Maria and Fiona and the Bahamas to cover Hurricane Dorian. Recently, Iâve reported from New York, Chicago and Denver to cover how those cities are dealing with an increase of migrants who were bused in from Texas beginning in 2022. I have also written about how the pandemic affected education around the country and how schools dealt with and attempted to recover from the unprecedented disruption in schooling. I have been with NBC News since 2013.","award":"I received a Deadline Club Award in 2021 in the category âNewspaper or Digital Enterprise Reportingâ for âLured to America â then trapped,â an investigation into abuses of a federal visa program for temporary farm workers that left legal workers vulnerable to labor trafficking and other abuse with little oversight.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211","sameAs":["https://x.com/DaniellaLSilva"]}],"articleBody":"Four people were arrested after the security breach during the March on the DNC protest this evening, Tom Ahern, the deputy director of communications for the Chicago Police Department, told NBC Chicago. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52532"},"headline":"Covid takes a turn at center stage, but at a very early hour","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52532","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:53:05.389Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:03:38.400Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Ben Kamisar","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653062/240627-ben-kamisar.jpg","jobTitle":"National Politics Reporter","description":"Ben Kamisar is a national political reporter for NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously worked as the deputy political editor at NBC News and a campaign reporter at The Hill newspaper in Washington, D.C. Prior to that, I covered Texas politics for The Dallas Morning News and the Austin American-Statesman. A Connecticut native, I graduated from Northwestern University and live in Washington, D.C.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986","sameAs":["https://x.com/bkamisar"]}],"articleBody":"It's rare to see a political discussion about Covid policy these days. Most Americans clearly want to turn the page, and the debate over pandemic response is a thorny one for both sides that usually has them on the defensive (Democrats over accusations that some of their policies infringed too much on personal freedoms and Republicans over the effort by many in their party to downplay the pandemic's impact and to cast doubt on the efficacy of vaccines). \n\nThat's why Monday's part of convention programming devoted to the Covid pandemic stuck out, showing how Democrats could try to go on offense on the issue if they chose to. \n\nMinnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan gave remarks with a nod to her brother, who she said was the \"second person to die of Covid in the state of Tennessee,\" remembering how she couldn't hold a proper memorial for him. \n\n\"Our communities were suffering, our economy was struggling, and Donald Trump was playing games. Our country was brought to the brink by his failure to respond, but the Biden-Harris administration stepped in,\" she said. \n\nShortly after, the convention played a video featuring a series of comments by Trump downplaying the risk of the virus, floating the possibility of injecting disinfectant and tangling with an Axios reporter before saying: \"They are dying, it's true. It is what it is.\" \n\nThe video then pivots to Harris declaring that \"help is on the way,\" outlining the Biden-Harris administration's vaccine rollout and the return to normal that came with it for public life and businesses. \n\nIt's a road map for how Democrats could try to prosecute the Covid case against Trump and for their candidate if they want to. But it's also worth noting this discussion came before 8 p.m. ET, well before the prime-time coverage begins.  ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52525"},"headline":"Rep. Lauren Underwood: Trump 'failed us' on Covid","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52525","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:45:36.156Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:05:57.717Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Lauren Underwood, D-Ill., drew a contrast between the Trump administration's response to Covid and that of the Biden-Harris White House in her convention remarks.\n\nShe said that Trump \"failed us\" on Covid but that the Biden-Harris administration \"got it under control.\" She also argued that Trump turned Covid \"into a catastrophe.\"\n\nUnderwood drew on her experience as a registered nurse and brought up that she had a pre-existing condition. She also highlighted that she was the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, noting that she was \"painfully aware\" that Black women \"were more likely to die from Covid.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-lauren-underwood-ac-955p__865244-1n7fp0.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52528"},"headline":"Minnesotaâs lieutenant governor describes 'historic night,' praises Walz","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52528","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:44:30.797Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:04:27.666Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"ZoÃ« Richards","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"ZoÃ« Richards is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously covered breaking news at The Daily Beast and Talking Points Memo.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151","sameAs":["https://x.com/zarichards"]}],"articleBody":"Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan heralded the convention's kickoff as a \"historic night\" in her convention speech tonight.\n\n\"We remember those who came before us, who fought and prayed this moment into existence, the suffragists and the abolitionists, the activists who fought for our rights, the leader who â the leaders who â paved the way for us,\" Flanagan said. \"Their memory reminds us that the fight for freedom always passes from one generation to the next.\" \n\nFlanagan, who also paid homage to her Native American heritage, spoke fondly of Walz, whom she said she had worked with for nearly six years, describing him as a public servant who \"does it all with a big heart, a buffalo plaid jacket and a bottomless bag of snacks, Nutter Butters, cheese curds and diet Dew.\" \n\n\"Any time we meet, he brings something for me, because heâs always got my back, and when heâs vice president, he will always have yours,\" she added.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52529"},"headline":"DNC won't formally vote to nominate Harris or Walz because it was done virtually ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52529","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:39:47.175Z","dateModified":"2024-08-20T00:53:01.044Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"There won't be a formal roll call vote at the convention this week to nominate Harris for president because delegates had done so virtually earlier this month. Instead, the Rules Committee chair re-affirmed their nominations tonight.\n\nTuesdayâs nominationÂ rollÂ callÂ votes will also include both in-person and remote elements designed to highlight the diversity of the party.\n\nAccording to the convention organizers, theÂ rollÂ callÂ will begin with Delaware, as a tribute to  Biden, and end with California and Minnesota, home states of  Harris and Walz, respectively. There will be a âdiverse mix of storytellersâ participating in the delegation-by-delegation voting, some in person and some at remote sites. (Remember âCalamari Guyâ from Rhode Island four years ago?)\n\nNote that the convention isÂ calling this a âceremonialâ and âcelebratoryâÂ rollÂ call, after they held a virtualÂ rollÂ callÂ to make Harris the official nominee that concluded earlier this month..","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52530"},"headline":"U.S. confirms Trump campaign claim it was breached by Iranian hackers ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52530","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:38:36.898Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:40:55.672Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Kevin Collier","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665021/241008-kevin-collier.jpg","description":"Kevin Collier is a reporter covering cybersecurity, privacy and technology policy for NBC News.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/kevin-collier-ncpn1110251"}],"articleBody":"The U.S. government has formally endorsed Trumpâs claim that Iran hacked his campaign.\n\nIn aÂ joint statementÂ today, the FBI, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence said Iran was behind attempts this year to hack presidential campaigns of both political parties.\n\nThe same hackers were alleged by Google to have targeted the Biden-Harris campaign before President Joe Biden ended his run for re-election, but itâs not clear whether they were breached. Democratic nominee Kamala Harrisâ campaign previously said it had no indication it was hacked.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Committee co-chair jokes the panel is a ladder for promotion","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52527","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:30:23.134Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:38:20.945Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"A Rules Committee co-chair, Bishop Leah Daughtry,Â joked in her remarks that Walz is a \"little occupied this evening\" but said, \"It's good to know that serving as co-chair of the Rules Committee is a ladder for promotion.\"\n\nWalz was a co-chair of the convention Rules Committee before Harris selected him to be her running mate.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52523"},"headline":"Rep. Maxine Waters pays tribute to civil rights icon","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52523","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:26:29.648Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:51:25.347Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"Rep. Maxine Waters, D-Calif., invoked the memory of Fannie Lou Hamer, a civil rights leader who took a group of Black delegates to the 1964 Democratic convention in Atlantic City, New Jersey.\n\nWaters said Hammer was 22 years old when she arrived with the group from Mississippi. She told the people in the room about the violence she endured at the hands of police when she demanded the right to vote. When she asked the convention, \"Is this America?\" she did not get the answer she hoped for, Waters said.\n\nSixty years later, as Democrats prepare to nominate the country's first Black woman to be the party's nominee, Hamer's legacy can serve as a reminder of how far we've come, Waters said.\n\n\"We will be able to ask ourselves, 'Is this America?' And we will be able to say loudly and proudly â 'Youâre damn right it is.'\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724110659267_f_mo_dnc_maxine_hamer_240819_1920x1080-ydst83.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52524"},"headline":"Jesse Jackson greets crowd surrounded by civil rights leaders","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52524","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:21:29.709Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:40:27.249Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"The Rev. Jesse Jackson, an icon of the American civil rights movement and a former Democratic presidential contender, took the stage to sustained applause and standing ovations.\n\nJackson, 82, was seated in a wheelchair and accompanied by other prominent Black leaders, including the Rev. Al Sharpton (who hosts a show on MSNBC) and NAACP President Derrick Johnson.\n\nJackson did not deliver remarks, but he smiled and waved to the crowd. He appeared after a short video highlighting the party's legacy on civil rights.\n\nJackson and Biden were both presidential candidates in the 1988 Democratic presidential primaries. Jackson came in third in the primaries; Biden dropped out before voting started amid accusations of plagiarism. ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-jesse-jackson-ac-944p__079131-kyr838.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52521"},"headline":"NAACP president says he's here to do his 'Black job'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52521","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:18:00.296Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:49:14.465Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"NAACP President Derrick Johnson began his convention remarks by taking a dig at one of Trump's recent remarks.\n\n\"I'm here to do my Black job,\" Johnson said.\n\n\"We must all understand Black history is American history. And in this historic moment, we will write the next chapter together,\" he said.\n\nDuring the June presidential debate, Trump said of immigrants: \"Theyâre taking Black jobs, and theyâre taking Hispanic jobs, and you havenât seen it yet, but youâre going to see something thatâs going to be the worst in our history.â\n\nMelanie Campbell, president and CEO of the National Coalition on Black Civic Participation, said tonight, \"We have come this far by faith, and for Black women, this moment has been a long time coming.\"\n\nCampbell said that Harris' path to the nomination was paved by Black women like Shirley Chisholm, Ella Baker and Diane Nash.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-derrick-johnson-ac-951p-hxmmqy.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52520"},"headline":"Delegate buses arriving at the DNC delayed by protests; outer security perimeter breached","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52520","datePublished":"2024-08-19T23:06:41.924Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:41:57.783Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Freddie Tunnard"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"}],"articleBody":"The buses bringing delegates to the Democratic National Convention this evening were delayed by protests, according to a DNC official riding one of the buses.\n\nDemonstrators breached part of the anti-scaling fencing on the outer perimeter near the United Center, the DNC Public Safety Joint Information Center said in a joint statement. \n\n\"Law enforcement personnel were immediately on-scene and contained the situation,\" the statement read. \"At no point was the inner perimeter breached, and there was no threat to any protectees.\"\n\nPer the statement, there are multiple \"redundancies\" in the security plan, one of which is the outer perimeter.\n\n\"The Chicago Police Department remains on-scene and is working to clear the area,\" the statement read.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52518"},"headline":"Tribal leaders begin night of speeches by praising Biden-Harris administration","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52518","datePublished":"2024-08-19T22:49:29.942Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:43:23.847Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"A pair of leaders from the Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation Tribal CouncilÂ began the night of speeches by praising the Biden-Harris administration for what it did to help their people reclaim land. \n\nZach Pahmahmi, vice chair of the council, said that in 1849, an illegal auction by the U.S. government forcibly removed the tribe from its homeland. \n\n\"Since then, we have been working to reclaim it. Finally, this year, the Department of the Interior placed some of our ancestral lands west of Chicago into a trust,\" he said. \"Thanks to the resolve of our tribal community and the Biden-Harris administration, we reclaimed a piece of our home. We became the only federally recognized tribal nation in Illinois in 175 years.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52517"},"headline":"DNC starts 15 minutes late","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52517","datePublished":"2024-08-19T22:38:00.743Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:44:34.949Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"The convention is officially kicking off, albeit 15 minutes late, with remarks by convention Chair Minyon Moore and Democratic National Committee Chairman Jaime Harrison. \n\nIn her opening remarks, Moore paid tribute to Biden in \"passing the torch\" to Harris as the presumptive party nominee.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Jaime-R-Harrison-Minyon-Moore-ew-644p-44f87e.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52495"},"headline":"Harris proposes raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, rolling back a Trump law ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52495","datePublished":"2024-08-19T22:35:00.114Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:10:39.667Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Sahil Kapur","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_09/3640450/sahil_hs.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Political Reporter","description":"Sahil Kapur is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I graduated with a B.A. in economics and government from Claremont McKenna College. In Washington, I got my start as a health care policy reporter for multiple publications and most recently worked at Bloomberg News, covering politics and a variety of policy issues. I've also appeared on CBS, ABC, Fox News, CNN, PBS and NPR to discuss my reporting.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791","sameAs":["https://x.com/sahilkapur"]}],"articleBody":"CHICAGO â Vice President Kamala Harris is calling for raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, her first major proposal to raise revenues and finance expensive plans she wants to pursue as president.\n\nHarris campaign spokesman James Singer told NBC News that she would push for a 28% corporate tax rate, calling it âa fiscally responsible way to put money back in the pockets of working people and ensure billionaires and big corporations pay their fair share.â\n\nâAs President, Kamala Harris will focus on creating an opportunity economy for the middle class that advances their economic security, stability, and dignity,â Singer wrote in an email.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240816-harris-ch-1531-6f67de.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52515"},"headline":"TrumpÂ says he will release his medical records","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52515","datePublished":"2024-08-19T22:27:23.520Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T23:11:59.535Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"Trump told a CBS news reporter tonight that he plans to release his medical records. \n\nThe Republican presidential nominee, who has not released a medical report since the attempt on his life last month, made the commitment during an interview in Pennsylvania, where he is campaigning.\n\nâYou will release your medical records to the public?â CBS News reporter Caitlin Huey-Burns asked the former president.Â \n\nTrump replied: âOh, sure, I would do that very gladly, sure.\"\n\nHe said he just had a medical exam and received a \"perfect score,\" as well as two cognitive tests, which he said he \"aced.\"\n\nTrump has faced pressure to release his medical records throughout the election cycle. He did not specify when or how he would transmit the records to the public. ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52513"},"headline":"Police make at least one arrest after some protesters breached a barricade and refused to leave","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52513","datePublished":"2024-08-19T22:06:14.296Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T22:22:36.803Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniella Silva","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2019_29/2934766/190619-daniella-silva-byline2558.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Daniella Silva is a national reporter for NBC News, focusing on immigration and education.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have traveled to the U.S.-Mexico border, as well as Mexico and Venezuela, for on-the-ground coverage of immigration. I have covered multiple natural disasters, traveling to Puerto Rico to cover Hurricanes Maria and Fiona and the Bahamas to cover Hurricane Dorian. Recently, Iâve reported from New York, Chicago and Denver to cover how those cities are dealing with an increase of migrants who were bused in from Texas beginning in 2022. I have also written about how the pandemic affected education around the country and how schools dealt with and attempted to recover from the unprecedented disruption in schooling. I have been with NBC News since 2013.","award":"I received a Deadline Club Award in 2021 in the category âNewspaper or Digital Enterprise Reportingâ for âLured to America â then trapped,â an investigation into abuses of a federal visa program for temporary farm workers that left legal workers vulnerable to labor trafficking and other abuse with little oversight.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211","sameAs":["https://x.com/DaniellaLSilva"]}],"articleBody":"Police with helmets and batons approached a group of breakaway protesters demonstrating outside the DNC venue in Chicago.Â \n\nThey ordered the protesters who breached the barricade to leave. Dozens did, but dozens remained and were pushed to the left and crushed upon by police in riot gear.\n\nSome protesters threw signs at the riot police while the riot police continued to advance on the group of several dozen protesters. After that, it appeared police made at least one arrest.\n\nPolice cleared the entire area between both barriers, but protesters on the outside continued to yell at riot police and continued to attempt to take down the gates.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-police-se-552p-bf58a2.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52459"},"headline":"How Harris built her political network as vice president ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52459","datePublished":"2024-08-19T22:00:35.027Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T22:03:26.333Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Jonathan Allen","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653033/230226-jonathan-allen.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Politics Reporter","description":"Jonathan Allen is a senior national politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"I am a co-author of three books on politics â \"HRC,\" \"Shattered\" and \"Lucky\" âÂ  a former Washington bureau chief for Bloomberg News and a former White House bureau chief for Politico. Before those gigs, I spent more than a decade covering Capitol Hill for Congressional Quarterly, The Hill and Politico. In addition to reporting and writing books, I am an adjunct professor at Northwestern University. I appear frequently on MSNBC and News Now.","award":"I am a recipient of the National Press Foundation's Everett McKinley Dirksen Award and the National Press Club's Sandy Hume Award.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jonathan-allen-ncpn802641","sameAs":["https://www.instagram.com/jonallendc","https://x.com/jonallendc"]}],"articleBody":"Before she became the presumptive Democratic nominee for president, there was a perception of HarrisÂ among party elites and Washington insiders that she might not have what it takes to mobilize voters.\n\nHer approval ratings were low. Sheâd been criticized not just by Republicans, but also by fellow Democrats, for miscues in her early days in the No. 2 job in government. She couldnât keep staff.\n\nBut while the Beltway set cemented its take on her, Harris builtÂ a formidable political network across the country and online. Her direct engagement with tens of thousands of political activists and voters â particularly through a tour of college campuses, events promoting reproductive rights and pushing an economic-empowerment agenda tilted toward the Black community â positioned Harris toÂ energize her party when she was tapped to top the ticket.\n\nIn other words, there was a ready core of Harris supporters ready to jump into action.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52510"},"headline":"James Taylor to close out first night of DNC","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52510","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:54:29.685Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:58:42.971Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alicia Victoria Lozano","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","disambiguatingDescription":"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ","award":"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","sameAs":["https://x.com/aliciavlozano"]}],"articleBody":"Legendary singer-songwriter and self-described \"lifelong Democrat\" James Taylor is slated to perform Monday night following first lady Jill Biden's address. \n\nTaylor played at the DNC in 2012 when then President Barack Obama ran for a second term. Speaking to reporters after his performance, Taylor said supporting Democrats has been a big part of his life and career.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC
