officers form wall to block breakaway protesters ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52512","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:53:49.960Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:53:49.960Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Police were closing in on a breakaway group after some protesters took down a barrier and crossed it, putting them a block away from the DNC arena.\n\nProtest organizers continued to attempt to usher people out of the area and back onto the marchâs planned route â but they were unsuccessful.\n\nIn the area between two barricades distancing the protesters from the arena, a group of several dozen police officers have emerged and have formed a wall of bodies apparently designed to prevent the protesters from advancing forward.\n\nThe official march then began walkingÂ again. It appearred to be an effort by organizers to move the growing crowd away from the barricades. The effort was not successful as the breakaway group of protesters locked arms and was in a stand off with police.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52508"},"headline":"NBA great Steve Kerr on the speakers lineup tonight","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52508","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:45:03.998Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:45:03.998Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniel Arkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior Reporter","description":"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","sameAs":["https://x.com/d_arkin"]}],"articleBody":"Fresh off winning an Olympic gold medal, Golden State Warriors coach and nine-time NBA champion Steve Kerr is slated to address the convention tonight, according to a program schedule.\n\nKerr, who has endorsed the Harris-Walz ticket, frequently uses his public platform to weigh in on political issues. He has criticized Trump for incendiary comments about women and people of color. He has lobbied for tighter federal gun control measures and advocated for racial justice.\n\nChicago happens to be symbolically meaningful for Kerr, who won three NBA championships as a player on the Chicago Bulls. \n\nKerr most recently coached the U.S. men's basketball team to its fifth consecutive gold medal at the Paris Olympics. He is slated to speak before remarks from United Automobile Workers president Shawn Fain and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52509"},"headline":"Protesters take down part of barrier separating march from DNC arena","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52509","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:40:05.966Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T22:25:20.745Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Selina Guevara","jobTitle":"Associate producer","description":"Selina Guevara is an NBC News field producer, based in Chicago.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/selina-guevara-ncpn1302441","sameAs":["https://x.com/selinaguevaraTV"]}],"articleBody":"After aggressively shaking the security barrier on the southern edge of Park #578 â the last point of the park before a parking lot adjacent to the United Center â a few dozen protesters have taken down part of the barrier.\n\nProtesters have climbed up a jersey barrier and continue to jostle the security fence loose. Several dozen police are looking on.\n\nProtesters have now entered through the barrier into a street. On the other side of the street is another barrier. Police are on the other side of that barrier.\n\nWest Washington Blvd was protected on both sides by security fences to serve as a buffer between Park 578 and the United Center where the DNC is taking place.\n\nThe group of protesters took down the fencing on the south side of the street and took over that protected street.\n\nMarch organizers are demanding that the protesters who have taken down the barriers stop their activity and continue marching.\n\nTwo protesters are now throwing bottles of water over the second fence at police officers.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52460"},"headline":"Prosecutors defer to judge on Trump sentencing delay in hush money case","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52460","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:21:10.386Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:26:24.492Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Dareh Gregorian","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2019_27/2923711/190612-dareh_gregorian-byline-30871.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Dareh Gregorian is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve worked at the New York Post and Daily News, where I mainly covered courts and major breaking news events, including the 9/11 terror attack and its aftermath.","award":"I've been a part of teams that have won numerous awards from the New York Associated Press Association for in-depth, spot and online reporting.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/dareh-gregorian-ncpn925686","sameAs":["https://x.com/darehgregorian"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Lisa Rubin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_30/3564290/lisa_rubin_bw.jpg","description":"Lisa Rubin is a senior legal reporter at MSNBC and a former litigator. Previously, she was the off-air legal analyst for âThe Rachel Maddow Showâ and âAlex Wagner Tonight.âÂ ","url":"https://www.msnbc.com/author/lisa-rubin-ncpn1134441","sameAs":["https://x.com/lawofruby"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Laura Jarrett","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_07/3638982/240215-laura-jarrett-headshot-mb-1422.jpg","description":"Laura Jarrett is a senior legal correspondent for NBC News.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/laura-jarrett-ncpn1302443"}],"articleBody":"Prosecutors from the Manhattan district attorneyâs office said today they will defer to the judge on former President Donald Trumpâs bid to delay, until after the election, his sentencing on falsifying business records charges.\n\nThe sentencing hearing is scheduled for Sept. 18 â two days after New York state Judge Juan Merchan is expected to rule on Trumpâs motion to toss out his conviction in May in light of the U.S. Supreme Courtâs decision on presidential immunity in a different case. \n\nProsecutors said they would âdefer to the Court on the appropriate post-trial schedule that allows for adequate time to adjudicate defendantâs CPL Â§ 330.30 motion while also pronouncing sentence âwithout unreasonable delay,ââ referring to Trumpâs motion to set aside the verdict.\n\nThey noted that Trumpâs request is about evidentiary issues, not immunity from prosecution, and that the Supreme Court did not address whether evidentiary rulings that touch on immunity are immediately appealable. \n\nThey also flagged that the logistical and security measures the court would have to take to prepare for Trumpâs sentencing could be upended if, as Trump has suggested he would, he seeks appellate intervention right after Merchan rules on Sept. 16 on the request to set aside the verdict.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52506"},"headline":"In walk-through ahead of convention speech, Biden says this is a 'memorable moment' ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52506","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:14:40.631Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:27:10.958Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"In a walk-through of the convention hall this afternoon, Biden briefly responded to shouted questions from reporters as he stood at the podium onstage.\n\nAsked if it was a bittersweet moment for him, Biden said, \"It's a memorable moment.\" \n\nAnd when asked what he makes of Trump's claims that Biden was pushed out of the presidential race in what amounts to a coup, the president said, âHis stability is still in question.\"\n\nBiden also said he is also ready to pass the torch to Harris, saying, \"I am.\" ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52505"},"headline":"Protester at march: 'Weâre trying to help you, Kamala'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52505","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:12:51.897Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:58:36.289Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Sean Parmelee, 36, is marching with a sign that reads, âWeâre trying to help you, Kamala.â\n\nHe means it earnestly.\n\nâIâm voting for her â but many people here are not,â said Parmelee, a Chicago resident. âHonestly, she is making it very hard for them.â\n\nâLook at all this energy. She can have it all if she chooses,â he said.\n\nParmelee said heâs protesting because pushing for a cease-fire and an arms embargo with Israel âis the right thing to do.â\n\nâAnd itâs the right strategy for Kamala Harris,â he said.\n\nAs Parmelee spoke, a protest organizer wielding a megaphone led the crowd in a loud chant of, âHarris, Harris, what do you say, how many kids have you killed today?â","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protester-Sean-Parmelee-se-507p-8bc5fa.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC a block away from the DNC arena ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52504","datePublished":"2024-08-19T21:08:31.708Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:11:32.985Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Daniella Silva","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2019_29/2934766/190619-daniella-silva-byline2558.jpg","jobTitle":"National Reporter","description":"Daniella Silva is a national reporter for NBC News, focusing on immigration and education.","disambiguatingDescription":"I have traveled to the U.S.-Mexico border, as well as Mexico and Venezuela, for on-the-ground coverage of immigration. I have covered multiple natural disasters, traveling to Puerto Rico to cover Hurricanes Maria and Fiona and the Bahamas to cover Hurricane Dorian. Recently, Iâve reported from New York, Chicago and Denver to cover how those cities are dealing with an increase of migrants who were bused in from Texas beginning in 2022. I have also written about how the pandemic affected education around the country and how schools dealt with and attempted to recover from the unprecedented disruption in schooling. I have been with NBC News since 2013.","award":"I received a Deadline Club Award in 2021 in the category âNewspaper or Digital Enterprise Reportingâ for âLured to America â then trapped,â an investigation into abuses of a federal visa program for temporary farm workers that left legal workers vulnerable to labor trafficking and other abuse with little oversight.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211","sameAs":["https://x.com/DaniellaLSilva"]}],"articleBody":"The march reached park #578, just one city block from the United Center, the home of the official DNC proceedings this week.\n\nProtesters are now technically within âsight and soundâ of the arena â which had been their goal during the arduous rounds of litigation with the city of Chicago to determine the march route.\n\nProtesters have paused at the southernmost gate of park #578 â their closest point to the United Center â to yell their chants.\n\nThe DNC will kick off with speakers at 5:15 p.m. local time, and President Joe Biden will end the night with a speech and show of support for Harris.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC calls Biden 'the most progressive president in modern history'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52500","datePublished":"2024-08-19T20:57:32.143Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:09:39.318Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alex Seitz-Wald","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2020_02/3181306/alex-seitz-wald-circle-byline-template.jpg","description":"Alex Seitz-Wald was a former national politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-seitz-wald-ncpn385646"}],"articleBody":"At a progressive event on the sidelines of the DNC, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders praised Biden as \"the most progressive president in modern history\" and said he largely \"kept his word\" to be the most progressive executive since FDR.\n\nSanders was speaking at an event billed as Progressive Central 2024 hosted by the Chicago Teachers Union and Progressive Democrats of America. \n\nWhen he was asked how much liberals should work within the Democratic Party, Sanders defended Biden and Harris from left-flank critiques, telling the audience that they need to \"do anything we can to make sure\" Harris wins in November.\n\nHe also joked that Harris and her running mate Tim Walz are \"unfortunately\" not as liberal as Fox News makes them out to be.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52499"},"headline":"Protesters march and chant 'Free Palestine'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52499","datePublished":"2024-08-19T20:34:02.595Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T20:51:58.149Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Protesters with the Coalition to March on the DNC are marching west on Washington Blvd. in northwest Chicago.\n\nLeaders are directing the crowd of several thousand in loud call-and-repeat chants of âNo justice, no peace,â âFree Palestine,â âFrom the river to the sea,â and several other slogans.\n\nThere is a robust police presence at the peaceful protest. The streets are closed to traffic and hundreds of police on bicycles have created a barrier separating the street, where the protesters are, from the sidewalks.\n\nThere is a cacophony of sounds at the head of the protest. A helicopter is loudly buzzing overhead while reporters from all over the world â part of the cadre of hundreds of media members keeping pace with the march â speak in different languages. The elevated train at Paulina Street and Washington Boulevard screeches by every few moments.\n\nA protester is periodicallyÂ releasing a flare of green smoke â sending a trove of thirsty photographers every few minutes scrambling for the perfect shot of it blowing in the wind.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52497"},"headline":"Trump says Harris is pushing 'communist price controls'","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52497","datePublished":"2024-08-19T20:25:53.759Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T21:06:21.761Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Shabad","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","disambiguatingDescription":"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","sameAs":["https://x.com/rebeccashabad"]}],"articleBody":"Trump blasted Harris and her economic policy proposals in lengthy remarks this afternoon from York, Pennsylvania.\n\nAt a machine manufacturing plant, Trump said Harrisâ economic agenda rewards companies that outsource jobs and âpunishes American workers by making it economically impossible to manufacture in America.â\n\nâWe donât need lectures on the economy from a candidate pushing communist price controls,\" he said. \"Kamala has no idea what the hell sheâs doing. Her father is a Marxist professor, and I believe he taught her well, you know, heâs a Marxist professor. Can you imagine?â\n\nHe also addressed attacks by Harris and her running mate, Tim Walz, on him and JD Vance calling them \"weird.\" \n\nâI wonder if they knew where she comes from, where she came from, what her ideology is. But you could see it a little bit by this whack job. You know, he said, weâre weird,\" Trump said. \"I think weâre extremely normal people like you ... Did you ever see him go on the stage and go like crazy? Itâs like he, between his movement and her laugh, thereâs a lot of craziness.\"","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724101296217_f_mo_trump_weird_proposals_240819_1920x1080-0vhp8p.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC to March on the DNCâs demonstration begins with thousands in attendance","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52496","datePublished":"2024-08-19T20:05:37.381Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T20:09:04.092Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"After more than three hours of speeches, the Coalition to March on the DNCâs demonstration  is finally kicking off.Â \n\nProtesters will walk 1.1 miles in a loop, leaving from â and returning to â Union Park.Â ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC urging for cease-fire yells 'Shame on them!' at DNC welcome party","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52494","datePublished":"2024-08-19T19:42:21.496Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:55:21.707Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Caroline Radnofsky","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2026_05/3718029/250128_1x1_nbc_headshots_caroline_radnofsky_5778.jpg","description":"Caroline London.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/caroline-radnofsky-ncpn798386","sameAs":["https://x.com/cradnofsky"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"ZoÃ« Richards","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"ZoÃ« Richards is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I previously covered breaking news at The Daily Beast and Talking Points Memo.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151","sameAs":["https://x.com/zarichards"]}],"articleBody":"Pro-Palestinian protesters appeared on the stage and floor at the DNC welcome party in Chicago last night and urged attendees to call for a cease-fire in Gaza, according to a video posted on X by the anti-war group CODEPINK, which says it organized the demonstration.\n\nIn the video, a protester can be heard yelling on the floor at the DNC welcome event: âThe Democratic administration is supporting an ongoing genocide in Gaza. Shame on them! Shame on them! Shame on them! Make sure you go to the convention and call for accountability. Call for peace and call for a cease-fire!â","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC
