Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52462"},"headline":"Josh Shapiro says antisemitism played no role in VP discussions and slams Trumpâs comments","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52462","datePublished":"2024-08-19T19:32:46.717Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T20:10:40.745Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Natasha Korecki","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_04/3591706/korecki_21_76_copy_copy.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Politics Reporter","description":"Natasha Korecki is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I worked as a journalist for more than two decades. Before NBC News, I worked at Politico as a White House reporter and a national correspondent. Prior to that, I launched the Illinois Playbook after leaving the Chicago Sun-Times where I covered federal courts for nearly a decade before moving to politics. I am the author of \"Only in Chicago: How the Rod Blagojevich Scandal Engulfed Illinois and Enthralled the Nation.\"","award":"Sigma Delta Chi Award, Livingston Award Finalist, IRE Award, University of Illinois College of Media Hall of Fame inductee, University of Illinois Public Affairs Reporting Hall of Fame inductee, Illinois Journalist of the Year.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/natasha-korecki-ncpn1286792","sameAs":["https://x.com/natashakorecki"]}],"articleBody":"CHICAGO â Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro said antisemitism played no role in his not becoming the Democratic Partyâs vice presidential nominee, as Donald Trump has charged.\n\nShapiro said Trump was the âleast credible personâ when it came to standing up against hatred and bigotry.\n\nâHeâs trying to use me and heâs trying to use other Jews to divide Americans further,â Shapiro said after concluding remarks to the Pennsylvania delegation at the Democratic convention this morning.\n\nShapiro then said he wanted to be clear: âAntisemitism played absolutely no role in my dialogue with the vice president. Absolutely none. It is also true that antisemitism is present in our commonwealth, in our country and in some areas within our party, and we have to stand up and speak out against that.â\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52489"},"headline":"Vietnam War protester traveled to Chicago for DNC protest","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52489","datePublished":"2024-08-19T19:31:24.530Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:49:48.580Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Emma Barnett","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656892/240729-emma-barnett.jpg","description":"Emma Barnett is a 2024 NBC News campaignÂ embed.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/emma-barnett-ncpn880641","sameAs":["https://x.com/emmab929"]}],"articleBody":"Mark Friedman, 73, from Los Angeles, was part of an organization in 1968 called the Student Mobilization Committee to end the war. During the DNC in 1968, he protested against the Vietnam War on his college campus in Boston.\n\nHeâs not sure who he is voting for yet but hopes a Labor Party candidate comes forward. In 2020, he voted for the socialist ticket.\n\nFriedman said the big difference between the 1968 and 2024 protests is âthe city is not planning on physically attacking the demonstrations.â\n\nâNone of us have come here with the intention of disrupting activities of the Democrat National Convention, but rather influencing the positions of the Democratic Party to defend abortion rights, to defend immigrant rights, to end the blockade of Cuba, to recognize Palestine and to stop sending U.S. military aid to Israel,â he said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52491"},"headline":"Lifelong Chicago resident reflects on 1968 DNC protests compared to today","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52491","datePublished":"2024-08-19T19:11:10.659Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:45:46.302Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Fred Schein, a 76-year-old lifelong Chicago resident, was inside Lincoln Park during the 1968 DNC protests when police came in aggressively and chased him and his fellow demonstrators out.\n\nHe says todayâs march is nothing like that.\n\nIn fact, the whole scene this year â which has drawn comparisons to the 1968 DNC â is entirely different from the one here 56 years ago, Schein said.\n\nâThis is nothing like â68,â he said. âThey wouldnât even let us stay in the park,â he said, referring to Chicago police.Â \n\nIn contrast, police have worked to keep Union Park protected and peaceful today, while also declining to have officers wear riot gear proactively.Â \n\nMore generally, Schein continued, ââ68 was much more broadly cultural.â\n\nâThis is strictly about politics,â he said.\n\nConversely, when it came to exactly what demonstrators were protesting against in 1968, âit was one thing: End the Vietnam War,â he said.\n\nWhile this yearâs protests do center on the war in Gaza, âthey also are really wrapping in quite a lot of issues,â he said, listing off reproductive rights, climate change and immigrant rights as a few examples.Â \n\nâTrump is a fascist and I would never vote for him, but the Democrats are the ones in power during this war,â Schein said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52488"},"headline":"Police say between 3,000 and 6,000 protesters are here for march","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52488","datePublished":"2024-08-19T18:41:54.981Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:41:19.543Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"March organizers had said as recently as Sunday that they were expecting as many as 20,000 people to attendÂ todayâsÂ protest.\n\nAs of now, theyÂ donât seem close to that. Police officers at the protest estimate there are around 3,000 to 6,000 people present. \n\nMarch organizers this afternoon disputed the police estimates andÂ claimed that 15,000Â people were here.\n\nAt least a dozen piles of hundreds of unused protest signs dotted the softball fields in Union Park. It wasÂ a clear indication that attendance for today's protestÂ âÂ which had been billed as the largest of six major demonstrations scheduled to occur this weekÂ âÂ fell short of expectations.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52487"},"headline":"Harris campaign launches WhatsApp channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52487","datePublished":"2024-08-19T18:40:58.068Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:24:08.956Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Nicole Acevedo ","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2019_29/2934411/190618-nicole-acevedo-byline2043.jpg","jobTitle":"News reporter","description":"Nicole Acevedo is a news reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I was previously a reporter for NBC Latino, specializing in issues affecting Latino communities in the U.S., the Caribbean and Latin America.Throughout my career, Iâve producedÂ hundreds of stories across digital, radio and broadcast platforms throughout my career â reporting on everything from elections, natural disasters and immigration to pop culture trends, social justice issues and breaking news. Iâm best known for my coverage of theÂ crises affecting Puerto Rico, including itsÂ reconstruction process after Hurricane Maria, the islandâs financial crisis and more. After graduating from the Newhouse School of Public Communications at Syracuse University with a bachelorâs degree in broadcast and digital journalism in 2016, I joined the inaugural cohort of students who helped launch the Spanish-language bilingual journalism masterâs program at the Craig Newmark Graduate School of Journalism at CUNY.","award":"I was a 2024 finalist for the NAHJ/University of Florida award in investigative journalism for my reporting uncovering the challenges Puerto Rican families face in caring for their elders, given that the islandâs population is aging faster than most places on Earth and fragmented by migration.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/nicole-acevedo-ncpn384476","sameAs":["https://www.instagram.com/nicoleacevedorodz","https://x.com/Nicolemarie_A"]}],"articleBody":"As the DNC kicked off Monday, the Harris campaign launched a new WhatsAppÂ channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters who could be consequential in the presidential race.\n\nItâs the first time a presidential campaign has created a channel to specifically engage with Latinos on the platform, saidÂ Julie Chavez RodrÃ­guez, manager of the Harris campaign, in a selfie-styleÂ welcome videoÂ message. The channel will be a place where users âcan go to get behind-the-scenes infoâ about the campaign and what itâs doing for Latino families, she added.\n\nWhatsApp is more popular among Hispanics than all other U.S. demographic groups, with 54% of Hispanic adults reporting they use the app. But Latinosâ greater reliance on messaging platforms such as WhatsApp hasÂ also disproportionately exposed them to misinformationÂ in both English and Spanish, since there are few effective tools to crack down on the large volume of false information shared bilingually across encrypted private group chats, according toÂ a 2021 Nielsen report.\n\nLatino voters, especially those living in battleground states, stand to reshape the race in ways that are hard to predict sinceÂ many of them are young people and newly registered voters, according toÂ a memoÂ on a recentÂ Equis Research poll.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52484"},"headline":"Georgia Election Board adopts another rule that could delay certification of votes","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52484","datePublished":"2024-08-19T18:25:49.835Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:15:08.413Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Lisa Rubin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_30/3564290/lisa_rubin_bw.jpg","description":"Lisa Rubin is a senior legal reporter at MSNBC and a former litigator. Previously, she was the off-air legal analyst for âThe Rachel Maddow Showâ and âAlex Wagner Tonight.âÂ ","url":"https://www.msnbc.com/author/lisa-rubin-ncpn1134441","sameAs":["https://x.com/lawofruby"]}],"articleBody":"The Georgia Election Board adopted a new rule today that could give county election administrators additional options to delay certification.Â \n\nSpecifically, the rule known colloquially as the âGrubbs Ruleâ for its proponent, Cobb County GOP Chair Salleigh Grubbs, requires county boards to do whatâs being described as a precinct-by-precinct âreconciliationâ of votes in which they âcompare the total number of ballots cast to the total number of unique voter ID numbers.â\n\nThe rule further requires that if any discrepancy exists, no matter how small or non-outcome-determinative, âno votes shall be counted from that precinctâ until an investigation is conducted and presented to the board.Â \n\nThe rule also empowers county-level election commissioners to âexamine all election-related documentation created during the conduct of elections prior to certification of results.âÂ \n\nAlthough the rule also demands that the countyâs consolidated returns be certified by the superintendent no later than 5 p.m. on the Monday following the election and âimmediately transmitted to the Secretary of State,â various Georgia election workers, residents and advocates raised concerns that the reconciliation processes and investigations would prevent counties from reporting results by the time required by Georgia law.Â \n\nThe full text of the proposed rule is available at the end ofÂ this petition.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52470"},"headline":"Trump Media stock sinks to new post-merger low ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52470","datePublished":"2024-08-19T18:21:01.875Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:21:01.875Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Kevin Breuninger, CNBC"}],"articleBody":"Shares of former PresidentÂ Donald Trumpâs social media company on Monday touched their lowest price since they began publicÂ tradingÂ on theÂ NasdaqÂ nearly five months ago after a merger.\n\nTrump Media, the company that owns the Republican presidential nomineeâs preferred social messaging platformÂ Truth Social, traded below $22.40 per share before noon ET.\n\nThe previous low point for the stock, which trades under theÂ DJTÂ ticker, was in mid-April, when the price plummeted to $22.55 following the companyâs slingshot rise in its frenzied public trading debut.\n\nThe notoriously volatile stockâs downward trajectory over the past month coincided with a swirl of seismic developments for Trump, who is both the majority stakeholder of Trump Media and a main draw for Truth Social users. The share price surged on July 15, the first trading day after Trump was nearlyÂ assassinatedÂ at a campaign rally in western Pennsylvania.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52481"},"headline":"Protester: âHarris still has the option to help stop funding this warâ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52481","datePublished":"2024-08-19T18:11:05.093Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:14:36.679Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Annie Weiler, a 28-year-old marketing manager who traveled to Chicago from Knoxville, succinctly summed up why she came today.\n\nâIf you have a voice, use it,â she said. âYou see the images [of destruction in Gaza] and at this point itâs hard to not get involved.â \n\nShe said she hoped the robust protest effort might help guide the Harris campaign to pivot not just on tone, but on policy regarding the war.\n\nâRight now, Kamala Harris still has the option to help stop funding this war,â she said.Â \n\nWeiler said she still wasnât sure who she would vote for in the fall â but added it wouldnât be Trump â though she also rejected that withholding a vote for Harris amounted to a vote for Trump.\n\nâI am a Democrat, but it is hard to support Kamala Harris when she is openly supporting Israel in this conflict,â she said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52479"},"headline":"Chicago police superintendent says officers won't need riot gear if protests stay peaceful","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52479","datePublished":"2024-08-19T18:07:51.765Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T19:02:25.533Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Selina Guevara","jobTitle":"Associate producer","description":"Selina Guevara is an NBC News field producer, based in Chicago.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/selina-guevara-ncpn1302441","sameAs":["https://x.com/selinaguevaraTV"]}],"articleBody":"Chicagoâs top cop thanked protest organizers for keeping protests on Sunday peaceful and said their officers were able to respond in the way they were trained.\n\nâWe were able to talk to the organizers,â Chicago Police Superintendent Larry Snelling said during a news conference Monday. âThere was mutual respect there, and because of that, we didnât have any incidents.â\n\nSnelling added that they hope for the same outcome at every protest going forward and âif that occurs, then weâve had the most successful Democratic National Convention that we can imagine.â\n\nAs Chicago police gear up for future protests, Snelling said his department has proven they can respond to First Amendment activity without it turning violent. âAs far as riot gear, we donât need officers out there in riot gear if people are protesting peacefully.â Â \n\nOther police departments, including Milwaukee, Capitol Police and departments from across Illinois, are helping to staff DNC infrastructure so Chicago police are freed up to patrol the city theyâve been extensively trained on, Snelling added.\n\nA 23-year-old woman was arrested on Sunday on charges of defacement of property and obstruction of a police officer, but Snelling noted she was not part of the protest imprint.\n\nâWe would prefer not to have clashes. We would prefer not to have to make arrests if we donât have to, and we will avoid those things as long as weâre not committing acts of vandalism or violence,â Snelling said.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52477"},"headline":"Biden to cast Trump as a threat to democracy in his convention speech ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52477","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:47:19.300Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:44:00.078Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Mike Memoli","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653074/240627-mike-memoli.jpg","description":"Mike Memoli is an NBC News correspondent.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/mike-memoli-ncpn793901"}],"articleBody":"Biden has had a major role in Democratic conventions for decades â heâs only missed one since 1972: 1988, after he suffered a brain aneurysm.Â Still, less than a month after he dropped his bid for a second term, his 2024 appearance now will serve as more of a valedictory address rather than one laying out his vision for four more years in the Oval Office.\n\nA senior Biden adviser said the president is viewing this moment without regret. âHe makes a decision and moves on,â they said. âIs it hard for other people? Yes. But itâs not like being president is a part-time job. Thereâs a lot on his plate that heâs focused on.â\n\nThat includes making sure Harris is elected to replace him. While the vice president has embraced the positive energy around her candidacy to push a campaign message about the future, Biden still sees it as a critical mission to ensure voters understand whatâs at risk if Donald Trump returns to the White House.Â \n\nBiden will cast Trump as a threat to democracy and urge all Democrats, and all Americans, to focus on whatâs needed to be done to defeat him. He will say that now that heâs made the decision he needed to make, itâs up to others to help him ensure that we are âcontinuing the progress we have made.âÂ Â Â \n\nâThe most important thing they can do is vote,â the adviser said.\n\nBiden advisers had had initial conversations about his convention speech prior to his politically fatal June 27 debate performance, but not yet begun to âput much on paper,â the adviser said. Tonightâs speech is expected to build on the themes of his Oval Office address explaining his decision to step aside.\n\nWith speeches and other tributes leading up to Bidenâs remarks, the president wants to share his belief that his accomplishments were not his alone. He will note the dire situation he inherited when he came into office in 2021, and how he believes the country was able to recover beyond anyoneâs expectations because of the determination of the American people.\n\nâThatâs a big distinction between Joe Biden and Donald Trump. He believes this is what we can do together. Trump says he alone can do it,â the adviser said. âAny time he talks about accomplishments, itâs really about what the country did.â\n\nBiden will also argue that Harris has been an important partner in progress, and how likeminded they are in fighting for ordinary Americans.Â \n\nâHeâs fully supportive of her,â the adviser said.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52465"},"headline":"Voting rights group asks DOJ to investigate Elon Muskâs PAC","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52465","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:46:10.395Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:38:36.987Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"David Ingram","jobTitle":"Tech Reporter","description":"David Ingram is a tech reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"Readers are interested in technology from many angles, including how tech is upending politics, why the internet is swallowing the economy and what people are doing to hold Silicon Valley accountable. Luckily, I have experience as a politics reporter, business reporter and legal reporter. I started at newspapers in North Carolina, where I wrote about state government and political campaigns. I covered Roy Cooper and Thom Tillis before they were on the national stage, and I investigated corruption among members of both parties. Later I turned to writing about our legal system, first for the Legal Times newspaper and then Reuters. I landed exclusive interviews with people from the White House and Justice Department and covered the courts from top to bottom, including Supreme Court rulings, nomination hearings and antitrust class actions. I first approached tech from a business perspective, writing about Facebook for Reuters at a crucial time for the company and its core advertising model. Now I look at the whole tech industry, using all my previous assignments in journalism to find stories that are distinctive and essential for NBC News. I have a bachelorâs degree in political science from Duke University, where I was the editor of the daily student-run newspaper, The Chronicle.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/david-ingram-ncpn890161","sameAs":["https://www.facebook.com/davidingramwrites","https://x.com/David_Ingram"]}],"articleBody":"Defend the Vote, a Democratic-aligned group that raises money for voting rights, wants the Justice Department to investigation Elon Muskâs America PAC over an allegedly misleading voter registration website. \n\nIn a letter over the weekend, Defend the Vote said it believed Muskâs PAC may have violated a federal law that makes it a crime to conspire to threaten civil rights, such as the right to vote. CNBC reported earlier this month that the website collected personal data from users but failed to direct them to voter registration help if they entered a ZIP code from a battleground state. \n\nâA scheme to trick people into believing that they have successfully registered to vote would put those individuals at risk of being unable to exercise their constitutional right to vote in future elections,â wrote Brian Lemek, Defend the Voteâs executive director.Â \n\nElection officials in Michigan and North Carolina have said they're investigating America PAC's website for potential violations of state law. \n\nMusk and America PAC did not immediately respond to requests for comment. The Justice Department also did not immediately respond to a request for comment. \n\nAmerica PAC says in regulatory filings that it supports Trump. Last month, the former president said he expected Musk to support him with $45 million a month in campaign funds, though Musk later said the amount would be lower. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC voters at protest hope to shape her platform on Gaza","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52475","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:43:51.455Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:23:15.170Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Some march attendees were more openly aligned with the Democratic Party and clearer about their intentions to vote for Harris in November â explaining that they felt their presence at todayâs protest was an act of service in helping steer the party.\n\nMariana Espana, a 17-year-old student in Chicago who will be old enough to vote by Election Day, said that she was here to help push Harris specifically to âact on a cease-fire for Palestineâ because âitâs such a tragedy to see these kids dying.â\n\nâI personally support Kamala. A Trump presidency would be a disaster. But I feel itâs important to push Kamala to push for a cease-fire,â she said.\n\nâI think it would help her campaign because it would help rally this wing of the party,â she said.","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-espana-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-d1d8fe.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52457"},"headline":"DNC protester says she was inspired by 1968 protests","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52457","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:41:18.699Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:21:21.389Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Emma Barnett","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656892/240729-emma-barnett.jpg","description":"Emma Barnett is a 2024 NBC News campaignÂ embed.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/emma-barnett-ncpn880641","sameAs":["https://x.com/emmab929"]}],"articleBody":"Sarah Martin, 84, came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC.\n\nShe was in her 20s during the 1968 DNC protests. She said the 1968 protests inspired her to protest the DNC, explaining that âthere really are parallels.â\n\nMartin says back then, she had just become involved in activism and remembers watching the protests on TV and being âhorrifiedâ by the police response. She said, âWeâre here to remind Kamala and Tim Walz that remember 1968 and being timid on the issue of U.S. war is not a good thing. Doesnât lead to a good result politically for you.â\n\nMartin says she is not sure who she is voting for yet, saying, âA lot of it depends on what happens between now and the election.â\n\nWhen asked whether she thinks a Trump-Vance administration would be better for this issue, she said, âHeavens no, theyâd be much worse.â","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.jpg"},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52466"},"headline":"Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig endorses Harris","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52466","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:38:20.194Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:14:17.045Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Summer Concepcion","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_46/3581078/summer-concepcion-byline-jm.jpg","description":"Summer Concepcion was a former politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519"}],"articleBody":"Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig, who publicly advised former Vice President Mike Pence to defy Trumpâs demands to unconstitutionally block the certification of the 2020 election results, announced his endorsement of Harris in an interview with CNN.\n\nâIn the presidential election of 2024 there is only one political party and one candidate for the presidency that can claim the mantle of defender and protector of Americaâs Democracy, the Constitution, and the Rule of Law,â Luttig said in a statement provided to CNN. âAs a result, I will unhesitatingly vote for the Democratic Partyâs candidate for the Presidency of the United States, Vice President of the United States, Kamala Harris.â\n\nLuttig, whose expected vote for Harris would mark his first time voting for a Democrat, told the news outlet that partisanship must be set aside heading into the November election to block Trump, whom he described as âsingularly unfit,â from winning the election.\n\nâIn voting for Vice President Harris, I assume that her public policy views are vastly different from my own, but I am indifferent in this election as to her policy views on any issues other than Americaâs Democracy, the Constitution, and the Rule of Law, as I believe all Americans should be,â Luttig said, according to CNN.\n\nLuttig emerged as a vocal critic of Trump after his efforts to overturn the 2020 election results. The former federal judge testified before the House Jan. 6 committee, warning that Trump and his allies were a âclear and present danger to American democracyâ because they continued to cast doubt on the legitimacy of the election process.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52474"},"headline":"DNC protest much larger than those at RNC ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52474","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:36:50.908Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T18:07:42.731Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"The DNC hasnât even formally kicked off downtown, but the protests this week are already far larger than any that occurred during the RNC last month.\n\nAttendees at todayâs march â many who identified as progressives â offered different reasons on why they felt it was crucial to protest the Democrats but not necessarily the Republicans.Â Â \n\nâI want to push the Democratic Party on a lot of issues,â said Jacob Smith, a 32-year-old software engineer, who traveled from Detroit to attend todayâs event. He listed âstopping the genocide in Gazaâ and achieving a âpermanent cease-fireâ as chief among them. He said he felt both the Democratic Party and the GOP were âequally beholden to special and corporate interests.â\n\nâTheyâre both basically right-wing parties at this point,â he said, adding â âbut in general Democrats are a little better than Republicans.âÂ \n\nâThey both equally support the police and they both equally donât truly care about the people,â he said. Smith said he hasnât decided who he wants to vote for yet and wouldnât offer who heâs considering, other than that it âwonât be Trump.â\n\nSmith said he felt that it's more pertinent to protest the Biden-Harris administration because âitâs the administration that has aided and abetted an ongoing, visible genocide.â\n\nâThe country is run by Democrats right now, this is happening on their watch,â he said.\n\nSmith explained that he was hopeful that Democratic Party leaders would be more likely to listen to such protest efforts âbecause progressive voters are part of their base â maybe theyâll be more likely to listen to usâ than Republicans.Â \n\nSmith did not attend any of the far smaller protests at the RNC.\n\nâObviously protesting Republican policies is a good thing,â he said, âbut how much of a policy change is really realistic to expect would happen that way.â\n\nâItâs about efficacy in a lot of ways,â Smith added. âWhere are your actions going to be most effective?â","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52472"},"headline":"Thousands gather for Coalition to March on the DNC protest","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52472","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:32:09.273Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T17:58:32.721Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Adam Edelman","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","sameAs":["https://x.com/abedelman"]}],"articleBody":"Thousands have already gathered in Union Park, on the Northwest side of Chicago, for todayâs Coalition to March on the DNC protest â the biggest planned protest event this week.Â \n\nA stage is set up on the west end of the park, where several speakers, from the dozens of groups that are part of the organizing coalition, will begin speaking shortly, ahead of the march.Â \n\nMiddle Eastern music blared from speakers, while protesters banging drums were already parading through the large park, chanting slogans in support of Palestinians.Â \n\nTodayâs event will feature advocates from an array of progressive causes â but it has been billed most prominently as a demonstration for Palestinians and against the war in Israel and Gaza.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52437"},"headline":"Former New Zealand leader Jacinda Ardern to attend Democratic convention","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52437","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:30:10.146Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T17:30:10.146Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Charlotte Kwan","description":"Charlotte Kwan is an intern on NBC Newsâs Asia Desk."}],"articleBody":"Former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern will attend the Democratic National Convention this week, The New Zealand Herald reported, citing a spokesperson.\n\nThough she wonât speak on the main stage, Ardern will participate in a panel discussion on âhealing the nationâ organized by the Center for American Progress Action Fund, a progressive think tank. According to New Zealand media, she is the first former New Zealand prime minister to speak at the DNC.\n\nArdern, who became a global progressive icon after taking office in 2017, announced her resignation as prime minister early last year, saying she no longer had âenough in the tank to do it justice.â \n\nShe has been living in the United States after being appointed to multiple fellowships at Harvard.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52471"},"headline":"March on DNC coalition leaders call out Harris ahead of pro-Palestinian march","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52471","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:29:05.278Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T17:51:27.090Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alex Tabet","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656890/240729-alex-tabet.jpg","description":"Alex Tabet is a 2024 NBC News campaignÂ embed.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-tabet-ncpn1237627","sameAs":["https://x.com/AlexanderTabet"]}],"articleBody":"Leaders from the March on the DNC coalition criticized Vice President Kamala Harris in a news conference ahead of their march to protest the convention in Chicago on Monday.Â \n\nâKamala Harrisâ candidacy, while historic, does not alter the partyâs ongoing support for the Israeli genocide,â said Omar Yunes, co-founder of Jisoor, a pro-Palestinian organization.Â \n\nâAt her rallies, she has attempted to silence pro-Palestinian protesters, and she, just like Biden, continues to be unwilling to listen to the outcries of the Palestinian people,â Yunes said in reference to Harrisâ response to a protest during one of her rallies in Detroit on Aug. 7.Â \n\nHatem Abudayyeh, executive director of the Arab American Action Network, said he and his organization will take no responsibility if Harris loses the election in November.Â \n\nâThe responsibility is on âgenocide Joeâ and on Kamala Harris and on the Democratic Party. If they lose this election to Trump, they are responsible only. Their policies around Palestine are responsible only, and nobody else,â Abudayyeh said.\n\nThe organizers also used their time to praise Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for being sympathetic to their movement.\n\nâWeâre in a city in which we have a mayor who says I am from the movement, a mayor who says I am an organizer, a mayor who says that people have the right to protest and express their First Amendment rights,â he said, praising Johnson. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC
