Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52469"},"headline":"First lady is 'excited' to pay tribute to her husband, communications director says","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52469","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:25:53.369Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T17:25:53.369Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Nicole Moeder","description":"Nicole Moeder is a desk assistance based in Washington, D.C. "},{"@type":"Person","name":"Elleiana Green","jobTitle":"Digital Politics Intern","description":"Elleiana Green is a Digital Politics intern with NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I am currently an undergraduate student at Northwestern University studying journalism and political science.Â AÂ native ofÂ Omaha, Nebraska, I am interested in writing about battleground states. At Northwestern, I have been part of the Medill on the Hill program, where I had the opportunity to be a full-time reporter on Capitol Hill. WhileÂ there, I covered Title IX protections, Supreme Court oral arguments and congressional hearings about free speech on college campuses. MyÂ work has appeared in UPI, Sojourners and the Albany Times Union.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/elleiana-green-ncpn1310109","sameAs":["https://x.com/elleianagreen"]}],"articleBody":"Jill Biden's communications director, Elizabeth Alexander, told MSNBC that the first lady is \"very excited to pay tribute to her husband, his character, his empathy, his leadership and how he has always put country first\" in her speech tonight.\n\nAlexander added, \"She knows him better than anyone. She knows his capacity for empathy, but sheâs also seen him on the world stage for those 50 years, so sheâs seen his accomplishments up front.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52467"},"headline":"Klobuchar: Harris is downplaying breaking the glass ceiling to focus on the merits of her candidacy","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52467","datePublished":"2024-08-19T17:23:18.356Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T17:46:05.691Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Andrea Mitchell","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2018_03/2300566/andrea_mitchell1.jpg","jobTitle":"NBC Chief Foreign Affairs Correspondent; Host, 'Andrea Mitchell Reports'","description":"Andrea Mitchell is chief Washington correspondent and chief foreign affairs correspondent for NBC News.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/andrea-mitchell-ncpn3416","sameAs":["https://x.com/mitchellreports"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Elleiana Green","jobTitle":"Digital Politics Intern","description":"Elleiana Green is a Digital Politics intern with NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I am currently an undergraduate student at Northwestern University studying journalism and political science.Â AÂ native ofÂ Omaha, Nebraska, I am interested in writing about battleground states. At Northwestern, I have been part of the Medill on the Hill program, where I had the opportunity to be a full-time reporter on Capitol Hill. WhileÂ there, I covered Title IX protections, Supreme Court oral arguments and congressional hearings about free speech on college campuses. MyÂ work has appeared in UPI, Sojourners and the Albany Times Union.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/elleiana-green-ncpn1310109","sameAs":["https://x.com/elleianagreen"]}],"articleBody":"When asked about Harris' decision not to focus as much on breaking the glass ceiling if elected president as Hillary Clinton did in her 2016 presidential campaign, Sen. Amy Klobuchar, D-Minn., told MSNBC that Harris had decided to emphasize the merit of her candidacy, adding that it was the right choice. \n\n\"It's not to minimize that she'd be the first woman president. She's already been the first woman vice president,\" Klobuchar said, adding, \"But I think this is her own decision to emphasize the merit of her candidacy as well as what she wants to do in the future.\"\n\n\"She is bringing the receipts,\" Klobuchar said in the interview. \"She has been an international leader as well as a national leader. She has, as I noted, in just 28 days, done everything flawlessly, including picking an excellent running mate from the state of Minnesota, where we just love our vice presidents.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52441"},"headline":"Biden heads to the Democratic convention with a large task and heaps of admiration from a party ready to move on ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52441","datePublished":"2024-08-19T15:24:13.730Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T17:40:23.103Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Natasha Korecki","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2023_04/3591706/korecki_21_76_copy_copy.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Politics Reporter","description":"Natasha Korecki is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I worked as a journalist for more than two decades. Before NBC News, I worked at Politico as a White House reporter and a national correspondent. Prior to that, I launched the Illinois Playbook after leaving the Chicago Sun-Times where I covered federal courts for nearly a decade before moving to politics. I am the author of \"Only in Chicago: How the Rod Blagojevich Scandal Engulfed Illinois and Enthralled the Nation.\"","award":"Sigma Delta Chi Award, Livingston Award Finalist, IRE Award, University of Illinois College of Media Hall of Fame inductee, University of Illinois Public Affairs Reporting Hall of Fame inductee, Illinois Journalist of the Year.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/natasha-korecki-ncpn1286792","sameAs":["https://x.com/natashakorecki"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Peter Nicholas","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653064/230223-peter-nicholas.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior White House Reporter","description":"Peter Nicholas is a senior White House reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I've covered the White House for NBC News, The Atlantic, The Wall Street Journal and the Los Angeles Times. A special interest of mine is how personal character and temperament influence a president's performance in the job. I am also focused on the expansion of presidential power over the years and the extent to which presidents can shape public opinion in carrying out their agenda.","award":"Selden Ring Award for Investigative Reporting","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/peter-nicholas-ncpn1287244","sameAs":["https://x.com/petereporter"]}],"articleBody":"CHICAGO â It will not be the convention President Joe Biden planned.Â \n\nA month ago, Biden was poised to conclude the Democratsâ party by accepting the nomination with bold pronouncements about how his second term would build on the successes of his first. Instead, he will open the convention Monday to make the case that Vice President Kamala Harris is the one to carry the torch.Â \n\nIt is a turnabout that Democrats are greeting with jubilation, melancholy, lingering hard feelings and, for some, outright anger.Â \n\nThe complicated dynamic has left convention planners and party leaders delicately navigating a display of respect to an outgoing president whileÂ building on newfound exuberanceÂ within the party over Harrisâ ascent.Â \n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52436"},"headline":"5 things to watch at the 2024 Democratic convention with Kamala Harris ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52436","datePublished":"2024-08-19T16:01:02.492Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T16:01:02.492Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Sahil Kapur","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_09/3640450/sahil_hs.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Political Reporter","description":"Sahil Kapur is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I graduated with a B.A. in economics and government from Claremont McKenna College. In Washington, I got my start as a health care policy reporter for multiple publications and most recently worked at Bloomberg News, covering politics and a variety of policy issues. I've also appeared on CBS, ABC, Fox News, CNN, PBS and NPR to discuss my reporting.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791","sameAs":["https://x.com/sahilkapur"]}],"articleBody":"The most unusual Democratic convention in generations is set to kick off Monday and make history by nominating Kamala Harris for president just one month after Joe Biden ended his re-election campaign.\n\nVice President Harris rapidly unified the party and locked up the nomination, even though she didnât compete in any primaries at the top of the ticket â and her campaign has since surged into a statistical tie or narrow leads in national and battleground surveys against Donald Trump.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52454"},"headline":"Harris campaign unveils more Monday speakers","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52454","datePublished":"2024-08-19T15:24:13.228Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T15:30:21.509Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Logan Schiciano","description":"Logan Schiciano is the White House Unit intern for NBC News."}],"articleBody":"While Biden will headline night one of the Democratic National Convention, several other prominent Democrats will speak this evening. \n\nSens. Chris Coons of Delaware and Raphael Warnock of Georgia; Reps. Jasmine Crockett of Texas and Grace Meng and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York; and Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear will all take the stage Monday, Harris campaign spokesperson Quentin Fulks announced.\n\nNBC News previously reported that Hillary Clinton, the former secretary of state and 2016 Democratic presidential nominee, and first lady Jill Biden are also slated to speak tonight.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52452"},"headline":"'This is what democracy looks like': Sen. Stabenow says uncommitted in Michigan should be heard","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52452","datePublished":"2024-08-19T15:24:06.394Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T15:25:54.531Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Elleiana Green","jobTitle":"Digital Politics Intern","description":"Elleiana Green is a Digital Politics intern with NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I am currently an undergraduate student at Northwestern University studying journalism and political science.Â AÂ native ofÂ Omaha, Nebraska, I am interested in writing about battleground states. At Northwestern, I have been part of the Medill on the Hill program, where I had the opportunity to be a full-time reporter on Capitol Hill. WhileÂ there, I covered Title IX protections, Supreme Court oral arguments and congressional hearings about free speech on college campuses. MyÂ work has appeared in UPI, Sojourners and the Albany Times Union.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/elleiana-green-ncpn1310109","sameAs":["https://x.com/elleianagreen"]}],"articleBody":"In an interview with Ana Cabrera on MSNBC this morning, Sen. Debbie Stabenow, D-Mich., said the voices of uncommitted voters in Michigan should be heard. \n\nDuring Michiganâs primary, more than 100,000 voters voted uncommitted in a symbolic effort to protest Bidenâs handling of the war in Gaza. \n\n\"This is what democracy looks like. And I think people are more engaged with the Democrats because they know we govern and we care and we're working to make a difference,\" she said. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52446"},"headline":"Vance has more than 20 campaign events under his belt in battleground barnstorm","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52446","datePublished":"2024-08-19T14:50:29.041Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T14:50:29.041Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alec HernÃ¡ndez","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656891/240729-alec-hernandez.jpg","description":"Alec HernÃ¡ndez is a 2024 NBC News campaignÂ embed.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alec-hernandez-ncpn1253662"}],"articleBody":"As JD Vance rounds out just over a month on Trumpâs presidential ticket, an NBC News tally of his public appearances shows a distinct focus on the upper Midwest and a busy travel schedule almost entirely independent of his running mate's. \n\nIn five weeks, the Ohio Republican senator has made at least 23 open-press stops, 20 of which were solo appearances separate from the former president. As the campaign and Vance himself have indicated was the plan all along, the Ohio Republican has spent the bulk of his time on the stump in âRust Beltâ states, with Wisconsin taking first place for total number of public appearances (helped in part by the Republican National Convention having been based in Milwaukee). \n\nVance has made seven appearances in the Badger State, followed by four in battleground Michigan, three in Pennsylvania, and two each in Arizona and Nevada. \n\nVance is expected to visit six states this week alone as Democrats gather in Chicago for their nominating convention, beginning with remarks on the economy in Philadelphia this afternoon. Also on his schedule for the week: his fourth joint appearance with Trump at an event billed as remarks on national security. ","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52447"},"headline":"Walz says Biden is the 'best president of his lifetime' at Pennsylvania delegation breakfast","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52447","datePublished":"2024-08-19T14:27:34.910Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T14:30:56.521Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Katherine Koretski","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656898/240729-katherine-koretski.jpg","description":"Katherine KoretskiÂ is a producer in the New York bureau.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/katherine-koretski-ncpn1295523"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Elleiana Green","jobTitle":"Digital Politics Intern","description":"Elleiana Green is a Digital Politics intern with NBC News","disambiguatingDescription":"I am currently an undergraduate student at Northwestern University studying journalism and political science.Â AÂ native ofÂ Omaha, Nebraska, I am interested in writing about battleground states. At Northwestern, I have been part of the Medill on the Hill program, where I had the opportunity to be a full-time reporter on Capitol Hill. WhileÂ there, I covered Title IX protections, Supreme Court oral arguments and congressional hearings about free speech on college campuses. MyÂ work has appeared in UPI, Sojourners and the Albany Times Union.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/elleiana-green-ncpn1310109","sameAs":["https://x.com/elleianagreen"]}],"articleBody":"During the Pennsylvania delegation breakfast today, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz, whom Harris tapped as her running mate, praised Biden ahead of his speech tonight at the Democratic National Convention. \n\n\"We get an opportunity tonight to say a thank you to the best president of my lifetime, that Iâve been able to witness, to someone whoâs delivered time and time again, someone who made the selfless act of handing that torch to an incredible leader,\" Walz said. \n\nDuring his remarks, he also included praise for Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro and told attendees that the \"blue wall is solid.\"","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52445"},"headline":"Sen. John Fetterman says he won't attend the convention this week","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52445","datePublished":"2024-08-19T14:00:51.947Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T15:04:31.397Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Summer Concepcion","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_46/3581078/summer-concepcion-byline-jm.jpg","description":"Summer Concepcion was a former politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519"}],"articleBody":"Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., who has endorsed Harris, wonât attend the Democratic National Convention this week.\n\nIn an interview with The Free Press, Fetterman said he is skipping the convention to spend time with his children.\n\n\"I've got three young kids, and theyâre out of school,âÂ he said about his absence from the convention. âThatâs four days I can spend with my children.â\n\nFetterman's office this morning confirmed the senator's absence from the convention to NBC News.\n\nFetterman, who has faced backlash from progressives over his staunch support for Israel, reportedly dismissed suggestions that he might not be welcomed at the convention as thousands of demonstrators plan to descend on Chicago, mainly in protest against Israelâs war in Gaza.\n\nFetterman told The Free Press that his decision \"was made well before that debate,â referring to Bidenâs poor June debate performance that ultimately led to the presidentâs decision to drop out of the race.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52444"},"headline":"Three women who have spoken out about the dangers of state abortion bans will speak at the convention tonight","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52444","datePublished":"2024-08-19T13:24:44.478Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T13:24:44.478Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Hallie Jackson","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2017_33/2122091/hallie_jackson-square.jpg","description":"Hallie Jackson is senior Washington correspondent for NBC News.","sameAs":["https://x.com/HallieJackson"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Summer Concepcion","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_46/3581078/summer-concepcion-byline-jm.jpg","description":"Summer Concepcion was a former politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519"}],"articleBody":"Three women who have been vocal about their harrowing experiences during pregnancy in the wake of the Supreme Courtâs decision to overturn Roe v. Wade are scheduled to speak at the Democratic convention tonight, a person with knowledge of the schedule told NBC News.\n\nThe women â Amanda Zurawski of Texas, Kaitlyn Joshua of Louisiana and Hadley Duvall of Kentucky â are outspoken supporters of the Democratic presidential ticket. They have been featured in campaign ads, offering personal testimonials about the dangers that state abortion bans impose on the health and livelihoods of pregnant women who are unable carry a pregnancy to term or have experienced sexual abuse resulting in a pregnancy.\n\nThe New York Times has reported that the women will be giving remarks.\n\nUnited Auto Workers President Shawn Fain, New York Gov. Kathy Hochul, Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, first lady Jill Biden and the president are also scheduled to deliver remarks at the convention today.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52443"},"headline":"Trump seeks to clarify controversial comments on the Presidential Medal of Freedom","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52443","datePublished":"2024-08-19T13:12:31.187Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T13:12:31.187Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Summer Concepcion","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_46/3581078/summer-concepcion-byline-jm.jpg","description":"Summer Concepcion was a former politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Jake Traylor","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656895/240729-jake-traylor.jpg","description":"Jake Traylor is aÂ White House correspondent for MSNBC.","url":"https://www.msnbc.com/author/jake-traylor-ncpn1296538","sameAs":["https://x.com/jake__traylor"]}],"articleBody":"In an interview with an NBC affiliate in Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania, that aired last night, Trump sought to clarify his comments last week on the Presidential Medal of Freedom that drew backlash after he said it was a âmuch betterâ to receive than the top military honor, the Congressional Medal of Honor.\n\nAsked to clarify his comments, Trump said he had not heard the negative reaction from the public over his remarks. The former president argued that theÂ Congressional Medal of Honor is the âultimateâ but also a âpainfulâ thing to receive.\n\nâI would rather, in a certain way, get it, because people that get the Congressional Medal of Honor, which Iâve given to many, are often horribly wounded or dead. Theyâre often dead. They get it posthumously,â he said. âAnd when you get the Congressional Medal of Honor, I always consider that to be the ultimate, but it is a painful thing to get it.â\n\nâWhen you get the Presidential Medal of Freedom, itâs usually for other things, like youâve achieved great success in sports, or youâve achieved great success someplace else,â he added. âWhen you get the Medal of Honor, generally speaking â and Iâve met many of them, and Iâve seen the families of many of them â this is an incredible honor, but it was a statement that is much more painful to get because theyâre oftentimes in very bad shape.â\n\nSpeaking of the Presidential Medal of Freedom, Trump said, âI donât think anybody suffered other than theyâve, you know, theyâve worked hard and theyâve done great things. Oneâs a military award, oneâs a civilian award, but sometimes very painful to get the other.\"\n\nDuring his presidency, Trump in 2018 awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Miriam Adelson, a wealthy Republican donor and widow of Sheldon Adelson, a Republican megadonor who died in 2021. \n\nIn remarks at a campaign event last week, Trump spoke of the medal he bestowed upon Miriam Adelson, saying itâs the âhighest award you can get as a civilianâ and is âmuch betterâ than the Congressional Medal of Honor because âeveryone [who] gets the Congressional Medal of Honor, theyâre soldiers. Theyâre either in very bad shape because theyâve been hit so many times by bullets or theyâre dead.â","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52440"},"headline":"Democratic National Committee releases party platform ahead of convention ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52440","datePublished":"2024-08-19T12:24:50.452Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T12:48:44.066Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Alex Seitz-Wald","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2020_02/3181306/alex-seitz-wald-circle-byline-template.jpg","description":"Alex Seitz-Wald was a former national politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-seitz-wald-ncpn385646"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Jonathan Allen","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653033/230226-jonathan-allen.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Politics Reporter","description":"Jonathan Allen is a senior national politics reporter for NBC News. ","disambiguatingDescription":"I am a co-author of three books on politics â \"HRC,\" \"Shattered\" and \"Lucky\" âÂ  a former Washington bureau chief for Bloomberg News and a former White House bureau chief for Politico. Before those gigs, I spent more than a decade covering Capitol Hill for Congressional Quarterly, The Hill and Politico. In addition to reporting and writing books, I am an adjunct professor at Northwestern University. I appear frequently on MSNBC and News Now.","award":"I am a recipient of the National Press Foundation's Everett McKinley Dirksen Award and the National Press Club's Sandy Hume Award.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jonathan-allen-ncpn802641","sameAs":["https://www.instagram.com/jonallendc","https://x.com/jonallendc"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"CHICAGO â Democrats released their party platform document yesterday, laying out more than 90 pages of policy priorities just one day beforeÂ their conventionÂ kicks off.\n\nBut the party platform was written and voted on by the Democratic National Conventionâs Platform Committee before BidenÂ dropped out of the race, and the document repeatedly highlights the presidentâs achievements and positions â even when they differ slightly from Harrisâ comments.\n\nThe platform refers to Bidenâs âsecond termâ more than a dozen times, underscoring the unprecedented timing of the top of the ticket shake-up.\n\nThe document was approved by the Platform Committee on July 16, just days before BidenÂ bowed out of the raceÂ July 21. Convention delegates will vote on the platform tonight, a largely ceremonial procedure.Â \n\nâThis election is a choice between two very different economic visions for America: Donald Trump, who sees the world from his country club at Mar-a-Lago; and Joe Biden, who sees it from kitchen tables in Scranton like the one he grew up around,â the document says in the economy chapter.\n\nThe policy platform is divided into nine chapters, emphasizing the partyâs top issues, including lowering costs, fighting climate change and gun violence, and strengthening democracy.\n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52438"},"headline":"Exclusive: DCCC launches $27 million ad blitz focused on GOP-held districts","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52438","datePublished":"2024-08-19T12:00:03.107Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T12:17:20.816Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Sahil Kapur","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_09/3640450/sahil_hs.jpg","jobTitle":"Senior National Political Reporter","description":"Sahil Kapur is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I graduated with a B.A. in economics and government from Claremont McKenna College. In Washington, I got my start as a health care policy reporter for multiple publications and most recently worked at Bloomberg News, covering politics and a variety of policy issues. I've also appeared on CBS, ABC, Fox News, CNN, PBS and NPR to discuss my reporting.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791","sameAs":["https://x.com/sahilkapur"]}],"articleBody":"CHICAGO â The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is launching a $27 million ad campaign focused on capturing Republican-held seats, targeting a mix of swing districts and red-leaning areas in a bid to retake control of the House.\n\nThe new ad buys, first reported by NBC News, come on the opening day of the Democratic convention here, where Harris is slated to be nominated for president later this week. Democrats feel buoyed by the vice presidentâs campaign as she rises in the polls, outperforming Biden since he dropped out.\n\nIf it continues, that new momentum could have a significant impact in the races for the House, and the DCCC is seeking to capitalize on the enthusiasm behind Harris' candidacy. The ad buys include deep investments in New York, at $8 million, and California, at $5 million, where Democrats are seeking to flip a series of GOP-held competitive districts that could be crucial to determining which party controls the House.\n\nâHouse Democrats are on offense and this latest salvo of reservations reflects the strong position we are in to retake the majority,â Julie Merz, the DCCC's executive director, said in a statement. âWeâre able to make these moves across the map thanks to the record-breaking fundraising weâve had â driven by Leader Hakeem Jeffries and fueled by the historic numbers of individual donors this cycle.â\n\nThe campaign targets prime Democratic pickup opportunities in GOP-held districts in Oregon, Arizona and Nebraska. It also includes a red-leaning Pennsylvania district where former TV news anchor Janelle Stelson is taking on Rep. Scott Perry, R-Pa., and a couple of GOP-friendly Iowa districts where Democrats have an outside chance. And it includes $1.5 million inÂ Spanish-languageÂ ads in Latino-heavy districts in California and Texas.\n\nItâs unclear whether the DCCC, which is tasked with getting Democrats elected to the House, would be attempting offense in those difficult districts if Biden were still in the race given his low poll numbers a month ago. The ad campaign represents hefty fundraising that allows the party to spend heavily on offense,Â in addition toÂ an earlier round of $28 million in ad buys largely to defend theirÂ incumbents.\n\nThe battle for the House majority is expected to be very close. Republicans hold a narrow 220-212 advantage, and the playing field has shrunk with a few dozen districts making up the battlefield thatâll decide control of the chamber, which will have an enormous impact on the next presidentâs legislative agenda.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52442"},"headline":"Trump and Vance will make campaign stops in swing states this week in DNC counterprogramming effort","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52442","datePublished":"2024-08-19T11:44:55.383Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T12:11:40.753Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Jillian Frankel","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653073/jillian-frankel.jpg","description":"Jillian FrankelÂ is a 2024 NBC News campaignÂ embed.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jillian-frankel-ncpn1287954"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Alec HernÃ¡ndez","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656891/240729-alec-hernandez.jpg","description":"Alec HernÃ¡ndez is a 2024 NBC News campaignÂ embed.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alec-hernandez-ncpn1253662"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Lindsey Pipia","description":"Lindsey Pipia isÂ a White House producer for MSNBC.","url":"https://www.msnbc.com/author/lindsey-pipia-ncpn1009051"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Isabelle Schmeler","description":"Isabelle Schmeler is a researcher on the 2024 politics desk."},{"@type":"Person","name":"Jake Traylor","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_31/3656895/240729-jake-traylor.jpg","description":"Jake Traylor is aÂ White House correspondent for MSNBC.","url":"https://www.msnbc.com/author/jake-traylor-ncpn1296538","sameAs":["https://x.com/jake__traylor"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Summer Concepcion","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2022_46/3581078/summer-concepcion-byline-jm.jpg","description":"Summer Concepcion was a former politics reporter for NBC News Digital.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519"}],"articleBody":"As the DNC kicks off, Trump and Vance are set to embark on a busy week of campaign stops through swing states across the country.\n\nIn a press briefing call yesterday afternoon, the Trump campaign gave a preview of this weekâs schedule, which includes plans for either Trump or Vance to do media interviews daily. \n\nThe Trump campaign will hold a news conference at 12:30 p.m. ET in Chicago and he will give remarks on the economy later this afternoon in York, Pennsylvania. He'll also deliver remarks in Howell, Michigan, tomorrow; Asheboro, N.C., on Wednesday; Montezuma Pass, Arizona, on Thursday; and Glendale, Arizona, on Friday.\n\nThe campaign said Trump and Vance will have âvarious opportunities for gagglesâ for those traveling with the campaign this week. But it is unclear at the moment what this looks like for Trump because there is no press charter and he does not standardly invite ânetworkâ media to travel with him.\n\nTrump campaign allies â including Republican Sens. Ron Johnson of Wisconsin and Rick Scott of Florida, Florida Rep. Byron Donalds and others â will also hold public events this week.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52418"},"headline":"GOP-led House committees release lengthy report alleging Biden committed impeachable offenses","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52418","datePublished":"2024-08-19T11:27:50.821Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T12:11:12.264Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Rebecca Kaplan","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_10/3641228/rk_headshot.jpg","description":"Rebecca is a producer and off-air reporter covering Congress for NBC News, managing coverage of the House. ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-kaplan-ncpn1305774"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Ryan Nobles","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_10/3641224/ryan_noble.jpg","description":"Ryan Nobles is chief Capitol Hill correspondent for NBC News.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ryan-nobles-ncpn1300284"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Garrett Grumbach"},{"@type":"Person","name":"Sarah Fitzpatrick","description":"Sarah Fitzpatrick is a senior investigative producer and story editor for NBC News. She previously worked for CBS News and \"60 Minutes.\"Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sarah-fitzpatrick-ncpn793476","sameAs":["https://x.com/S_Fitzpatrick"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Julie Tsirkin","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_46/3669091/241113-julie-tsirkin.jpg","description":"JulieÂ Tsirkin is aÂ correspondent covering Capitol Hill and the White House.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/julie-tsirkin-ncpn947511","sameAs":["https://x.com/JulieNBCNews"]}],"articleBody":"The Republican-led House committees investigating whether to impeach Biden released their long-awaited report about their findings this morning, arguing that Biden has committed impeachable conduct but deferring to the full House on whether to pursue a formal impeachment.Â \n\nThe nearly 300-page report is a summary of the investigation conducted by the House Oversight, Judiciary and Ways and Means committees over the past year and a half, nearly all of which has already been made public. \n\nRead the full story here.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52433"},"headline":"First lady to highlight Biden's character in tonight's speech","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52433","datePublished":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.840Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.840Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Monica Alba","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_35/3660421/240826-monica-alba.jpg","jobTitle":"White House correspondent","description":"Monica Alba is a White House correspondent for NBC News.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/monica-alba-ncpn3696","sameAs":["https://x.com/AlbaMonica"]},{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"First lady Jill Biden will use her speech tonight to highlight her husband's character and reiterate her support for Harris' candidacy, a source familiar with the matter said. \n\nShe is expected to call for Americans to unite \"with faith in each other, hope for a brighter future, and love for our country,\" the source said.\n\nThe first lady will be introduced in a video highlighting moments from her experience in the East Wing. Vivian Wierwille from New Hampshire will also be featured in the video. Wierwille introduced the first lady at a 2021 elementary school event for reopening schools after the height of the pandemic.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52416"},"headline":"Where's Trump?","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52416","datePublished":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.589Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.589Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"}],"articleBody":"As Vance speaks at an economic and energy development event in Philadelphia today, Trump will be in York, Pennsylvania, doing the same. \n\nTrump's campaign will be looking to make a pitch to voters in the natural gas-driven battleground state that he and his \"drill, baby, drill\" plan would be better for Pennsylvania than Harris, who in the past supported anti-fracking policies.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52414"},"headline":"Where's Vance?","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52414","datePublished":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.309Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.309Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Raquel Coronell Uribe","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_41/3665448/241011-raquel-coronell-uribe.jpg","description":"Raquel Coronell Uribe is a breaking news reporter.Â ","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088"}],"articleBody":"Vance is expected to be in Philadelphia today as both campaigns zero in on battleground Pennsylvania. \n\nVance will speak at an economic and energy event.\n\nTrump was in Wilkes-Barre over the weekend, and Harris and Walz were in Rochester yesterday.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}},{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"BlogPosting","publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC to watch the DNC tonight","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52427","datePublished":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.003Z","dateModified":"2024-08-19T11:00:44.003Z","author":[{"@type":"Person","name":"Megan Lebowitz","image":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg","jobTitle":"Politics Reporter","description":"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","disambiguatingDescription":"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written enterprise and fact-checking stories. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","sameAs":["https://x.com/megan_lebowitz"]}],"articleBody":"Tune in to special network coverage of the convention on NBC News at 9 p.m. ET. \n\nNBC News Now will air live from Chicago starting at 4 p.m. ET, and MSNBC will air special coverage starting at 6 p.m.","image":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/t_fit-1500w,q_auto:best/rockcms/2024-08/240816-dnc-liveblog-jg-d2a0f2.jpg","caption":""}}],"mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226"},"publisher":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC News","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/nbc-news-digital-editors-n893846","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/v1696280688/newsgroup-logos/nbcnews/logo/primary-black-424x45.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcnews","https://www.pinterest.com/nbcnews/","https://www.facebook.com/NBCNews/","https://www.instagram.com/nbcnews/","https://www.youtube.com/nbcnews","https://www.snapchat.com/p/8bb879c7-45c0-499c-bb3c-7a3d0e229301/2193844248074240","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcnews?lang=en"],"subOrganization":{"@type":"NewsMediaOrganization","name":"NBC Select","masthead":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select/shopping/masthead-rcna167949","url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/select","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/h_60/newsgroup-logos/nbc-select/logo-horizontal/default-blue-360x102.png"},"sameAs":["https://x.com/nbcselect","https://www.facebook.com/NBCSelect","https://www.instagram.com/nbcselect/","https://www.youtube.com/@NBCSelect","https://www.tiktok.com/@nbcselect","https://www.threads.com/@nbcselect","https://bsky.app/profile/nbcselect.nbcnews.com"]}},"inLanguage":"en","articleBody":" What to know about the Democratic convention so far: The Democratic National Convention&#x27;s first night highlighted President Joe Biden&#x27;s &quot;leadership and legacy,&quot; capped off by a speech by the president. He began speaking after more than four minutes of applause. Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, who was the Democratic nominee for president in 2016, delivered a rousing speech. She smiled and nodded during anti-Trump chants of &quot;Lock him up!&quot; Vice President Kamala Harris made an unexpected appearance onstage this evening to give brief remarks praising Biden. Outside the convention venue, several dozen protesters broke away from the Coalition to March on the DNC, a group that&#x27;s against Israel&#x27;s war in Gaza, and tried to breach a barricade at the closest point along the route to the United Center. Police in riot gear formed a wall and arrested at least four people. Organizers said they believe those protesters were not part of any of the groups involved with the coalition.\n\nThis event has ended. Check here for the latest updates."}</script><script async="" src="https://assets.adobedtm.com/launch-EN03682f66064449c8b87d78eae3e2fc57.min.js"></script><script async="" id="hfs-config">(function(){const hfsBrand = "news";

const hfsActive = 400;
const hfsGlobalNav = false;

      provider: 'mps',
      preprocessors: mpsPreprocessors,

  })();</script><script>(function(){const mpsVendorUrl = "https://mps.nbcuni.com/fetch/ext/load-nbcnews-bento.js?nowrite=jq";

    function loadScript(src, eventName) {
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = src;
        script.async = true;

        script.onload = () => {
          if (eventName) {
            const event = new CustomEvent(eventName, { detail: { src } });
            window.dispatchEvent(event);
            document.documentElement.dataset[eventName.toLowerCase()] = 'true';
          }
          resolve();
        };

        script.onerror = () => {
          reject(new Error(`## Failed to load script: ${src}`));
        };

        document.head.appendChild(script);
      });
    }

    loadScript(mpsVendorUrl, 'mpsLoaded')
      .then(() => {
        return Promise.all([]);
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        console.error(error);
      });
  })();</script><script>(function(){const MPS_MEDIA_QUERY = {"mobile":"(max-width: 757px)","tablet":"(min-width: 758px) and (max-width: 999px)","desktop":"(min-width: 1000px)"};

    const breakpoints = {
      mobile: MPS_MEDIA_QUERY.mobile,
      tablet: MPS_MEDIA_QUERY.tablet,
      desktop: MPS_MEDIA_QUERY.desktop,
    };

    function onBreakpointChange(callback) {
      Object.entries(breakpoints).forEach(([key, query]) => {
        const mediaQuery = window.matchMedia(query);
        callback(key, mediaQuery.matches);

        const listener = (event) => {
          if (event.matches) {
            callback(key, true);
          } else {
            callback(key, false);
          }
        };
        mediaQuery.addEventListener('change', listener);
      });
    }

    window.addEventListener('mpsLoaded', () => {
      window.mps &&
        mps._ready(function () {
          onBreakpointChange((breakpoint, matches) => {
            if (matches) {
              mps.refreshAds(['topbanner', 'boxflex']);
            }
          });
        });
    });
  })();</script><style>@layer varsReact{._omegaContainer_1pyq3_8{--omega-floating-container-height: 147px;--omega-floating-container-bottom: 20px}@media (width >= âNow is the time to get a hostage deal and a ceasefire deal doneâ","Harris vows to fight for Israeli hostage and cease-fire deal in Gaza",{"primary":"91","seo":"92"},"Vice President Harris said that she and Biden are working around the clock to get a \"hostage deal and a ceasefire deal done.\" She says she will always stand up for Israel's right to defend itself, and also addresses the ongoing humanitarian crisis in Gaza and called for a solution where \"the hostages are released, the suffering in Gaza ends, and the Palestinian people can realize their right to dignity, security, freedom and self-determination.\"",{"primary":"94"},{"name":"2m"},{"name":"6f"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724383155611_f_mo_dnc_israel_gaza_240822.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724383155611_f_mo_dnc_israel_gaza_240822.vtt",{"srt":"98","webvtt":"99"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_israel_gaza_240822/1/abs/index.m3u8",108.275,4299000,{"assetType":"18","format":"19","publicUrl":"9b","height":"1b","width":"1c","assetDuration":"9c","bitrate":"9d"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724383155611_f_mo_dnc_israel_gaza_240822_6.mp4",4299180,{"assetType":"1g","format":"1h","publicUrl":"9f","height":"1b","width":"1c","assetDuration":"9c","bitrate":"9g"},["9e","9h"],{"type":"m","id":"8m","mpxMetadata":"8p","primaryImage":"8w","url":"8z","duration":"90","sentiment":"w","videoType":"2h","headline":"93","description":"95","publisher":"96","source":"97","closedCaptioning":"9a","videoAssets":"9i"},"mmvo217817669510","217817669510","f_mo_dnc_harris_reproductive_240822",{"id":"9l","guid":"9m","externalAdvertiserId":"9m"},"vidimg1598156884",{"primary":"1n","tease":"1n","seo":"1n","social":"1n"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/harris3__744974-gejwl4.jpg",{"primary":"9q"},{"publishedAt":"1r","createdAt":"1r","modifiedAt":"1r"},[],{"id":"9o","headline":"9p","caption":"1n","altText":"1n","url":"9r","encodingFormat":"1n","height":"1n","width":"1n","date":"9s","authors":"9t","source":"1n"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/harris-says-trump-vance-out-of-their-minds-for-trying-to-ban-abortion-217817669510","harris-says-trump-vance-out-of-their-minds-for-trying-to-ban-abortion-217817669510",{"canonical":"9v","primary":"9v","slug":"9w"},"Harris says Trump, Vance 'out of their minds' for trying to ban abortion",{"primary":"9y","seo":"9y"},"During her keynote address, Vice President Kamala Harris warned of the dangers to reproductive freedom in the United States if former President Donald Trump is re-elected and took aim at policies from Trump and Sen. JD Vance. law.\"Â ",{"primary":"a0"},{"name":"2m"},{"name":"6f"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724383046804_f_mo_dnc_harris_reproductive_240822.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724383046804_f_mo_dnc_harris_reproductive_240822.vtt",{"srt":"a4","webvtt":"a5"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_harris_reproductive_240822/1/abs/index.m3u8",196.564,4297000,{"assetType":"18","format":"19","publicUrl":"a7","height":"1b","width":"1c","assetDuration":"a8","bitrate":"a9"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724383046804_f_mo_dnc_harris_reproductive_240822_6.mp4",4297350,{"assetType":"1g","format":"1h","publicUrl":"ab","height":"1b","width":"1c","assetDuration":"a8","bitrate":"ac"},["aa","ad"],{"type":"m","id":"9k","mpxMetadata":"9n","primaryImage":"9u","url":"9x","duration":"84","sentiment":"w","videoType":"2h","headline":"9z","description":"a1","publisher":"a2","source":"a3","closedCaptioning":"a6","videoAssets":"ae"},"mmvo217816133978","217816133978","f_mo_dnc_harris_middleclass_240822",{"id":"ah","guid":"ai","externalAdvertiserId":"ai"},"vidimg4045220772",{"primary":"1n","tease":"1n","seo":"1n","social":"1n"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724382774179_f_mo_dnc_harris_middleclass_240822_1920x1080-73l126.jpg",{"primary":"am"},{"publishedAt":"1r","createdAt":"1r","modifiedAt":"1r"},[],{"id":"ak","headline":"al","caption":"1n","altText":"1n","url":"an","encodingFormat":"1n","height":"1n","width":"1n","date":"ao","authors":"ap","source":"1n"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/harris-vows-strengthening-middle-class-will-be-crucial-element-of-her-presidency-217816133978","harris-vows-strengthening-middle-class-will-be-crucial-element-of-her-presidency-217816133978",{"canonical":"ar","primary":"ar","slug":"as"},"PT3M6S","Harris: Building the middle class âwill be a defining goal of my presidencyâ","Harris vows strengthening middle class will be crucial element of her presidency",{"primary":"av","seo":"aw"},"In her remarks at the Democratic National Convention, Vice President Kamala Harris underscored the importance of a strong middle class and its importance to the U.S. economy.
