</div> <div class="names" data-astro-cid-6llnna2y="" style=""> By  NBC News </div> </div> <!--cq--><div class="qcð¦" q:base="https://nodeassets.nbcnews.com/libra/libra-assets/qwik-assets/" q:container="paused" q:instance="y9a4jd8fvga" q:manifest-hash="n9tvj0" q:render="ssr" q:version="1.15.0" style="display: contents"><link href="https://nodeassets.nbcnews.com/libra/libra-assets/qwik-assets/q-DrewtzGc.js" rel="modulepreload"/><!--qv q:id=0 q:key=jP3B:--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1 q:key=5auE:<ahre0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="mainBody" q:id="3" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/election-2024-dnc-live-updates-rcna165227" target="_blank"><strong><em>This event has ended. Check here for the latest updates.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4 q:key=5auE:ncwd000999--><!--qv q:id=5 q:key=ut0k:ncwd000999--><section class="summary _summary_l3zna_8 mainBody" data-testid="summary-box-qwik" q:key="jS_2"><div class="relative _inner_l3zna_81"><h2 class="mb-1 relative _headline_l3zna_88" q:key="jS_0"><!--t=6-->What to know about the Democratic convention so far:<!-- --></h2><ul class="mb-0 text-lg" q:key="jS_1"><!--qv q:id=7 q:key=JbNX:TheDe0--><li class="mb-2" q:id="8" q:key="Il_0">The Democratic National Convention's first night highlighted President Joe Biden's "leadership and legacy," capped off by a speech by the president. He began speaking after <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226/rcrd52630?canonicalCard=true" target="_blank">more than four minutes of applause</a>.</li><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9 q:key=JbNX:Forme1--><li class="mb-2" q:id="a" q:key="Il_0">Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, who was the Democratic nominee for president in 2016, <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52604" target="_blank">delivered a rousing speech</a>. She <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/lock-hillary-clinton-smiles-nods-chants-echoing-trump-supporters-rcna167299" target="_blank">smiled and nodded</a> during anti-Trump chants of "Lock him up!"</li><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=b q:key=JbNX:ViceP2--><li class="mb-2" q:id="c" q:key="Il_0">Vice President Kamala Harris made <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226/rcrd52581?canonicalCard=true" target="_blank">an unexpected appearance onstage</a> this evening to give brief remarks praising Biden.</li><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=d q:key=JbNX:Outsi3--><li class="mb-2" q:id="e" q:key="Il_0">Outside the convention venue, several dozen protesters <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226/rcrd52513?canonicalCard=true" target="_blank">broke away from</a> the Coalition to March on the DNC, a group that's against Israel's war in Gaza, and tried to breach a barricade at the closest point along the route to the United Center. Police in riot gear formed a wall and arrested at least four people. Organizers said they believe those protesters <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226/rcrd52541?canonicalCard=true" target="_blank">were not part of any of the groups</a> involved with the coalition.</li><!--/qv--></ul></div></section><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=f q:key=5auE:rctx10499--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><q:template aria-hidden="true" hidden="" q:slot=""></q:template><!--/qv--><script type="qwik/json">{"refs":{},"ctx":{},"objs":[],"subs":[]}</script></div><!--/cq--> AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1c-->Democratic convention wraps for the first day<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1d q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1d q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1a q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1e q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1f q:key=5auE:Theco0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1g q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1h" q:key="Il_0">The convention has concluded for the day â very late. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1a q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52656--><!--qv q:id=1i q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52656--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:24:10.751Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52656" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1j"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:24 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1k-->Fact check: Does Trump support cutting Medicare and Social Security?<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1l q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986" q:id="1m" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1l q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1i q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1n q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1o q:key=5auE:ncwd000999--><!--qv q:key=Rz_5--><!--qv q:id=1p q:key=0NDF:Rz_4--><h3 class="subHeading _subHeading_hyokb_8 uppercase tracking-wide" data-testid="subheading" q:key="VY_1"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1p q:key=-->Statement<!--/qv--></h3><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1q q:key=5etA:ncwd000999--><figure class="statement quote relative _inlineQuote_1cw91_8 feedBody mb-2" data-testid="inline-quote" q:key="7m_4"><blockquote cite="" class="quoteContent _quoteContent_1cw91_147 grid" q:id="1r"><p class="_quoteText_1cw91_201" q:key='"Trum0'>"Trump wants to cut Social Security and Medicare."</p><span class="decoration _decoration_1cw91_158"></span></blockquote><figcaption class="_figcaption_1cw91_148 grid uppercase" q:key="7m_3"><span class="_captionText_1cw91_211"><!--t=1s-->Biden<!-- --><!--t=1t--><!-- --><!--t=1u--><!-- --></span><span class="decoration _decoration_1cw91_158"></span></figcaption></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1v q:key=5auE:fallback-id-1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_13--><!--qv q:key=Rz_7--><!--qv q:id=1w q:key=0NDF:Rz_6--><h3 class="subHeading _subHeading_hyokb_8 uppercase tracking-wide" data-testid="subheading" q:key="VY_1"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1w q:key=-->Verdict<!--/qv--></h3><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1x q:key=JbNX:FACT_CHECK_CONTENTp1--><p q:id="1y" q:key="Il_0">This is misleading.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=Rz_9--><!--qv q:id=1z q:key=0NDF:Rz_8--><h3 class="subHeading _subHeading_hyokb_8 uppercase tracking-wide" data-testid="subheading" q:key="VY_1"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1z q:key=-->Analysis<!--/qv--></h3><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20 q:key=JbNX:FACT_CHECK_CONTENTp1--><p q:id="21" q:key="Il_0">It's true that Trump has been all over the place on Medicare and Social Security over the years. And he said in March on CNBC that âthereâs a lot you can do in terms of entitlements, in terms of cutting."</p><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22 q:key=JbNX:FACT_CHECK_CONTENTp1--><p q:id="23" q:key="Il_0">But shortly after that interview, Trump told Breitbart, "I will never do anything that will jeopardize or hurt Social Security or Medicare," reiterating a call he has made repeatedly over the last few years.</p><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24 q:key=JbNX:FACT_CHECK_CONTENTp1--><p q:id="25" q:key="Il_0">My colleague Sahil Kapur has a <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/donald-trump-map-social-security-medicare-rcna143475" target="_blank">great rundown of where Trump has stood</a> on entitlement programs â calling it a "huge Ponzi scheme" and floating raising the benefit age in 2000, praising then-House Speaker Paul Ryan's 2012 plans to cap future Medicare spending, saying during his 2016 bid he'd protect the programs and proposing Social Security cuts while in office but no tangible Medicare cuts.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1i q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52655--><!--qv q:id=26 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52655--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:23:14.765Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52655" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="27"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:23 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=28-->Biden says he was 'too old to stay as president'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=29 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=29 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=26 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2a q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2b q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2b q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2d" q:key="Il_0">Biden drew a contrast between his being the oldest serving president and his young age when he was elected senator. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2e q:key=5auE:Biden1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2e q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2f q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2g" q:key="Il_0">Biden said he has been "too young to be in the Senate because I wasn't 30 yet and too old to stay as president. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2h q:key=5auE:"Ican2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2h q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2j" q:key="Il_0">"I can honestly say Iâm more optimistic about the future than I was when I was elected as a 29-year-old United States senator â I mean it," he added.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=26 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52654--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52654"><!--qv q:id=2k q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52654--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:21:51.275Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52654" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2n"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:21 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2o-->Harris joins Biden onstage after he finishes remarks<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2p q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="2q" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2p q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2m q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2r q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2s q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2s q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2t q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2u" q:key="Il_0">Biden finished his speech just before 12:20 a.m. ET. He was then joined onstage by Harris, first lady Jill Biden, second gentleman Doug Emhoff and members of the extended Biden family, including his children Hunter and Ashley.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2v q:key=5auE:Nomor1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2v q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2w q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2x" q:key="Il_0">No more speeches on the lineup tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2m q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52649--><!--qv q:id=2y q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52649--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:20:25.975Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52649" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=30-->'Like many of our best presidents, [Kamala] was also a vice president'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=31 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="42" q:key="Il_0">"That was a joke, that was a joke," he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=43 q:key=5auE:Fifte4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=43 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=44 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="45" q:key="Il_0">Fifteen vice presidents, including Biden, have gone on to become president.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2y data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:20:23.036Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52645" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="47"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:20 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=48-->Fact check: Did murder rise by 30% under Trump?<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=49 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jane-c-timm-ncpn475656" q:id="4a" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=49 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=46 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=4b q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=4c q:key=5auE:ncwd000999--><!--qv q:key=Rz_5--><!--qv q:id=4d q:key=0NDF:Rz_4--><h3 class="subHeading _subHeading_hyokb_8 uppercase tracking-wide" data-testid="subheading" q:key="VY_1"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4d q:key=-->Statement<!--/qv--></h3><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4e q:key=5etA:ncwd000999--><figure class="statement quote relative _inlineQuote_1cw91_8 feedBody mb-2" data-testid="inline-quote" q:key="7m_4"><blockquote cite="" class="quoteContent _quoteContent_1cw91_147 grid" q:id="4f"><p class="_quoteText_1cw91_201" q:key="âOnhi0">âOn his watch, the murder rate went up 30%."</p><span class="decoration _decoration_1cw91_158"></span></blockquote><figcaption class="_figcaption_1cw91_148 grid uppercase" q:key="7m_3"><span class="_captionText_1cw91_211"><!--t=4g-->Biden, referring to trump<!-- --><!--t=4h--><!-- --><!--t=4i--><!-- --></span><span class="decoration _decoration_1cw91_158"></span></figcaption></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4j q:key=5auE:fallback-id-1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_13--><!--qv q:key=Rz_7--><!--qv q:id=4k q:key=0NDF:Rz_6--><h3 class="subHeading _subHeading_hyokb_8 uppercase tracking-wide" data-testid="subheading" q:key="VY_1"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4k q:key=-->Verdict<!--/qv--></h3><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4l q:key=JbNX:FACT_CHECK_CONTENTp1--><p q:id="4m" q:key="Il_0">This is true. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=Rz_9--><!--qv q:id=4n q:key=0NDF:Rz_8--><h3 class="subHeading _subHeading_hyokb_8 uppercase tracking-wide" data-testid="subheading" q:key="VY_1"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4n q:key=-->Analysis<!--/qv--></h3><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4o q:key=JbNX:FACT_CHECK_CONTENTp1--><p q:id="4p" q:key="Il_0">The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention found that homicide <a href="https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/pressroom/nchs_press_releases/2021/202110.htm" target="_blank">rose 30% in 2020</a>, the last year of Trump's presidency, while the FBI estimated the rise in murder to be nearly 30%. And while the number may be correct, it's important to note the huge hike occurred during the 2020 pandemic, when American society was upended in many ways.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=46 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52651--><!--qv q:id=4q q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52651--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:18:42.060Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52651" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="4r"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:18 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=4s-->Biden warns that the threat seen on Jan. 6 is still 'very much alive'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=4t q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="4u" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4t q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4q q:key=--><!--qv q:id=4v q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=4w q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=4w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4x q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="4y" q:key="Il_0">Biden said this will be the first presidential election since Jan. 6, 2021. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=4z q:key=5auE:"Onth1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=4z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=50 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="51" q:key="Il_0">"On that day, we almost lost everything about who we are as a country, and that threat, this is not hyperbole, that threat is still very much alive. Donald Trump says he will refuse to accept the election results if he loses again," Biden said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=52 q:key=5auE:Biden2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=52 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=53 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="54" q:key="Il_0">Biden said the country can't let Trump make the same attempt again.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=4q q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52648--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52648"><!--qv q:id=55 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52648--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:17:04.204Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52648" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="58"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:17 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=59-->Pro-Palestinian protesters turn their backs to Biden<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=5a q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-seitz-wald-ncpn385646" q:id="5b" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=5a q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=57 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=5c q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=5d q:key=5auE:Agrou0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=5d q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=5e q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="5f" q:key="Il_0">A group of pro-Palestinian protesters standing with the Minnesota delegation have turned their backs to Biden during his remarks. They are each holding a hand over their mouths. Seven protestersÂ are holding buttons that say ânot another bombâ and have âarms embargo nowâ written in red on their hands.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=5g q:key=5auE:AsmaM1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=5g q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=5h q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="5i" q:key="Il_0">Asma Mohammed, one of the uncommitted delegates from Minneapolis, said the plan was intentionally not to interrupt andÂ that they wanted to protest Biden. But they will prob not do same when Harris speaks because they feel likeÂ sheâsÂ moving in the right direction.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=5j q:key=5auE:rcim301502--><!--qv q:id=5k q:key=HvIT:rcim301502--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="5l"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_840/rockcms/2024-08/IMG8593-a5fd27.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_420/rockcms/2024-08/IMG8593-a5fd27.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_585/rockcms/2024-08/IMG8593-a5fd27.avif"/><img alt="" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="585" loading="lazy" q:id="5m" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_4032,h_3024/rockcms/2024-08/IMG8593-a5fd27.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=5n q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=5o-->Pro-Palestinian protesters turn their backs as President Joe Biden speaks.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=5p-->Alex Seitz-Wald<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=57 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52642--><!--qv q:id=5q q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52642--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:16:32.185Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52642" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="5r"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:16 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=5s-->Biden speech exceeds length of his 2012 VP speech<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=5t q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088" q:id="5u" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=5t q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=5q q:key=--><!--qv q:id=5v q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=5w q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=5w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=5x q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="5y" q:key="Il_0">Biden's speech hit the 38-minute mark, officially surpassing the length of his 2012 vice presidential acceptance speech.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=5z q:key=5auE:Thesp1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=5z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=60 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="61" q:key="Il_0">The speech is also longer than his 2020 nomination acceptance speech and his 2008 VP acceptance speech.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=5q q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52638--><!--qv q:id=62 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52638--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:16:11.530Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52638" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="63"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:16 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=64-->Biden talks up 'power of women' and bashes Trump's role in overturning Roe v. Wade<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=65 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151" q:id="66" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=65 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=62 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=67 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=68 q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=68 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=69 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6a" q:key="Il_0">Biden touched on reproductive freedom, referring to Trump's role in appointing conservative Supreme Court justices who helped overturn the constitutional right to abortion.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6b q:key=5auE:Biden1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6b q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6c q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6d" q:key="Il_0">Biden cited the Supreme Court majority's writing in its decision to overturn Roe v. Wade that women "are not without electoral or political power.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6e q:key=5auE:"Noki2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6e q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6f q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6g" q:key="Il_0">"No kidding," Biden said. "Republicans found out the power of women in 2022, and Donald Trump is going to find out the power of women in 2024."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6h q:key=5auE:Voter3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6h q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6i q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6j" q:key="Il_0">Voters are set toÂ <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/abortion-rights-ballot-measure-south-dakota-rcna152746" target="_blank">weigh in on</a><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/abortion-rights-ballot-measure-south-dakota-rcna152746" target="_blank">Â c</a><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/abortion-rights-ballot-measure-south-dakota-rcna152746" target="_blank">onstitutional amendments</a>Â to enshrine abortion rights in several states this fall.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=62 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52646--><!--qv q:id=6k q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52646--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:15:51.379Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52646" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="6l"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:15 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=6m-->Biden says his administration is working toward an Israel-Hamas cease-fire deal<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=6n q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="6o" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=6n q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=6k q:key=--><!--qv q:id=6p q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=6q q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6r q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6s" q:key="Il_0">Biden said his administration will keep working to bring hostages home and end the war in Gaza.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6t q:key=5auE:âTwod1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6u q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6v" q:key="Il_0">âTwo days ago, I put forward a proposal that brought us closerâ to a cease-fire agreement âthan weâve done since Oct. 7,â he said.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6w q:key=5auE:Biden2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6x q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="6y" q:key="Il_0">Biden said his administration, including Secretary of State Antony Blinken, is working to prevent a wider war, reunite hostages with their families and surge humanitarian health and food assistance into Gaza.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=6z q:key=5auE:Heals3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=6z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=70 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="71" q:key="Il_0">He also said of the anti-Israel demonstrators in Chicago: âThose protesters out in the street, they have a point. A lot of innocent people are being killed on both sides.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52644"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=74 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52644--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:15:29.331Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52644" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="75"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:15 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=76-->Biden says he isn't angry at those who called for him to step aside<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=77 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="78" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=77 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=74 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=79 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=7a q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=7a q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7b q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="7c" q:key="Il_0">Biden addressed people who called on him to bow out of the presidential race, saying he was not angry.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7d q:key=5auE:"Allt1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=7d q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7e q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="7f" q:key="Il_0">"All this talk about how I'm angry at all those people who said I should step down, that's not true," he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7g q:key=5auE:Theau2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=7g q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7h q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="7i" q:key="Il_0">The audience chanted, "We love Joe."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7j q:key=5auE:"Ilov3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=7j q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7k q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="7l" q:key="Il_0">"I love my country more, and we need to preserve our democracy," he said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=74 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52643--><!--qv q:id=7m q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52643--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:14:58.343Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52643" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="7n"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:14 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=7o-->Convention officials forced to shorten opening night<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=7p q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.msnbc.com/author/nnamdi-egwuonwu-ncpn1305655" q:id="7q" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=7p q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=7m q:key=--><!--qv q:id=7r q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=7s q:key=5auE:Night0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=7s q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7t q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="7u" q:key="Il_0">Night one was almost too successful, convention officials said. The constant cheering and applause forced convention officials to skip planned speakers and performers to ensure Biden had enough time to complete his address, officials said in a statement </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7v q:key=5auE:âBeca1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=7v q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=7w q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="7x" q:key="Il_0">âBecause of the raucous applause interrupting speaker after speaker, we ultimately skipped elements of our program to ensure we could get to President Biden as quickly as possible so that he could speak directly to the American people," the statement read.Â "We are proud of the electric atmosphere in our convention hall and proud that our convention is showcasing the broad and diverse coalition behind the Harris-Walz ticket throughout the week on and off the stage."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=7m q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52640--><!--qv q:id=7y q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52640--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T04:04:54.780Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52640" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="7z"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:04 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=80-->Rep. Grace Meng rescheduled as DNC Day 1 goes long<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=81 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791" q:id="82" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=81 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=7y q:key=--><!--qv q:id=83 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=84 q:key=5auE:Rep.G0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=84 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=85 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="86" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Grace Meng, D-N.Y., was scheduled to speak at the convention tonight, but after it got off to a late start she never took the stage.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=87 q:key=5auE:Sheâh1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=87 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=88 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="89" q:key="Il_0">She âhas been rescheduled for another nightâ that is still to be announced, a spokesperson for Meng told NBC News.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=7y q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52553--><!--qv q:id=8a q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52553--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:58:52.371Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52553" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="8b"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:58 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=8c-->Biden talks up jobs that don't require college degrees<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=8d q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="8e" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=8d q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=8a q:key=--><!--qv q:id=8f q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=8g q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=8g q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=8h q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="8i" q:key="Il_0">Biden spent part of his speech promoting his support of jobs that do not require college degrees.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=8j q:key=5auE:"Wecr1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=8j q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=8k q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="8l" q:key="Il_0">"We created apprenticeships with businesses and communities, putting students on a path to a good-paying job whether or not they go to college," he said. "And by the way, we're making college a hell of a lot more affordable."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=8a q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52635--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52635"><!--qv q:id=8m q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52635--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:56:02.598Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52635" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="8p"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:56 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=8q-->Biden says he's proud to be first president to walk a picket line<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=8r q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="8s" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=8r q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=8o q:key=--><!--qv q:id=8t q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=8u q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=8u q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=8v q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="8w" q:key="Il_0">Biden has often called himself the most pro-union president, and tonight he doubled down on that.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=8x q:key=5auE:"Wall1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=8x q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=8y q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="8z" q:key="Il_0">"Wall Street didnât build America," he said. "Unions built the middle class."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=90 q:key=5auE:Lasty2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=90 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=91 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="92" q:key="Il_0">Last year, Biden joined striking members of the United Auto Workers near Detroit.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=93 q:key=5auE:UAWPr3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=93 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=94 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="95" q:key="Il_0">UAW President Shawn Fain was among tonight's convention speakers, touting what he said is Biden's pro-worker agenda, saying Harris is the only candidate who will protect the right of workers to organize.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=8o q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52634--><!--qv q:id=96 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52634--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:48:37.909Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52634" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="97"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:48 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=98-->Biden nods to Harris in touting his administration's accomplishments<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=99 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="9a" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=99 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=96 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=9b q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=9c q:key=5auE:Inhis0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=9c q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9d q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="9e" q:key="Il_0">In his remarks, Biden has repeatedly sought to tie Harris to the administration's top domestic agenda items, from infrastructure investments to lowering the cost of prescription drugs.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9f q:key=5auE:Whent1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=9f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9g q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="9h" q:key="Il_0">When the crowd started chanting, "Thank you, Joe," he jumped in with a suggested addition: "Thank you, Kamala, too."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=96 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52632--><!--qv q:id=9i q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52632--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:44:59.643Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52632" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="9j"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:44 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=9k-->Biden says 'democracy has delivered, and now democracy must be preserved'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=9l q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="9m" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=9l q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=9i q:key=--><!--qv q:id=9n q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=9o q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=9o q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9p q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="9q" q:key="Il_0">Biden said he wants to report that "democracy has prevailed, democracy has delivered, and now democracy must be preserved."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9r q:key=5auE:"We'r1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=9r q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9s q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="9t" q:key="Il_0">"We're facing an inflection point, one of those rare moments in history when the decisions we make now will determine the fate of our nation and the world for decades to come. That's not hyperbole. I mean it literally. We're in a battle for the very soul of America," he said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52632-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Biden says 'democracy has delivered, and now democracy must be preserved'" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="9u" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52632-overflow-content" q:id="9v"><!--qv q:id=9w q:key=5auE:Hespo0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=9w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9x q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="9y" q:key="Il_0">He spoke about what occurred in Charlottesville, Virginia, in 2017 and how it motivated him to run for president again. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=9z q:key=5auE:"Iran1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=9z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=a0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="a1" q:key="Il_0">"I ran for president in 2020 because of what I saw in Charlottesville," he said. "Extremists coming out of the woods, carrying torches, their veins bulging from their necks, carrying Nazi swastikas, chanting the same exact antisemitic bile that was heard in Germany in the early â30s, neo-Nazis, white supremacists, the Ku Klux Klan, so emboldened by a president then in the White House that they saw as an ally [that] they didn't even bother to wear their hoods." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=9i q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52633--><!--qv q:id=a2 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52633--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:42:17.010Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52633" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="a3"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:42 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=a4-->Gaza protester clashes with attendees during Biden's speech<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=a5 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.msnbc.com/author/nnamdi-egwuonwu-ncpn1305655" q:id="a6" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=a5 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=a2 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=a7 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=a8 q:key=5auE:Aprot0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=a8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=a9 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="aa" q:key="Il_0">A protester was trying to unfurl a flag in support of Palestinians in Gaza. Other attendees tried to block the flag with âWe â¤ï¸ Joeâ signs before one snatched the flag and threw it aside. Chants of âWe love Joeâ also drowned out attempts by the protesters to interrupt Bidenâs remarks.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ab q:key=5auE:Theco1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ab q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ac q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ad" q:key="Il_0">The commotion went largely unnoticed by Biden or most of the people in the convention center.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=a2 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52630--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52630"><!--qv q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ay-->Biden takes the stage to rapturous applause<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=az q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" ovation from the delegates in the crowd.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=b5 q:key=5auE:Theso1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=b5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=b6 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="b7" q:key="Il_0">The song selection: Jackie Wilson's "(Your Love Keeps Lifting Me) Higher and Higher."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="c2"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724125086065_f_mo_dnc_ashley_girldad_240819_1920x1080-90i8ej.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724125086065_f_mo_dnc_ashley_girldad_240819_1920x1080-90i8ej.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724125086065_f_mo_dnc_ashley_girldad_240819_1920x1080-90i8ej.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724125086065_f_mo_dnc_ashley_girldad_240819_1920x1080-90i8ej.avif"/><img alt="Ashley Biden describes in DNC remarks how her father embodies 'girl dad' spirit" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="c3" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724125086065_f_mo_dnc_ashley_girldad_240819_1920x1080-90i8ej.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=c4 q:key=5auE:JoeBi1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=c4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=c5 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="c6" q:key="Il_0">Joe Bidenâs daughter, Ashley Biden, introduced him in deeply personal remarks that honored his career, as well as his family life. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=c7 q:key=5auE:"JoeB2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=c7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=c8 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="c9" q:key="Il_0">"Joe Biden is the O.G. girl dad," Ashley Biden said, following her mother, the first lady. "And he wasn't just a girl dad. I could see that he valued and trusted women. How he listened to his mother. How he believed his sister. Most of all, how he respected my mother's career."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52623-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Ashley Biden introduces her father as the 'O.G. girl dad'" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="ca" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52623-overflow-content" q:id="cb"><!--qv q:id=cc q:key=5auE:Ashle0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=cc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cd q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ce" q:key="Il_0">Ashley Biden was one of Bidenâs family members who sat to the side of the Resolute Desk as Biden announced his decision to step aside as the presidential nominee less than a month ago.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cf q:key=5auE:"Dad,1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=cf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cg q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ch" q:key="Il_0">"Dad, you always tell us, but we don't tell you enough, that you are the love of our lives and the life of our love," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ci q:key=5auE:Sheca2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ci q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cj q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ck" q:key="Il_0">She called her father "one of the most consequential leaders in American history" and said he knew that "family was everything." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cl q:key=5auE:Ashle3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=cl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cm q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="cn" q:key="Il_0">Ashley Biden recounted losing her brother Beau Biden to brain cancer in 2015, saying it had felt like the grief would "never end."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=co q:key=5auE:"Ikno4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=co q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cp q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="cq" q:key="Il_0">"I know that Beau is here with us tonight," she said. "He is always here with us."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cr q:key=5auE:Biden5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=cr q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cs q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ct" q:key="Il_0">Biden called the election "the fight of our lifetimes," characterizing it as a fight for freedom, democracy and reproductive rights.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cu q:key=5auE:"Afte6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=cu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cv q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="cw" q:key="Il_0">"After Beau passed, I got this tattoo on my wrist. It says 'Courage, dear heart,'" Biden said. "And now, this election requires the courageous hearts of all of us."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cx q:key=5auE:"Toni7--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=cx q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=cy q:key=JbNX:markupp7--><p class="feedBody" q:id="cz" q:key="Il_0">"Tonight I am asking you, if you stood with us in 2020, call upon your courageous heart. Stand with us today," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=b8 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52615--><!--qv q:id=d0 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52615--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative items-center">605d ago / 11:19 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=d2-->First lady praises Biden's service, recounts his withdrawing from race<!-- --></h2><div Biden honors husband Joe Biden at Democratic convention" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="dv" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124711879_f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819_1920x1080-uzsxjl.jpg" q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="dy" q:key="Il_0">First lady Jill Biden took the stage as the crowd waved "Jill" signs and applauded and chanted her name.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=dz q:key=5auE:Shepr2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=dz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=e0 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="e1" q:key="Il_0">She praised her husband's service and recounted his decision to exit the presidential race last month.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=e2 q:key=5auE:Shesa3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=e2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=e3 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="e4" q:key="Il_0">She said there "are moments when I fall in love with him all over again," going on to list examples. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=e5 q:key=5auE:"Andw4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=e5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=e6 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="e7" q:key="Il_0">"And weeks ago, when I saw him dig deep into his soul and decide to no longer seek re-election and endorse Kamala Harris," she said at the end of her list.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52615-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post First lady praises Biden's service, recounts his withdrawing from race" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="e8" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52615-overflow-content" q:id="e9"><!--qv q:id=ea q:key=5auE:Sheal0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ea q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=eb q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ec" q:key="Il_0">She also recounted Beau Biden's telling her and her husband about Harris.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ed q:key=5auE:"Ours1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ed q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ee q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ef" q:key="Il_0">"Our son Beau first worked with Kamala when he was attorney general of Delaware. He told me at the dinner table one night, 'Mom, sheâs special. Someone to keep your eye on,'" she said. "And he was right. Joe and I know Kamala. We have seen her courage, her determination and her leadership up close."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=d0 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52627--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52627"><!--qv q:id=eg q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52627--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="eh"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52627"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=ei q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52627--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:19:17.354Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52627" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="ej"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:19 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ek-->Sen. Chris Coons praises and thanks Biden for his leadership<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=el q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="em" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=el q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ei q:key=--><!--qv q:id=en q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=eo q:key=5auE:Sen.C0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=eo q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ep q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="eq" q:key="Il_0">Sen. Chris Coons, D-Del., who was a co-chair of the Biden campaign and is a close friend of the president's, praised Biden's leadership in the White House.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=er q:key=5auE:"Bide1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=er q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=es q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="et" q:key="Il_0">"Biden's courage, Joe Biden's faith in us, Joe Biden's determination to heal the soul of our nation gave us hope and gave us confidence. Someone who has himself been knocked down by life, time and again. Joe Biden knows the grit and determination of the American people. He believed in us, and Joe Biden helped us get back up again," he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52627-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Sen. Chris Coons praises and thanks Biden for his leadership" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="eu" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52627-overflow-content" q:id="ev"><!--qv q:id=ew q:key=5auE:mmvo217504325507--><!--qv q:id=ex q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=ez q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="f0" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=f1 q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/sen-chris-coons-reflects-on-president-biden-s-presidency-217504325507" q:id="f2" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=f1 q:key=--><!--t=f3-->'Mr. President, thank you':  Sen. Chris Coons reflects on Biden's presidency<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_5"><!--t=f4-->06:12<!-- --></div><div 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_1920x1080-caert2.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_1920x1080-caert2.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_1920x1080-caert2.avif"/><img alt="'Mr. President, thank you':  Sen. Chris Coons reflects on Biden's presidency" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="fl" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_1920x1080-caert2.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=fm q:key=5auE:"Joea1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=fm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=fn q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="fo" q:key="Il_0">"Joe and Kamala helped rebuild our economy from the middle up, from the bottom up and the middle out, not from the top down," he said. "And they made our families safer and our country stronger at home and abroad. Today, we are so much better off because they believed in us, in our democracy and our incredible first lady, Jill Biden."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=fp q:key=5auE:Coons2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=fp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=fq q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="fr" q:key="Il_0">Coons said he has "never known a more compassionate man than Joe Biden" and has "never known a man who has taken from his own loss and his own faith and delivered so much for the future of so many others."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=fs q:key=5auE:"Mr.P3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=fs q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ft q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="fu" q:key="Il_0">"Mr. President, you were my senator as a Delawarean, you are my president as an American, and you will always be my friend on behalf of our nation, Joe, for your courage in fighting for our democracy," he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=ei q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52625--><!--qv q:id=fv q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52625--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:17:21.142Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52625" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="fw"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:17 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=fx-->WarnockÂ delivers impromptu sermon on Israel, Gaza<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=fy q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="fz" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=fy q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=fv q:key=--><!--qv q:id=g0 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=g1 q:key=5auE:Warno0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=g1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=g2 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="g3" q:key="Il_0">WarnockÂ got a standing ovation after he called for peace in Israel and Gaza.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=g4 q:key=5auE:âInee1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=g4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=g5 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="g6" q:key="Il_0">âI need my neighborâs children to be OK so that my children will be OK," he said before he launched into an impassioned plea for justice.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=g7 q:key=5auE:"Inee2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=g7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=g8 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="g9" q:key="Il_0">"I need the poor children of Israel and the poor children of Gaza, I need Israelis and Palestinians ... those in Ukraine, I need American children on both sides of the tracks to be OK," he said as the crowd erupted in applause. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=fv q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52622--><!--qv q:id=ga q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52622--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T03:10:56.475Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52622" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="gb"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 11:10 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=gc-->Sen. Warnock, a Baptist pastor, says Trump should 'try reading' the Bible<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=gd q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151" q:id="ge" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=gd q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ga q:key=--><!--qv q:id=gf q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=gg q:key=5auE:Sen.R0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=gg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=gh q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="gi" q:key="Il_0">Sen. Raphael Warnock, D-Ga., suggested Trump ought to "try reading" the Bible in remarks tonight that took aim at the former president for what Warnock described as efforts to divide Americans. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=gj q:key=5auE:"Heis1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=gj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=gk q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="gl" q:key="Il_0">"He is a clear and present threat to the precious covenant we share with one another. And yes, I saw him. I saw him holding the Bible and endorsing a Bible as if it needed his endorsement. He should try reading it," Warnock, a Baptist pastor, said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=gm q:key=5auE:NBCNe2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=gm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=gn q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="go" q:key="Il_0">NBC News <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trump-owns-1-million-crypto-made-300k-branded-bibles-financial-disclos-rcna166850" target="_blank">reported last week</a> that the former president's financial disclosure showed that he had made $300,000 onÂ <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/business/business-news/trumps-deals-sell-bibles-sneakers-perfume-are-unprecedented-presidenti-rcna145637" target="_blank">branded Bibles</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52622-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Sen. Warnock, a Baptist pastor, says Trump should 'try reading' the Bible" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="gp" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52622-overflow-content" q:id="gq"><!--qv q:id=gr q:key=5auE:mmvo217500741835--><!--qv q:id=gs q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=gu q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="gv" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=gw q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/sen-warnock-at-dnc-trump-should-try-reading-the-bible-217500741835" q:id="gx" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=gw q:key=--><!--t=gy-->Sen. 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123947440_f_mo_dnc_warnock_bible_240819_1920x1080-vdyny9.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123947440_f_mo_dnc_warnock_bible_240819_1920x1080-vdyny9.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123947440_f_mo_dnc_warnock_bible_240819_1920x1080-vdyny9.avif"/><img alt="Sen. Warnock at DNC: Trump 'should try reading' the Bible" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="hg" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123947440_f_mo_dnc_warnock_bible_240819_1920x1080-vdyny9.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hh q:key=5auE:Inhis1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=hh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hi q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="hj" q:key="Il_0">In his speech, Warnock also referred to the Capitol riot and efforts in the wake of Trump's 2020 electoral defeat to change election laws. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hk q:key=5auE:"Behi2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=hk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hl q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="hm" q:key="Il_0">"Behind the big lie was an even bigger lie. It is the lie that this increasingly diverse American electorate does not get to determine the future of the country, the lie and the logic of Jan. 6 is a sickness," Warnock said. "It is a kind of cancer that then metastasized into dozens of voter suppression laws, all across our country."  </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hn q:key=5auE:TheGe3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=hn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ho q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="hp" q:key="Il_0">The Georgia election board today approved an effort that could allow county election administrators more paths to <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52484" target="_blank">delay the certification</a> of the vote. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=ga q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52618--><!--qv q:id=hq q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52618--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:58:21.143Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52618" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="hr"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:58 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=hs-->Rep. Jasmine Crockett jokes about viral moment <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=ht q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="hu" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ht q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=hq q:key=--><!--qv q:id=hv q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=hw q:key=5auE:Rep.J0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=hw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hx q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="hy" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Jasmine Crockett, D-Texas, who went viral last year after she used colorful language to describe Trumpâs hoarding of classified documents, was back at it tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=hz q:key=5auE:âSheb1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=hz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=i0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="i1" q:key="Il_0">âShe became a career prosecutor, while he became a career criminal with 34 felonies, two impeachments and one porn star to prove it,â Crockett said of Harris and Trump.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=i2 q:key=5auE:âShep2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=i2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=i3 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="i4" q:key="Il_0">âShe presides over the Senate, while he keeps national secrets next to his thinking chair â yâall know what I said <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v8zemW5JeUc" target="_blank">the other time</a> â in Mar-a-Lago," she added.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=i5 q:key=5auE:mmvo217499717550--><!--qv q:id=i6 q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=i8 q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="i9" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=ia q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-crockett-compares-resumes-of-harris-and-trump-at-dnc-217499717550" q:id="ib" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ia q:key=--><!--t=ic-->Rep. Crockett at DNC: 'Kamala Harris has a rÃ©sumÃ©; Donald Trump has a rap sheet'<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121970188_f_mo_dnc_crockett_harris_240819_1920x1080-gkbuhb.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121970188_f_mo_dnc_crockett_harris_240819_1920x1080-gkbuhb.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121970188_f_mo_dnc_crockett_harris_240819_1920x1080-gkbuhb.avif"/><img alt="Rep. Crockett at DNC: 'Kamala Harris has a rÃ©sumÃ©; Donald Trump has a rap sheet'" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="iu" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121970188_f_mo_dnc_crockett_harris_240819_1920x1080-gkbuhb.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=iv q:key=5auE:Crock4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=iv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=iw q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ix" q:key="Il_0">Crockett said that when she took office, she was nervous and doubted her place in Congress. She said Harris saw her in distress and comforted her when they met for the first time.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=iy q:key=5auE:âThem5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=iy q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=iz q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="j0" q:key="Il_0">âThe most powerful woman in the world wiped my tears and listened,â Crockett said, tearing up onstage. âThe brief but impactful interaction gave me my legislative legs, and Iâve been running ever since.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=hq q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52619--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52619"><!--qv q:id=j1 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52619--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]"
