relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:56:18.702Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52619" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="j4"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:56 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=j5-->Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear highlights women's rights<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=j6 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="j7" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=j6 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=j3 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=j8 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=j9 q:key=5auE:Kentu0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=j9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ja q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="jb" q:key="Il_0">Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear began his remarks by saying Hadley Duvall was one of the bravest people he has met.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=jc q:key=5auE:Duval1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=jc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=jd q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="je" q:key="Il_0">Duvall had spoken out in a pro-Beshear advertisement about surviving sexual abuse, and many credited the ad with having a large impact on Beshear's being re-elected as a Democratic governor in a deep red state.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=jf q:key=5auE:Beshe2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=jf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=jg q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="jh" q:key="Il_0">Beshear said that women should have "freedom over their own bodies," arguing that freedom should include whether women want to pursue in vitro fertilization or have children.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52619-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear highlights women's rights" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="ji" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52619-overflow-content" q:id="jj"><!--qv q:id=jk q:key=5auE:mmvo217498693757--><!--qv q:id=jl q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=jn q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="jo" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=jp q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/gov-andy-beshear-calls-for-protecting-reproductive-freedom-at-the-dnc-217498693757" q:id="jq" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=jp q:key=--><!--t=jr-->Gov. class="feedBody" q:id="kf" q:key="Il_0">Beshear was initially reported to have been considered to be Harris' running mate.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="le" q:key="Il_0">Four people whose lives were jeopardized because of abortion bans enacted at the state level since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade shared their personal stories with the delegates.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=lf q:key=5auE:Democ2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=lf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=lg q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="lh" q:key="Il_0">Democrats have sought to put human faces on the debate over reproductive freedom as the Harris-Walz campaign goes after Trump for appointing three of the five conservative justices who voted to reverse Roe.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=li q:key=5auE:Thesp3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=li q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=lj q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="lk" q:key="Il_0">The speakers included Hadley Duvall, a Kentucky woman who was raped and impregnated by her stepfather. Duvall has been featured in ads from Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear, who spoke after her remarks.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=kg q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52616--><!--qv q:id=ll q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52616--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:51:43.556Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52616" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="lm"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:51 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ln-->Democrats hit Trump on abortion with women who say they were denied emergency abortions<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=lo q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986" q:id="lp" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=lo q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ll q:key=--><!--qv q:id=lq q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=lr q:key=5auE:Theco0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=lr q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ls q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="lt" q:key="Il_0">The convention just showed an emotional video of a woman discussing how she was denied emergency abortions because of state abortion bans.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=lu q:key=5auE:"Iwas1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=lu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=lv q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="lw" q:key="Il_0">"I was punished for three days having to wait for either my baby to die or me to die or both," a mother named Amanda Zurawski says in the video. "I almost died because doctors were forced to follow Trump's abortion ban."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=lx q:key=5auE:Zuraw2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=lx q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ly q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="lz" q:key="Il_0">Zurawski's story has been featured in news media and Democratic campaign ads. She says doctors told her her pregnancy was no longer viable but wouldn't provide the medical care she says she needed because of the state's near-total ban on abortion. She <a href="https://19thnews.org/2024/08/dnc-amanda-zurawski-kaitlyn-joshua-hadley-duvall-speakers/" target="_blank">unsuccessfully sued the state</a> in response. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52616-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Democrats hit Trump on abortion with women who say they were denied emergency abortions" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="m0" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52616-overflow-content" q:id="m1"><!--qv q:id=m2 q:key=5auE:Amand0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=m2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=m3 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="m4" q:key="Il_0">Amanda and her husband, Josh, appeared on the convention stage, both sharing their stories, warning that a second Trump term would lead to even more restrictions on abortion and reproductive freedom. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=m5 q:key=5auE:Kaitl1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=m5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=m6 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="m7" q:key="Il_0">Kaitlyn Joshua and Hadley Duvall, two other women who have shared their stories in recent years, <a href="https://19thnews.org/2024/08/dnc-amanda-zurawski-kaitlyn-joshua-hadley-duvall-speakers/" target="_blank">also spoke</a>. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=ll q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52612--><!--qv q:id=m8 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52612--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:37:19.168Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52612" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="m9"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:37 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ma-->Rep. Jamie Raskin recounts Jan. 6 attack<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=mb q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="mc" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=mb q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=m8 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=md q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=me q:key=5auE:mmvo217499205523--><!--qv q:id=mf q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=mh q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="mi" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=mj q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-jamie-raskin-recalls-hearing-pounding-on-house-door-during-jan-6-217499205523" q:id="mk" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=mj q:key=--><!--t=ml-->Rep. Jamie Raskin recalls hearing pounding on House door during Jan. 6<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" Jamie Raskin recalls hearing pounding on House door during Jan. 6&amp;body=https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-jamie-raskin-recalls-hearing-pounding-on-house-door-during-jan-6-217499205523" on:click="q-DbLqUMDt.js#s_KE0wDxvLlrA" q:id="mv" role="menuitem" tabindex="-1"><!--qv q:id=mw q:key=dJkd:GH_10--><svg aria-hidden="true" class="_shareLinkIcon_akhn9_202" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="mx" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#email" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></a></li></ul></div></div><!--qv q:key=GH_12--><button class="_clickToPlayButton_akhn9_247 flex-center" on:click="q-wvTVTK-H.js#s_fXS03dk2qiE[0 1 2]" q:id="my"><div class="_playIconContainer_akhn9_20 flex-center"><!--qv q:id=mz q:key=dJkd:GH_11--><svg aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="n0" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#play" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></div></button><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=n1 q:key=HvIT:GH_14--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 _posterFrame_akhn9_275 mb-0" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="n2"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121520300_f_mo_dnc_raskin_jan6_240819_1920x1080-g9iyzm.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121520300_f_mo_dnc_raskin_jan6_240819_1920x1080-g9iyzm.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121520300_f_mo_dnc_raskin_jan6_240819_1920x1080-g9iyzm.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121520300_f_mo_dnc_raskin_jan6_240819_1920x1080-g9iyzm.avif"/><img alt="Rep. Jamie Raskin recalls hearing pounding on House door during Jan. 6" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="n3" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121520300_f_mo_dnc_raskin_jan6_240819_1920x1080-g9iyzm.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=n4 q:key=5auE:Rep.J1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=n4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=n5 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="n6" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., recounted the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol and laid blame at Trump's feet, calling him a "career criminal."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=n7 q:key=5auE:Hehig2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=n7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=n8 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="n9" q:key="Il_0">He highlighted how the rioters called to "hang Mike Pence," noting that Pence, Trump's vice president, did not endorse him. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=na q:key=5auE:Raski3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=na q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nb q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="nc" q:key="Il_0">Raskin served on the House Jan. 6 committee. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nd q:key=5auE:"Arew4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=nd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ne q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="nf" q:key="Il_0">"Are we going to go back to the days of election suppression and violent insurrection?" he asked. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52612-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Rep. Jamie Raskin recounts Jan. 6 attack" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="ng" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52612-overflow-content" q:id="nh"><!--qv q:id=ni q:key=5auE:"No!"0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ni q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nj q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="nk" q:key="Il_0">"No!" the crowd yelled before breaking into chants of "not going back."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nl q:key=5auE:Raski1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=nl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nm q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="nn" q:key="Il_0">Raskin criticized Trump's saying he would pardon convicted Jan. 6 rioters as the crowd booed in response. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=m8 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52611--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52611"><!--qv q:id=no q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52611--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="np"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52611"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=nq q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52611--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:29:28.847Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52611" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="nr"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:29 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ns-->'Law &amp; Order' pastiche mocks Trump's being a convicted felon<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=nt q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="nu" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=nt q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=nq q:key=--><!--qv q:id=nv q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=nw q:key=5auE:Avide0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=nw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nx q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ny" q:key="Il_0">A video pastiche of the introduction to the television show "Law &amp; Order" mocked Trump for his felony conviction.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=nz q:key=5auE:Itwas1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=nz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=o0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="o1" q:key="Il_0">It was a marked shift in tone for Democrats, who have shed the "take the high road" approach to Trump and have repeatedly sought to lambaste him for his criminal conviction during the first day of the convention. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=o2 q:key=5auE:"Inth2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=o2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=o3 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="o4" q:key="Il_0">"In the criminal justice system, the people are represented by two separate yet equally important groups: the police, who investigate crime, and the district attorneys, who prosecute the offenders. This is the story of Donald Trump," the narrator said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52611-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post 'Law &amp; Order' pastiche mocks Trump's being a convicted felon" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="o5" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52611-overflow-content" q:id="o6"><!--qv q:id=o7 q:key=5auE:Thevi0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=o7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=o8 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="o9" q:key="Il_0">The video continued: "His entire life, Trump has believed he's above the law, but no one would ever dare hold him accountable. He lies. He rips off workers. He sexually abuses women ... in business. He cheated on his wife with a porn star and paid her off so the American people wouldn't find out during an election. But in the criminal justice system, ordinary Americans have had the courage to find him accountable time and time again: guilty, guilty, guilty. Donald Trump guilty on all 34 felony counts."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=oa q:key=5auE:Itfin1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=oa q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ob q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="oc" q:key="Il_0">It finished by saying voters have to "render our own verdict" on Trump in November. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=nq q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52609--><!--qv q:id=od q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52609--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:21:30.423Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52609" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="oe"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:21 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=of-->Rep. James Clyburn expresses gratitude for Biden<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=og q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="oh" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=og q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=od q:key=--><!--qv q:id=oi q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=oj q:key=5auE:AtopB0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=oj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ok q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ol" q:key="Il_0">A top Biden ally, Rep. James Clyburn, D-S.C., used part of his speech to thank the president, saying, "We owe him a great debt of gratitude," before he delivered forceful praise of Harris.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=om q:key=5auE:âAndw1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=om q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=on q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="oo" q:key="Il_0">âAnd weâre all grateful for one of the best decisions he made: selecting Kamala Harris as his vice president and endorsing her to succeed him," he said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=op q:key=5auE:mmvo217498181794--><!--qv q:id=oq q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=os q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="ot" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=ou q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-jim-clyburn-praises-biden-and-harris-administration-at-dnc-217498181794" q:id="ov" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ou q:key=--><!--t=ow-->'Restore American can-do spirit': Rep. Jim Clyburn praises Biden and Harris administration<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_5"><!--t=ox-->05:20<!-- Jim Clyburn praises Biden and Harris administration" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="pe" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724121373698_f_mo_dnc_jim_clyburn_240819_1920x1080-ilorob.jpg" q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ph" q:key="Il_0">Clyburn is often credited with helping revive Bidenâs 2020 campaign during the primary season. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=pi q:key=5auE:"Ourg4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=pi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=pj q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="pk" q:key="Il_0">"Our great democracy has been tested, and so has the basic goodness of the American people," Clyburn said, adding that Americans would continue to work toward "a more perfect union."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=od q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52610--><!--qv q:id=pl q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52610--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:17:08.155Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52610" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="pm"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:17 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=pn-->Clinton plays the hits<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=po q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/amanda-terkel-ncpn1300953" q:id="pp" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=po q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=pl q:key=--><!--qv q:id=pq q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=pr q:key=5auE:Clint0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=pr q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ps q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="pt" q:key="Il_0">Clintonâs speech was full of Easter eggs for her fans, with some of her biggest applause lines calling back to her past speeches and work.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=pu q:key=5auE:Shere1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=pu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=pv q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="pw" q:key="Il_0">She referred to shattering the highest glass ceiling â a theme of her 2016 presidential campaign. She also talked about how âit takes a villageâ â a throwback to her famous 1996 book. She turned her âthe future is femaleâ line into âthe future is here,â adding, âI wish my mother and Kamalaâs mother were here to see this.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=px q:key=5auE:Andas2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=px q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=py q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="pz" q:key="Il_0">And as she left the stage, âFight Songâ played â the earworm that was the theme of her 2016 run and will now be stuck in everyoneâs head all night.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=pl q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52604--><!--qv q:id=q0 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52604--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:09:46.014Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52604" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="q1"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:09 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=q2-->Hillary Clinton says 'the future is here' and Democrats have to 'keep going' <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=q3 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="q4" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=q3 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=q0 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=q5 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=q6 q:key=5auE:Hilla0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=q6 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=q7 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="q8" q:key="Il_0">Hillary Clinton said in her remarks that it was the honor of her life to accept the Democratic Party's nomination for president in 2016. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=q9 q:key=5auE:"Andn1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=q9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=qa q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="qb" q:key="Il_0">"And nearly 66 million Americans voted for a future where there are no ceilings on our dreams," she said, alluding to her winning the popular vote in that election. "Afterwards we refused to give up on America. Millions marched. Many ran for office. We kept our eyes on the future. Well, my friends, the future is here."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=qc q:key=5auE:mmvo217496645584--><!--qv q:id=qd q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=qf q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="r0"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.avif"/><img alt="Watch Hillary Clinton's full address to the 2024 Democratic National Convention" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="r1" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=r2 q:key=5auE:Clint3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=r2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=r3 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="r4" q:key="Il_0">Clinton said she wishes her mother and Harris' mother were there to see them â "they would say keep going." She said people like Shirley Chisholm, who paved the way for women running for president, would say keep going.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=r5 q:key=5auE:"Fami4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=r5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=r6 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="r7" q:key="Il_0">"Families, buildings that are lives, parents stretching to afford child care, young people struggling to pay the rent. Theyâre all asking us to keep going," she said. "With faith in each other and joy in our hearts, letâs send Kamala Harris and Tim Walz to the White House."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=q0 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52605--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52605"><!--qv q:id=r8 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52605--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="r9"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52605"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=ra q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52605--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:07:18.697Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52605" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="rb"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:07 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=rc-->Clinton nods while crowd chants 'Lock him up' â a reference to the anti-Clinton chant in 2016 <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=rd q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="re" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=rd q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=ra q:key=--><!--qv q:id=rf q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=rg q:key=5auE:Clint0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=rg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rh q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ri" q:key="Il_0">Clinton took aim at Trump's legal woes, mocking him for appearing to fall asleep at his hush money trial in New York. "When he woke up," she said, "he made his own kind of history: the first person to run for president with 34 felony convictions."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rj q:key=5auE:Thecr1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=rj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rk q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="rl" q:key="Il_0">The crowd went wild and started chanting: "Lock him up!" </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rm q:key=5auE:Eight2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=rm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rn q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ro" q:key="Il_0">Eight years ago, Trump supporters routinely chanted "Lock her up!" at rallies in reference to Clinton as Trump vowed to put her jail if he was elected. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rp q:key=5auE:Harri3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=rp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rq q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="rr" q:key="Il_0">Harris has sought to tamp down "Lock him up" chants at her rallies. Clinton tried to talk over the crowd for a moment when the chant began. But as the chants continued, she stood at the podium until the audience calmed. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=ra q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52603--><!--qv q:id=rs q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52603--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:05:36.172Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52603" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="rt"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:05 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ru-->Gwen Walz moved to tears during Hillary Clinton's speech<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=rv q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088" q:id="rw" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=rv q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=rs q:key=--><!--qv q:id=rx q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=ry q:key=5auE:Amidc0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ry q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=rz q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="s0" q:key="Il_0">Amid chants of "keep going" during Hillary Clinton's speech, Gwen Walz cried as she cheered for the 2016 nominee.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=rs q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52599--><!--qv q:id=s1 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52599--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:03:00.000Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52599" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="s2"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:03 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=s3-->Walz is wowed as Hillary Clinton takes to the stage<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=s4 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/christopher-cicchiello-ncpn1248427" q:id="s5" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=s4 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=s1 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=s6 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=s7 q:key=5auE:Clint0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=s7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=s8 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="s9" q:key="Il_0">Clinton walked onto the stage to thunderous applause. Everyone was on their feet, and Pelosi beamed with admiration. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sa q:key=5auE:Itwas1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=sa q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sb q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="sc" q:key="Il_0">It was the longest sustained applause of the convention so far. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sd q:key=5auE:ButWa2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=sd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=se q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="sf" q:key="Il_0">But Walz seemed seriously starstruck as the camera caught him mouthing the word "Wow!"</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=s1 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52601--><!--qv q:id=sg q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52601--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:01:01.156Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52601" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="sh"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:01 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=si-->Clinton begins speech honoring Biden<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=sj q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="sk" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=sj q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=sg q:key=--><!--qv q:id=sl q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=sm q:key=5auE:Clint0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=sm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sn q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="so" q:key="Il_0">Clinton kicked off her speech by honoring Biden, saying, "First, though, let's salute President Biden."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sp q:key=5auE:"Heha1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=sp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sq q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="sr" q:key="Il_0">"He has been democracy's champion at home and abroad," she said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ss q:key=5auE:Biden2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ss q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=st q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="su" q:key="Il_0">Biden will address the convention later tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sv q:key=5auE:"Than3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=sv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sw q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="sx" q:key="Il_0">"Thank you, Joe, for your lifetime of service and leadership," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sy q:key=5auE:Theau4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=sy q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=sz q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="t0" q:key="Il_0">The audience broke into chants of "thank you, Joe." Nancy Pelosi appeared to mouth, "Thank you, Joe," too.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=sg q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52600--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52600"><!--qv q:id=t1 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52600--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 data-pubat="2024-08-20T02:00:46.865Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52600" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="t4"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 10:00 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=t5-->Hillary Clinton walked out to 'Brave'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=t6 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="t7" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=t6 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=t3 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=t8 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=t9 q:key=5auE:Thefo0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=t9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ta q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="tb" q:key="Il_0">The former secretary of state took the stage to Sara Bareilles' song "Brave," a track that became synonymous with her 2016 presidential campaign.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=t3 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52594--><!--qv q:id=tc q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52594--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:52:37.048Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52594" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="td"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:52 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=te-->Kamala Harris' childhood friend and her mother speak: 'Your mom would be so proud'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=tf q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088" q:id="tg" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=tf q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=tc q:key=--><!--qv q:id=th q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=ti q:key=5auE:Stace0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ti q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=tj q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="tk" q:key="Il_0">Stacey Johnson-Batiste, Harris' childhood friend who wrote "Friends From the Beginning: The Berkeley Village That Raised Kamala and Me," spoke with her mother, Doris Johnson, who was the best friend of Harris' late mother.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=tl q:key=5auE:"Kama1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=tl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=tm q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="tn" q:key="Il_0">"Kamala has always been a protector," Johnson-Batiste said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex alt="Harris' childhood friend says she has always been a protector" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="uf" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119285597_f_mo_dnc_child_friend_protector_240819_1920x1080-l0wr0o.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ug q:key=5auE:Johns1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ug q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=uh q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ui" q:key="Il_0">Johnson-Batiste retold a story about a boy in their class who broke a sculpture she made. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=uj q:key=5auE:"Kama2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=uj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=uk q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ul" q:key="Il_0">"Kamala jumped in between him and me and said something that made him so mad he picked up a rock or something and hit her on the head," Johnson-Batiste said. "Blood came streaming down."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=um q:key=5auE:Thest3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=um q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=un q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="uo" q:key="Il_0">The stitches left a scar that Harris still has, Johnson-Batiste said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=up q:key=5auE:"That4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=up q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=uq q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="ur" q:key="Il_0">"That's the kind of person Kamala has always been, from the very beginning. Someone who doesn't hesitate to stand up for what's right, to take up for the underdog and to stand up to bullies," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=us q:key=5auE:Johns5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=us q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ut q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="uu" q:key="Il_0">Johnson said, "Kamala, your mom would be so proud of you."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=tc q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52592--><!--qv q:id=uv q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52592--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:48:42.595Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52592" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="uw"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:48 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=ux-->AOC calls for an Israel-Hamas cease-fire deal in her remarks <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=uy q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="uz" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=uy q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=uv q:key=--><!--qv q:id=v0 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=v1 q:key=5auE:Rep.A0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=v1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=v2 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="v3" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., said in her remarks that Harris is "working tirelessly" to secure a cease-fire deal in Gaza that would also bring the hostages home. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=v4 q:key=5auE:"InKa1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=v4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=v5 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="v6" q:key="Il_0">"In Kamala Harris, I see a leader who understands. I see a leader with a real commitment to a better future for working families and Chicago. We have to help her win, because we know that Donald Trump would sell this country for $1 if it meant lining his own pockets and greasing the palms of his Wall Street friends," Ocasio-Cortez said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_1920x1080-qylgkd.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_1920x1080-qylgkd.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_1920x1080-qylgkd.avif"/><img alt="AOC calls Harris a 'leader who understands' working class concerns" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="vy" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_1920x1080-qylgkd.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=vz q:key=5auE:Shesa1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=vz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="w1" q:key="Il_0">She said she's tired of hearing Trump, "a union buster," thinking "of himself as more of a patriot than the woman who fights every single day."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w2 q:key=5auE:"Thet2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=w2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w3 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="w4" q:key="Il_0">"The truth is, Don, you cannot love this country if you only fight for the wealthy and big business," she continued. "To love this country is to fight for its people, all people, working people, everyday Americans, like bartenders and factory workers and fast food cashiers who punch a clock and are on their feet all day in some of the toughest jobs out there."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w5 q:key=5auE:Ocasi3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=w5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w6 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="w7" q:key="Il_0">Ocasio-Cortez finished her speech by saying that they can't send just Harris and Walz alone to the White House. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w8 q:key=5auE:"Wemu4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=w8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=w9 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="wa" q:key="Il_0">"We must also elect strong Democratic majorities in the House and in the Senate so that we can deliver on an ambitious agenda for the people," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=uv data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:42:09.160Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52593" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="wc"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:42 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=wd-->Biden stopped by reception with longtime Delaware supportersÂ tonight<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=we q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/mike-memoli-ncpn793901" q:id="wf" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=we q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=wb q:key=--><!--qv q:id=wg q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=wh q:key=5auE:After0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=wh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=wi q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="wj" q:key="Il_0">After he conducted his walk-through at the United Center, Biden has spent some of his downtime back at his hotel preparing for tonightâs address â but also catching up with some of his longest-term supporters.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=wk q:key=5auE:Athis1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=wk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=wl q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="wm" q:key="Il_0">At his downtown hotel, Biden surprised some of the several dozen supporters who flew on a chartered plane from Delaware today to attend his speech.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=wn q:key=5auE:Biden2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=wn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=wo q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="wp" q:key="Il_0">Biden âworked the room like he was still running for office,â joked the Rev. Christopher Bullock, the pastor of Canaan Baptist Church in New Castle.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=wb q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52591--><div class="sm-only:hidden PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=xs-->'Trump's a scab': UAW head throws muscle behind Harris-Walz ticket<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=xt q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="xu" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=xt q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=xq q:key=--><!--qv q:id=xv q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=xw q:key=5auE:Shawn0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=xw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=xx q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="xy" q:key="Il_0">Shawn Fain, the president of the United Auto Workers, praised Harris and Walz for standing "shoulder to shoulder with the working class" â and dissed Trump and Vance as "two lapdogs for the billionaire class who only serve themselves."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=xz q:key=5auE:"It's1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=xz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=y0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="y1" q:key="Il_0">"It's real simple: Kamala Harris is one of us," Fain said to cheers. "She's a fighter for the working class â and Donald Trump is a scab!"</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=y2 q:key=5auE:mmvo217494085898--><!--qv q:id=y3 q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=y5 srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724118646509_f_mo_dnc_shawn_fain_240819_1920x1080-tk5caz.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724118646509_f_mo_dnc_shawn_fain_240819_1920x1080-tk5caz.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724118646509_f_mo_dnc_shawn_fain_240819_1920x1080-tk5caz.avif"/><img alt="UAW President Shawn Fain calls Trump a scab in DNC remarks" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="yr" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724118646509_f_mo_dnc_shawn_fain_240819_1920x1080-tk5caz.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=ys q:key=5auE:Thecr3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=ys q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=yt q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="yu" q:key="Il_0">The crowd broke out into loud chants of "Trump's a scab" â union slang for a person who refuses to join up or go on strike. Fain later removed his jacket to reveal a red T-shirt that read: "Trump Is A Scab. Vote Harris."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=yv q:key=5auE:Thein4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=yv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=yw q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="yx" q:key="Il_0">The influential UAW has roughly 370,000 members nationwide, including in key Midwestern battleground states like Michigan and Wisconsin.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=xq q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52587--><!--qv q:id=yy q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52587--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:32:50.409Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52587" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="yz"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:32 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=z0-->Hollywood takes the stage <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=z1 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="z2" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=z1 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=yy q:key=--><!--qv q:id=z3 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=z4 q:key=5auE:Actor0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=z4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=z5 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="z6" q:key="Il_0">Actor Tony Goldwyn, of "Scandal" fame, rolled out the proverbial Hollywood red carpet after Harris' surprise address.  </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=z7 q:key=5auE:Hetou1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=z7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=z8 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="z9" q:key="Il_0">He touted her vision of unity, optimism and opportunity, saying, "Americas are not a cynical people."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=za q:key=5auE:"Wear2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=za q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=zb q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="zc" q:key="Il_0">"We are not small-minded," he added. "We can dream as big as we want."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=yy q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52567--><!--qv q:id=zd q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52567--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:28:45.323Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52567" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="ze"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:28 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=zf-->NBA coach Steve Kerr jokes about Walz's coaching background<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=zg q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/christopher-cicchiello-ncpn1248427" q:id="zh" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=zg q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=zd q:key=--><!--qv q:id=zi q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=zj q:key=5auE:Fresh0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=zj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=zk q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="zl" q:key="Il_0">Fresh off of coaching Team USA's men's basketball squad to a gold medal at the Paris Olympics, legendary NBA coach Steve Kerr endorsed Harris and Walz and brought a hopeful tone to the convention.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=zm q:key=5auE:"Thin1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=zm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=zn q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="zo" q:key="Il_0">"Think about what our team achieved with 12 Americans in Paris â putting aside rivalries to represent our country. Now imagine what we could do with all 350 million of us playing on the same team," Kerr said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52567-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="10j" q:key="Il_0">As he stepped into the political arena, his remarks focused on the qualities of what it takes to lead, including dignity, commitment to the truth andÂ an ability to laugh at yourself â attributes he said both Harris and Walz have. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10k q:key=5auE:"They2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=10k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10l q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="10m" q:key="Il_0">"They have devoted their lives to serving other people, whether Vice President Harris was defending her community in the courtroom or Gov. Walz was inspiring the next generation in the classroom, or on the field, for that matter."Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10n q:key=5auE:Walzw3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=10n q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10o q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="10p" q:key="Il_0">Walz was an assistant football coach at Mankato West High School and helped bring back a winning tradition to the school in the form of a state championship.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10q q:key=5auE:"Coac4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=10q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10r q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="10s" q:key="Il_0">"Coach to coach: That guy's awesome," Kerr said, though he joked that Walz had "way too much reliance on the blitz" as a coach.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10t q:key=5auE:And,h5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=10t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=10u q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="10v" q:key="Il_0">And, he added, quoting <a href="https://www.nbcsportsbayarea.com/paris-2024-summer-olympics/steph-curry-night-draymond-green-dagger/1769252/" target="_blank">"the great Steph Curry: </a>We can tell Donald Trump, night night."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=zd &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116922370_n_msnbc_jacobwalz9p_240819_1920x1080-uh9xqr.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116922370_n_msnbc_jacobwalz9p_240819_1920x1080-uh9xqr.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116922370_n_msnbc_jacobwalz9p_240819_1920x1080-uh9xqr.avif"/><img alt="Watch: Tim Walz gets candid at the DNC in surprise MSNBC interview" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="11t" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116922370_n_msnbc_jacobwalz9p_240819_1920x1080-uh9xqr.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=11u q:key=5auE:Walzs1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=11u q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=11v q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="11w" q:key="Il_0">Walz said in a brief interview with MSNBC that it's an "important night for Democrats tonight to honor Joe Biden."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=11x q:key=5auE:Asked2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=11x q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=11y q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="11z" q:key="Il_0">Asked about his role as the VP candidate, Walz said, "I can tell you this ticket, feeling that energy ... just a privilege."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=120 q:key=5auE:Walzs3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=120 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=121 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="122" q:key="Il_0">Walz said of the campaign's bus tour in Pennsylvania over the weekend that there was "energy out there" and that it was "exciting."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=10y q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52575--><!--qv q:id=123 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52575--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:20:11.122Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52575" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="124"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:20 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=125-->Hillary Clinton to highlight Harris' "heart and her integrity" in tonight's speech<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=126 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="127" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=126 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=123 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=128 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=129 q:key=5auE:Forme0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=129 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12a q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="12b" q:key="Il_0">Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton will use her speech tonight to highlight Harris' "heart and her integrity," underscoring how Harris' experience sets her apart.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12c q:key=5auE:"Webo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=12c q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12d q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="12e" q:key="Il_0">"We both got our start as young lawyers helping children who were abused or neglected. That kind of work changes you," Clinton will say, according to selected prepared remarks released by the Democratic National Convention Committee. "Those kids stay with you. Kamala carries with her the hopes of every child she protected, every family she helped, every community she served."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12f q:key=5auE:Clint2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=12f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12g q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="12h" q:key="Il_0">Clinton, who lost to Trump in 2016, will argue that Harris "has the character, experience and vision to lead us forward."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52575-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Hillary Clinton to highlight Harris' &quot;heart and her integrity&quot; in tonight's speech" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="12i" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52575-overflow-content" q:id="12j"><!--qv q:id=12k q:key=5auE:Shewi0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=12k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12l q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="12m" q:key="Il_0">She will also take jabs at Trump, arguing that Harris "cares about kids, families and America" but that "Donald only cares about himself."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12n q:key=5auE:"Onhe1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=12n q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=12o q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="12p" q:key="Il_0">"On her first day in court, Kamala said five words that guide her still: âKamala Harris, for the people,'" Clinton will say, according to the prepared remarks. "Thatâs something Donald Trump will never understand."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=123 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52581--><!--qv q:id=12q q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52581--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:16:24.687Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52581" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="12r"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:16 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=12s-->Harris makes surprise early appearance, thanks Biden for his service<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=12t q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="12u" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=12t q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=12q q:key=--><!--qv q:id=12v q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=12w q:key=5auE:mmvo217491525967--><!--qv q:id=12x q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=12z q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="130" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/harris-thanks-biden-for-his-historic-leadership-at-the-dnc-217491525967" q:id="132" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=131 q:key=--><!--t=133-->Harris thanks Biden for his 'historic leadership' at the DNC<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_5"><!--t=134-->01:58<!-- --></div><div srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724117078437_f_mo_dnc_harris_biden_thank_240819_1920x1080-7smezy.avif"/><img alt="Harris thanks Biden for his 'historic leadership' at the DNC" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="13l" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724117078437_f_mo_dnc_harris_biden_thank_240819_1920x1080-7smezy.jpg" q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="13o" q:key="Il_0">Harris made a surprise early appearance tonight, speaking for a few minutes and thanking Biden for his "historic leadership" and service.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=13p q:key=5auE:"Wear2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=13p q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=13q q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="13r" q:key="Il_0">"We are forever grateful to you," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=13s q:key=5auE:Harri3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=13s q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=13t q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="13u" q:key="Il_0">Harris said that "this is going to be a great week," emphasizing later that in November "we are moving forward."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=13v q:key=5auE:Shecl4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=13v q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=13w q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="13x" q:key="Il_0">She closed her brief remarks with her frequent refrain: "When we fight, we win." The audience joined in on the final two words.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=12q q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52577--><!--qv q:id=13y q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52577--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:13:17.767Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52577" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="13z"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:13 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=140-->Harris campaign pounces on Trump's saying he has 'no regrets' over the overturning of Roe v. Wade<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=141 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="142" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=141 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=13y q:key=--><!--qv q:id=143 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=144 q:key=5auE:TheHa0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=144 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=145 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="146" q:key="Il_0">The Harris campaign responded to Trumpâs saying today in an interview with CBS News that he has "no regrets" about having played a major role in the Supreme Court's reversal of Roe v. Wade.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=147 q:key=5auE:âDona1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=147 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=148 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="149" q:key="Il_0">âDonald Trump overturnedÂ <em>Roe v. Wade</em>, ripped away womenâs freedoms in all 50 states, and wears it like a badge of honor. Give him the chance, and heâll go even further and ban abortion nationwide," campaign spokesperson Sarafina Chitika said in a statement. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=14a q:key=5auE:âTheA2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=14a q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=14b q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="14c" q:key="Il_0">âThe American people have no regrets about making Donald a one-term president. Theyâll make him a two-time loser this November," she said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=13y q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52578--><div class="sm-only:hidden class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=14i q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" Gov. Hochul calls Trump âa fraud, a philanderer, and a felonâ" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="15m" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Kathy-Hochul-ac-1159p-ubrmwx.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15n q:key=5auE:NewYo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=15n q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15o q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="15p" q:key="Il_0">New York Gov. Kathy Hochul slammed Trump in her remarks, depicting him as a fraudster who doesn't understand working-class Americans.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15q q:key=5auE:"Trus2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=15q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15r q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="15s" q:key="Il_0">"Trust me, America: If you think you're tired of Donald Trump, talk to a New Yorker," Hochul said to cheers. "Weâve had to deal with him for 78 long years."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15t q:key=5auE:"Thef3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=15t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15u q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="15v" q:key="Il_0">"The fraud, the tax-dodging, the sham university, the shady universities. We've seen him stiff contractors, rip off workers," Hochul said. "He abuses women, brags about it and then takes away their rights â and New Yorkers are sick of it."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15w q:key=5auE:fallback-id-4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=15w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=15x q:key=JbNX:markupbr4--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend"
