q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52566--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:08:50.583Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52566" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="15z"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:08 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=160-->Influencer and activist Deja Foxx speaks at the DNC<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=161 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alana-satlin-ncpn1072966" q:id="162" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=161 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=15y q:key=--><!--qv q:id=163 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=164 q:key=5auE:DejaF0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=164 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=165 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="166" q:key="Il_0">Deja Foxx, a blogger and activist, became the first influencer to speak at the convention â <a href="https://www.nytimes.com/2024/08/18/us/politics/democratic-convention-harris-social-media-influencers.html" target="_blank">one of several </a>this week as the Harris campaign <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/tech/tech-news/progressive-content-creators-kamala-harris-reaction-rcna162967" target="_blank">courts young voters</a>. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=167 q:key=5auE:Foxx,1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=167 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=168 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="169" q:key="Il_0">Foxx, who worked with Harris' presidential campaign in 2019 and now posts regularly about the election to her<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@deja_foxx?lang=en" target="_blank"> 140,000 TikTok followers,</a> spoke about reproductive rights and her upbringing as a "free lunch kid."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=15y q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52563--><!--qv q:id=16a q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52563--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:08:26.184Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52563" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="16b"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:08 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=16c-->Singer-songwriter Jason Isbell performs at DNC<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=16d q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=16d q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=16a q:key=--><!--qv q:id=16e q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=16f q:key=5auE:Gramm0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=16f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16g q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="16h" q:key="Il_0">Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Isbell performed tonight at the convention.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16i q:key=5auE:Aside1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=16i q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16j q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="16k" q:key="Il_0">Aside from his solo career, Isbell, a native Alabamian, is known for his work with the 400 Unit and as a former member of the Drive-By Truckers.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16l q:key=5auE:Hehas2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=16l q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16m q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="16n" q:key="Il_0">He has been politically outspoken for some time, having performed a concert for former Sen. Doug Jones, a Democrat, during the 2017 special election in Alabama, which Jones won.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=16a q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52574--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52574"><!--qv q:id=16o q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52574--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:04:49.255Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52574" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="16r"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:04 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=16s-->Walz slips into convention hall with little fanfare<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=16t q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/katherine-koretski-ncpn1295523" q:id="16u" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=16t q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=16q q:key=--><!--qv q:id=16v q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=16w q:key=5auE:Walza0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=16w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16x q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="16y" q:key="Il_0">Walz arrived inside the United Center a few moments ago. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=16z q:key=5auE:There1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=16z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=170 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="171" q:key="Il_0">There was no fanfare in the room and no shot of his entrance on the big screen. Unlike the Republican National Convention last month in Milwaukee, where the Trump campaign had a box labeled "Make America Great Once Again," this VIP box has no signs.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=16q q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52568--><!--qv q:id=172 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52568--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T01:04:44.193Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52568" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="173"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 9:04 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=174-->Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo touts Harris' economic agenda<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=175 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="176" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=175 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=172 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=177 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=178 q:key=5auE:Comme0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=178 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=179 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="17a" q:key="Il_0">Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo spoke about Harris' economic agenda, arguing that she would "make building up the middle class a defining goal of her presidency."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=17b q:key=5auE:mmvo217491525653--><!--qv q:id=17c q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=17e q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 Secretary Raimondo touts Harris' 'pro-worker' economic vision at DNC" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="180" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724116381249_f_mo_dnc_raimondo_econ_240819_1920x1080-i0v8ec.jpg" q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="183" q:key="Il_0">Raimondo, the former governor of Rhode Island, discussed her own work in turning around the state's economy with a "pro-business, pro-worker agenda."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=184 q:key=5auE:"Kama3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=184 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=185 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="186" q:key="Il_0">"Kamala Harris has that same agenda," she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=187 q:key=5auE:Shesa4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=187 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=188 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="189" q:key="Il_0">She said "Kamala Harris gets it" when it comes to understanding that many Americans work very hard but are "barely getting by, and that's not right."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=172 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52561--><!--qv q:id=18a q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52561--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:59:43.306Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52561" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="18b"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:59 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=18c-->Harris has always 'understood the assignment' of holding fraudsters to account<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=18d q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="18e" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=18d q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=18a q:key=--><!--qv q:id=18f q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=18g q:key=5auE:AkeyH0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=18g q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=18h q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="18i" q:key="Il_0">A key Harris ally, Sen. Laphonza Butler, of California, echoed the vice president's previous remarks about "knowing the type" in reference to Trump and his ilk. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=18j q:key=5auE:"Wede1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=18j q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=18k q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="18l" q:key="Il_0">"We deserve a president who is tough, not just tough-talking; one who shatters the boundaries of what's possible, not the boundaries of what's legal; one who wipes the floor with cheats and fraudsters because, well, Democrats, she knows the type," Butler said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=18m q:key=5auE:mmvo217492037566--><!--qv q:id=18n q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=18p q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="18q" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=18r q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/sen-laphonza-butler-says-harris-held-criminals-accountable-as-attorney-general-217492037566" q:id="18s" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=18r q:key=--><!--t=18t-->Sen. Laphonza Butler says Harris held 'criminals accountable' as attorney general<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" Laphonza Butler says Harris held 'criminals accountable' as attorney general&amp;body=https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/sen-laphonza-butler-says-harris-held-criminals-accountable-as-attorney-general-217492037566" on:click="q-DbLqUMDt.js#s_KE0wDxvLlrA" q:id="193" role="menuitem" tabindex="-1"><!--qv q:id=194 q:key=dJkd:GH_10--><svg aria-hidden="true" class="_shareLinkIcon_akhn9_202" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="195" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#email" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></a></li></ul></div></div><!--qv q:key=GH_12--><button class="_clickToPlayButton_akhn9_247 flex-center" on:click="q-wvTVTK-H.js#s_fXS03dk2qiE[0 1 2]" q:id="196"><div class="_playIconContainer_akhn9_20 flex-center"><!--qv q:id=197 q:key=dJkd:GH_11--><svg aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="198" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#play" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></div></button><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=199 q:key=HvIT:GH_14--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 _posterFrame_akhn9_275 mb-0" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="19a"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Laphonza-Butler-ac-1159p-wclois.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Laphonza-Butler-ac-1159p-wclois.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Laphonza-Butler-ac-1159p-wclois.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Laphonza-Butler-ac-1159p-wclois.avif"/><img alt="Sen. Laphonza Butler says Harris held 'criminals accountable' as attorney general" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="19b" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Laphonza-Butler-ac-1159p-wclois.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19c q:key=5auE:Butle3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=19c q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19d q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="19e" q:key="Il_0">Butler said Harris, a former prosecutor, has always "understood the assignment" and never doubted the future would be brighter. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19f q:key=5auE:"Ever4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=19f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19g q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="19h" q:key="Il_0">"Every time she walked into a courtroom she would say 'Kamala Harris for the people.' It was a battle cry," Butler said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19i q:key=5auE:fallback-id-5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=19i q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19j q:key=JbNX:markupbr5--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=18a q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52559--><!--qv q:id=19k q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52559--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:57:09.016Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52559" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="19l"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:57 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=19m-->Here's the deal about Project 2025<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=19n q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986" q:id="19o" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=19n q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=19k q:key=--><!--qv q:id=19p q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=19q q:key=5auE:Democ0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=19q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19r q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="19s" q:key="Il_0">Democrats keep mentioning Project 2025 tonight, using it interchangeably with Trump's platform for a second term. That's not exactly the case â while Trump and his allies have deep ties to the Heritage Foundation's policy road map, Trump has furiously tried to distance himself from it in recent weeks. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19t q:key=5auE:Mycol1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=19t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19u q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="19v" q:key="Il_0">My colleagues Vaughn Hillyard and Alexandra Marquez dove deeper into those ties between Project 2025 and Trump, what the plan says and who's involved last month. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=19w q:key=5auE:ncwd999999--><!--qv q:id=19x q:key=57R8:fhrsUSZ--><div class="overflow-hidden mb-4 mx-auto w-full nbc news feedBody" data-testid="iframely-embed" on:qvisible="q-B4mwBO5V.js#_hW[0]" q:id="19y" q:key="uH_0"><div class="iframely-nbc news iframely-embed" q:id="19z"><div class="iframely-responsive"><iframe data-testid="iframely-iframe" q:id="1a0" src="about:blank"></iframe></div></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:46:54.385Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52554" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1a4"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:46 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1a5-->Pelosi addresses tension with Biden in interview<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1a6 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="1a7" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1a6 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1a3 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1a8 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1a9 q:key=5auE:Rep.N0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1a9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1aa q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ab" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., the former House speaker, tonight addressed the tension between her and Biden and his White House aides after she played a key role in his decision to drop his re-election bid.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ac q:key=5auE:Shewa1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ac q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ad q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ae" q:key="Il_0">She was asked in a CNN interview to respond to longtime Biden adviser Anita Dunn's saying earlier on CNN that ânobody wants to have a fight with Nancy Pelosi at this time" and whether Pelosi has spoken to Biden since he withdrew from the race.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1af q:key=5auE:"Some2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1af q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ag q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ah" q:key="Il_0">"Sometimes you just have to take a punch for the children," said Pelosi, who didn't say whether she has spoken to Biden but said recently that she hasn't spoken to him since he dropped out.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ai q:key=5auE:"Hema3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ai q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1aj q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ak" q:key="Il_0">"He made the decision for the country. My concern was not about the president. It was about his campaign," Pelosi said tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1a3 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52550--><!--qv q:id=1al q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52550--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:46:32.826Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52550" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1am"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:46 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1an-->Remembering the water bottles left behind<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1ao q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-seitz-wald-ncpn385646" q:id="1ap" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ao q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1al q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1aq q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1ar q:key=5auE:Alarg0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ar q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1as q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1at" q:key="Il_0">A large pile of fancy metal water bottles, which are prohibited from entering the United Center, stands in silent vigil to the unquenched thirsts of those inside.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1au q:key=5auE:TheSe1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1au q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1av q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1aw" q:key="Il_0">The Secret Service would not allow metal bottles inside, but plastic disposable water bottles are OK â even if they are filled with water (unlike at airports).</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ax q:key=5auE:rcim301428--><!--qv q:id=1ay q:key=HvIT:rcim301428--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1az"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_1494/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-2024-wm-543p-475ab2.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-2024-wm-543p-475ab2.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_2080/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-2024-wm-543p-475ab2.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; metal waters bottles seen behind security outside of the DNC in Chicago on Monday." class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="1040" loading="lazy" q:id="1b0" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:46:25.840Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52555" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1b5"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:46 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1b6-->Protester describes moment some entered the breached security area<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1b7 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="1b8" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1b7 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1b4 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1b9 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1ba q:key=5auE:Justi0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ba q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bb q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1bc" q:key="Il_0">Justin Cheong was among the protesters who quickly dipped into the street barrier that became exposed after some protesters tore down security fencing at Park 578 today.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bd q:key=5auE:Cheon1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1bd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1be q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1bf" q:key="Il_0">Cheong said he and some other protesters went inside what had been a protected buffer street for a few minutes and chanted, âBiden, Harris, you canât hide, stop funding the genocide.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bg q:key=5auE:âThen2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1bg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bh q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1bi" q:key="Il_0">âThen we left and went on with the route,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bj q:key=5auE:rcim301427--><!--qv q:id=1bk q:key=HvIT:rcim301427--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1bl"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=1bo-->Justin Cheong in Chicago on Monday.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=1bp-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bq q:key=5auE:Cheon4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1bq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1br q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1bs" q:key="Il_0">Cheong, who said he didnât know who was responsible for tearing down the security fencing, said the moment of defiance made him feel âmore connected to the intifadaâ â a word that refers to the Palestiniansâ uprising against Israel.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bt q:key=5auE:Hesai5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1bt q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bu q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1bv" q:key="Il_0">He said he was emboldened by being even closer to the United Center and chanting at DNC attendees inside an arena several hundred yards away.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bw q:key=5auE:âThey6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1bw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1bx q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1by" q:key="Il_0">âThey had to listen and not take us for granted,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1b4 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52556--><!--qv q:id=1bz q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52556--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:45:32.932Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52556" &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_1920x1080-ozn3ek.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_1920x1080-ozn3ek.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_1920x1080-ozn3ek.avif"/><img alt="Michigan state senator uses large copy Project 2025 to criticize its 'Republican blueprint'" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1cu" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_1920x1080-ozn3ek.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1cv q:key=5auE:Michi1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1cv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1cw q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1cx" q:key="Il_0">Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow is speaking, and she has a giant book titled "Project 2025" with her, calling it "the Republican blueprint for a second Trump term."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1cy q:key=5auE:"That2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1cy q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1cz q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1d0" q:key="Il_0">"That's right, they went ahead and wrote down all the extreme things that Donald Trump wants to do in the next four years, and then they just tweeted it out, putting it out on the internet for everybody to read," McMorrow said. "So we read it."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52556-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Speaker reads from giant Project 2025 book, saying 'that is not how it works in America.'" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1d1" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52556-overflow-content" q:id="1d2"><!--qv q:id=1d3 q:key=5auE:McMor0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1d3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1d4 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1d5" q:key="Il_0">McMorrow flipped to a page in the book, saying she wanted to tell the crowd about Project 2025's plan to "turn Donald Trump into a dictator."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1d6 q:key=5auE:"They1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1d6 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1d7 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1d8" q:key="Il_0">"They're talking about replacing the entire federal government with an army of loyalists who answer only to Donald Trump," she said. "Under Project 2025 Donald Trump would be able to weaponize the Department of Justice to go after his political opponents. He could even turn the FBI into his own personal police force."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1d9 q:key=5auE:"That2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1d9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1da q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1db" q:key="Il_0">"That is not how it works in America," McMorrow said to cheers.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dc q:key=5auE:McMor3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dd q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1de" q:key="Il_0">McMorrow concluded by saying she would return the next night to explain what Project 2025 would mean for people's pocketbooks.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1bz q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52551--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52551"><!--qv q:id=1df q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52551--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="1dg"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52551"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=1dh q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52551--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:45:05.221Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52551" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1di"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:45 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1dj-->Four state politicians vouch for Democrats' impact on their states<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1dk q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dh q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1dl q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1dm q:key=5auE:Fours0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dn q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1do" q:key="Il_0">Four state politicians took the stage to vouch for the Biden-Harris administrationâs impact on their states. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dp q:key=5auE:Penns1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dq q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1dr" q:key="Il_0">Pennsylvania Lt. Gov. Austin Davis focused on infrastructure, arguing that Harris is âlooking forwardâ and "committed to keeping our infrastructure safe and modern.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ds q:key=5auE:Wisco2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ds q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dt q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1du" q:key="Il_0">Wisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez, a former nurse and health care executive, focused her remarks on the Harris-Walz health agenda. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dv q:key=5auE:Rodri3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1dw q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1dx" q:key="Il_0">Rodriguez touted Harris' support for women's reproductive rights, her pledges to protect Medicare and Medicare and the Biden administration's cap on the price of insulin for seniors.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52551-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Four state politicians vouch for Democrats' impact on their states" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1dy" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52551-overflow-content" q:id="1dz"><!--qv q:id=1e0 q:key=5auE:"It's0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1e0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1e1 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1e2" q:key="Il_0">"It's about freedom, the freedom to make your own choices and the freedom to get the care you need without worrying about the cost. Kamala Harris is fighting for that healthy future," Rodriguez said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1e3 q:key=5auE:LinaH1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1e3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1e4 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1e5" q:key="Il_0">Lina Hidalgo, the judge, or executive, of Harris County, Texas, touted the Biden-Harris administration's work to address extreme weather and climate change. She also said that when the Texas power grid went dark, Harris called her personally to make sure Texans had what they needed.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1e6 q:key=5auE:Calif2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1e6 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1e7 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1e8" q:key="Il_0">California Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis recounted her friendship with Harris and told a story about Harris' giving her advice when she dealt with sexism in the workplace. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1e9 q:key=5auE:mmvo217489477976--><!--qv q:id=1ea q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=1ec q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1ed" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=1ee q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/california-lt-gov-kounalakis-says-harris-was-a-mentor-in-her-career-217489477976" q:id="1ef" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ee q:key=--><!--t=1eg-->California Lt. Gov. Kounalakis says Harris was a mentor in her career<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_5"><!--t=1eh-->03:16<!-- --></div><div class="_shareContainer_akhn9_133 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"><button aria-controls="jwplayer-l5biiz-C4ZIm9X4sDY-1eb-share-options" aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-label="More 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_1920x1080-q87gf5.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_1920x1080-q87gf5.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_1920x1080-q87gf5.avif"/><img alt="California Lt. Gov. Kounalakis says Harris was a mentor in her career" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1ey" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_1920x1080-q87gf5.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1dh q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52546--><!--qv q:id=1ez q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52546--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:35:26.864Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52546" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1f0"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:35 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1f1-->L.A mayor touts Harris' commitment to next generation<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1f2 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="1f3" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1f2 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ez q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1f4 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1f5 q:key=5auE:Harri0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1f5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1f6 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1f7" q:key="Il_0">Harris and Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass have a lot of things in common, starting with their shared history of shattering ceilings. Both ascended to be the first women to hold their respective offices, and both did so while championing the next generation of leaders, Bass said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1f8 q:key=5auE:"Kama1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1f8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1f9 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1fa" q:key="Il_0">"Kamala knows that each generation has an obligation to the next," Bass said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1fb q:key=5auE:mmvo217487941576--><!--qv q:id=1fc q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=1fe q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1ff" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=1fg q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/l-a-mayor-bass-highlights-harris-commitment-to-the-young-generation-217487941576" q:id="1fh" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1fg q:key=--><!--t=1fi-->L.A. Mayor Bass highlights Harrisâ commitment to the young generation<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_5"><!--t=1fj-->02:51<!-- --></div><div class="_shareContainer_akhn9_133 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"><button aria-controls="jwplayer-l5biiz-C4ZIm9X4sDY-1fd-share-options" Mayor Bass highlights Harrisâ commitment to the young generation&amp;body=https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/l-a-mayor-bass-highlights-harris-commitment-to-the-young-generation-217487941576" on:click="q-DbLqUMDt.js#s_KE0wDxvLlrA" q:id="1fs" role="menuitem" tabindex="-1"><!--qv q:id=1ft q:key=dJkd:GH_10--><svg aria-hidden="true" class="_shareLinkIcon_akhn9_202" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="1fu" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#email" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></a></li></ul></div></div><!--qv q:key=GH_12--><button class="_clickToPlayButton_akhn9_247 flex-center" on:click="q-wvTVTK-H.js#s_fXS03dk2qiE[0 1 2]" q:id="1fv"><div class="_playIconContainer_akhn9_20 flex-center"><!--qv q:id=1fw q:key=dJkd:GH_11--><svg aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="1fx" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#play" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></div></button><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1fy q:key=HvIT:GH_14--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 _posterFrame_akhn9_275 mb-0" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="1fz"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-karen-bass-ac-1159p__552774-x67wme.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-karen-bass-ac-1159p__552774-x67wme.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-karen-bass-ac-1159p__552774-x67wme.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-karen-bass-ac-1159p__552774-x67wme.avif"/><img alt="L.A. Mayor Bass highlights Harrisâ commitment to the young generation" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1g0" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-karen-bass-ac-1159p__552774-x67wme.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1g1 q:key=5auE:WhenB3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1g1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1g2 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1g3" q:key="Il_0">When Bass was speaker of the California Assembly and Harris was a prosecutor, they fought to address youth homelessness and reform the child welfare system, she said. When Harris was state attorney general, she supported reforms to the juvenile justice system that are still in place today.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1g4 q:key=5auE:"Youc4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1g4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1g5 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1g6" q:key="Il_0">"You can feel her heart, and you can feel her fearlessness," Bass went on.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ez q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52547--><!--qv q:id=1g7 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52547--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:33:04.139Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52547" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1g8"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:33 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1g9-->Country singer Mickey Guyton performs<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1ga q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ga q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1g7 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1gb q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1gc q:key=5auE:Count0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gd q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ge" q:key="Il_0">Country singer Mickey Guyton sang "All American," a unity anthem.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gf q:key=5auE:"Jame1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gg q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1gh" q:key="Il_0">"James Brown and James Dean," the song goes. "Weâre cold beer, champagne, millionaires, spare some change. ... Ain't we all American?"</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gi q:key=5auE:Guyto2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gj q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1gk" q:key="Il_0">Guyton grew up in Texas listening to her grandma play Dolly Parton and decided to pursue country music after she heard LeAnn Rimes sing the national anthem at a Texas Rangers baseball game when she was 8 years old. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gl q:key=5auE:Guyto3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gm q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1gn" q:key="Il_0">Guytonâs career didnât gain the momentum she wanted it to, which she largely attributes to her being held to a different set of standards as a Black woman in the industry.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52547-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Country singer Mickey Guyton performs" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1go" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52547-overflow-content" q:id="1gp"><!--qv q:id=1gq q:key=5auE:âIhad0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gr q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1gs" q:key="Il_0">âI had heard so many noes. Iâd heard people say, âOh, I donât know if you can do that.â âYou canât sing that.â âThatâs a little too pop,ââ <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/country-music-typically-white-space-mickey-guyton-ready-change-it-n1234821" target="_blank">Guyton told NBC News in 2020</a>. âMeanwhile, Iâm seeing all these dudes with trap beats and R&amp;B melodies in their songs, making all this money and selling out tours, but Iâm not allowed to do that.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gt q:key=5auE:Guyto1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gt q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gu q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1gv" q:key="Il_0">Guyton signed with Capitol Records in 2011, becoming the only Black female country artist signed to a major label. However, she didn't have her <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/country-music-typically-white-space-mickey-guyton-ready-change-it-n1234821" target="_blank">breakout moment</a> until 2020 after she released âBlack Like Meâ in the wake of the death of George Floyd.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gw q:key=5auE:Sheâs2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gx q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1gy" q:key="Il_0">Sheâs made a name for herself since then, blazing a trail as a Black country star in Nashville. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1gz q:key=5auE:<ahre3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1gz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1h0 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1h1" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/country-music-typically-white-space-mickey-guyton-ready-change-it-n1234821" target="_blank"><strong><em>For more on Guyton, check our 2020 profile. </em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1g7 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52545--><!--qv q:id=1h2 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52545--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:29:29.695Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52545" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1h3"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:29 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1h4-->After security incident, police superintendent says: âIâm not going to associate this with the march as a wholeâ <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1h5 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211" q:id="1h6" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1h5 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1h2 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1h7 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1h8 q:key=5auE:Chica0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1h8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1h9 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ha" q:key="Il_0">Chicago's top cop said tonight that while the police department was ânot going to tolerateâ vandalism and acts of violence after a small group of protesters breached a security barrier and encountered police, âIâm not going to associate this with the march as a whole.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hb q:key=5auE:âYouh1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1hb q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hc q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1hd" q:key="Il_0">âYou have people who just wanted to have their voices heard,â Police Superintendent Larry Snelling said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1he q:key=5auE:âThey2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1he q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hf q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1hg" q:key="Il_0">âThey did that, but you had a portion of that group who decided that they were going to stand behind and breach the fence and try to get to the other side â and we cannot let that happen,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hh q:key=5auE:Hesai3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1hh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hi q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1hj" q:key="Il_0">He said officers âresponded swiftlyâ to make sure the group of protesters was not able to reach the inner perimeter separating them from the arena where the convention is taking place.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hk q:key=5auE:âWeha4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1hk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hl q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1hm" q:key="Il_0">âWe have no idea what they would have done if they had gotten onto the other side, but as I said before, weâre not going to tolerate anyone who is going to vandalize things in our city,â Snelling said. âWeâre not going to tolerate anyone who is going to commit acts of violence, and we will act swiftly on that. As you saw today, our officers acted professionally.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1hn q:key=5auE:âOurj5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1hn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ho q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1hp" q:key="Il_0">âOur job here is to make sure that we keep the DNC safe, keep our city safe and keep our people safe,â he said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1h2 say they are 'all in' for Harris at the DNC" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1in" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724113880756_f_mo_dnc_union_leaders_240819_1920x1080-5jgwf0.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1io q:key=5auE:Thehe1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1io q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ip q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1iq" q:key="Il_0">The heads of some of the country's largest and most influential labor unions took the stage tonight to tout the economic agenda and accomplishments of the Biden-Harris administration and rail against Trump, painting him as a foe of organized labor.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ir q:key=5auE:Trump2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ir q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1is q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1it" q:key="Il_0">Trump's appeal to working-class voters has been key to his political appeal since his 2016 campaign, but Democrats have been aggressively courting union members this cycle, championing populist economic policies and workers' rights.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52543-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post 'Union Yes!': Labor leaders rally behind Harris-Walz ticket" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1iu" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52543-overflow-content" q:id="1iv"><!--qv q:id=1iw q:key=5auE:Labor0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1iw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ix q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1iy" q:key="Il_0">Labor leaders at tonight's convention session included:</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1iz q:key=5auE:<li>L1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1iz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1j0 q:key=JbNX:markupul1--><ul class="feedBody" q:id="1j1" q:key="Il_0"><li>Lee Saunders,Â president of the American Federation of State, County, and Municipal Employees</li><li>April Verrett, president of the Service Employees International Union</li><li>Brent Booker, general president of the Laborersâ International Union of North America</li><li>Kenneth Cooper, international president of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers</li><li>Claude Cummings Jr., president of the Communications Workers of America</li><li>Elizabeth Shuler,Â president of the AFL-CIO</li></ul><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1j2 q:key=5auE:Notic2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1j2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1j3 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1j4" q:key="Il_0">Noticeably absent: Teamsters head Sean O'Brien, who gave a fiery speech at the Republican National Convention last month assailing corporatism. O'Brien has not endorsed a candidate in the presidential race.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1j5 q:key=5auE:rcim301426--><!--qv q:id=1j6 q:key=HvIT:rcim301426--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1j7"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-2024-union-wm-536p-9b2695.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52541--><!--qv q:id=1jc q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52541--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:11:55.464Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52541" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1jd"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:11 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1je-->Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest ends peacefully where it began<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1jf q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="1jg" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1jf q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1jc q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1jh q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1ji q:key=5auE:While0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ji q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jj q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1jk" q:key="Il_0">While the situation that unfolded in Park 578 stole a lot of attention from the Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest, the march continued beyond the park afterward and ended peacefully where it started: in Union Park.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jl q:key=5auE:After1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1jl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jm q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1jn" q:key="Il_0">After it became clear at Park 578 that a breakaway group of protesters was looking to tear down security fencing, organizers urged demonstrators to exit the park and continue on the march route.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jo q:key=5auE:Mostd2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1jo q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jp q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1jq" q:key="Il_0">Most did. After leaving Park 578, marchers walked for another 45 minutes, chanting pro-Palestinian messages. They returned to Union Park around 5:45 p.m. local time, just a bit later than they had planned, and ended the day with speeches.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jr q:key=5auE:Despi3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1jr q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1js q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1jt" q:key="Il_0">Despite the chaos at Park 578, organizers said they were pleased with how things went.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ju q:key=5auE:âExtr4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ju q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jv q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1jw" q:key="Il_0">âExtremely happyâ is how Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the coalitionâs main organizers, put it.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1jx q:key=5auE:rcim301420--><!--qv q:id=1jy q:key=HvIT:rcim301420--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1jz"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_1120/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_560/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1560/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_780/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.avif"/><img alt="Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the Coalition to March on the DNCâs main organizers" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="780" loading="lazy" q:id="1k0" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2412,h_2412/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=1k1 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=1k2-->Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the Coalition to March on the DNCâs main organizers.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=1k3-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1k4 q:key=5auE:Abuda6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1k4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1k5 q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1k6" q:key="Il_0">Abudayyeh and other organizers said they believe the people responsible for the violent behavior in Park 578 were not part of any of the groups involved with the coalition.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1k7 q:key=5auE:âIhav7--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1k7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1k8 q:key=JbNX:markupp7--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1k9" q:key="Il_0">âI have no idea who those people were,â Abudayyeh said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ka q:key=5auE:Heack8--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ka q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1kb q:key=JbNX:markupp8--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1kc" q:key="Il_0">He acknowledged that the protest dwindled after Park 578 and that it lost numbers during the melee after people âscattered,â but he said, âWe still came back to Union Park in big numbers.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1kd q:key=5auE:By6:49--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1kd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ke q:key=JbNX:markupp9--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1kf" q:key="Il_0">By 6:45 local time, a few hundred protesters remained in Union Park, mostly celebrating the protest and cleaning up.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1jc q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52540--><!--qv q:id=1kg q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52540--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative items-center">605d ago / 8:11 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1ki-->Rep. Beatty calls out Vance for not helping Ohio's working people" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1lb" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-Joyce-Beatty-ac-1052p-kn2joa.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1lc q:key=5auE:Rep.J1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1lc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ld q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1le" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Joyce Beatty, D-Ohio, criticized Vance, saying he "ran away" from his home state to go to Yale and Silicon Valley the moment he could.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1lf q:key=5auE:Shear2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1lf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1lg q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1lh" q:key="Il_0">She argued that Trump and Vance like to "talk about states like Ohio" but that "Kamala and Joe actually get stuff done for us."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1kg q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52539--><!--qv q:id=1li q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52539--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-20T00:06:28.360Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52539" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1lj"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 8:06 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1lk-->Sen. Dick Durbin says Trump is 'like a bad boss'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1ll q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="1mc"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-dick-durbin-ac-1159p__881045-5xfeub.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-dick-durbin-ac-1159p__881045-5xfeub.avif"/><img alt="Durbin at DNC: Trump 'like a bad boss,' his record 'defined by failure'" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1md" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-dick-durbin-ac-1159p__881045-5xfeub.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1me q:key=5auE:Sen.D1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1me q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1mf q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1mg" q:key="Il_0">Sen. Dick Durbin, D-Ill., said in his convention remarks that Trump had promised to bring back manufacturing jobs and to deliver infrastructure "but he failed."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1mh q:key=5auE:"Hisr2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1mh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1mi q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1mj" q:key="Il_0">"His record was defined by failure. To put it another way, Donald Trump is like a bad boss. You want time off to take care of your sick parents? Ask Donald Trump. Denied. In Donald Trump's America, there is no paid family leave. Want to have a child but need IVF? Too bad; that's shut down. ... Want a pay raise? Too bad; the boss just gave himself one, so there's nothing left for you."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1mk q:key=5auE:Durbi3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1mk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ml q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1mm" q:key="Il_0">Durbin quipped that Trump did make history and should be given credit: "He is one of only two presidents in the history of the United States to leave office with fewer Americans working than when he started."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52539-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Sen. Dick Durbin says Trump is 'like a bad boss'" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1mn" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52539-overflow-content" q:id="1mo"><!--qv q:id=1mp q:key=5auE:Hethe0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1mp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1mq q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1mr" q:key="Il_0">He then praised the Biden administration's record, saying, "Today, more roads are getting fixed, more factories are being built, more Americans are working construction, and more autoworkers are making cars than on any month when Trump was president."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ms q:key=5auE:Durbi1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ms q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1mt q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1mu" q:key="Il_0">Durbin said Harris and Walz would "fight for the places that are too often left behind."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1li q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52533--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52533"><!--qv q:id=1mv q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52533--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div
