2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-robert-garcia-ac-1006p__826562-eu0gvc.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-robert-garcia-ac-1006p__826562-eu0gvc.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-robert-garcia-ac-1006p__826562-eu0gvc.avif"/><img alt="Rep. Garcia reflects on losing his mother and stepfather during the Covid pandemic" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1ns" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-robert-garcia-ac-1006p__826562-eu0gvc.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1nt q:key=5auE:Rep.R1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1nt q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1nu q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1nv" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Robert Garcia, D-Calif., tonight talked about how Harris called him after his mother and stepfather died from Covid.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1nw q:key=5auE:"Iwil2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1nw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1nx q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ny" q:key="Il_0">"I will never forget when Kamala Harris called me after my parents died," Garcia said. "She told me about her own story, about losing her own mother, and that she was praying for me at that very moment."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1nz q:key=5auE:Garci3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1nz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1o0 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1o1" q:key="Il_0">Garcia criticized Trump over his handling of the virus, pointing to his suggestion that the <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trump-suggests-injection-disinfectant-beat-coronavirus-clean-lungs-n1191216" target="_blank">âinjectionâ of disinfectant</a> might help clean the lungs and defeat the virus.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52533-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Rep. Robert Garcia recalls Harris conversation after his parents died of Covid" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1o2" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52533-overflow-content" q:id="1o3"><!--qv q:id=1o4 q:key=5auE:Garci0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1o4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1o5 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1o6" q:key="Il_0">Garcia also described his experience immigrating to the U.S. as a young child.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1o7 q:key=5auE:"Iâll1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1o7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1o8 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1o9" q:key="Il_0">"Iâll never forget the day that I became a United States citizen. I raised my right hand and I pledge an oath to protect and to love this country. It was the proudest day of my life," Garcia said, adding that his mother instilled in him the notion that true patriotism "is not about screaming and yelling America first."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1mx q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52535--><!--qv q:id=1oa q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52535--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:54:46.680Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52535" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1ob"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:54 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1oc-->Ex-MAGA commentator calls on Republicans to leave 'MAGA echo chamber'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1od q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="1oe" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1od q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1oa q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1of q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1og q:key=5auE:RichL0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1og q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1oh q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1oi" q:key="Il_0">Rich Logis once styled himself as an "ultra-MAGA" conservative commentator and Trump defender. He started a pro-Trump podcast, wrote for conservative media outlets and regularly assailed liberal Democrats.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1oj q:key=5auE:Butas1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1oj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ok q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ol" q:key="Il_0">But as Logis told Democratic delegates in a recorded video tonight, he "finally stepped outside the MAGA echo chamber" and "looked around with my own eyes." He determined that Trump was a serial liar who failed the country in the early months of the Covid crisis.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1om q:key=5auE:Logis2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1om q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1on q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1oo" q:key="Il_0">Logis, speaking straight to the camera, delivered a pointed message to "all the Republicans and independents" watching the convention: "I made a grave mistake, but it's never too late to change your mind."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1op q:key=5auE:Hecal3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1op q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1oq q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1or" q:key="Il_0">He called on anti-Trump Republicans and independents to vote for the Harris-Walz ticket.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1oa q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52537--><!--qv q:id=1os q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52537--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:53:42.077Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52537" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1ot"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:53 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1ou-->4 arrests made after security breach during March on the DNC protest<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1ov q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211" q:id="1ow" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ov q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1os q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1ox q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1oy q:key=5auE:Fourp0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1oy q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1oz q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1p0" q:key="Il_0">Four people were arrested after the security breach during the March on the DNC protest this evening, Tom Ahern, the deputy director of communications for the Chicago Police Department, told NBC Chicago. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1os q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52532--><!--qv q:id=1p1 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52532--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:53:05.389Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52532" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1p2"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:53 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1p3-->Covid takes a turn at center stage, but at a very early hour<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1p4 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986" q:id="1p5" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1p4 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1p1 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1p6 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1p7 q:key=5auE:It'sr0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1p7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1p8 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1p9" q:key="Il_0">It's rare to see a political discussion about Covid policy these days. Most Americans clearly want to turn the page, and the debate over pandemic response is a thorny one for both sides that usually has them on the defensive (Democrats over accusations that some of their policies infringed too much on personal freedoms and Republicans over the effort by many in their party to downplay the pandemic's impact and to cast doubt on the efficacy of vaccines). </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pa q:key=5auE:That'1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1pa q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pb q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1pc" q:key="Il_0">That's why Monday's part of convention programming devoted to the Covid pandemic stuck out, showing how Democrats could try to go on offense on the issue if they chose to. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pd q:key=5auE:Minne2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1pd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pe q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1pf" q:key="Il_0">Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan gave remarks with a nod to her brother, who she said was the "second person to die of Covid in the state of Tennessee," remembering how she couldn't hold a proper memorial for him. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52532-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Covid takes a turn at center stage, but at a very early hour" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1pg" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52532-overflow-content" q:id="1ph"><!--qv q:id=1pi q:key=5auE:"Ourc0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1pi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pj q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1pk" q:key="Il_0">"Our communities were suffering, our economy was struggling, and Donald Trump was playing games. Our country was brought to the brink by his failure to respond, but the Biden-Harris administration stepped in," she said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pl q:key=5auE:Short1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1pl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pm q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1pn" q:key="Il_0">Shortly after, the convention played a video featuring a series of comments by Trump downplaying the risk of the virus, floating the possibility of injecting disinfectant and tangling with an Axios reporter before saying: "They are dying, it's true. It is what it is." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1po q:key=5auE:Thevi2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1po q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pp q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1pq" q:key="Il_0">The video then pivots to Harris declaring that "help is on the way," outlining the Biden-Harris administration's vaccine rollout and the return to normal that came with it for public life and businesses. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pr q:key=5auE:It'sa3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1pr q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ps q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1pt" q:key="Il_0">It's a road map for how Democrats could try to prosecute the Covid case against Trump and for their candidate if they want to. But it's also worth noting this discussion came before 8 p.m. ET, well before the prime-time coverage begins.  </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pu q:key=5auE:fallback-id-4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1pu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1pv q:key=JbNX:markupbr4--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1p1 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52525--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52525"><!--qv q:id=1pw q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52525--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="1px"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52525"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=1py q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52525--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:45:36.156Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52525" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1pz"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:45 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1q0-->Rep. Lauren Underwood: Trump 'failed us' on Covid<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1q1 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337" q:id="1q2" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1q1 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1py q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1q3 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1q4 q:key=5auE:Rep.L0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1q4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1q5 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1q6" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Lauren Underwood, D-Ill., drew a contrast between the Trump administration's response to Covid and that of the Biden-Harris White House in her convention remarks.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1q7 q:key=5auE:Shesa1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1q7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1q8 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1q9" q:key="Il_0">She said that Trump "failed us" on Covid but that the Biden-Harris administration "got it under control." She also argued that Trump turned Covid "into a catastrophe."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1qa q:key=5auE:mmvo217482309852--><!--qv q:id=1qb q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=1qd q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1qe" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=1qf q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-lauren-underwood-criticizes-trump-s-covid-handling-217482309852" q:id="1qg" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1qf q:key=--><!--t=1qh-->Rep. Underwood: Trump turned Covid crisis into âcatastropheâ<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_5"><!--t=1qi-->03:09<!-- 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-lauren-underwood-ac-955p__865244-1n7fp0.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-lauren-underwood-ac-955p__865244-1n7fp0.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-lauren-underwood-ac-955p__865244-1n7fp0.avif"/><img alt="Rep. Underwood: Trump turned Covid crisis into âcatastropheâ" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1qz" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-lauren-underwood-ac-955p__865244-1n7fp0.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1r0 q:key=5auE:Under3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1r0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1r1 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1r2" q:key="Il_0">Underwood drew on her experience as a registered nurse and brought up that she had a pre-existing condition. She also highlighted that she was the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, noting that she was "painfully aware" that Black women "were more likely to die from Covid."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1py q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52528--><!--qv q:id=1r3 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52528--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:44:30.797Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52528" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1r4"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:44 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1r5-->Minnesotaâs lieutenant governor describes 'historic night,' praises Walz<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1r6 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/zoe-richards-ncpn1291151" q:id="1r7" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1r6 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1r3 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1r8 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1r9 q:key=5auE:Minne0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1r9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ra q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1rb" q:key="Il_0">Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan heralded the convention's kickoff as a "historic night" in her convention speech tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rc q:key=5auE:"Were1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1rc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rd q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1re" q:key="Il_0">"We remember those who came before us, who fought and prayed this moment into existence, the suffragists and the abolitionists, the activists who fought for our rights, the leader who â the leaders who â paved the way for us," Flanagan said. "Their memory reminds us that the fight for freedom always passes from one generation to the next." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rf q:key=5auE:rcim301414--><!--qv q:id=1rg q:key=HvIT:rcim301414--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1rh"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1041/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_521/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.avif"/><img alt="Image: peggy flanagan politics political politician dnc" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="521" loading="lazy" q:id="1ri" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1667/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=1rj q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=1rk-->Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan speaks at the convention.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=1rl-->J. Scott Applewhite / AP<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rm q:key=5auE:Flana3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1rm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rn q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ro" q:key="Il_0">Flanagan, <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-walz-win-make-minnesotas-peggy-flanagan-first-native-american-rcna165389" target="_blank">who also paid homage to her Native American heritage,</a> spoke fondly of Walz, whom she said she had worked with for nearly six years, describing him as a public servant who "does it all with a big heart, a buffalo plaid jacket and a bottomless bag of snacks, Nutter Butters, cheese curds and diet Dew." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rp q:key=5auE:"Anyt4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1rp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rq q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1rr" q:key="Il_0">"Any time we meet, he brings something for me, because heâs always got my back, and when heâs vice president, he will always have yours," she added.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1r3 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52529--><!--qv q:id=1rs q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52529--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:39:47.175Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52529" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1rt"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:39 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1ru-->DNC won't formally vote to nominate Harris or Walz because it was done virtually <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1rv q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="1rw" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1rv q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1rs q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1rx q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1ry q:key=5auE:There0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ry q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1rz q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1s0" q:key="Il_0">There won't be a formal roll call vote at the convention this week to nominate Harris for president because <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/dnc-chair-says-majority-delegates-voted-give-harris-democratic-nominat-rcna164743" target="_blank">delegates had done so virtually earlier this month</a>. Instead, the Rules Committee chair re-affirmed their nominations tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1s1 q:key=5auE:Tuesd1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1s1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1s2 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1s3" q:key="Il_0">Tuesdayâs nominationÂ rollÂ callÂ votes will also include both in-person and remote elements designed to highlight the diversity of the party.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1s4 q:key=5auE:Accor2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1s4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1s5 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1s6" q:key="Il_0">According to the convention organizers, theÂ rollÂ callÂ will begin with Delaware, as a tribute to  Biden, and end with California and Minnesota, home states of  Harris and Walz, respectively. There will be a âdiverse mix of storytellersâ participating in the delegation-by-delegation voting, some in person and some at remote sites. (Remember âCalamari Guyâ from Rhode Island four years ago?)</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1s7 q:key=5auE:Notet3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1s7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1s8 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1s9" q:key="Il_0">Note that the convention isÂ calling this a âceremonialâ and âcelebratoryâÂ rollÂ call, after they held a virtualÂ rollÂ callÂ to make Harris the official nominee that concluded earlier this month..</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1rs q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52530--><!--qv q:id=1sa q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52530--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:38:36.898Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52530" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1sb"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:38 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1sc-->U.S. confirms Trump campaign claim it was breached by Iranian hackers <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1sd q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/kevin-collier-ncpn1110251" q:id="1se" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sd q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sa q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1sf q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1sg q:key=5auE:TheU.0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sh q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1si" q:key="Il_0">The U.S. government has formally endorsed Trumpâs claim that Iran hacked his campaign.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sj q:key=5auE:Ina<a1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sk q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1sl" q:key="Il_0">In aÂ <a href="https://www.fbi.gov/news/press-releases/joint-odni-fbi-and-cisa-statement-on-iranian-election-influence-efforts" target="_blank">joint statement</a>Â today, the FBI, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence said Iran was behind attempts this year to hack presidential campaigns of both political parties.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sm q:key=5auE:Thesa2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sn q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1so" q:key="Il_0">The same hackers were alleged by Google to have targeted the Biden-Harris campaign before President Joe Biden ended his run for re-election, but itâs not clear whether they were breached. Democratic nominee Kamala Harrisâ campaign previously said it had no indication it was hacked.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sp q:key=5auE:<ahre3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1sq q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1sr" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/tech/security/us-confirms-trump-campaign-claim-was-breached-iranian-hackers-rcna167285" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sa q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52527--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52527"><!--qv PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1sw-->Rules Committee co-chair jokes the panel is a ladder for promotion<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1sx q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="1sy" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1sx q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1su q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1sz q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1t0 q:key=5auE:ARule0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1t0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1t1 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1t2" q:key="Il_0">A Rules Committee co-chair, Bishop Leah Daughtry,Â joked in her remarks that Walz is a "little occupied this evening" but said, "It's good to know that serving as co-chair of the Rules Committee is a ladder for promotion."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1t3 q:key=5auE:Walzw1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1t3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1t4 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1t5" q:key="Il_0">Walz was a co-chair of the convention Rules Committee before Harris selected him to be her running mate.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1su data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:26:29.648Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52523" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1t7"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:26 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1t8-->Rep. Maxine Waters pays tribute to civil rights icon<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1t9 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="1ta" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1t9 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1t6 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1tb q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1tc q:key=5auE:Rep.M0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1tc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1td q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1te" q:key="Il_0">Rep. Maxine Waters, D-Calif., invoked the memory of Fannie Lou Hamer, a civil rights leader who took a group of Black delegates to the 1964 Democratic convention in Atlantic City, New Jersey.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1tf q:key=5auE:mmvo217482821809--><!--qv q:id=1tg q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=1ti q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1tj" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=1tk q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-maxine-waters-pays-tribute-to-civil-rights-icon-fannie-lou-hamer-at-dnc-217482821809" q:id="1tl" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1tk q:key=--><!--t=1tm-->Rep. Maxine Waters pays tribute to civil rights icon Fannie Lou Hamer at DNC<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" Maxine Waters pays tribute to civil rights icon Fannie Lou Hamer at DNC&amp;body=https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-maxine-waters-pays-tribute-to-civil-rights-icon-fannie-lou-hamer-at-dnc-217482821809" on:click="q-DbLqUMDt.js#s_KE0wDxvLlrA" q:id="1tw" role="menuitem" tabindex="-1"><!--qv q:id=1tx q:key=dJkd:GH_10--><svg aria-hidden="true" class="_shareLinkIcon_akhn9_202" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="1ty" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#email" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></a></li></ul></div></div><!--qv q:key=GH_12--><button class="_clickToPlayButton_akhn9_247 flex-center" on:click="q-wvTVTK-H.js#s_fXS03dk2qiE[0 1 2]" q:id="1tz"><div class="_playIconContainer_akhn9_20 flex-center"><!--qv q:id=1u0 q:key=dJkd:GH_11--><svg aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" height="20" q:id="1u1" q:key="YD_0" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><use href="/libra-assets/astro-assets/sprite.c8f9fc74.svg#play" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use></svg><!--/qv--></div></button><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1u2 q:key=HvIT:GH_14--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 _posterFrame_akhn9_275 mb-0" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block" q:id="1u3"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_630/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724110659267_f_mo_dnc_maxine_hamer_240819_1920x1080-ydst83.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724110659267_f_mo_dnc_maxine_hamer_240819_1920x1080-ydst83.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724110659267_f_mo_dnc_maxine_hamer_240819_1920x1080-ydst83.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724110659267_f_mo_dnc_maxine_hamer_240819_1920x1080-ydst83.avif"/><img alt="Rep. Maxine Waters pays tribute to civil rights icon Fannie Lou Hamer at DNC" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1u4" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724110659267_f_mo_dnc_maxine_hamer_240819_1920x1080-ydst83.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1u5 q:key=5auE:Water2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1u5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1u6 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1u7" q:key="Il_0">Waters said Hammer was 22 years old when she arrived with the group from Mississippi. She told the people in the room about the violence she endured at the hands of police when she demanded the right to vote. When she asked the convention, "Is this America?" she did not get the answer she hoped for, Waters said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1u8 q:key=5auE:Sixty3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1u8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1u9 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ua" q:key="Il_0">Sixty years later, as Democrats prepare to nominate the country's first Black woman to be the party's nominee, Hamer's legacy can serve as a reminder of how far we've come, Waters said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ub q:key=5auE:"Wewi4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ub q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1uc q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ud" q:key="Il_0">"We will be able to ask ourselves, 'Is this America?' And we will be able to say loudly and proudly â 'Youâre damn right it is.'"</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1t6 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52524--><!--qv q:id=1ue q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52524--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:21:29.709Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52524" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1uf"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:21 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1ug-->Jesse Jackson greets crowd surrounded by civil rights leaders<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1uh q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="1ui" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1uh q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ue q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1uj q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1uk q:key=5auE:TheRe0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1uk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ul q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1um" q:key="Il_0">The Rev. Jesse Jackson, an icon of the American civil rights movement and a former Democratic presidential contender, took the stage to sustained applause and standing ovations.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1un q:key=5auE:Jacks1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1un q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1uo q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1up" q:key="Il_0">Jackson, 82, was seated in a wheelchair and accompanied by other prominent Black leaders, including the Rev. Al Sharpton (who hosts a show on MSNBC) and NAACP President Derrick Johnson.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1uq q:key=5auE:mmvo217480773951--><!--qv q:id=1ur q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=1ut q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1uu" q:key="GH_16"><div class="_overlay_akhn9_48"><div class="_overlayBackgroundGradient_akhn9_210 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217"></div><div class="_title_akhn9_104 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" q:key="GH_4"><!--qv q:id=1uv q:key=7CbQ:GH_3--><a class="_titleLink_akhn9_109" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rev-jesse-jackson-met-with-a-standing-ovation-at-the-democratic-national-convention-217480773951" q:id="1uw" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1uv q:key=--><!--t=1ux-->Rev. Jesse Jackson met with a standing ovation at the Democratic National Convention<!-- --><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_timestamp_akhn9_123 _fadeOutWithControls_akhn9_217" 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_315/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-jesse-jackson-ac-944p__079131-kyr838.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_878/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-jesse-jackson-ac-944p__079131-kyr838.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-jesse-jackson-ac-944p__079131-kyr838.avif"/><img alt="Rev. Jesse Jackson met with a standing ovation at the Democratic National Convention" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1vf" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-jesse-jackson-ac-944p__079131-kyr838.jpg" width="780"/></picture></figure><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vg q:key=5auE:Jacks3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vh q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1vi" q:key="Il_0">Jackson did not deliver remarks, but he smiled and waved to the crowd. He appeared after a short video highlighting the party's legacy on civil rights.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vj q:key=5auE:Jacks4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vk q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1vl" q:key="Il_0">Jackson and Biden were both presidential candidates in the 1988 Democratic presidential primaries. Jackson came in third in the primaries; Biden dropped out before voting started amid accusations of plagiarism. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ue q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52521--><!--qv q:id=1vm q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52521--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:18:00.296Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52521" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1vn"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:18 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1vo-->NAACP president says he's here to do his 'Black job'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1vp q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="1vq" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vp q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vm q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1vr q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1vs q:key=5auE:NAACP0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vs q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vt q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1vu" q:key="Il_0">NAACP President Derrick Johnson began his convention remarks by taking a dig at one of <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/trumps-anti-immigration-black-jobs-reactions-presidential-debate-rcna159375" target="_blank">Trump's recent remarks</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vv q:key=5auE:"I'mh1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vw q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1vx" q:key="Il_0">"I'm here to do my Black job," Johnson said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1vy q:key=5auE:mmvo217483333560--><!--qv q:id=1vz q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=1w1 q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div class="_jwPlayerWithOverlayContainer_akhn9_2 grid-stack-container jwplayerEmbed mb-10 mt-4 feedBody" data-testid="jwplayer-with-overlay" on-document:qidle="q-wvTVTK-H.js#_hW[0]" to do my Black job,â NAACP president says at DNC" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="439" loading="lazy" q:id="1wn" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_780,h_439/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-derrick-johnson-ac-951p-hxmmqy.jpg" q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1wq" q:key="Il_0">"We must all understand Black history is American history. And in this historic moment, we will write the next chapter together," he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52521-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post NAACP president says he's here to do his 'Black job'" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="1wr" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52521-overflow-content" q:id="1ws"><!--qv q:id=1wt q:key=5auE:Durin0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1wt q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1wu q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1wv" q:key="Il_0">During the June presidential debate, Trump said of immigrants: "Theyâre taking Black jobs, and theyâre taking Hispanic jobs, and you havenât seen it yet, but youâre going to see something thatâs going to be the worst in our history.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ww q:key=5auE:Melan1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ww q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1wx q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1wy" q:key="Il_0">Melanie Campbell, president and CEO of the National Coalition on Black Civic Participation, said tonight, "We have come this far by faith, and for Black women, this moment has been a long time coming."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1wz q:key=5auE:Campb2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1wz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1x0 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1x1" q:key="Il_0">Campbell said that Harris' path to the nomination was paved by Black women like Shirley Chisholm, Ella Baker and Diane Nash.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1vm q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52520--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52520"><!--qv q:id=1x2 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52520--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52520"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=1x4 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52520--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T23:06:41.924Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52520" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1x5"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 7:06 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1x6-->Delegate buses arriving at the DNC delayed by protests; outer security perimeter breached<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1x7 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1x7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1x4 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1x8 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1x9 q:key=5auE:Thebu0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1x9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xa q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1xb" q:key="Il_0">The buses bringing delegates to the Democratic National Convention this evening were delayed by protests, according to a DNC official riding one of the buses.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xc q:key=5auE:Demon1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xd q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1xe" q:key="Il_0">Demonstrators breached part of the anti-scaling fencing on the outer perimeter near the United Center, the DNC Public Safety Joint Information Center said in a joint statement. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xf q:key=5auE:"Lawe2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xg q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1xh" q:key="Il_0">"Law enforcement personnel were immediately on-scene and contained the situation," the statement read. "At no point was the inner perimeter breached, and there was no threat to any protectees."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xi q:key=5auE:Perth3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xj q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1xk" q:key="Il_0">Per the statement, there are multiple "redundancies" in the security plan, one of which is the outer perimeter.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xl q:key=5auE:"TheC4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xm q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1xn" q:key="Il_0">"The Chicago Police Department remains on-scene and is working to clear the area," the statement read.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1x4 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52518--><!--qv q:id=1xo q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52518--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T22:49:29.942Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52518" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1xp"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 6:49 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1xq-->Tribal leaders begin night of speeches by praising Biden-Harris administration<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1xr q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="1xs" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xr q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xo q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1xt q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1xu q:key=5auE:Apair0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xv q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1xw" q:key="Il_0">A pair of leaders from the Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation Tribal CouncilÂ began the night of speeches by praising the Biden-Harris administration for what it did to help their people reclaim land. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1xx q:key=5auE:rcim301406--><!--qv q:id=1xy q:key=HvIT:rcim301406--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1xz"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1041/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_521/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.avif"/><img alt="Image: 2024 Democratic National Convention: Day 1 Lorrie Melchior Zach Pahmahmie " class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="521" loading="lazy" q:id="1y0" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1667/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=1y1 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=1y2-->Lorrie Melchior, tribal council secretary of the Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation, and tribal council Vice Chairman Zach Pahmahmie during the first day of the Democratic National Convention in Chicago on Monday.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=1y3-->Chip Somodevilla / Getty Images<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1y4 q:key=5auE:ZachP2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1y4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1y5 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1y6" q:key="Il_0">Zach Pahmahmi, vice chair of the council, said that in 1849, an illegal auction by the U.S. government forcibly removed the tribe from its homeland. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1y7 q:key=5auE:"Sinc3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1y7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1y8 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1y9" q:key="Il_0">"Since then, we have been working to reclaim it. Finally, this year, the Department of the Interior placed some of our ancestral lands west of Chicago into a trust," he said. "Thanks to the resolve of our tribal community and the Biden-Harris administration, we reclaimed a piece of our home. We became the only federally recognized tribal nation in Illinois in 175 years."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1xo q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52517--><!--qv q:id=1ya q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52517--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T22:38:00.743Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52517" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1yb"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 6:38 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1yc-->DNC starts 15 minutes late<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1yd q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="1ye" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1yd q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1ya q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1yf q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1yg q:key=5auE:Theco0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1yg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1yh q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1yi" q:key="Il_0">The convention is officially kicking off, albeit 15 minutes late, with remarks by convention Chair Minyon Moore and Democratic National Committee Chairman Jaime Harrison. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1yj q:key=5auE:Inher1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1yj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1yk q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1yl" q:key="Il_0">In her opening remarks, Moore paid tribute to Biden in "passing the torch" to Harris as the presumptive party nominee.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1ym q:key=5auE:rcim301400--><!--qv q:id=1yn q:key=HvIT:rcim301400--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Jaime-R-Harrison-Minyon-Moore-ew-644p-44f87e.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Jaime-R-Harrison-Minyon-Moore-ew-644p-44f87e.avif"/><source q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52495--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T22:35:00.114Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52495" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1yu"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 6:35 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1yv-->Harris proposes raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, rolling back a Trump law <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1yw q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791" q:id="1yx" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1yw q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1yt q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1yy q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1yz q:key=5auE:CHICA0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1yz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1z0 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1z1" q:key="Il_0">CHICAGO â Vice President Kamala Harris is calling for raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, her first major proposal to raise revenues and finance expensive plans she wants to pursue as president.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1z2 q:key=5auE:rcim300751--><!--qv q:id=1z3 q:key=HvIT:rcim300751--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1z4"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240816-harris-ch-1531-6f67de.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240816-harris-ch-1531-6f67de.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1041/rockcms/2024-08/240816-harris-ch-1531-6f67de.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_521/rockcms/2024-08/240816-harris-ch-1531-6f67de.avif"/><img alt="Kamala Harris." class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="521" loading="lazy" q:id="1z5" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1667/rockcms/2024-08/240816-harris-ch-1531-6f67de.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=1z6 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=1z7-->Kamala Harris in Raleigh, N.C., on Friday.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=1z8-->Mike Stewart / AP<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1z9 q:key=5auE:Harri2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1z9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1za q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1zb" q:key="Il_0">Harris campaign spokesman James Singer told NBC News that she would push for a 28% corporate tax rate, calling it âa fiscally responsible way to put money back in the pockets of working people and ensure billionaires and big corporations pay their fair share.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zc q:key=5auE:âAsPr3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zd q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1ze" q:key="Il_0">âAs President, Kamala Harris will focus on creating an opportunity economy for the middle class that advances their economic security, stability, and dignity,â Singer wrote in an email.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zf q:key=5auE:<ahre4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zg q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1zh" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-proposes-raising-corporate-tax-rate-28-rolling-back-trump-law-rcna167208" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story
