data-pubat="2024-08-19T22:27:23.520Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52515" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="1zl"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 6:27 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=1zm-->TrumpÂ says he will release his medical records<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=1zn q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="1zo" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zn q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zk q:key=--><!--qv q:id=1zp q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=1zq q:key=5auE:Trump0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zr q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1zs" q:key="Il_0">Trump told a CBS news reporter tonight that he plans to release his medical records. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zt q:key=5auE:TheRe1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zt q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zu q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="1zv" q:key="Il_0">The Republican presidential nominee, who has not released a medical report since the attempt on his life last month, made the commitment during <a href="https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-insults-harris-intelligence-medical-records-tv-exclusive/?ftag=CNM-00-10aab7e&amp;linkId=555037424" target="_blank">an interview in Pennsylvania</a>, where he is campaigning.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=1zw q:key=5auE:rcim301031--><!--qv q:id=1zx q:key=HvIT:rcim301031--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="1zy"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1041/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_521/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.avif"/><img alt="Trump in Pennsylvania" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="521" loading="lazy" q:id="1zz" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1667/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=200 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=201-->Former President Donald Trump, in Wilkes-Barre, Pa., on Saturday<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=202-->Carolyn Kaster / AP file<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=203 q:key=5auE:âYouw3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=203 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=204 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="205" q:key="Il_0">âYou will release your medical records to the public?â CBS News reporter Caitlin Huey-Burns asked the former president.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=206 q:key=5auE:Trump4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=206 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=207 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="208" q:key="Il_0">Trump replied: âOh, sure, I would do that very gladly, sure."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=209 q:key=5auE:Hesai5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=209 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20a q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="20b" q:key="Il_0">He said he just had a medical exam and received a "perfect score," as well as two cognitive tests, which he said he "aced."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20c q:key=5auE:Trump6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=20c q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20d q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="20e" q:key="Il_0">Trump has faced pressure to release his medical records throughout the election cycle. He did not specify when or how he would transmit the records to the public. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=1zk q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52513--><!--qv q:id=20f q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52513--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T22:06:14.296Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52513" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="20g"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 6:06 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=20h-->Police make at least one arrest after some protesters breached a barricade and refused to leave<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=20i q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=20i q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=20f q:key=--><!--qv q:id=20j q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=20k q:key=5auE:Polic0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=20k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20l q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="20m" q:key="Il_0">Police with helmets and batons approached a group of breakaway protesters demonstrating outside the DNC venue in Chicago.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20n q:key=5auE:Theyo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=20n q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20o q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="20p" q:key="Il_0">They ordered the protesters who breached the barricade to leave. Dozens did, but dozens remained and were pushed to the left and crushed upon by police in riot gear.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20q q:key=5auE:Somep2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=20q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20r q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="20s" q:key="Il_0">Some protesters threw signs at the riot police while the riot police continued to advance on the group of several dozen protesters. After that, it appeared police made at least one arrest.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20t q:key=5auE:Polic3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=20t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20u q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="20v" q:key="Il_0">Police cleared the entire area between both barriers, but protesters on the outside continued to yell at riot police and continued to attempt to take down the gates.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=20w q:key=5auE:rcim301386--><!--qv q:id=20x q:key=HvIT:rcim301386--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="20y"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-police-se-552p-bf58a2.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-police-se-552p-bf58a2.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1040/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-police-se-552p-bf58a2.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_520/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-police-se-552p-bf58a2.avif"/><img alt="" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="520" loading="lazy" q:id="20z" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_822,h_548/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-police-se-552p-bf58a2.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=210 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=211-->Police with helmets and batons approach the breakaway group of protesters in Chicago today.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=212-->Conner Trotter / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=20f q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52459--><!--qv q:id=213 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52459--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T22:00:35.027Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52459" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="214"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 6:00 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=215-->How Harris built her political network as vice president <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=216 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jonathan-allen-ncpn802641" q:id="217" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=216 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=213 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=218 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=219 q:key=5auE:Befor0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=219 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21a q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21b" q:key="Il_0">Before she became the presumptive Democratic nominee for president, there was a perception of <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/kamala-harris" target="_blank">Harris</a>Â among party elites and Washington insiders that she might not have what it takes to mobilize voters.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21c q:key=5auE:Herap1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=21c q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21d q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21e" q:key="Il_0">Her approval ratings were low. Sheâd been criticized not just by Republicans, but also by fellow Democrats, for miscues in her early days in the No. 2 job in government. She couldnât keep staff.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21f q:key=5auE:Butwh2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=21f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21g q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21h" q:key="Il_0">But while the Beltway set cemented its take on her, Harris built<strong>Â </strong>a formidable political network across the country and online. Her direct engagement with tens of thousands of political activists and voters â particularly through a tour of college campuses, events promoting reproductive rights and pushing an economic-empowerment agenda tilted toward the Black community â positioned Harris to<strong>Â </strong>energize her party when she was tapped to top the ticket.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21i q:key=5auE:Inoth3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=21i q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21j q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21k" q:key="Il_0">In other words, there was a ready core of Harris supporters ready to jump into action.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21l q:key=5auE:<ahre4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=21l q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21m q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21n" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/president-harris-built-ground-force-travels-rcna165105" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=213 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52510--><!--qv q:id=21o q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52510--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:54:29.685Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52510" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="21p"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:54 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=21q-->James Taylor to close out first night of DNC<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=21r q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366" q:id="21s" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=21r q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=21o q:key=--><!--qv q:id=21t q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=21u q:key=5auE:Legen0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=21u q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21v q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21w" q:key="Il_0">Legendary singer-songwriter and self-described "lifelong Democrat" James Taylor is slated to perform Monday night following first lady Jill Biden's address. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21x q:key=5auE:Taylo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=21x q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=21y q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="21z" q:key="Il_0">Taylor played at the DNC in 2012 when then President Barack Obama ran for a second term. Speaking to reporters after his performance, Taylor said supporting Democrats has been a big part of his life and career.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=21o q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52512--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52512"><!--qv q:id=220 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52512--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="221"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52512"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=222 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52512--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:53:49.960Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52512" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="223"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:53 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=224-->Police officers form wall to block breakaway protesters <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=225 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="226" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=225 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=222 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=227 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=228 q:key=5auE:Polic0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=228 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=229 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22a" q:key="Il_0">Police were closing in on a breakaway group after some protesters took down a barrier and crossed it, putting them a block away from the DNC arena.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22b q:key=5auE:Prote1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22b q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22c q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22d" q:key="Il_0">Protest organizers continued to attempt to usher people out of the area and back onto the marchâs planned route â but they were unsuccessful.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22e q:key=5auE:Inthe2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22e q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22f q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22g" q:key="Il_0">In the area between two barricades distancing the protesters from the arena, a group of several dozen police officers have emerged and have formed a wall of bodies apparently designed to prevent the protesters from advancing forward.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22h q:key=5auE:Theof3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22h q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22i q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22j" q:key="Il_0">The official march then began walkingÂ again. It appearred to be an effort by organizers to move the growing crowd away from the barricades. The effort was not successful as the breakaway group of protesters locked arms and was in a stand off with police.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=222 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52508--><!--qv q:id=22k q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52508--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:45:03.998Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52508" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="22l"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:45 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=22m-->NBA great Steve Kerr on the speakers lineup tonight<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=22n q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206" q:id="22o" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=22n q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=22k q:key=--><!--qv q:id=22p q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=22q q:key=5auE:Fresh0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22r q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22s" q:key="Il_0">Fresh off winning an Olympic gold medal, Golden State Warriors coach and nine-time NBA champion Steve Kerr is slated to address the convention tonight, according to a program schedule.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22t q:key=5auE:Kerr,1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22u q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22v" q:key="Il_0">Kerr, who has endorsed the Harris-Walz ticket, frequently uses his public platform to weigh in on political issues. He has criticized Trump for incendiary comments about women and people of color. He has lobbied for tighter federal gun control measures and advocated for racial justice.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22w q:key=5auE:Chica2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22x q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="22y" q:key="Il_0">Chicago happens to be symbolically meaningful for Kerr, who won three NBA championships as a player on the Chicago Bulls. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=22z q:key=5auE:Kerrm3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=22z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=230 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="231" q:key="Il_0">Kerr most recently coached the U.S. men's basketball team to its fifth consecutive gold medal at the Paris Olympics. He is slated to speak before remarks from United Automobile Workers president Shawn Fain and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=22k q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52509--><!--qv q:id=232 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52509--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:40:05.966Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52509" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="233"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:40 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=234-->Protesters take down part of barrier separating march from DNC arena<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=235 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=235 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=232 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=236 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=237 q:key=5auE:After0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=237 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=238 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="239" q:key="Il_0">After aggressively shaking the security barrier on the southern edge of Park #578 â the last point of the park before a parking lot adjacent to the United Center â a few dozen protesters have taken down part of the barrier.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23a q:key=5auE:Prote1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=23a q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23b q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="23c" q:key="Il_0">Protesters have climbed up a jersey barrier and continue to jostle the security fence loose. Several dozen police are looking on.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23d q:key=5auE:rcim301381--><!--qv q:id=23e q:key=HvIT:rcim301381--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="23f"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1040/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_520/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.avif"/><img alt="" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="520" loading="lazy" q:id="23g" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1666/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=23h q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=23i-->Protesters gather inside of Park #578, just a block from the United Center.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=23j-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23k q:key=5auE:Prote3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=23k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23l q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="23m" q:key="Il_0">Protesters have now entered through the barrier into a street. On the other side of the street is another barrier. Police are on the other side of that barrier.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23n q:key=5auE:WestW4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=23n q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23o q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="23p" q:key="Il_0">West Washington Blvd was protected on both sides by security fences to serve as a buffer between Park 578 and the United Center where the DNC is taking place.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23q q:key=5auE:Thegr5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=23q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23r q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="23s" q:key="Il_0">The group of protesters took down the fencing on the south side of the street and took over that protected street.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23t q:key=5auE:March6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=23t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23u q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="23v" q:key="Il_0">March organizers are demanding that the protesters who have taken down the barriers stop their activity and continue marching.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23w q:key=5auE:Twopr7--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=23w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=23x q:key=JbNX:markupp7--><p class="feedBody" q:id="23y" q:key="Il_0">Two protesters are now throwing bottles of water over the second fence at police officers.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=232 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52460--><!--qv q:id=23z q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52460--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:21:10.386Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52460" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="240"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:21 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=241-->Prosecutors defer to judge on Trump sentencing delay in hush money case<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=242 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=242 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=23z q:key=--><!--qv q:id=243 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=244 q:key=5auE:Prose0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=244 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=245 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="246" q:key="Il_0">Prosecutors from the Manhattan district attorneyâs office said today they will defer to the judge on former President Donald Trumpâs bid to<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/trump-attorneys-ask-delay-sentencing-hush-money-case-election-rcna166751" target="_blank"> delay, </a>until after the election,<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/trump-attorneys-ask-delay-sentencing-hush-money-case-election-rcna166751" target="_blank"> his sentencing </a>on falsifying business records charges.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=247 q:key=5auE:These1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=247 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=248 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="249" q:key="Il_0">The sentencing hearing is scheduled for Sept. 18 â two days after New York state Judge Juan Merchan is expected to rule on Trumpâs motion to toss out his conviction in May in light of the U.S. Supreme Courtâs <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/supreme-court/supreme-court-rules-trump-may-immunity-federal-election-inter-rcna149135" target="_blank">decision on presidential immunity</a> in a different case. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52460-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Prosecutors defer to judge on Trump sentencing delay in hush money case" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="24a" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52460-overflow-content" q:id="24b"><!--qv q:id=24c q:key=5auE:Prose0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=24c q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24d q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="24e" q:key="Il_0">Prosecutors said they would âdefer to the Court on the appropriate post-trial schedule that allows for adequate time to adjudicate defendantâs CPL Â§ 330.30 motion while also pronouncing sentence âwithout unreasonable delay,ââ referring to Trumpâs motion to set aside the verdict.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24f q:key=5auE:Theyn1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=24f q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24g q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="24h" q:key="Il_0">They noted that Trumpâs request is about evidentiary issues, not immunity from prosecution, and that the Supreme Court did not address whether evidentiary rulings that touch on immunity are immediately appealable. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24i q:key=5auE:Theya2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=24i q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24j q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="24k" q:key="Il_0">They also flagged that the logistical and security measures the court would have to take to prepare for Trumpâs sentencing could be upended if, as Trump has suggested he would, he seeks appellate intervention right after Merchan rules on Sept. 16 on the request to set aside the verdict.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24l q:key=5auE:<ahre3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=24l q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24m q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="24n" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/prosecutors-trump-sentencing-delay-hush-money-election-rcna166813" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=23z q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52506--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52506"><!--qv q:id=24o q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52506--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="24p"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52506"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=24q q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52506--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:14:40.631Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52506" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="24r"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:14 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=24s-->In walk-through ahead of convention speech, Biden says this is a 'memorable moment' <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=24t q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="24u" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=24t q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=24q q:key=--><!--qv q:id=24v q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=24w q:key=5auE:Inawa0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=24w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24x q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="24y" q:key="Il_0">In a walk-through of the convention hall this afternoon, Biden briefly responded to shouted questions from reporters as he stood at the podium onstage.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=24z q:key=5auE:Asked1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=24z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=250 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="251" q:key="Il_0">Asked if it was a bittersweet moment for him, Biden said, "It's a memorable moment." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=252 q:key=5auE:Andwh2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=252 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=253 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="254" q:key="Il_0">And when asked what he makes of Trump's claims that Biden was pushed out of the presidential race in what amounts to a coup, the president said, âHis stability is still in question."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=255 q:key=5auE:Biden3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=255 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=256 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="257" q:key="Il_0">Biden also said he is also ready to pass the torch to Harris, saying, "I am." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=24q q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52505--><!--qv q:id=258 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52505--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:12:51.897Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52505" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="259"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:12 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=25a-->Protester at march: 'Weâre trying to help you, Kamala'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=25b q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="25c" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=25b q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=258 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=25d q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=25e q:key=5auE:SeanP0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25e q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25f q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25g" q:key="Il_0">Sean Parmelee, 36, is marching with a sign that reads, âWeâre trying to help you, Kamala.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25h q:key=5auE:Hemea1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25h q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25i q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25j" q:key="Il_0">He means it earnestly.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25k q:key=5auE:âIâmv2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25l q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25m" q:key="Il_0">âIâm voting for her â but many people here are not,â said Parmelee, a Chicago resident. âHonestly, she is making it very hard for them.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25n q:key=5auE:âLook3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25n q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25o q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25p" q:key="Il_0">âLook at all this energy. She can have it all if she chooses,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25q q:key=5auE:Parme4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25q q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25r q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25s" q:key="Il_0">Parmelee said heâs protesting because pushing for a cease-fire and an arms embargo with Israel âis the right thing to do.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25t q:key=5auE:âAndi5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25u q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25v" q:key="Il_0">âAnd itâs the right strategy for Kamala Harris,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25w q:key=5auE:AsPar6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=25w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25x q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="25y" q:key="Il_0">As Parmelee spoke, a protest organizer wielding a megaphone led the crowd in a loud chant of, âHarris, Harris, what do you say, how many kids have you killed today?â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=25z q:key=5auE:rcim301365--><!--qv q:id=260 q:key=HvIT:rcim301365--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="261"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protester-Sean-Parmelee-se-507p-8bc5fa.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protester-Sean-Parmelee-se-507p-8bc5fa.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1041/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protester-Sean-Parmelee-se-507p-8bc5fa.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and alt="Protester Sean Parmelee holds a sign that reads &quot;We're Trying to Help You Kamala&quot; during a protest in Chicago on the first day of the DNC" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="521" loading="lazy" q:id="262" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1667/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protester-Sean-Parmelee-se-507p-8bc5fa.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=263 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=264-->Sean Parmelee.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=265-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=258 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52504--><!--qv q:id=266 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52504--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T21:08:31.708Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52504" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="267"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 5:08 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=268-->Protesters a block away from the DNC arena <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=269 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=269 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=266 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=26a q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=26b q:key=5auE:Thema0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26b q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26c q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="26d" q:key="Il_0">The march reached park #578, just one city block from the United Center, the home of the official DNC proceedings this week.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26e q:key=5auE:Prote1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26e q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26f q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="26g" q:key="Il_0">Protesters are now technically within âsight and soundâ of the arena â which had been their goal during the arduous rounds of litigation with the city of Chicago to determine the march route.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26h q:key=5auE:Prote2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26h q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26i q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="26j" q:key="Il_0">Protesters have paused at the southernmost gate of park #578 â their closest point to the United Center â to yell their chants.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26k q:key=5auE:TheDN3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26l q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="26m" q:key="Il_0">The DNC will kick off with speakers at 5:15 p.m. local time, and President Joe Biden will end the night with a speech and show of support for Harris.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=266 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52500--><!--qv q:id=26n q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52500--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T20:57:32.143Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52500" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="26o"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 4:57 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=26p-->Sanders calls Biden 'the most progressive president in modern history'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=26q q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-seitz-wald-ncpn385646" q:id="26r" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=26q q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=26n q:key=--><!--qv q:id=26s q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=26t q:key=5auE:Atapr0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26t q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26u q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="26v" q:key="Il_0">At a progressive event on the sidelines of the DNC, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders praised Biden as "the most progressive president in modern history" and said he largely "kept his word" to be the most progressive executive since FDR.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26w q:key=5auE:Sande1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26w q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26x q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="26y" q:key="Il_0">Sanders was speaking at an event billed as Progressive Central 2024 hosted by the Chicago Teachers Union and Progressive Democrats of America. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=26z q:key=5auE:Whenh2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=26z q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=270 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="271" q:key="Il_0">When he was asked how much liberals should work within the Democratic Party, Sanders defended Biden and Harris from left-flank critiques, telling the audience that they need to "do anything we can to make sure" Harris wins in November.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=272 q:key=5auE:Heals3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=272 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=273 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="274" q:key="Il_0">He also joked that Harris and her running mate Tim Walz are "unfortunately" not as liberal as Fox News makes them out to be.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=26n q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52499--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52499"><!--qv q:id=275 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52499--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="276"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52499"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=277 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52499--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T20:34:02.595Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52499" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="278"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 4:34 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=279-->Protesters march and chant 'Free Palestine'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=27a q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="27b" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=27a q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=277 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=27c q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=27d q:key=5auE:Prote0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=27d q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27e q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="27f" q:key="Il_0">Protesters with the Coalition to March on the DNC are marching west on Washington Blvd. in northwest Chicago.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27g q:key=5auE:Leade1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=27g q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27h q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="27i" q:key="Il_0">Leaders are directing the crowd of several thousand in loud call-and-repeat chants of âNo justice, no peace,â âFree Palestine,â âFrom the river to the sea,â and several other slogans.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27j q:key=5auE:There2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=27j q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27k q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="27l" q:key="Il_0">There is a robust police presence at the peaceful protest. The streets are closed to traffic and hundreds of police on bicycles have created a barrier separating the street, where the protesters are, from the sidewalks.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27m q:key=5auE:There3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=27m q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27n q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="27o" q:key="Il_0">There is a cacophony of sounds at the head of the protest. A helicopter is loudly buzzing overhead while reporters from all over the world â part of the cadre of hundreds of media members keeping pace with the march â speak in different languages. The elevated train at Paulina Street and Washington Boulevard screeches by every few moments.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27p q:key=5auE:Aprot4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=27p q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27q q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="27r" q:key="Il_0">A protester is periodicallyÂ releasing a flare of green smoke â sending a trove of thirsty photographers every few minutes scrambling for the perfect shot of it blowing in the wind.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=277 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52497--><!--qv q:id=27s q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52497--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T20:25:53.759Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52497" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="27t"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 4:25 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=27u-->Trump says Harris is pushing 'communist price controls'<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=27v q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016" q:id="27w" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=27v q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=27s q:key=--><!--qv q:id=27x q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=27y q:key=5auE:Trump0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=27y q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=27z q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="280" q:key="Il_0">Trump blasted Harris and her economic policy proposals in lengthy remarks this afternoon from York, Pennsylvania.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=281 q:key=5auE:Atama1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=281 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=282 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="283" q:key="Il_0">At a machine manufacturing plant, Trump said Harrisâ economic agenda rewards companies that outsource jobs and âpunishes American workers by making it economically impossible to manufacture in America.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=284 q:key=5auE:âWedo2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=284 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=285 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="286" q:key="Il_0">âWe donât need lectures on the economy from a candidate pushing communist price controls," he said. "Kamala has no idea what the hell sheâs doing. Her father is a Marxist professor, and I believe he taught her well, you know, heâs a Marxist professor. Can you imagine?â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=287 q:key=5auE:mmvo217465925822--><!--qv q:id=288 q:key=q9JX:Rz_2--><!--qv q:id=28a q:key=C4ZI:Bn_0--><div q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=290 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="291" q:key="Il_0">He also addressed attacks by Harris and her running mate, Tim Walz, on him and JD Vance calling them "weird." </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=292 q:key=5auE:âIwon1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=292 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=293 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="294" q:key="Il_0">âI wonder if they knew where she comes from, where she came from, what her ideology is. But you could see it a little bit by this whack job. You know, he said, weâre weird," Trump said. "I think weâre extremely normal people like you ... Did you ever see him go on the stage and go like crazy? Itâs like he, between his movement and her laugh, thereâs a lot of craziness."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=297-->Coalition to March on the DNCâs demonstration begins with thousands in attendance<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=298 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="299" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=298 q:key=5auE:After0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=29b q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=29c q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="29d" q:key="Il_0">After more than three hours of speeches, the Coalition to March on the DNCâs demonstration  is finally kicking off.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=29e q:key=5auE:Prote1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=29e q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=29f q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="29g" q:key="Il_0">Protesters will walk 1.1 miles in a loop, leaving from â and returning to â Union Park.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=295 data-pubat="2024-08-19T19:42:21.496Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52494" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="29i"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 3:42 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=29j-->Protester urging for cease-fire yells 'Shame on them!' at DNC welcome party<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=29k q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=29k q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=29h q:key=--><!--qv q:id=29l q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=29m q:key=5auE:Pro-P0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=29m q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=29n q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="29o" q:key="Il_0">Pro-Palestinian protesters appeared on the stage and floor at the DNC welcome party in Chicago last night and urged attendees to call for a cease-fire in Gaza, <a href="https://x.com/codepink/status/1825357088266031497" target="_blank">according to a video posted on X </a>by the anti-war group CODEPINK, which says it organized the demonstration.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=29p q:key=5auE:Inthe1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=29p q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=29q q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="29r" q:key="Il_0">In the video, a protester can be heard yelling on the floor at the DNC welcome event: âThe Democratic administration is supporting an ongoing genocide in Gaza. Shame on them! Shame on them! Shame on them! Make sure you go to the convention and call for accountability. Call for peace and call for a cease-fire!â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=29h q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52462--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52462"><!--qv q:id=29s q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52462--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="29t"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52462"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=29u q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52462--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T19:32:46.717Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52462" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="29v"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 3:32 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=29w-->Josh Shapiro says antisemitism played no role in VP discussions and slams Trumpâs comments<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=29x q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/natasha-korecki-ncpn1286792" q:id="29y" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=29x q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=29u q:key=--><!--qv q:id=29z q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2a0 q:key=5auE:CHICA0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2a0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2a1 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2a2" q:key="Il_0">CHICAGO â Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro said antisemitism played no role in his not becoming the Democratic Partyâs vice presidential nominee, as Donald Trump has charged.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2a3 q:key=5auE:Shapi1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2a3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2a4 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2a5" q:key="Il_0">Shapiro said Trump was the âleast credible personâ when it came to standing up against hatred and bigotry.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52462-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Josh Shapiro says antisemitism played no role in VP discussions and slams Trumpâs comments" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2a6" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52462-overflow-content" q:id="2a7"><!--qv q:id=2a8 q:key=5auE:âHeâs0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2a8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2a9 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2aa" q:key="Il_0">âHeâs trying to use me and heâs trying to use other Jews to divide Americans further,â Shapiro said after concluding remarks to the Pennsylvania delegation at the Democratic convention this morning.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ab q:key=5auE:Shapi1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ab q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ac q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ad" q:key="Il_0">Shapiro then said he wanted to be clear: âAntisemitism played absolutely no role in my dialogue with the vice president. Absolutely none. It is also true that antisemitism is present in our commonwealth, in our country and in some areas within our party, and we have to stand up and speak out against that.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ae q:key=5auE:<ahre2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ae q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2af q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ag" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/josh-shapiro-says-antisemitism-played-no-role-vp-discussions-slams-tru-rcna167167" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=29u q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52489--><!--qv q:id=2ah q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52489--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T19:31:24.530Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52489" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ai"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 3:31 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2aj-->Vietnam War protester traveled to Chicago for DNC protest<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2ak q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/emma-barnett-ncpn880641" q:id="2al" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ak q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ah q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2am q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2an q:key=5auE:MarkF0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2an q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ao q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ap" q:key="Il_0">Mark Friedman, 73, from Los Angeles, was part of an organization in 1968 called the Student Mobilization Committee to end the war. During the DNC in 1968, he protested against the Vietnam War on his college campus in Boston.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2aq q:key=5auE:Heâsn1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2aq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ar q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2as" q:key="Il_0">Heâs not sure who he is voting for yet but hopes a Labor Party candidate comes forward. In 2020, he voted for the socialist ticket.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2at q:key=5auE:Fried2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2at q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2au q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2av" q:key="Il_0">Friedman said the big difference between the 1968 and 2024 protests is âthe city is not planning on physically attacking the demonstrations.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2aw q:key=5auE:âNone3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2aw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ax q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ay" q:key="Il_0">âNone of us have come here with the intention of disrupting activities of the Democrat National Convention, but rather influencing the positions of the Democratic Party to defend abortion rights, to defend immigrant rights, to end the blockade of Cuba, to recognize Palestine and to stop sending U.S. military aid to Israel,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2az q:key=5auE:rcim301318--><!--qv q:id=2b0 q:key=HvIT:rcim301318--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="2b1"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_1120/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_560/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1560/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_780/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.avif"/><img alt="Mark Friedman, 73, from Los Angeles." class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="780" loading="lazy" q:id="2b2" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_2500/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=2b3 q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=2b4-->Mark Friedman, 73, from Los Angeles.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=2b5-->Emma Barnett / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ah q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52491--><!--qv q:id=2b6 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52491--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T19:11:10.659Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52491" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2b7"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 3:11 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2b8-->Lifelong Chicago resident reflects on 1968 DNC protests compared to today<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2b9 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="2ba" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2b9 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2b6 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2bb q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2bc q:key=5auE:FredS0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2bc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bd q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2be" q:key="Il_0">Fred Schein, a 76-year-old lifelong Chicago resident, was inside Lincoln Park during the 1968 DNC protests when police came in aggressively and chased him and his fellow demonstrators out.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bf q:key=5auE:Hesay1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2bf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bg q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2bh" q:key="Il_0">He says todayâs march is nothing like that.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bi q:key=5auE:Infac2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2bi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bj q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2bk" q:key="Il_0">In fact, the whole scene this year â which has drawn comparisons to the 1968 DNC â is entirely different from the one here 56 years ago, Schein said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bl q:key=5auE:âThis3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2bl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bm q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2bn" q:key="Il_0">âThis is nothing like â68,â he said. âThey wouldnât even let us stay in the park,â he said, referring to Chicago police.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bo q:key=5auE:rcim301320--><!--qv q:id=2bp q:key=HvIT:rcim301320--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="2bq"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_1400/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_700/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1950/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_975/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.avif"/><img alt='Fred Schein holds a sign that reads, "Stand with Palestine! End US Aid to Israel"' class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="975" loading="lazy" q:id="2br" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2490,h_3112/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=2bs q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=2bt-->Fred Schein.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=2bu-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bv q:key=5auE:Incon5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2bv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bw q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2bx" q:key="Il_0">In contrast, police have worked to keep Union Park protected and peaceful today, while also declining to have officers wear riot gear proactively.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2by q:key=5auE:Moreg6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2by q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2bz q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2c0" q:key="Il_0">More generally, Schein continued, ââ68 was much more broadly cultural.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c1 q:key=5auE:âThis7--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2c1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c2 q:key=JbNX:markupp7--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2c3" q:key="Il_0">âThis is strictly about politics,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c4 q:key=5auE:Conve8--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2c4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c5 q:key=JbNX:markupp8--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2c6" q:key="Il_0">Conversely, when it came to exactly what demonstrators were protesting against in 1968, âit was one thing: End the Vietnam War,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c7 q:key=5auE:While9--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2c7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2c8 q:key=JbNX:markupp9--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2c9" q:key="Il_0">While this yearâs protests do center on the war in Gaza, âthey also are really wrapping in quite a lot of issues,â he said, listing off reproductive rights, climate change and immigrant rights as a few examples.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ca q:key=5auE:âTrum10--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ca q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cb q:key=JbNX:markupp10--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2cc" q:key="Il_0">âTrump is a fascist and I would never vote for him, but the Democrats are the ones in power during this war,â Schein said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2b6 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52488--><!--qv q:id=2cd q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52488--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T18:41:54.981Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52488" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ce"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 2:41 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2cf-->Police say between 3,000 and 6,000 protesters are here for march<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2cg q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="2ch" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2cg q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2cd q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2ci q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2cj q:key=5auE:March0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2cj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ck q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2cl" q:key="Il_0">March organizers had said as recently as Sunday that they were expecting as many as 20,000 people to attendÂ todayâsÂ protest.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cm q:key=5auE:Asofn1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2cm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cn q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2co" q:key="Il_0">As of now, theyÂ donât seem close to that. Police officers at the protest estimate there are around 3,000 to 6,000 people present. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cp q:key=5auE:March2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2cp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cq q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2cr" q:key="Il_0">March organizers this afternoon disputed the police estimates andÂ claimed that 15,000Â people were here.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cs q:key=5auE:Atlea3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2cs q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ct q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2cu" q:key="Il_0">At least a dozen piles of hundreds of unused protest signs dotted the softball fields in Union Park. It wasÂ a clear indication that attendance for today's protestÂ âÂ which had been billed as the largest of six major demonstrations scheduled to occur this weekÂ âÂ fell short of expectations.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2cv q:key=5auE:rcim301331--><!--qv q:id=2cw q:key=HvIT:rcim301331--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="2cx"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_840/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_420/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1170/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_585/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.avif"/><img alt="Protest signs on the ground" class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="585" loading="lazy" q:id="2cy" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_2500,h_1875/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=2cz q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=2d0-->Unused protest signs in Chicago on Monday.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=2d1-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div q:key=feed-item-rcrd52487--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52487"><!--qv q:id=2d2 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52487--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="2d3"><div class="mps-slot text-center
