data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52487"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=2d4 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52487--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T18:40:58.068Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52487" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2d5"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 2:40 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2d6-->Harris campaign launches WhatsApp channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2d7 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/nicole-acevedo-ncpn384476" q:id="2d8" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2d7 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2d4 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2d9 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2da q:key=5auE:Asthe0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2da q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2db q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2dc" q:key="Il_0">As the DNC kicked off Monday, the Harris campaign launched a new WhatsAppÂ <a href="https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/joebiden.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6b693f24f8d92d026e0c2d2&amp;id=9ad140fd9f&amp;e=20efa93dd3__;!!PIZeeW5wscynRQ!oNNHsCwPojcZ3s0NrxYnCePsLY9V-xklDDWK2gdJGoiuHiVmrcQkRl9EMw524ul8MBruPmcCuD3_B9kxPMSKMGl3aQ$" target="_blank">channel</a> aimed at bilingual Latino voters who could be consequential in the presidential race.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2dd q:key=5auE:Itâst1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2dd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2de q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2df" q:key="Il_0">Itâs the first time a presidential campaign has created a channel to specifically engage with Latinos on the platform, said<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/raised-front-lines-labor-activism-bidens-new-campaign-manager-brings-l-rcna82912" target="_blank">Â Julie Chavez RodrÃ­guez</a>, manager of the Harris campaign, in a selfie-styleÂ welcome <a href="https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/joebiden.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6b693f24f8d92d026e0c2d2&amp;id=750bff993d&amp;e=20efa93dd3__;!!PIZeeW5wscynRQ!oNNHsCwPojcZ3s0NrxYnCePsLY9V-xklDDWK2gdJGoiuHiVmrcQkRl9EMw524ul8MBruPmcCuD3_B9kxPMSgCOBxOA$" target="_blank">video</a>Â message. The channel will be a place where users âcan go to get behind-the-scenes infoâ about the campaign and what itâs doing for Latino families, she added.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52487-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Harris campaign launches WhatsApp channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2dg" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52487-overflow-content" q:id="2dh"><!--qv q:id=2di q:key=5auE:Whats0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2di q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2dj q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2dk" q:key="Il_0">WhatsApp is more popular among Hispanics than all other U.S. demographic groups, with <a href="https://www.pewresearch.org/internet/2024/01/31/americans-social-media-use/" target="_blank">54% of Hispanic adults reporting they use the app</a>. But Latinosâ greater reliance on messaging platforms such as WhatsApp hasÂ also <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/latinos-likely-get-consume-share-online-misinformation-fake-news-rcna2622" target="_blank">disproportionately exposed them to misinformation</a>Â in both English and Spanish, since there are few effective tools to crack down on the large volume of false information shared bilingually across encrypted private group chats, according toÂ <a href="https://www.nielsen.com/insights/2021/inclusion-information-and-intersection/?utm_campaign=Diversity_Equity_Inclusion&amp;utm_content=DIS_Latino&amp;utm_id=NLSN_10_01_2021&amp;utm_source=twitter&amp;utm_medium=Organic_Social/" target="_blank">a 2021 Nielsen report</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2dl q:key=5auE:Latin1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2dl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2dm q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2dn" q:key="Il_0">Latino voters, especially those living in battleground states, stand to reshape the race in ways that are hard to predict sinceÂ <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/harris-poll-latino-voter-support-rcna166532" target="_blank">many of them are young people and newly registered voters</a>, according toÂ <a href="https://www.weareequis.us/research/xssaug2024bgmemo#about-the-polling" target="_blank">a memo</a>Â on a recentÂ <a href="https://www.weareequis.us/research/xssaug2024bgtoplines" target="_blank">Equis Research poll</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2do q:key=5auE:<ahre2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2do q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2dp q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2dq" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/kamala-harris-latino-voters-whatsapp-channel-rcna167176" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2d4 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52484--><!--qv q:id=2dr q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52484--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T18:25:49.835Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52484" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ds"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 2:25 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2dt-->Georgia Election Board adopts another rule that could delay certification of votes<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2du q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.msnbc.com/author/lisa-rubin-ncpn1134441" q:id="2dv" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2du q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2dr q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2dw q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2dx q:key=5auE:TheGe0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2dx q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2dy q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2dz" q:key="Il_0">The Georgia Election Board adopted a new rule today that could give county election administrators additional options to delay certification.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2e0 q:key=5auE:Speci1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2e0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2e1 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2e2" q:key="Il_0">Specifically, the rule known colloquially as the âGrubbs Ruleâ for its proponent, Cobb County GOP Chair Salleigh Grubbs, requires county boards to do whatâs being described as a precinct-by-precinct âreconciliationâ of votes in which they âcompare the total number of ballots cast to the total number of unique voter ID numbers.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52484-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Georgia Election Board adopts another rule that could delay certification of votes" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2e3" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52484-overflow-content" q:id="2e4"><!--qv q:id=2e5 q:key=5auE:Theru0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2e5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2e6 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2e7" q:key="Il_0">The rule further requires that if any discrepancy exists, no matter how small or non-outcome-determinative, âno votes shall be counted from that precinctâ until an investigation is conducted and presented to the board.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2e8 q:key=5auE:Theru1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2e8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2e9 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ea" q:key="Il_0">The rule also empowers county-level election commissioners to âexamine all election-related documentation created during the conduct of elections prior to certification of results.âÂ </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2eb q:key=5auE:Altho2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2eb q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ec q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ed" q:key="Il_0">Although the rule also demands that the countyâs consolidated returns be certified by the superintendent no later than 5 p.m. on the Monday following the election and âimmediately transmitted to the Secretary of State,â various Georgia election workers, residents and advocates raised concerns that the reconciliation processes and investigations would prevent counties from reporting results by the time required by Georgia law.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ee q:key=5auE:Thefu3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ee q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ef q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2eg" q:key="Il_0">The full text of the proposed rule is available at the end ofÂ <a href="https://sos.ga.gov/sites/default/files/forms/Petition%20-%20Grubbs_Redacted.pdf" target="_blank">this petition</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2dr q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52470--><!--qv q:id=2eh q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52470--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T18:21:01.875Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52470" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ei"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 2:21 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2ej-->Trump Media stock sinks to new post-merger low <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2ek q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ek q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2eh q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2el q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2em q:key=5auE:Share0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2em q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2en q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2eo" q:key="Il_0">Shares of former PresidentÂ <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/donald-trump/" target="_blank">Donald Trump</a>âs social media company on Monday touched their lowest price since they began publicÂ <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/04/17/trump-media-shares-rise-in-early-trading-after-days-of-declines.html" target="_blank">trading</a>Â on theÂ <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/18/stock-market-today-live-updates.html" target="_blank">Nasdaq</a>Â nearly five months ago after a merger.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ep q:key=5auE:<ahre1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ep q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2eq q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2er" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/DJT/" target="_blank">Trump Media</a>, the company that owns the Republican presidential nomineeâs preferred social messaging platformÂ <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/04/08/trump-media-how-much-truth-social-app-executives-make.html" target="_blank">Truth Social</a>, traded below $22.40 per share before noon ET.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2es q:key=5auE:Thepr2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2es q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2et q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2eu" q:key="Il_0">The previous low point for the stock, which trades under theÂ <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/03/26/trump-media-stock-ticker-djt-debuts-after-dwac-merger.html" target="_blank">DJT</a>Â ticker, was in mid-April, when the price plummeted to $22.55 following the companyâs slingshot rise in its frenzied public trading debut.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ev q:key=5auE:Theno3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ev q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ew q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ex" q:key="Il_0">The notoriously volatile stockâs downward trajectory over the past month coincided with a swirl of seismic developments for Trump, who is both the majority stakeholder of Trump Media and a main draw for Truth Social users. The share price surged on July 15, the first trading day after Trump was nearly<a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/07/13/trump-rushed-off-stage-by-secret-service-at-rally-after-loud-cracking-noises.html" target="_blank">Â assassinated</a>Â at a campaign rally in western Pennsylvania.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ey q:key=5auE:<ahre4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ey q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ez q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2f0" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/19/trump-media-djt-stock-harris-earnings.html" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2eh q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52481--><!--qv q:id=2f1 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52481--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T18:11:05.093Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52481" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2f2"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 2:11 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2f3-->Protester: âHarris still has the option to help stop funding this warâ<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2f4 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="2f5" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2f4 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2f1 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2f6 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2f7 q:key=5auE:Annie0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2f7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2f8 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2f9" q:key="Il_0">Annie Weiler, a 28-year-old marketing manager who traveled to Chicago from Knoxville, succinctly summed up why she came today.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fa q:key=5auE:âIfyo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2fa q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fb q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2fc" q:key="Il_0">âIf you have a voice, use it,â she said. âYou see the images [of destruction in Gaza] and at this point itâs hard to not get involved.â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fd q:key=5auE:rcim301273--><!--qv q:id=2fe q:key=HvIT:rcim301273--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="2ff"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_1494/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_747/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_2080/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_1040/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.avif"/><img alt='Annie Weiler holds a sign outside that says "Stand With Palestine! End U.S. Aid To Israel!"' class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="1040" loading="lazy" q:id="2fg" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_1600,h_2133/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=2fh q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=2fi-->Annie Weiler.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=2fj-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fk q:key=5auE:Shesa3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2fk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fl q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2fm" q:key="Il_0">She said she hoped the robust protest effort might help guide the Harris campaign to pivot not just on tone, but on policy regarding the war.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fn q:key=5auE:âRigh4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2fn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fo q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2fp" q:key="Il_0">âRight now, Kamala Harris still has the option to help stop funding this war,â she said.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fq q:key=5auE:Weile5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2fq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fr q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2fs" q:key="Il_0">Weiler said she still wasnât sure who she would vote for in the fall â but added it wouldnât be Trump â though she also rejected that withholding a vote for Harris amounted to a vote for Trump.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ft q:key=5auE:âIama6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ft q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2fu q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2fv" q:key="Il_0">âI am a Democrat, but it is hard to support Kamala Harris when she is openly supporting Israel in this conflict,â she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2f1 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52479--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52479"><!--qv q:id=2fw q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52479--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="2fx"><div data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" data-pubat="2024-08-19T18:07:51.765Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52479" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2fz"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 2:07 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2g0-->Chicago police superintendent says officers won't need riot gear if protests stay peaceful<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2g1 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/selina-guevara-ncpn1302441" q:id="2g2" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2g1 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2fy q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2g3 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2g4 q:key=5auE:Chica0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2g4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2g5 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2g6" q:key="Il_0">Chicagoâs top cop thanked protest organizers for keeping protests on Sunday peaceful and said their officers were able to respond in the way they were trained.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2g7 q:key=5auE:âWewe1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2g7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2g8 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2g9" q:key="Il_0">âWe were able to talk to the organizers,â Chicago Police Superintendent Larry Snelling said during a news conference Monday. âThere was mutual respect there, and because of that, we didnât have any incidents.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ga q:key=5auE:Snell2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ga q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gb q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2gc" q:key="Il_0">Snelling added that they hope for the same outcome at every protest going forward and âif that occurs, then weâve had the most successful Democratic National Convention that we can imagine.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gd q:key=5auE:AsChi3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ge q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2gf" q:key="Il_0">As Chicago police gear up for future protests, Snelling said his department has proven they can respond to First Amendment activity without it turning violent. âAs far as riot gear, we donât need officers out there in riot gear if people are protesting peacefully.â Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gg q:key=5auE:Other4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gh q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2gi" q:key="Il_0">Other police departments, including Milwaukee, Capitol Police and departments from across Illinois, are helping to staff DNC infrastructure so Chicago police are freed up to patrol the city theyâve been extensively trained on, Snelling added.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gj q:key=5auE:A23-y5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gk q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2gl" q:key="Il_0">A 23-year-old woman was arrested on Sunday on charges of defacement of property and obstruction of a police officer, but Snelling noted she was not part of the protest imprint.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gm q:key=5auE:âWewo6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gn q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2go" q:key="Il_0">âWe would prefer not to have clashes. We would prefer not to have to make arrests if we donât have to, and we will avoid those things as long as weâre not committing acts of vandalism or violence,â Snelling said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2fy q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52477--><!--qv q:id=2gp q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52477--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:47:19.300Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52477" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2gq"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:47 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2gr-->Biden to cast Trump as a threat to democracy in his convention speech <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2gs q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/mike-memoli-ncpn793901" q:id="2gt" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gs q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gp q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2gu q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2gv q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gw q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2gx" q:key="Il_0">Biden has had a major role in Democratic conventions for decades â heâs only missed one since 1972: 1988, after he suffered a brain aneurysm.Â Still, less than a month after he dropped his bid for a second term, his 2024 appearance now will serve as more of a valedictory address rather than one laying out his vision for four more years in the Oval Office.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gy q:key=5auE:Aseni1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gy q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2gz q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2h0" q:key="Il_0">A senior Biden adviser said the president is viewing this moment without regret. âHe makes a decision and moves on,â they said. âIs it hard for other people? Yes. But itâs not like being president is a part-time job. Thereâs a lot on his plate that heâs focused on.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2h1 q:key=5auE:Thati2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2h1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2h2 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2h3" q:key="Il_0">That includes making sure Harris is elected to replace him. While the vice president has embraced the positive energy around her candidacy to push a campaign message about the future, Biden still sees it as a critical mission to ensure voters understand whatâs at risk if Donald Trump returns to the White House.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52477-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Biden to cast Trump as a threat to democracy in his convention speech " class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2h4" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52477-overflow-content" q:id="2h5"><!--qv q:id=2h6 q:key=5auE:Biden0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2h6 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2h7 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2h8" q:key="Il_0">Biden will cast Trump as a threat to democracy and urge all Democrats, and all Americans, to focus on whatâs needed to be done to defeat him. He will say that now that heâs made the decision he needed to make, itâs up to others to help him ensure that we are âcontinuing the progress we have made.âÂ Â Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2h9 q:key=5auE:âThem1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2h9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ha q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2hb" q:key="Il_0">âThe most important thing they can do is vote,â the adviser said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hc q:key=5auE:Biden2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hd q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2he" q:key="Il_0">Biden advisers had had initial conversations about his convention speech prior to his politically fatal June 27 debate performance, but not yet begun to âput much on paper,â the adviser said. Tonightâs speech is expected to build on the themes of his Oval Office address explaining his decision to step aside.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hf q:key=5auE:Withs3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hg q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2hh" q:key="Il_0">With speeches and other tributes leading up to Bidenâs remarks, the president wants to share his belief that his accomplishments were not his alone. He will note the dire situation he inherited when he came into office in 2021, and how he believes the country was able to recover beyond anyoneâs expectations because of the determination of the American people.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hi q:key=5auE:âThat4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hj q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2hk" q:key="Il_0">âThatâs a big distinction between Joe Biden and Donald Trump. He believes this is what we can do together. Trump says he alone can do it,â the adviser said. âAny time he talks about accomplishments, itâs really about what the country did.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hl q:key=5auE:Biden5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hm q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2hn" q:key="Il_0">Biden will also argue that Harris has been an important partner in progress, and how likeminded they are in fighting for ordinary Americans.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ho q:key=5auE:âHeâs6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ho q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hp q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2hq" q:key="Il_0">âHeâs fully supportive of her,â the adviser said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2gp q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52465--><!--qv q:id=2hr q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52465--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:46:10.395Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52465" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2hs"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:46 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2ht-->Voting rights group asks DOJ to investigate Elon Muskâs PAC<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2hu q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/david-ingram-ncpn890161" q:id="2hv" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hu q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hr q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2hw q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2hx q:key=5auE:Defen0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hx q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2hy q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2hz" q:key="Il_0">Defend the Vote, a Democratic-aligned group that raises money for voting rights, wants the Justice Department to investigation Elon Muskâs America PAC over an allegedly misleading voter registration website. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i0 q:key=5auE:In<ah1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2i0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i1 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2i2" q:key="Il_0">In <a href="https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/25051099-defend-the-vote-letter-to-doj-august-2024" target="_blank">a letter over the weekend</a>, Defend the Vote said it believed Muskâs PAC may have violated a federal law that makes it a crime to conspire to threaten civil rights, such as the right to vote. CNBC <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/02/elon-musk-pac-voter-data-trump-harris.html" target="_blank">reported earlier this month</a> that the website collected personal data from users but failed to direct them to voter registration help if they entered a ZIP code from a battleground state. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i3 q:key=5auE:âAsch2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2i3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i4 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2i5" q:key="Il_0">âA scheme to trick people into believing that they have successfully registered to vote would put those individuals at risk of being unable to exercise their constitutional right to vote in future elections,â wrote Brian Lemek, Defend the Voteâs executive director.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i6 q:key=5auE:Elect3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2i6 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2i7 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2i8" q:key="Il_0">Election officials in <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/05/trump-elon-musk-pac-election-north-carolina.html" target="_blank">Michigan and North Carolina</a> have said they're investigating America PAC's website for potential violations of state law. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52465-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Voting rights group asks DOJ to investigate Elon Muskâs PAC" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2i9" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52465-overflow-content" q:id="2ia"><!--qv q:id=2ib q:key=5auE:Muska0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ib q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ic q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2id" q:key="Il_0">Musk and America PAC did not immediately respond to requests for comment. The Justice Department also did not immediately respond to a request for comment. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ie q:key=5auE:Ameri1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ie q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2if q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ig" q:key="Il_0">America PAC says <a href="https://www.fec.gov/data/committee/C00879510/?tab=spending" target="_blank">in regulatory filings</a> that it supports Trump. Last month, the former president said he expected Musk to support him with $45 million a month in campaign funds, though Musk later said <a href="https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/08/trump-musk-crypto-harris-election.html" target="_blank">the amount would be lower</a>. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2hr q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52475--><!--qv q:id=2ih q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52475--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:43:51.455Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52475" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ii"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:43 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2ij-->Harris voters at protest hope to shape her platform on Gaza<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2ik q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="2il" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ik q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ih q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2im q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2in q:key=5auE:Somem0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2in q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2io q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ip" q:key="Il_0">Some march attendees were more openly aligned with the Democratic Party and clearer about their intentions to vote for Harris in November â explaining that they felt their presence at todayâs protest was an act of service in helping steer the party.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2iq q:key=5auE:Maria1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2iq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ir q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2is" q:key="Il_0">Mariana Espana, a 17-year-old student in Chicago who will be old enough to vote by Election Day, said that she was here to help push Harris specifically to âact on a cease-fire for Palestineâ because âitâs such a tragedy to see these kids dying.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2it q:key=5auE:rcim301268--><!--qv q:id=2iu q:key=HvIT:rcim301268--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="2iv"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_420/rockcms/2024-08/240819-espana-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-d1d8fe.avif"/><source _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=2iy-->Mariana Espana.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=2iz-->Adam Edelman / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2j0 q:key=5auE:âIper3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2j0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2j1 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2j2" q:key="Il_0">âI personally support Kamala. A Trump presidency would be a disaster. But I feel itâs important to push Kamala to push for a cease-fire,â she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2j3 q:key=5auE:âIthi4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2j3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2j4 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2j5" q:key="Il_0">âI think it would help her campaign because it would help rally this wing of the party,â she said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ih PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2ja-->DNC protester says she was inspired by 1968 protests<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2jb q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/emma-barnett-ncpn880641" q:id="2jc" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2jb q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2j8 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2jd q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2je q:key=5auE:Sarah0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2je q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2jf q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2jg" q:key="Il_0">Sarah Martin, 84, came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2jh q:key=5auE:Shewa1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2jh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ji q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2jj" q:key="Il_0">She was in her 20s during the 1968 DNC protests. She said the 1968 protests inspired her to protest the DNC, explaining that âthere really are parallels.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2jk q:key=5auE:rcim301152--><!--qv q:id=2jl q:key=HvIT:rcim301152--><figure class="figure _figure_1wrxx_8 mb-2 feedBody" data-testid="figure-component" q:key="hI_2"><picture class="block mb-1" q:id="2jm"><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1120,h_748/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.avif"/><source media="(width &gt;= 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_560,h_374/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (min-resolution: 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_1560,h_1041/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.avif"/><source media="(width &lt; 1000px) and (resolution &lt; 2dppx)" srcset="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,q_auto:eco,w_780,h_521/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.avif"/><img alt="Sarah Martin came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC." class="block" fetchpriority="low" height="521" loading="lazy" q:id="2jn" src="https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/c_fill,g_auto,w_4032,h_2690/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.jpg" width="780"/></picture><!--qv q:id=2jo q:key=tEul:hI_1--><p class="caption mb-0 _caption_1r9t6_8" q:key="Gg_6"><span class="decoration _decoration_1r9t6_51" data-testid="caption-decoration" q:key="Gg_0"></span><span class="body _body_1r9t6_62" data-testid="caption-body" q:key="Gg_3"><!--t=2jp-->Sarah Martin came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC.<!-- --></span><span class="space _space_1r9t6_66" data-testid="caption-suffix-space" q:key="Gg_4">Â </span><span class="suffix inline-block tracking-tight _suffix_1r9t6_69" q:key="Gg_5"><!--t=2jq-->Emma Barnett / NBC News<!-- --></span></p><!--/qv--></figure><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2jr q:key=5auE:Marti3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2jr q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2js q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2jt" q:key="Il_0">Martin says back then, she had just become involved in activism and remembers watching the protests on TV and being âhorrifiedâ by the police response. She said, âWeâre here to remind Kamala and Tim Walz that remember 1968 and being timid on the issue of U.S. war is not a good thing. Doesnât lead to a good result politically for you.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52457-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post DNC protester says she was inspired by 1968 protests" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2ju" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52457-overflow-content" q:id="2jv"><!--qv q:id=2jw q:key=5auE:Marti0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2jw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2jx q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2jy" q:key="Il_0">Martin says she is not sure who she is voting for yet, saying, âA lot of it depends on what happens between now and the election.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2jz q:key=5auE:Whena1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2jz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2k0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2k1" q:key="Il_0">When asked whether she thinks a Trump-Vance administration would be better for this issue, she said, âHeavens no, theyâd be much worse.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2j8 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52466--><!--qv q:id=2k2 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52466--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:38:20.194Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52466" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2k3"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:38 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2k4-->Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig endorses Harris<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2k5 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519" q:id="2k6" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2k5 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2k2 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2k7 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2k8 q:key=5auE:Retir0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2k8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2k9 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ka" q:key="Il_0">Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig, who publicly <a href="https://www.msnbc.com/deadline-white-house/deadline-legal-blog/luttig-pence-subpoena-jack-smith-rcna72223" target="_blank">advised former Vice President Mike Pence to defy Trumpâs demands </a>to unconstitutionally block the certification of the 2020 election results, announced his endorsement of Harris in an <a href="https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/19/politics/conservative-republican-endorses-harris-calls-trump-a-threat-to-democracy?cid=ios_app" target="_blank">interview</a> with CNN.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kb q:key=5auE:âInth1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2kb q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kc q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2kd" q:key="Il_0">âIn the presidential election of 2024 there is only one political party and one candidate for the presidency that can claim the mantle of defender and protector of Americaâs Democracy, the Constitution, and the Rule of Law,â Luttig said in a statement provided to CNN. âAs a result, I will unhesitatingly vote for the Democratic Partyâs candidate for the Presidency of the United States, Vice President of the United States, Kamala Harris.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ke q:key=5auE:Lutti2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ke q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kf q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2kg" q:key="Il_0">Luttig, whose expected vote for Harris would mark his first time voting for a Democrat, told the news outlet that partisanship must be set aside heading into the November election to block Trump, whom he described as âsingularly unfit,â from winning the election.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52466-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig endorses Harris" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2kh" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52466-overflow-content" q:id="2ki"><!--qv q:id=2kj q:key=5auE:âInvo0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2kj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kk q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2kl" q:key="Il_0">âIn voting for Vice President Harris, I assume that her public policy views are vastly different from my own, but I am indifferent in this election as to her policy views on any issues other than Americaâs Democracy, the Constitution, and the Rule of Law, as I believe all Americans should be,â Luttig said, according to CNN.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2km q:key=5auE:Lutti1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2km q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kn q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ko" q:key="Il_0">Luttig emerged as a<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/video/luttig-calls-trump-a-clear-and-present-danger-to-american-democracy-142272069847" target="_blank"> vocal critic of Trump</a> after his efforts to overturn the 2020 election results. The former federal judge <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/live-blog/january-6-hearings-day-three-live-updates-rcna32981/rcrd2840?canonicalCard=true" target="_blank">testified before the House Jan. 6 committee</a>, warning that Trump and his allies were a âclear and present danger to American democracyâ because they continued to cast doubt on the legitimacy of the election process.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2k2 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52474--><!--qv q:id=2kp q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52474--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:36:50.908Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52474" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2kq"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:36 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2kr-->DNC protest much larger than those at RNC <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2ks q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="2kt" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ks q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2kp q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2ku q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2kv q:key=5auE:TheDN0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2kv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kw q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2kx" q:key="Il_0">The DNC hasnât even formally kicked off downtown, but the protests this week are already far larger than any that occurred during the RNC last month.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ky q:key=5auE:Atten1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ky q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2kz q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2l0" q:key="Il_0">Attendees at todayâs march â many who identified as progressives â offered different reasons on why they felt it was crucial to protest the Democrats but not necessarily the Republicans.Â Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2l1 q:key=5auE:âIwan2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2l1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2l2 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2l3" q:key="Il_0">âI want to push the Democratic Party on a lot of issues,â said Jacob Smith, a 32-year-old software engineer, who traveled from Detroit to attend todayâs event. He listed âstopping the genocide in Gazaâ and achieving a âpermanent cease-fireâ as chief among them. He said he felt both the Democratic Party and the GOP were âequally beholden to special and corporate interests.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2l4 q:key=5auE:âThey3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2l4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2l5 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2l6" q:key="Il_0">âTheyâre both basically right-wing parties at this point,â he said, adding â âbut in general Democrats are a little better than Republicans.âÂ </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2l7 q:key=5auE:âThey4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2l7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2l8 q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2l9" q:key="Il_0">âThey both equally support the police and they both equally donât truly care about the people,â he said. Smith said he hasnât decided who he wants to vote for yet and wouldnât offer who heâs considering, other than that it âwonât be Trump.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2la q:key=5auE:Smith5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2la q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lb q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2lc" q:key="Il_0">Smith said he felt that it's more pertinent to protest the Biden-Harris administration because âitâs the administration that has aided and abetted an ongoing, visible genocide.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ld q:key=5auE:âThec6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ld q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2le q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2lf" q:key="Il_0">âThe country is run by Democrats right now, this is happening on their watch,â he said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lg q:key=5auE:Smith7--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2lg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lh q:key=JbNX:markupp7--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2li" q:key="Il_0">Smith explained that he was hopeful that Democratic Party leaders would be more likely to listen to such protest efforts âbecause progressive voters are part of their base â maybe theyâll be more likely to listen to usâ than Republicans.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lj q:key=5auE:Smith8--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2lj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lk q:key=JbNX:markupp8--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ll" q:key="Il_0">Smith did not attend any of the far smaller protests at the RNC.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lm q:key=5auE:âObvi9--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2lm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ln q:key=JbNX:markupp9--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2lo" q:key="Il_0">âObviously protesting Republican policies is a good thing,â he said, âbut how much of a policy change is really realistic to expect would happen that way.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lp q:key=5auE:âItâs10--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2lp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lq q:key=JbNX:markupp10--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2lr" q:key="Il_0">âItâs about efficacy in a lot of ways,â Smith added. âWhere are your actions going to be most effective?â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2kp q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52472--><!--qv q:id=2ls q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52472--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:32:09.273Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52472" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2lt"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:32 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2lu-->Thousands gather for Coalition to March on the DNC protest<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2lv q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046" q:id="2lw" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2lv q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ls q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2lx q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2ly q:key=5auE:Thous0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ly q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2lz q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2m0" q:key="Il_0">Thousands have already gathered in Union Park, on the Northwest side of Chicago, for todayâs Coalition to March on the DNC protest â the biggest planned protest event this week.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2m1 q:key=5auE:Astag1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2m1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2m2 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2m3" q:key="Il_0">A stage is set up on the west end of the park, where several speakers, from the dozens of groups that are part of the organizing coalition, will begin speaking shortly, ahead of the march.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2m4 q:key=5auE:Middl2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2m4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2m5 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2m6" q:key="Il_0">Middle Eastern music blared from speakers, while protesters banging drums were already parading through the large park, chanting slogans in support of Palestinians.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2m7 q:key=5auE:Today3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2m7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2m8 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2m9" q:key="Il_0">Todayâs event will feature advocates from an array of progressive causes â but it has been billed most prominently as a demonstration for Palestinians and against the war in Israel and Gaza.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ls q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52437--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52437"><!--qv
