data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:30:10.146Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52437" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2md"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:30 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2me-->Former New Zealand leader Jacinda Ardern to attend Democratic convention<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2mf q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mc q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2mg q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2mh q:key=5auE:Forme0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2mi q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2mj" q:key="Il_0">Former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern will attend the Democratic National Convention this week, <a href="https://www.nzherald.co.nz/nz/politics/lets-do-this-jacinda-ardern-heads-to-chicago-for-democratic-national-convention/HFDZAIPLDRE7TGRDSCJMCD5PHY/" target="_blank">The New Zealand Herald reported</a>, citing a spokesperson.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2mk q:key=5auE:Thoug1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ml q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2mm" q:key="Il_0">Though she wonât speak on the main stage, Ardern will participate in a panel discussion on âhealing the nationâ organized by the Center for American Progress Action Fund, a progressive think tank. According to New Zealand media, she is the first former New Zealand prime minister to speak at the DNC.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2mn q:key=5auE:Arder2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2mo q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2mp" q:key="Il_0">Ardern, who became a global progressive icon after taking office in 2017, <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/jacinda-ardern-says-will-resign-new-zealand-prime-minister-rcna66437" target="_blank">announced her resignation as prime minister</a> early last year, saying she no longer had âenough in the tank to do it justice.â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2mq q:key=5auE:Sheha3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2mr q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ms" q:key="Il_0">She has been living in the United States after being <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/former-new-zealand-prime-minister-jacinda-ardern-join-harvard-rcna81503" target="_blank">appointed to multiple fellowships at Harvard</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mc q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52471--><!--qv q:id=2mt q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52471--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:29:05.278Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52471" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2mu"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:29 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2mv-->March on DNC coalition leaders call out Harris ahead of pro-Palestinian march<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2mw q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-tabet-ncpn1237627" q:id="2mx" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mw q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mt q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2my q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2mz q:key=5auE:Leade0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n0 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2n1" q:key="Il_0">Leaders from the March on the DNC coalition criticized Vice President Kamala Harris in a news conference ahead of their march to protest the convention in Chicago on Monday.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n2 q:key=5auE:âKama1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2n2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n3 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2n4" q:key="Il_0">âKamala Harrisâ candidacy, while historic, does not alter the partyâs ongoing support for the Israeli genocide,â said Omar Yunes, co-founder of Jisoor, a pro-Palestinian organization.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n5 q:key=5auE:âAthe2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2n5 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n6 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2n7" q:key="Il_0">âAt her rallies, she has attempted to silence pro-Palestinian protesters, and she, just like Biden, continues to be unwilling to listen to the outcries of the Palestinian people,â Yunes said in reference to Harrisâ response to a protest during one of her rallies in Detroit on Aug. 7.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n8 q:key=5auE:Hatem3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2n8 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2n9 q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2na" q:key="Il_0">Hatem Abudayyeh, executive director of the Arab American Action Network, said he and his organization will take no responsibility if Harris loses the election in November.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2nb q:key=5auE:âTher4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nb q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2nc q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2nd" q:key="Il_0">âThe responsibility is on âgenocide Joeâ and on Kamala Harris and on the Democratic Party. If they lose this election to Trump, they are responsible only. Their policies around Palestine are responsible only, and nobody else,â Abudayyeh said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ne q:key=5auE:Theor5--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ne q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2nf q:key=JbNX:markupp5--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ng" q:key="Il_0">The organizers also used their time to praise Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for being sympathetic to their movement.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2nh q:key=5auE:âWeâr6--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ni q:key=JbNX:markupp6--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2nj" q:key="Il_0">âWeâre in a city in which we have a mayor who says I am from the movement, a mayor who says I am an organizer, a mayor who says that people have the right to protest and express their First Amendment rights,â he said, praising Johnson. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2mt q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52469--><!--qv q:id=2nk q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52469--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:25:53.369Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52469" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2nl"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:25 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2nm-->First lady is 'excited' to pay tribute to her husband, communications director says<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2nn q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nk q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2no q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2np q:key=5auE:JillB0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2np q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2nq q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2nr" q:key="Il_0">Jill Biden's communications director, Elizabeth Alexander, told MSNBC that the first lady is "very excited to pay tribute to her husband, his character, his empathy, his leadership and how he has always put country first" in her speech tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ns q:key=5auE:Alexa1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ns q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2nt q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2nu" q:key="Il_0">Alexander added, "She knows him better than anyone. She knows his capacity for empathy, but sheâs also seen him on the world stage for those 50 years, so sheâs seen his accomplishments up front."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nk q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52467--><!--qv q:id=2nv q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52467--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T17:23:18.356Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52467" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2nw"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 1:23 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2nx-->Klobuchar: Harris is downplaying breaking the glass ceiling to focus on the merits of her candidacy<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2ny q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ny q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nv q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2nz q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2o0 q:key=5auE:Whena0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2o0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2o1 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2o2" q:key="Il_0">When asked about Harris' decision not to focus as much on breaking the glass ceiling if elected president as Hillary Clinton did in her 2016 presidential campaign, Sen. Amy Klobuchar, D-Minn., told MSNBC that Harris had decided to emphasize the merit of her candidacy, adding that it was the right choice. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2o3 q:key=5auE:"It's1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2o3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2o4 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2o5" q:key="Il_0">"It's not to minimize that she'd be the first woman president. She's already been the first woman vice president," Klobuchar said, adding, "But I think this is her own decision to emphasize the merit of her candidacy as well as what she wants to do in the future."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2o6 q:key=5auE:"Shei2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2o6 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2o7 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2o8" q:key="Il_0">"She is bringing the receipts," Klobuchar said in the interview. "She has been an international leader as well as a national leader. She has, as I noted, in just 28 days, done everything flawlessly, including picking an excellent running mate from the state of Minnesota, where we just love our vice presidents."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2nv q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52441--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52441"><!--qv q:id=2o9 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52441--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="2oa"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52441"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=2ob q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52441--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T16:36:00.000Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52441" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2oc"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">605d ago / 12:36 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2od-->Biden heads to the Democratic convention with a large task and heaps of admiration from a party ready to move on <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2oe q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2oe q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ob q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2of q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2og q:key=5auE:CHICA0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2og q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2oh q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2oi" q:key="Il_0">CHICAGO â It will not be the convention President Joe Biden planned.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2oj q:key=5auE:Amont1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2oj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ok q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ol" q:key="Il_0">A month ago, Biden was poised to conclude the Democratsâ party by accepting the nomination with bold pronouncements about how his second term would build on the successes of his first. Instead, he will open the convention Monday to make the case that Vice President Kamala Harris is the one to carry the torch.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2om q:key=5auE:Itisa2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2om q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2on q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2oo" q:key="Il_0">It is a turnabout that Democrats are greeting with jubilation, melancholy, lingering hard feelings and, for some, outright anger.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2op q:key=5auE:Theco3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2op q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2oq q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2or" q:key="Il_0">The complicated dynamic has left convention planners and party leaders delicately navigating a display of respect to an outgoing president whileÂ <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-democratic-convention-hot-ticket-rcna165249" target="_blank">building on newfound exuberanceÂ </a>within the party over Harrisâ ascent.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2os q:key=5auE:<ahre4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2os q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ot q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ou" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/joe-biden-heads-democratic-convention-large-task-heaps-admiration-part-rcna165955" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ob q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52436--><!--qv q:id=2ov q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52436--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T16:01:02.492Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52436" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ow"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 12:01 PM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2ox-->5 things to watch at the 2024 Democratic convention with Kamala Harris <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2oy q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791" q:id="2oz" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2oy q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ov q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2p0 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2p1 q:key=5auE:Themo0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2p1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2p2 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2p3" q:key="Il_0">The most unusual Democratic convention in generations is set to kick off Monday and make history by nominating <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/kamala-harris" target="_blank">Kamala Harris</a> for president just one month after Joe Biden ended his re-election campaign.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2p4 q:key=5auE:ViceP1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2p4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2p5 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2p6" q:key="Il_0">Vice President Harris rapidly unified the party and locked up the nomination, even though she didnât compete in any primaries at the top of the ticket â and her campaign has since surged into a statistical tie or narrow leads in national and battleground surveys against <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump" target="_blank">Donald Trump</a>.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2p7 q:key=5auE:<ahre2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2p7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2p8 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2p9" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/dnc-what-watch-for-harris-biden-democratic-convention-rcna165264" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ov q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52454--><!--qv q:id=2pa q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52454--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T15:24:13.228Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52454" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2pb"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 11:24 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2pc-->Harris campaign unveils more Monday speakers<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2pd q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pa q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2pe q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2pf q:key=5auE:While0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2pg q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ph" q:key="Il_0">While Biden will headline night one of the Democratic National Convention, several other prominent Democrats will speak this evening. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2pi q:key=5auE:Sens.1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2pj q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2pk" q:key="Il_0">Sens. Chris Coons of Delaware and Raphael Warnock of Georgia; Reps. Jasmine Crockett of Texas and Grace Meng and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York; and Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear will all take the stage Monday, Harris campaign spokesperson Quentin Fulks announced.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2pl q:key=5auE:NBCNe2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2pm q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2pn" q:key="Il_0">NBC News previously reported that Hillary Clinton, the former secretary of state and 2016 Democratic presidential nominee, and first lady<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/jill-biden-honor-husband-convention-monday-appearance-was-going-much-d-rcna166732" target="_blank"> Jill Biden</a> are also slated to speak tonight.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pa q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52452--><!--qv q:id=2po q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52452--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T15:24:06.394Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52452" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2pp"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 11:24 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2pq-->'This is what democracy looks like': Sen. Stabenow says uncommitted in Michigan should be heard<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2pr q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/elleiana-green-ncpn1310109" q:id="2ps" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pr q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2po q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2pt q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2pu q:key=5auE:Inani0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2pu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2pv q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2pw" q:key="Il_0">In an interview with Ana Cabrera on MSNBC this morning, Sen. Debbie Stabenow, D-Mich., said the voices of uncommitted voters in Michigan should be heard. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2px q:key=5auE:Durin1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2px q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2py q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2pz" q:key="Il_0">During Michiganâs primary,<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/nightly-news/video/michigan-primary-voters-send-warning-signs-to-both-biden-and-trump-for-november-205142085722" target="_blank"> more than 100,000 voters</a> voted uncommitted in a symbolic effort to protest Bidenâs handling of the war in Gaza. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2q0 q:key=5auE:"This2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2q0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2q1 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2q2" q:key="Il_0">"This is what democracy looks like. And I think people are more engaged with the Democrats because they know we govern and we care and we're working to make a difference," she said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2po q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52446--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52446"><!--qv q:id=2q3 q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52446--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="2q4"><div class="mps-slot text-center data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52446"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=2q5 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52446--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T14:50:29.041Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52446" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2q6"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 10:50 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2q7-->Vance has more than 20 campaign events under his belt in battleground barnstorm<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2q8 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alec-hernandez-ncpn1253662" q:id="2q9" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2q8 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2q5 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2qa q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2qb q:key=5auE:AsJDV0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qb q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qc q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2qd" q:key="Il_0">As JD Vance rounds out just over a month on Trumpâs presidential ticket, an NBC News tally of his public appearances shows a distinct focus on the upper Midwest and a busy travel schedule almost entirely independent of his running mate's. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qe q:key=5auE:Infiv1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qe q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qf q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2qg" q:key="Il_0">In five weeks, the Ohio Republican senator has made at least 23 open-press stops, 20 of which were solo appearances separate from the former president. As the campaign and Vance himself have indicated was the plan all along, the Ohio Republican has spent the bulk of his time on the stump in âRust Beltâ states, with Wisconsin taking first place for total number of public appearances (helped in part by the Republican National Convention having been based in Milwaukee). </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52446-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Vance has more than 20 campaign events under his belt in battleground barnstorm" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2qh" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52446-overflow-content" q:id="2qi"><!--qv q:id=2qj q:key=5auE:Vance0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qk q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2ql" q:key="Il_0">Vance has made seven appearances in the Badger State, followed by four in battleground Michigan, three in Pennsylvania, and two each in Arizona and Nevada. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qm q:key=5auE:Vance1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qn q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2qo" q:key="Il_0">Vance is expected to visit six states this week alone as Democrats gather in Chicago for their nominating convention, beginning with remarks on the economy in Philadelphia this afternoon. Also on his schedule for the week: his fourth joint appearance with Trump at an event billed as remarks on national security. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2q5 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52447--><!--qv q:id=2qp q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52447--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T14:27:34.910Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52447" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2qq"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 10:27 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2qr-->Walz says Biden is the 'best president of his lifetime' at Pennsylvania delegation breakfast<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2qs q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qs q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qp q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2qt q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2qu q:key=5auE:Durin0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qv q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2qw" q:key="Il_0">During the Pennsylvania delegation breakfast today, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz, whom Harris tapped as her running mate, praised Biden ahead of his speech tonight at the Democratic National Convention. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qx q:key=5auE:"Wege1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qx q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2qy q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2qz" q:key="Il_0">"We get an opportunity tonight to say a thank you to the best president of my lifetime, that Iâve been able to witness, to someone whoâs delivered time and time again, someone who made the selfless act of handing that torch to an incredible leader," Walz said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2r0 q:key=5auE:Durin2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2r0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2r1 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2r2" q:key="Il_0">During his remarks, he also included praise for Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro and told attendees that the "blue wall is solid."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2qp q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52445--><!--qv q:id=2r3 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52445--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T14:00:51.947Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52445" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2r4"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 10:00 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2r5-->Sen. John Fetterman says he won't attend the convention this week<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2r6 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519" q:id="2r7" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2r6 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2r3 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2r8 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2r9 q:key=5auE:Sen.J0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2r9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ra q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2rb" q:key="Il_0">Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., who has <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/-are-underdogs-harris-introduces-running-mate-walz-coach-veteran-prote-rcna165350" target="_blank">endorsed Harris</a>, wonât attend the Democratic National Convention this week.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rc q:key=5auE:Inan<1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rc q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rd q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2re" q:key="Il_0">In an <a href="https://www.thefp.com/p/john-fetterman-has-no-regrets" target="_blank">interview</a> with The Free Press, Fetterman said he is skipping the convention to spend time with his children.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rf q:key=5auE:"I've2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rg q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2rh" q:key="Il_0">"I've got three young kids, and theyâre out of school,âÂ he said about his absence from the convention. âThatâs four days I can spend with my children.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ri q:key=5auE:Fette3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ri q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rj q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2rk" q:key="Il_0">Fetterman's office this morning confirmed the senator's absence from the convention to NBC News.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rl q:key=5auE:Fette4--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rl q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rm q:key=JbNX:markupp4--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2rn" q:key="Il_0">Fetterman, who has faced <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/-not-progressive-fetterman-breaks-left-israel-immigration-rcna129747" target="_blank">backlash from progressives over his staunch support for Israel</a>, reportedly dismissed suggestions that he might not be welcomed at the convention as <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/will-protesters-police-problem-democratic-national-convention-rcna166535" target="_blank">thousands of demonstrators </a>plan to descend on Chicago, mainly in protest against Israelâs war in Gaza.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52445-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Sen. John Fetterman says he won't attend the convention this week" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2ro" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52445-overflow-content" q:id="2rp"><!--qv q:id=2rq q:key=5auE:Fette0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rr q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2rs" q:key="Il_0">Fetterman told The Free Press that his decision "was made well before that debate,â referring to Bidenâs poor June debate performance that ultimately led to the presidentâs decision to drop out of the race.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2r3 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52444--><!--qv q:id=2rt q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52444--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T13:24:44.478Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52444" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2ru"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 9:24 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2rv-->Three women who have spoken out about the dangers of state abortion bans will speak at the convention tonight<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2rw q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rt q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2rx q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2ry q:key=5auE:Three0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ry q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2rz q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2s0" q:key="Il_0">Three women who have been vocal about their harrowing experiences during pregnancy in the wake of the Supreme Courtâs decision to overturn Roe v. Wade are scheduled to speak at the Democratic convention tonight, a person with knowledge of the schedule told NBC News.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2s1 q:key=5auE:Thewo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2s1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2s2 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2s3" q:key="Il_0">The women â Amanda Zurawski of Texas, Kaitlyn Joshua of Louisiana and Hadley Duvall of Kentucky â are outspoken supporters of the Democratic presidential ticket. They have been featured in campaign ads, offering personal testimonials about the dangers that state abortion bans impose on the health and livelihoods of pregnant women who are unable carry a pregnancy to term or have experienced sexual abuse resulting in a pregnancy.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2s4 q:key=5auE:The<a2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2s4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2s5 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2s6" q:key="Il_0">The <a href="https://www.nytimes.com/2024/08/19/us/politics/harris-dnc-abortion-rights.html" target="_blank">New York Times</a> has reported that the women will be giving remarks.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52444-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Three women who have spoken out about the dangers of state abortion bans will speak at the convention tonight" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2s7" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52444-overflow-content" q:id="2s8"><!--qv q:id=2s9 q:key=5auE:Unite0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2s9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sa q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2sb" q:key="Il_0">United Auto Workers President Shawn Fain, New York Gov. Kathy Hochul, Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, first lady Jill Biden and the president are also scheduled to deliver remarks at the convention today.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2rt q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52443--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52443"><!--qv q:id=2sc q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52443--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="2sd"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52443"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=2se q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52443--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T13:12:31.187Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52443" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2sf"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 9:12 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2sg-->Trump seeks to clarify controversial comments on the Presidential Medal of Freedom<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2sh q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2sh q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2se q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2si q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2sj q:key=5auE:Inani0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2sj q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sk q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2sl" q:key="Il_0">In an interview with an NBC affiliate in Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania, that aired last night, Trump sought to clarify his<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/trump-says-presidential-civilian-award-better-top-military-honor-whose-rcna166855" target="_blank"> comments last week on the Presidential Medal of Freedom that drew backlash</a> after he said it was a âmuch betterâ to receive than the top military honor, the Congressional Medal of Honor.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sm q:key=5auE:Asked1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2sm q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sn q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2so" q:key="Il_0">Asked to clarify his comments, Trump said he had not heard the negative reaction from the public over his remarks. The former president argued that theÂ Congressional Medal of Honor is the âultimateâ but also a âpainfulâ thing to receive.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sp q:key=5auE:âIwou2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2sp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sq q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2sr" q:key="Il_0">âI would rather, in a certain way, get it, because people that get the Congressional Medal of Honor, which Iâve given to many, are often horribly wounded or dead. Theyâre often dead. They get it posthumously,â he said. âAnd when you get the Congressional Medal of Honor, I always consider that to be the ultimate, but it is a painful thing to get it.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ss q:key=5auE:âWhen3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ss q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2st q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2su" q:key="Il_0">âWhen you get the Presidential Medal of Freedom, itâs usually for other things, like youâve achieved great success in sports, or youâve achieved great success someplace else,â he added. âWhen you get the Medal of Honor, generally speaking â and Iâve met many of them, and Iâve seen the families of many of them â this is an incredible honor, but it was a statement that is much more painful to get because theyâre oftentimes in very bad shape.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52443-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Trump seeks to clarify controversial comments on the Presidential Medal of Freedom" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2sv" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52443-overflow-content" q:id="2sw"><!--qv q:id=2sx q:key=5auE:Speak0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2sx q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2sy q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2sz" q:key="Il_0">Speaking of the Presidential Medal of Freedom, Trump said, âI donât think anybody suffered other than theyâve, you know, theyâve worked hard and theyâve done great things. Oneâs a military award, oneâs a civilian award, but sometimes very painful to get the other."</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2t0 q:key=5auE:Durin1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2t0 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2t1 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2t2" q:key="Il_0">During his presidency, Trump in 2018 awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Miriam Adelson, a wealthy Republican donor and widow of Sheldon Adelson, a Republican megadonor who died in 2021. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2t3 q:key=5auE:Inrem2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2t3 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2t4 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2t5" q:key="Il_0">In remarks at a campaign event last week, Trump spoke of the medal he bestowed upon Miriam Adelson, saying itâs the âhighest award you can get as a civilianâ and is âmuch betterâ than the Congressional Medal of Honor because âeveryone [who] gets the Congressional Medal of Honor, theyâre soldiers. Theyâre either in very bad shape because theyâve been hit so many times by bullets or theyâre dead.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2se q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52440--><!--qv q:id=2t6 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52440--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T12:24:50.452Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52440" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2t7"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 8:24 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2t8-->Democratic National Committee releases party platform ahead of convention <!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2t9 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2t9 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2t6 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2ta q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2tb q:key=5auE:CHICA0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2tb q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tc q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2td" q:key="Il_0">CHICAGO â Democrats released their party platform document yesterday, laying out more than 90 pages of policy priorities just one day beforeÂ their<a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/nightly-news/video/chicago-ramps-up-security-ahead-of-democratic-national-convention-217379397840" target="_blank"> convention</a>Â kicks off.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2te q:key=5auE:Butth1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2te q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tf q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2tg" q:key="Il_0">But the party platform was written and voted on by the Democratic National Conventionâs Platform Committee before <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/joe-biden/" target="_blank">Biden</a>Â dropped out of the race, and the document repeatedly highlights the presidentâs achievements and positions â even when they differ slightly from <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/kamala-harris" target="_blank">Harris</a>â comments.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2th q:key=5auE:Thepl2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2th q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ti q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2tj" q:key="Il_0">The platform refers to Bidenâs âsecond termâ more than a dozen times, underscoring the unprecedented timing of the top of the ticket shake-up.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tk q:key=5auE:Thedo3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2tk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tl q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2tm" q:key="Il_0">The document was approved by the Platform Committee on July 16, just days before BidenÂ <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/president-joe-biden-drops-2024-presidential-race-rcna159867" target="_blank">bowed out of the race</a>Â July 21. Convention delegates will vote on the platform tonight, a largely ceremonial procedure.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52440-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Democratic National Committee releases party platform ahead of convention " class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2tn" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52440-overflow-content" q:id="2to"><!--qv q:id=2tp q:key=5auE:âThis0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2tp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tq q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2tr" q:key="Il_0">âThis election is a choice between two very different economic visions for America: Donald Trump, who sees the world from his country club at Mar-a-Lago; and Joe Biden, who sees it from kitchen tables in Scranton like the one he grew up around,â the document says in the economy chapter.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ts q:key=5auE:Thepo1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ts q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tt q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2tu" q:key="Il_0">The policy platform is divided into nine chapters, emphasizing the partyâs top issues, including lowering costs, fighting climate change and gun violence, and strengthening democracy.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tv q:key=5auE:<ahre2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2tv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2tw q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2tx" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/democratic-national-committee-releases-party-platform-ahead-convention-rcna167098" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2t6 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52438--><!--qv q:id=2ty q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52438--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T12:00:03.107Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52438" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2tz"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 8:00 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2u0-->Exclusive: DCCC launches $27 million ad blitz focused on GOP-held districts<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2u1 q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791" q:id="2u2" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2u1 q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ty q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2u3 q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2u4 q:key=5auE:CHICA0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2u4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2u5 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2u6" q:key="Il_0">CHICAGO â The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is launching a $27 million ad campaign focused on capturing Republican-held seats, targeting a mix of swing districts and red-leaning areas in a bid to retake control of the House.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2u7 q:key=5auE:Thene1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2u7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2u8 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2u9" q:key="Il_0">The new ad buys, first reported by NBC News, come on the opening day of the Democratic convention here, where Harris is slated to be nominated for president later this week. Democrats feel buoyed by the vice presidentâs campaign as she rises in the polls, outperforming Biden since he dropped out.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ua q:key=5auE:Ifitc2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ua q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ub q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2uc" q:key="Il_0">If it continues, that new momentum could have a significant impact in the races for the House, and the DCCC is seeking to capitalize on the enthusiasm behind Harris' candidacy. The ad buys include deep investments in New York, at $8 million, and California, at $5 million, where Democrats are seeking to flip a series of GOP-held competitive districts that could be crucial to determining which party controls the House.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52438-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Exclusive: DCCC launches $27 million ad blitz focused on GOP-held districts" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2ud" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52438-overflow-content" q:id="2ue"><!--qv q:id=2uf q:key=5auE:âHous0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2uf q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ug q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2uh" q:key="Il_0">âHouse Democrats are on offense and this latest salvo of reservations reflects the strong position we are in to retake the majority,â Julie Merz, the DCCC's executive director, said in a statement. âWeâre able to make these moves across the map thanks to the record-breaking fundraising weâve had â driven by Leader Hakeem Jeffries and fueled by the historic numbers of individual donors this cycle.â</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ui q:key=5auE:Theca1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ui q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2uj q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2uk" q:key="Il_0">The campaign targets prime Democratic pickup opportunities in GOP-held districts in Oregon, Arizona and Nebraska. It also includes a red-leaning Pennsylvania district where former TV news anchor Janelle Stelson is taking on Rep. Scott Perry, R-Pa., and a couple of GOP-friendly Iowa districts where Democrats have an outside chance. And it includes $1.5 million inÂ Spanish-languageÂ ads in Latino-heavy districts in California and Texas.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ul q:key=5auE:Itâsu2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ul q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2um q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2un" q:key="Il_0">Itâs unclear whether the DCCC, which is tasked with getting Democrats elected to the House, would be attempting offense in those difficult districts if Biden were still in the race given his low poll numbers a month ago. The ad campaign represents hefty fundraising that allows the party to spend heavily on offense,Â in addition toÂ an earlier round of $28 million in ad buys largely to defend theirÂ incumbents.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2uo q:key=5auE:Theba3--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2uo q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2up q:key=JbNX:markupp3--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2uq" q:key="Il_0">The battle for the House majority is expected to be very close. Republicans hold a narrow 220-212 advantage, and the playing field has shrunk with a few dozen districts making up the battlefield thatâll decide control of the chamber, which will have an enormous impact on the next presidentâs legislative agenda.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ty q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52442--><!--qv q:id=2ur q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52442--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T11:44:55.383Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52442" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2us"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 7:44 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2ut-->Trump and Vance will make campaign stops in swing states this week in DNC counterprogramming effort<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2uu q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2uu q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ur q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2uv q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2uw q:key=5auE:Asthe0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2uw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ux q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2uy" q:key="Il_0">As the DNC kicks off, Trump and Vance are set to embark on a busy week of campaign stops through swing states across the country.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2uz q:key=5auE:Inapr1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2uz q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2v0 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2v1" q:key="Il_0">In a press briefing call yesterday afternoon, the Trump campaign gave a preview of this weekâs schedule, which includes plans for either Trump or Vance to do media interviews daily. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2v2 q:key=5auE:TheTr2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2v2 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2v3 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2v4" q:key="Il_0">The Trump campaign will hold a news conference at 12:30 p.m. ET in Chicago and he will give remarks on the economy later this afternoon in York, Pennsylvania. He'll also deliver remarks in Howell, Michigan, tomorrow; Asheboro, N.C., on Wednesday; Montezuma Pass, Arizona, on Thursday; and Glendale, Arizona, on Friday.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=0Z_2--><div class="showMoreBtnWrapper _showMoreBtnWrapper_hxea4_27 flex relative" q:key="0Z_1"><div class="_showMoreFade_hxea4_30" data-testid="showmore-fade"></div><button aria-controls="rcrd52442-overflow-content" aria-label="Show more of post Trump and Vance will make campaign stops in swing states this week in DNC counterprogramming effort" class="_showMoreBtn_hxea4_8 btn relative uppercase block mb-2 ghost-button" on:click="q-B2o8Q0xJ.js#s_J08Rfg6pYLQ[0]" q:id="2v5" type="button">Show more</button></div><div class="_afterShowMore_hxea4_40" data-testid="markupembeds-overflow" id="rcrd52442-overflow-content" q:id="2v6"><!--qv q:id=2v7 q:key=5auE:Theca0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2v7 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2v8 q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2v9" q:key="Il_0">The campaign said Trump and Vance will have âvarious opportunities for gagglesâ for those traveling with the campaign this week. But it is unclear at the moment what this looks like for Trump because there is no press charter and he does not standardly invite ânetworkâ media to travel with him.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2va q:key=5auE:Trump1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2va q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vb q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2vc" q:key="Il_0">Trump campaign allies â including Republican Sens. Ron Johnson of Wisconsin and Rick Scott of Florida, Florida Rep. Byron Donalds and others â will also hold public events this week.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ur q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52418--><div class="sm-only:hidden md:hidden" data-testid="feed-ad-qwik" q:key="feed-ad-wrapper-rcrd52418"><!--qv q:id=2vd q:key=00Of:feed-ad-rcrd52418--><!--qv q:key=8z_1--><div class="adSlot col-bleed overflow-hidden mx-auto _adSlot_s90ez_8 mb-6 _feedAd_1ykwf_26 boxinline" data-ad-label="Advertisement" data-testid="ad-slot-component" on-document:auth-update="q-DQTH0shh.js#s_nGUOX1fLPWM[1]" on-document:qinit="q-DQTH0shh.js#_hW[0]" on-window:mps-loaded="q-D0c2iAZ6.js#s_6hNYGwo30Rs[2]" q:id="2ve"><div class="mps-slot text-center _mpsSlot_s90ez_25" data-active-tab="true" data-loadset="0" data-mps="true" data-offset-viewport="50" data-render-on-view="true" data-sizes="[[[1000,1],[]],[[758,1],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[728,90],[360,360]]],[[0,0],[[300,250],[700,50],[5,5],[360,360]]]]" data-slot="boxinline" data-targeting="{}" id="div-libra-feed-ad-rcrd52418"></div></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--qv q:id=2vf q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52418--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T11:27:50.821Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52418" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2vg"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 7:27 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2vh-->GOP-led House committees release lengthy report alleging Biden committed impeachable offenses<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2vi q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vi q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vf q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2vj q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2vk q:key=5auE:TheRe0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vk q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vl q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2vm" q:key="Il_0">The Republican-led House committees investigating whether to impeach Biden released their long-awaited report about their findings this morning, arguing that Biden has committed impeachable conduct but deferring to the full House on whether to pursue a formal impeachment.Â </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vn q:key=5auE:Thene1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vn q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vo q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2vp" q:key="Il_0">The nearly 300-page report is a summary of the investigation conducted by the House Oversight, Judiciary and Ways and Means committees over the past year and a half, nearly all of which has already been made public. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vq q:key=5auE:<ahre2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vq q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vr q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2vs" q:key="Il_0"><a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/gop-led-house-committees-release-lengthy-report-alleging-president-bid-rcna166954" target="_blank"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a></p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vf q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52433--><!--qv q:id=2vt q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52433--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T11:00:44.840Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52433" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2vu"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 7:00 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2vv-->First lady to highlight Biden's character in tonight's speech<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2vw q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vw q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vt q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2vx q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2vy q:key=5auE:First0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vy q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2vz q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2w0" q:key="Il_0">First lady Jill Biden will use <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/jill-biden-honor-husband-convention-monday-appearance-was-going-much-d-rcna166732" target="_blank">her speech tonight</a> to highlight her husband's character and reiterate her support for Harris' candidacy, a source familiar with the matter said. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2w1 q:key=5auE:Sheis1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2w1 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2w2 q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2w3" q:key="Il_0">She is expected to call for Americans to unite "with faith in each other, hope for a brighter future, and love for our country," the source said.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2w4 q:key=5auE:Thefi2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2w4 q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2w5 q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2w6" q:key="Il_0">The first lady will be introduced in a video highlighting moments from her experience in the East Wing. Vivian Wierwille from New Hampshire will also be featured in the video. Wierwille introduced the first lady at a 2021 elementary school event for reopening schools after the height of the pandemic.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2vt q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52416--><!--qv q:id=2w7 q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52416--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T11:00:44.589Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52416" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2w8"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 7:00 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2w9-->Where's Trump?<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2wa q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088" q:id="2wb" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wa q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2w7 q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2wc q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2wd q:key=5auE:AsVan0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wd q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2we q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2wf" q:key="Il_0">As Vance speaks at an economic and energy development event in Philadelphia today, Trump will be in York, Pennsylvania, doing the same. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2wg q:key=5auE:Trump1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wg q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2wh q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2wi" q:key="Il_0">Trump's campaign will be looking to make a pitch to voters in the natural gas-driven battleground state that he and his <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-trump-stance-issues-policies-president-race-rcna150570" target="_blank">"drill, baby, drill"</a> plan would be better for Pennsylvania than Harris, who in the past supported anti-fracking policies.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:s q:sref=2w7 q:key=replies--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:key=feed-item-rcrd52414--><!--qv q:id=2wj q:key=5MJu:card-rcrd52414--><!--qv q:key=r0_14--><div class="card relative _card_ghmuq_8" data-pubat="2024-08-19T11:00:44.309Z" data-testid="card-qwik" id="rcrd52414" on:qvisible="q-BA26PUp-.js#_hW[0]" q:id="2wk"><div class="timestamp _timestamp_ghmuq_70 flex items-center">606d ago / 7:00 AM EDT</div><h2 class="headline _headline_ghmuq_114" q:key="r0_1"><!--t=2wl-->Where's Vance?<!-- --></h2><div class="_authorsContainer_ghmuq_133"><!--qv q:id=2wm q:key=7CbQ:r0_7--><a class="_linkedAuthor_ghmuq_130" data-testid="link-if" href="https://www.nbcnews.com/author/raquel-coronell-uribe-ncpn1310088" q:id="2wn" target="_self"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wm q:key=--><!--/qv--></a><!--/qv--></div><div class="_body_ghmuq_175" data-icid="liveBlogCardLink"><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wj q:key=--><!--qv q:id=2wo q:key=jP3B:FF_3--><!--qv q:key=0Z_3--><!--qv q:id=2wp q:key=5auE:Vance0--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wp q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2wq q:key=JbNX:markupp0--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2wr" q:key="Il_0">Vance is expected to be in Philadelphia today as both campaigns zero in on battleground Pennsylvania. </p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ws q:key=5auE:Vance1--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2ws q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2wt q:key=JbNX:markupp1--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2wu" q:key="Il_0">Vance will speak at an economic and energy event.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2wv q:key=5auE:Trump2--><!--qv q:key=Rz_1--><!--qv q:s q:sref=2wv q:key=--><!--/qv--><!--qv q:id=2ww q:key=JbNX:markupp2--><p class="feedBody" q:id="2wx" q:key="Il_0">Trump was in Wilkes-Barre over the weekend, and Harris and Walz were in Rochester yesterday.</p><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><div data-testid="markupembeds-bodyend" id="bodyEnd"></div><!--/qv--><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv President Harris accepts historic Democratic nomination",{"primary":"1b3","seo":"1b3"},"Now that the DNC is over, Vice President Harris and the Democrats are trying to harness this week's energy to But she's facing criticism for not getting more specific about what policies she would pursue as President. Kamala Harris accepted the party's nomination for president of the United States.
