President Bidenâs full remarks at DNC ",{"primary":"1fp","seo":"1fp","social":"1fp"},"default",{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52659",{"primary":"1ft"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1fv"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1fx"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1fz"},{"analysis":"1fw","citations":"1fy","verdict":"1g0"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"190","authors":"191","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"1fk","date":"1fn","description":"1fo","headline":"1fq","presentation":"1fs","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"1fu","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"1g1","replies":"1g2"},"rcrd52658",[],"The convention has concluded for the day â very late. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1g6"},["1g7"],["1g6"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1g8","text":"1g9"},"2024-08-20T04:29:01.285Z","2024-08-20T04:30:40.880Z",{"createdAt":"1gb","publishedAt":"1gb","modifiedAt":"1gc"},"The convention has concluded for the day â very late.",{"primary":"1ge","seo":"1ge"},"Democratic convention wraps for the first day",{"primary":"1gg","seo":"1gg","social":"1gg"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52658",{"primary":"1gj"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1gl"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1gn"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1gp"},{"analysis":"1gm","citations":"1go","verdict":"1gq"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"1g4","authors":"1g5","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"1ga","date":"1gd","description":"1gf","headline":"1gh","presentation":"1gi","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"1gk","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"1gr","replies":"1gs"},"rcrd52656","I am a national political reporter at NBC News covering presidential and down-ballot elections, as well as campaign finance and other election data.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1gv"},["1gw"],"Ben Kamisar is a national political reporter for NBC News","ncpn891986","ben.kamisar@nbcuni.com","National Politics Reporter",["1h1"],"Ben Kamisar",1500,"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_26/3653062/240627-ben-kamisar.jpg",{"primary":"1h5"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"1h6","width":"1h4"},"organization",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@bkamisar",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1ha","youtube":"1a8"},"person","https://www.nbcnews.com/author/ben-kamisar-ncpn891986","ben-kamisar-ncpn891986",{"canonical":"1hd","primary":"1hd","slug":"1he"},"I previously worked as the deputy political editor at NBC News and a campaign reporter at The Hill newspaper in Washington, D.C. Prior to that, I covered Texas politics for The Dallas Morning News and the Austin American-Statesman. A Connecticut native, I graduated from Northwestern University and live in Washington, D.C.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1hg"},["1hh"],[],[],{"bio":"1gx","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1gy","id":"1gz","email":"1h0","jobTitle":"1h2","name":"1h3","primaryImage":"1h7","publisher":"1h9","socialMediaProfiles":"1hb","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1hf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"1hi","educationAndExpertise":"1hj","awards":"1hk"},["1hl"],"embeddedWidget","ncwd000999","widget","CUSTOM_EMBED","Biden","\"Trump wants to cut Social Security and Medicare.\"","FACT_CHECK_STATEMENT","7d8a8cf5-a75d-48bb-b760-4123599633ca",{"attribution":"1hr","attributionUrl":"1ac","text":"1hs","type":"1ht","updateId":"1hu"},"MEDIUM","LEFT",{"size":"1hw","alignment":"1hx","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"1hv","presentation":"1hy"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"1hz","publisher":"1i0"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"1i1"},["1i2"],[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1i3","text":"1i4"},"2024-08-20T04:24:10.751Z","2024-08-20T04:28:09.310Z",{"createdAt":"1i6","publishedAt":"1i6","modifiedAt":"1i7"},"Fact check: Does Trump support cutting Medicare and Social Security?",{"primary":"1i9","seo":"1i9"},{"primary":"1i9","seo":"1i9","social":"1i9"},"FACT_CHECK",{"style":"1ic"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52656",{"primary":"1ie"},"It's true that Trump has been all over the place on Medicare and Social Security over the years. And he said in March on CNBC that âthereâs a lot you can do in terms of entitlements, in terms of cutting.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ig"},"But shortly after that interview, Trump told Breitbart, \"I will never do anything that will jeopardize or hurt Social Security or Medicare,\" reiterating a call he has made repeatedly over the last few years.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ii"},"My colleague Sahil Kapur has a <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/donald-trump-map-social-security-medicare-rcna143475\" target=\"_blank\">great rundown of where Trump has stood</a> on entitlement programs â calling it a \"huge Ponzi scheme\" and floating raising the benefit age in 2000, praising then-House Speaker Paul Ryan's 2012 plans to cap future Medicare spending, saying during his 2016 bid he'd protect the programs and proposing Social Security cuts while in office but no tangible Medicare cuts.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ik"},["1ih","1ij","1il"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1im"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1io"},"This is misleading.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iq"},["1ir"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1is"},{"analysis":"1in","citations":"1ip","verdict":"1it"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"1gu","authors":"1hm","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"1i5","date":"1i8","description":"1ia","headline":"1ib","presentation":"1id","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"1if","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"1iu","replies":"1iv"},"rcrd52655","I am a politics reporter covering breaking news for NBC News, based in Washington, D.C. I have covered the White House, political campaigns and Congress. My reporting has touched on <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/trump-military-fears-rcna129159\" target=\"_blank\">national defense</a>,<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/joe-biden/muslim-americans-biden-israel-aid-package-betrayal-gaza-palestinians-rcna148638\" target=\"_blank\"> U.S. foreign policy</a>, <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/judge-denies-trump-co-defendants-motions-dismiss-charges-classified-do-rcna148505\" target=\"_blank\">court battles</a>, <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/teamsters-unions-45000-rnc-donation-exposes-divisions-members-rcna140136\" target=\"_blank\">unions</a>, <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/ohio-abortion-vote-excites-liberals-may-not-predict-2024-democratic-wi-rcna124204\" target=\"_blank\">abortion politics</a> and more.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["1iz"],"Megan Lebowitz is a politics reporter for NBC News.","ncpn1275337","megan.lebowitz@nbcuni.com","Politics Reporter",["1j4"],"Megan Lebowitz","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_26/3653107/240627-megan-lebowitz.jpg",{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"1j8","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@megan_lebowitz",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337","megan-lebowitz-ncpn1275337",{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},"I joined the politics digital team in 2023 after completing an NBC News rotational program, where I worked on the assignment desk and coordinated live shots for MSNBC and NBC News Now. My digital coverage focuses on breaking politics news, and I have also written <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/democrats-ohio-abortion-second-win-rcna103897\" target=\"_blank\">enterprise</a> and <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trumps-claims-crime-rates-clash-police-data-rcna145353\" target=\"_blank\">fact-checking stories</a>. I graduated from Northwestern University, where I studied journalism and political science. A midwesterner at heart, I grew up outside of Cleveland.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["1jh"],[],[],{"bio":"1j0","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"1j5","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"1j9","publisher":"1ja","socialMediaProfiles":"1jc","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1jf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"1ji","educationAndExpertise":"1jj","awards":"1jk"},"Christopher Cicchiello is an NBC News researcher in Washington D.C.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jm"},["1jn"],"ncpn1248427",[],"Christopher Cicchiello",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/christopher-cicchiello-ncpn1248427","christopher-cicchiello-ncpn1248427",{"canonical":"1ju","primary":"1ju","slug":"1jv"},[],[],[],{"bio":"1jo","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1jp","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"1jq","name":"1jr","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"1js","socialMediaProfiles":"1jt","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1jw","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"1jx","educationAndExpertise":"1jy","awards":"1jz"},["1jl","1k0"],"Biden drew a contrast between his being the oldest serving president and his young age when he was elected senator. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1k2"},"Biden said he has been \"too young to be in the Senate because I wasn't 30 yet and too old to stay as president. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1k4"},"\"I can honestly say Iâm more optimistic about the future than I was when I was elected as a 29-year-old United States senator â I mean it,\" he added.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1k6"},["1k3","1k5","1k7"],["1k2","1k4","1k6"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1k8","text":"1k9"},"2024-08-20T04:23:14.765Z","2024-08-20T04:28:30.249Z",{"createdAt":"1kb","publishedAt":"1kb","modifiedAt":"1kc"},"Biden drew a contrast between his being the oldest serving president and his young age when he was elected senator.",{"primary":"1ke","seo":"1ke"},"Biden says he was 'too old to stay as president'",{"primary":"1kg","seo":"1kg","social":"1kg"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52655",{"primary":"1kj"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1kl"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1kn"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1kp"},{"analysis":"1km","citations":"1ko","verdict":"1kq"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"1ix","authors":"1k1","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"1ka","date":"1kd","description":"1kf","headline":"1kh","presentation":"1ki","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"1kk","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"1kr","replies":"1ks"},"rcrd52654","I am a senior reporter focused on the biggest stories of the day, including high-profile trials, natural disasters, cultural events and international conflicts. I specialize in coverage of the entertainment industry and the media business.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["1kw"],"Daniel Arkin is a senior reporter at NBC News.","ncpn1206","daniel.arkin@nbcuni.com","Senior Reporter",["1l1"],"Daniel Arkin","daniel arkin","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_47/3669551/241118-daniel-arkin.jpg",{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"1l6","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@d_arkin",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniel-arkin-ncpn1206","daniel-arkin-ncpn1206",{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},"I have worked at NBC News for more than a decade. I have a masterâs degree from Columbia Journalism School.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["1lf"],[],[],{"bio":"1kx","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"1l2","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"1l7","publisher":"1l8","socialMediaProfiles":"1la","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1ld","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"1lg","educationAndExpertise":"1lh","awards":"1li"},["1lj"],"Biden finished his speech just before 12:20 a.m. ET. He was then joined onstage by Harris, first lady Jill Biden, second gentleman Doug Emhoff and members of the extended Biden family, including his children Hunter and Ashley.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ll"},"No more speeches on the lineup tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ln"},["1lm","1lo"],["1ll","1ln"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1lp","text":"1lq"},"2024-08-20T04:21:51.275Z","2024-08-20T04:22:28.050Z",{"createdAt":"1ls","publishedAt":"1ls","modifiedAt":"1lt"},"Biden said he knows Harris would be a great president.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1mw"},"\"Because like many of our best presidents, she was also a vice president,\" Biden joked.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1my"},"mmvo217506885667","PT1M38S","Tue Aug 20 2024 04:52:19 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T04:52:13.000Z",{"publishedAt":"1n3","createdAt":"1n3"},"217506885667","now_joe_harris_dnc_240819",{"id":"1n5","guid":"1n6","externalAdvertiserId":"1n6"},"'Like many of our best presidents, she was also a vice president': Biden endorses Harris at DNC",{"primary":"1n8","seo":"1n8"},"During his speech at the Democratic National Convention, President Joe Biden praised Vice President Kamala Harris and her running mate, Tim Walz, stating, \"She will be a president our children can look up to\" and a \"historic president who puts her stamp on America's was a joke, that was a joke,\" he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1qf"},"Fifteen vice presidents, including Biden, have gone on to become president.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1qh"},["1mx","1mz","1qe","1qg","1qi"],["1mw","1my","1qf","1qh"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1qj","text":"1qk"},"2024-08-20T04:20:25.975Z","2024-08-20T05:03:12.334Z",{"createdAt":"1qm","publishedAt":"1qm","modifiedAt":"1qn"},"Biden said he knows Harris would be a great president. \"Because like many of our best presidents, she was also a vice president,\" Biden joked. \"That was a joke,",{"primary":"1qp","seo":"1qp"},"'Like many of our best presidents, [Kamala] was also a vice president'",{"primary":"1qr","seo":"1qr","social":"1qr"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52649",{"primary":"1qu"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1qw"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1qy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1r0"},{"analysis":"1qx","citations":"1qz","verdict":"1r1"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"1mb","authors":"1mv","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"1ql","date":"1qo","description":"1qq","headline":"1qs","presentation":"1qt","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"1qv","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"1r2","replies":"1r3"},"rcrd52645","I'm a senior reporter telling stories about elections and the people who shape them. I cover election administration and policy, exploring the debilitating and destabilizing <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/buckingham-county-virginia-election-staff-quits-baseless-voter-fraud-rcna76435\" target=\"_blank\" data-sk=\"tooltip_parent\">effects of election conspiracy theories</a>, the activist networks and partisans influencing American democracy, and how policy changes shape the franchise.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1r6"},["1r7"],"Jane C. Timm is a senior reporter for NBC News.","ncpn475656","jane.timm@nbcuni.com",["1l1"],"Jane C. Timm ","Jane Timm.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2023_08/3595670/jane-timm-byline-jm-1.jpg",{"primary":"1rf"},{"altText":"1re","height":"1h4","url":"1rg","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@janestreet",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1rj","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jane-c-timm-ncpn475656","jane-c-timm-ncpn475656",{"canonical":"1rl","primary":"1rl","slug":"1rm"},"I've spent more than a decade at NBC News, covering Donald Trump and Ben Carson on the 2016 campaign trail and later spearheading NBC News' accountability and fact-check coverage. I'm a graduate of New York University.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ro"},["1rp"],[],"I won a Front Page Award from the Newswomen's Club of New York for specialized political reporting in 2023.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1rs"},["1rt"],{"bio":"1r8","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1r9","id":"1ra","email":"1rb","jobTitle":"1rc","name":"1rd","primaryImage":"1rh","publisher":"1ri","socialMediaProfiles":"1rk","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1rn","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"1rq","educationAndExpertise":"1rr","awards":"1ru"},["1rv"],"Biden, referring to trump","âOn his watch, the murder rate went up 30%.\"","61bd0e37-5f17-4531-8f09-f695bb1ab685",{"attribution":"1rx","attributionUrl":"1ac","text":"1ry","type":"1ht","updateId":"1rz"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"1hx","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"1s0","presentation":"1s1"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"1s2","publisher":"1s3"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"1s4"},["1s5"],[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1s6","text":"1s7"},"2024-08-20T04:20:23.036Z","2024-08-20T04:24:46.245Z",{"createdAt":"1s9","publishedAt":"1s9","modifiedAt":"1sa"},"Fact check: Did murder rise by 30% under Trump?",{"primary":"1sc","seo":"1sc"},{"primary":"1sc","seo":"1sc","social":"1sc"},{"style":"1ic"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52645",{"primary":"1sg"},"The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention found that homicide <a href=\"https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/pressroom/nchs_press_releases/2021/202110.htm\" target=\"_blank\">rose 30% in 2020</a>, the last year of Trump's presidency, while the FBI estimated the rise in murder to be nearly 30%. And while the number may be correct, it's important to note the huge hike occurred during the 2020 pandemic, when American society was upended in many ways.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1si"},["1sj"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1sk"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1sm"},"This is true. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1so"},["1sp"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1sq"},{"analysis":"1sl","citations":"1sn","verdict":"1sr"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"1r5","authors":"1rw","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"1s8","date":"1sb","description":"1sd","headline":"1se","presentation":"1sf","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"1sh","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"1ss","replies":"1st"},"rcrd52651","I am a politics reporter covering breaking political news for NBC News, with 13 years of experience reporting on Washington. I cover legal developments involving former President Trump, the Biden administration, presidential campaigns, Congress and foreign policy. I live-blogged Trumpâs first criminal trial as well as all 10 congressional hearings held by the House select committee that investigated the Jan. 6 insurrection. I have also written enterprise stories about medication abortion and gun restrictions imposed by the executive branch. For my first two years at NBC, I was the sole digital congressional reporter, covering both the House and Senate.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["1sx"],"Rebecca Shabad is a politics reporter for NBC News based in Washington.","ncpn854016","Rebecca.Shabad@nbcuni.com",["1j4"],"Rebecca Shabad","Rebecca Shabad.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2023_08/3595832/rebecca-shabad-byline-jm-1.jpg",{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"1t6","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@rebeccashabad",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016","rebecca-shabad-ncpn854016",{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},"Before NBC News, I was a political reporter at CBS News, covering national politics and policy for its website during the 2016 presidential election cycle and the first year of Trumpâs presidency. I wrote about how Russian hackers could disrupt the U.S. election, issues surrounding voting machines and the Trump administrationâs vetting process for refugees. I also wrote an exclusive story that went viral about sleeveless dresses being banned in the House, which prompted a change in the dress code. At The Hill newspaper, I reported on the federal budget process, government spending as well as on breaking political news. I got my start in journalism at CQ Roll Call. Iâm a graduate of Syracuse Universityâs S.I. Newhouse School of Public Communications, with a degree in broadcast journalism and political science.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["1tf"],[],[],{"bio":"1sy","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"1t2","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"1t7","publisher":"1t8","socialMediaProfiles":"1ta","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1td","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"1tg","educationAndExpertise":"1th","awards":"1ti"},["1tj"],"Biden said this will be the first presidential election since Jan. 6, 2021. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1tl"},"\"On that day, we almost lost everything about who we are as a country, and that threat, this is not hyperbole, that threat is still very much alive. Donald Trump says he will refuse to accept the election results if he loses again,\" Biden said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1tn"},"Biden said the country can't let Trump make the same attempt touched on reproductive freedom, referring to Trump's role in appointing conservative Supreme Court justices who helped overturn the constitutional right to abortion.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xt"},"Biden cited the Supreme Court majority's writing in its decision to overturn Roe v. Wade that women \"are not without electoral or political power.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xv"},"\"No kidding,\" Biden said. \"Republicans found out the power of women in 2022, and Donald Trump is going to find out the power of women in 2024.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xx"},"Voters are set toÂ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/abortion-rights-ballot-measure-south-dakota-rcna152746\" target=\"_blank\">weigh in on</a><a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/abortion-rights-ballot-measure-south-dakota-rcna152746\" target=\"_blank\">Â c</a><a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/abortion-rights-ballot-measure-south-dakota-rcna152746\" target=\"_blank\">onstitutional amendments</a>Â to enshrine abortion rights in several states this fall.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xz"},["1xu","1xw","1xy","1y0"],"Voters are set toÂ weigh in onÂ constitutional amendmentsÂ to enshrine abortion rights in several states this fall.",["1xt","1xv","1xx","1y2"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"1y1","text":"1y3"},"2024-08-20T04:16:11.530Z","2024-08-20T04:26:03.235Z",{"createdAt":"1y5","publishedAt":"1y5","modifiedAt":"1y6"},"Biden touched on reproductive freedom, referring to Trump's role in appointing conservative Supreme Court justices who helped overturn the constitutional right",{"primary":"1y8","seo":"1y8"},"Biden talks up 'power of women' and bashes Trump's role in overturning Roe v. said his administration will keep working to bring hostages home and end the war in Gaza.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1z3"},"âTwo days ago, I put forward a proposal that brought us closerâ to a cease-fire agreement âthan weâve done since Oct. 7,â he said.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1z5"},"Biden said his administration, including Secretary of State Antony addressed people who called on him to bow out of the presidential race, saying he was not angry.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"20c"},"\"All this talk about how I'm angry at all those people who said I should step down, that's not true,\" he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"20e"},"The audience chanted, \"We love Joe.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"20g"},"\"I love my country more, and we need to preserve our democracy,\" he said. one was almost too successful, convention officials said. The constant cheering and applause forced convention officials to skip planned speakers and performers to ensure Biden had enough time to complete his address, officials said in a statement ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"21v"},"âBecause of the raucous applause interrupting speaker after speaker, we ultimately skipped elements of our program to ensure we could get to President Biden as quickly as possible so that he could speak directly to the American people,\" the statement read.Â \"We are proud of the electric atmosphere in our convention hall and proud that our convention is showcasing the broad and diverse coalition behind the Harris-Walz ticket throughout the week on and off the stage.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"21x"},["21w","21y"],["21v","21x"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"21z","text":"220"},"2024-08-20T04:14:58.343Z","2024-08-20T04:26:58.518Z",{"createdAt":"222","publishedAt":"222","modifiedAt":"223"},"Night one was almost too successful, convention officials said.",{"primary":"225","seo":"225"},"Convention officials forced to shorten opening night",{"primary":"227","seo":"227","social":"227"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52643",{"primary":"22a"},"Reporting from Chicago",[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"22d"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"22f"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"22h"},{"analysis":"22e","citations":"22g","verdict":"22i"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"216","authors":"21u","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"221","date":"224","description":"226","headline":"228","presentation":"229","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"22b","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"22j","replies":"22k"},"rcrd52640","I'm a reporter for NBC News covering Capitol Hill, elections and the intersection of politics and public policy in Washington. I've reported on presidential elections, legislative battles in Congress, leadership races, consequential investigations, impeachments â and the dynamics between the White House and Capitol Hill across four presidencies. I also cover Formula 1 racing. You can find me onÂ <a href=\"http://nbcnews.com/\" target=\"_blank\" data-stringify-link=\"http://NBCNews.com\" data-sk=\"tooltip_parent\">NBCNews.com</a>Â and appearing across NBCâs TV and streaming platforms.<strong></strong>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"22n"},["22o"],"Sahil Kapur is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","ncpn1123791","sahil.kapur@nbcuni.com","Senior National Political Reporter",["22t"],"Sahil Kapur",1076,"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_09/3640450/sahil_hs.jpg",{"primary":"22x"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"22w","url":"22y","width":"22w"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@sahilkapur",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"231","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791","sahil-kapur-ncpn1123791",{"canonical":"233","primary":"233","slug":"234"},"I graduated with a B.A. in economics and government from Claremont McKenna College. In Washington, I got my start as a health care policy reporter for multiple publications and most recently worked at Bloomberg News, covering politics and a variety of policy issues. I've also appeared on CBS, ABC, Fox News, CNN, PBS and NPR to discuss my reporting.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"236"},["237"],[],[],{"bio":"22p","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"22q","id":"22r","email":"22s","jobTitle":"22u","name":"22v","primaryImage":"22z","publisher":"230","socialMediaProfiles":"232","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"235","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"238","educationAndExpertise":"239","awards":"23a"},["23b"],"Rep. Grace Meng, D-N.Y., was scheduled to speak at the convention tonight, but after it got off to a late start she never took the stage.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"23d"},"She âhas been rescheduled for another nightâ that is still to be announced, a spokesperson for Meng told NBC News.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"23f"},["23e","23g"],["23d","23f"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"23h","text":"23i"},"2024-08-20T04:04:54.780Z","2024-08-20T04:05:30.134Z",{"createdAt":"23k","publishedAt":"23k","modifiedAt":"23l"},{"primary":"23d","seo":"23d"},"Rep. Grace Meng rescheduled as DNC Day 1 goes spent part of his speech promoting his support of jobs that do not require college degrees.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"24h"},"\"We created apprenticeships with businesses and communities, putting students on a path to a good-paying job whether or not they go to college,\" he said. \"And by the way, we're making college a hell of a lot more affordable.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"24j"},["24i","24k"],["24h","24j"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"24l","text":"24m"},"2024-08-20T03:58:52.371Z","2024-08-20T04:02:55.839Z",{"createdAt":"24o","publishedAt":"24o","modifiedAt":"24p"},"Biden spent part of his speech promoting his support of jobs that do not require college degrees. \"We created apprenticeships with businesses and communities,",{"primary":"24r","seo":"24r"},"Biden talks up jobs that don't require college degrees",{"primary":"24t","seo":"24t","social":"24t"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52553",{"primary":"24w"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"24y"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"250"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"252"},{"analysis":"24z","citations":"251","verdict":"253"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"242","authors":"24g","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"24n","date":"24q","description":"24s","headline":"24u","presentation":"24v","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"24x","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"254","replies":"255"},"rcrd52635","I am an award-winning National reporter for NBCNews.com. I rush to wildfires, shootings, protests, high-profile court rulings and more. A native of Los Angeles, I primarily focus on the western U.S. but have also covered the wars in Ukraine and Gaza and Queen Elizabethâs death in London.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"258"},["259"],"Alicia Victoria Lozano is a California-based reporter for NBC News focusing on climate change, wildfires and the changing politics of drug laws.","ncpn1112366","alicia.lozano@nbcuni.com","National Reporter",["25e"],"Alicia Victoria Lozano","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_25/3652082/230203-alicia-lozano.jpg",{"primary":"25h"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"25i","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@aliciavlozano",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"25l","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366","alicia-victoria-lozano-ncpn1112366",{"canonical":"25n","primary":"25n","slug":"25o"},"I helped lead coverage of the Lahaina fire in Maui and uncovered how a historic neighborhood became ground zero for the devastation. I have closely followed the challenges faced by wildland firefighters as they fight for better pay. And I was among the first reporters dispatched when gunmen opened fire in Uvalde, Texas; Monterey Park; Calif.; and Colorado Springs.Â Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25q"},"<strong>Â </strong>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25s"},"My work also includes deep dives into Californiaâs troubled cannabis industry, income disparities associated with tourism in Wyoming, reviving the drug war in Portland and San Francisco, and a state secession movement unlike any other in Oregon.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25u"},"Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},"Previously, I worked at NBC Philadelphia where I covered gun violence, the criminal justice system and the regionâs fentanyl crisis. I got my start at La OpiniÃ³n, a Spanish-language daily, and the Los Angeles Times. I received my graduate degree in journalism from the University of Southern California and an undergraduate degree in political science from Kenyon College.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25y"},["25r","25t","25v","25x","25z"],[],"Mid-Atlantic Emmy - Interactivity, Preventing Suicide: Breaking the Silence, 2018",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"262"},"Edward R. he's proud to be first president to walk a picket his remarks, Biden has repeatedly sought to tie Harris to the administration's top domestic agenda items, from infrastructure investments to lowering the cost of prescription drugs.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"27l"},"When the crowd started chanting, \"Thank you, Joe,\" he jumped in with a suggested addition: \"Thank you, Kamala, his remarks, Biden has repeatedly sought to tie Harris to the administration's top domestic agenda items, from infrastructure investments to lowering the",{"primary":"27v","seo":"27v"},"Biden nods to Harris in touting his administration's accomplishments",{"primary":"27x","seo":"27x","social":"27x"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52634",{"primary":"280"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"282"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"284"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"286"},{"analysis":"283","citations":"285","verdict":"287"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"276","authors":"27k","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"27r","date":"27u","description":"27w","headline":"27y","presentation":"27z","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"281","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"288","replies":"289"},"rcrd52632",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["28c"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"28f","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["28k"],[],[],{"bio":"28d","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"28e","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"28g","publisher":"28h","socialMediaProfiles":"28i","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"28j","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"28l","educationAndExpertise":"28m","awards":"28n"},["28o"],"Biden said he wants to report that \"democracy has prevailed, democracy has delivered, and now democracy must be preserved.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"28q"},"\"We're facing an inflection point, one of those rare moments in history when the decisions we make now will determine the fate of our nation and the world for decades to come. That's not hyperbole. I mean it literally. We're in a battle for the very soul of America,\" he said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"28s"},"SHOW_MORE_BUTTON",{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},"CENTER",{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"28v","presentation":"28x"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"28y","publisher":"28z"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"290"},"He spoke about what occurred in Charlottesville, Virginia, in 2017 and how it motivated him to run for president again. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"292"},"\"I ran for president in 2020 because of what I saw in Charlottesville,\" he said. \"Extremists coming out of the woods, carrying torches, their veins bulging from their necks, carrying Nazi swastikas, chanting the same exact antisemitic bile that was heard in Germany in the early â30s, neo-Nazis, white supremacists, the Ku Klux Klan, so emboldened by a president then in the White House that they saw as an ally [that] they didn't even bother to wear their hoods.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"294"},["28r","28t","291","293","295"],["28q","28s","292","294"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"296","text":"297"},"2024-08-20T03:44:59.643Z","2024-08-20T03:47:51.413Z",{"createdAt":"299","publishedAt":"299","modifiedAt":"29a"},"Biden said he wants to report that \"democracy has prevailed, democracy has delivered, and now democracy must be preserved.\" \"We're facing an inflection point,",{"primary":"29c","seo":"29c"},"Biden says 'democracy has delivered, and now democracy must be preserved'",{"primary":"29e","seo":"29e","social":"29e"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52632",{"primary":"29h"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"29j"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"29l"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"29n"},{"analysis":"29k","citations":"29m","verdict":"29o"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"28b","authors":"28p","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"298","date":"29b","description":"29d","headline":"29f","presentation":"29g","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"29i","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"29p","replies":"29q"},"rcrd52633",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"217"},["29t"],[],{"primary":"21f"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"21e","url":"29w","width":"21h"},{"name":"21j","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"21l","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"21n","primary":"21n","slug":"21o"},[],[],[],{"bio":"29u","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"21a","email":"21b","jobTitle":"29v","name":"21d","primaryImage":"29x","publisher":"29y","socialMediaProfiles":"29z","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"2a0","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"2a1","educationAndExpertise":"2a2","awards":"2a3"},["2a4"],"A protester was trying to unfurl a flag in support of Palestinians in Gaza. Other attendees tried to block the flag with âWe â¤ï¸ Joeâ signs before one snatched the flag and threw it aside. Chants of âWe love Joeâ also drowned out attempts by the protesters to interrupt Bidenâs remarks.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2a6"},"The commotion went largely unnoticed by Biden or most of the people in the convention center.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2a8"},["2a7","2a9"],["2a6","2a8"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2aa","text":"2ab"},"2024-08-20T03:42:17.010Z","2024-08-20T03:51:57.457Z",{"createdAt":"2ad","publishedAt":"2ad","modifiedAt":"2ae"},"A uid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"2gp","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2gq","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2gr","authors":"2gs","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["2h0","2h1"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"2go","primaryImage":"2gt","url":"2gu","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2gv","description":"2gw","publisher":"2gx","source":"2gy","closedCaptioning":"2gz","videoAssets":"2h2"},["2fb","2fr","2g7","2gn","2h3"],{"headline":"2ev","videos":"2h4"},{"id":"2dt","type":"198","duration":"2du","dateBroadcast":"2dv","date":"2dx","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"2e0","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2e2","description":"2e4","url":"2e7","closedCaptioning":"2ea","videoAssets":"2ei","primaryImage":"2ep","teaseImage":"2eu","associatedVideoPlaylist":"2h5"},{"type":"196","video":"2h6"},"Joe Bidenâs daughter, Ashley Biden, introduced him in deeply personal remarks that honored his career, as well as his family life. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2h8"},"\"Joe Biden is the O.G. girl dad,\" Ashley Biden said, following her mother, the first lady. \"And he wasn't just a girl dad. I could see that he valued and trusted women. How he listened to his mother. How he believed his sister. Most of all, how he respected my mother's career.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2ha"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"2hc","presentation":"2hd"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"2he","publisher":"2hf"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"2hg"},"Ashley Biden was one of Bidenâs family members who sat to the side of the Resolute Desk as Biden announced his decision to step aside as the presidential nominee less than a month ago.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hi"},"\"Dad, you always tell us, but we don't tell you enough, that you are the love of our lives and the life of our love,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hk"},"She called her father \"one of the most consequential leaders in American history\" and said he knew that \"family was everything.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hm"},"Ashley Biden recounted losing her brother Beau Biden to brain cancer in 2015, saying it had felt like the grief would \"never end.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2ho"},"\"I know that Beau is here with us tonight,\" she said. \"He is always here with us.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hq"},"Biden called the election \"the fight of our lifetimes,\" characterizing it as a fight for freedom, democracy and reproductive rights.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hs"},"\"After Beau passed, I got this tattoo on my wrist. It says 'Courage, dear heart,'\" Biden said. \"And now, this election requires the courageous hearts of all of us.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hu"},"\"Tonight I am asking you, if you stood with us in 2020, call upon your courageous heart. Stand with us today,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2hw"},["2h7","2h9","2hb","2hh","2hj","2hl","2hn","2hp","2hr","2ht","2hv","2hx"],["2h8","2ha","2hi","2hk","2hm","2ho","2hq","2hs","2hu","2hw"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2hy","text":"2hz"},"2024-08-20T03:28:23.056Z","2024-08-20T03:49:26.162Z",{"createdAt":"2i1","publishedAt":"2i1","modifiedAt":"2i2"},"Joe Bidenâs daughter, Ashley Biden, introduced him in deeply personal remarks that honored his career, as well as his family life.  \"Joe Biden is the O.G. girl",{"primary":"2i4","seo":"2i4"},"Ashley Biden introduces her father as the 'O.G. girl dad'",{"primary":"2i6","seo":"2i6","social":"2i6"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52623",{"primary":"2i9"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2ib"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2id"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2if"},{"analysis":"2ic","citations":"2ie","verdict":"2ig"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"2df","authors":"2ds","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"2i0","date":"2i3","description":"2i5","headline":"2i7","presentation":"2i8","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"2ia","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"2ih","replies":"2ii"},"rcrd52615",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["2il"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"2io","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["2it"],[],[],{"bio":"2im","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"2in","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"2ip","publisher":"2iq","socialMediaProfiles":"2ir","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"2is","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"2iu","educationAndExpertise":"2iv","awards":"2iw"},["2ix"],"mmvo217501765794","PT4M18S","Tue Aug 20 2024 03:32:13 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T03:32:08.000Z",{"publishedAt":"2j2","createdAt":"2j2"},"217501765794","f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819",{"id":"2j4","guid":"2j5","externalAdvertiserId":"2j5"},"First Lady Jill Biden honors husband Joe Biden at Democratic convention",{"primary":"2j7","seo":"2j7"},"First Lady Jill Biden gave a speech paying tribute to her husband, President Joe Biden, at the Democratic National Convention. She traced the arc of their life together from raising their children to his rise to the vice presidency and ultimately to the presidency.",{"primary":"2j9"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/dr-jill-biden-honors-husband-joe-biden-at-democratic-national-convention-217501765794","dr-jill-biden-honors-husband-joe-biden-at-democratic-national-convention-217501765794",{"canonical":"2jb","primary":"2jb","slug":"2jc"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724124711879_f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724124711879_f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819.vtt",{"srt":"2je","webvtt":"2jf"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",258.027,4392000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"2jh","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"2ji","bitrate":"2jj"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724124711879_f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819_6.mp4",4392675,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"2jl","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"2ji","bitrate":"2jm"},["2jk","2jn"],"vidimg3249890432",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124711879_f_mo_dnc_jill_biden_240819_1920x1080-uzsxjl.jpg",{"primary":"2jr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"2jp","headline":"2jq","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2js","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2jt","authors":"2ju","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"2jr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"2jp","headline":"2jw","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2jx","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2jy","authors":"2jz","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primar "1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1cr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1cp","headline":"2kz","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2l0","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2l1","authors":"2l2","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1cw","primary":"1cw","slug":"1cx"},{"primary":"1d0","seo":"1d1"},{"primary":"1d3"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1d7","webvtt":"1d8"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1da","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1dc"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1de","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1df"},["2la","2lb"],{"type":"198","id":"1cl","mpxMetadata":"2ky","primaryImage":"2l3","url":"2l4","duration":"1cz","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2l5","description":"2l6","publisher":"2l7","source":"2l8","closedCaptioning":"2l9","videoAssets":"2lc"},{"id":"1dk","guid":"1dl","externalAdvertiserId":"1dl"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1dp"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1dn","headline":"2lf","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2lg","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2lh","authors":"2li","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1du","primary":"1du","slug":"1dv"},{"primary":"1dy","seo":"1dy"},{"primary":"1e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1e4","webvtt":"1e5"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1e7","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1e9"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1eb","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1ec"},["2lq","2lr"],{"type":"198","id":"1dj","mpxMetadata":"2le","primaryImage":"2lj","url":"2lk","duration":"1dx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2ll","description":"2lm","publisher":"2ln","source":"2lo","closedCaptioning":"2lp","videoAssets":"2ls"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"2lv","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2lw","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2lx","authors":"2ly","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["2m6","2m7"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"2lu","primaryImage":"2lz","url":"2m0","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2m1","description":"2m2","publisher":"2m3","source":"2m4","closedCaptioning":"2m5","videoAssets":"2m8"},["2kh","2kx","2ld","2lt","2m9"],{"headline":"2k1","videos":"2ma"},{"id":"2iz","type":"198","duration":"2j0","dateBroadcast":"2j1","date":"2j3","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"2j6","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2j8","description":"2ja","url":"2jd","closedCaptioning":"2jg","videoAssets":"2jo","primaryImage":"2jv","teaseImage":"2k0","associatedVideoPlaylist":"2mb"},{"type":"196","video":"2mc"},"First lady Jill Biden took the stage as the crowd waved \"Jill\" signs and applauded and chanted her name.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2me"},"She praised her husband's service and recounted his decision to exit the presidential race last month.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2mg"},"She said there \"are moments when I fall in love with him all over again,\" going on to list examples. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2mi"},"\"And weeks ago, when I saw him dig deep into his soul and decide to no longer seek re-election and endorse Kamala Harris,\" she said at the end of her list.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2mk"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"2mm","presentation":"2mn"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"2mo","publisher":"2mp"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"2mq"},"She also recounted Beau Biden's telling her and her husband about Harris.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2ms"},"\"Our son Beau first worked with Kamala when he was attorney general of Delaware. He told me at the dinner table one night, 'Mom, sheâs special. Someone to keep your eye on,'\" she said. \"And he was right. Joe and I know Kamala. We have seen her courage, her determination and her leadership up close.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2mu"},["2md","2mf","2mh","2mj","2ml","2mr","2mt","2mv"],["2me","2mg","2mi","2mk","2ms","2mu"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2mw","text":"2mx"},"2024-08-20T03:19:30.844Z","2024-08-20T03:38:59.828Z",{"createdAt":"2mz","publishedAt":"2mz","modifiedAt":"2n0"},{"primary":"2me","seo":"2me"},"First lady praises Biden's service, recounts his withdrawing from race",{"primary":"2n3","seo":"2n3","social":"2n3"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52615",{"primary":"2n6"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2n8"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2na"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2nc"},{"analysis":"2n9","citations":"2nb","verdict":"2nd"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"2ik","authors":"2iy","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"2my","date":"2n1","description":"2n2","headline":"2n4","presentation":"2n5","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"2n7","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"2ne","replies":"2nf"},"rcrd52627",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["2ni"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"2nl","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["2nq"],[],[],{"bio":"2nj","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"2nk","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"2nm","publisher":"2nn","socialMediaProfiles":"2no","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"2np","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"2nr","educationAndExpertise":"2ns","awards":"2nt"},["2nu"],"Sen. Chris Coons, D-Del., who was a co-chair of the Biden campaign and is a close friend of the president's, praised Biden's leadership in the White House.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2nw"},"\"Biden's courage, Joe Biden's faith in us, Joe Biden's determination to heal the soul of our nation gave us hope and gave us confidence. Someone who has himself been knocked down by life, time and again. Joe Biden knows the grit and determination of the American people. He believed in us, and Joe Biden helped us get back up again,\" he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2ny"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"2o0","presentation":"2o1"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"2o2","publisher":"2o3"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"2o4"},"mmvo217504325507","PT6M12S","Tue Aug 20 2024 03:36:40 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T03:36:37.000Z",{"publishedAt":"2o9","createdAt":"2o9"},"217504325507","f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819",{"id":"2ob","guid":"2oc","externalAdvertiserId":"2oc"},"'Mr. President, thank you':  Sen. Chris Coons reflects on Biden's presidency","Sen. Chris Coons reflects on President Biden's presidency",{"primary":"2oe","seo":"2of"},"At the Democratic National Convention, Senator Chris Coons of Delaware addressed the party by reflecting and praising President Joe Biden's administration and legacy, stating, \"Biden helped us get back up again.\"Â ",{"primary":"2oh"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/sen-chris-coons-reflects-on-president-biden-s-presidency-217504325507","sen-chris-coons-reflects-on-president-biden-s-presidency-217504325507",{"canonical":"2oj","primary":"2oj","slug":"2ok"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819.vtt",{"srt":"2om","webvtt":"2on"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",371.574,4288000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"2op","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"2oq","bitrate":"2or"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_6.mp4",4288508,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"2ot","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"2oq","bitrate":"2ou"},["2os","2ov"],"vidimg2242210354",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724124979674_f_mo_dnc_chris_coons_240819_1920x1080-caert2.jpg",{"primary":"2oz"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"2ox","headline":"2oy","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2p0","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2p1","authors":"2p2","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"2oz"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"2ox","headline":"2p4","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2p5","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2p6","authors":"2p7","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1at"},{"publishedAt":"1a 1a8"},{"primary":"1cr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1cp","headline":"2q7","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2q8","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2q9","authors":"2qa","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1cw","primary":"1cw","slug":"1cx"},{"primary":"1d0","seo":"1d1"},{"primary":"1d3"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1d7","webvtt":"1d8"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1da","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1dc"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1de","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1df"},["2qi","2qj"],{"type":"198","id":"1cl","mpxMetadata":"2q6","primaryImage":"2qb","url":"2qc","duration":"1cz","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2qd","description":"2qe","publisher":"2qf","source":"2qg","closedCaptioning":"2qh","videoAssets":"2qk"},{"id":"1dk","guid":"1dl","externalAdvertiserId":"1dl"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1dp"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1dn","headline":"2qn","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2qo","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2qp","authors":"2qq","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1du","primary":"1du","slug":"1dv"},{"primary":"1dy","seo":"1dy"},{"primary":"1e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1e4","webvtt":"1e5"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1e7","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1e9"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1eb","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1ec"},["2qy","2qz"],{"type":"198","id":"1dj","mpxMetadata":"2qm","primaryImage":"2qr","url":"2qs","duration":"1dx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2qt","description":"2qu","publisher":"2qv","source":"2qw","closedCaptioning":"2qx","videoAssets":"2r0"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"2r3","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"2r4","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"2r5","authors":"2r6","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["2re","2rf"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"2r2","primaryImage":"2r7","url":"2r8","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2r9","description":"2ra","publisher":"2rb","source":"2rc","closedCaptioning":"2rd","videoAssets":"2rg"},["2pp","2q5","2ql","2r1","2rh"],{"headline":"2p9","videos":"2ri"},{"id":"2o6","type":"198","duration":"2o7","dateBroadcast":"2o8","date":"2oa","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"2od","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2og","description":"2oi","url":"2ol","closedCaptioning":"2oo","videoAssets":"2ow","primaryImage":"2p3","teaseImage":"2p8","associatedVideoPlaylist":"2rj"},{"type":"196","video":"2rk"},"\"Joe and Kamala helped rebuild our economy from the middle up, from the bottom up and the middle out, not from the top down,\" he said. \"And they made our families safer and our country stronger at home and abroad. Today, we are so much better off because they believed in us, in our democracy and our incredible first lady, Jill Biden.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2rm"},"Coons said he has \"never known a more compassionate man than Joe Biden\" and has \"never known a man who has taken from his own loss and his own faith and delivered so much for the future of so many others.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2ro"},"\"Mr. President, you were my senator as a Delawarean, you are my president as an American, and you will always be my friend on behalf of our nation, Joe, for your courage in fighting for our democracy,\" he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2rq"},["2nx","2nz","2o5","2rl","2rn","2rp","2rr"],["2nw","2ny","2rm","2ro","2rq"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2rs","text":"2rt"},"2024-08-20T03:19:17.354Z","2024-08-20T03:49:52.326Z",{"createdAt":"2rv","publishedAt":"2rv","modifiedAt":"2rw"},"Sen.",{"primary":"2ry","seo":"2ry"},"Sen. Chris Coons praises and thanks Biden for his leadership",{"primary":"2s0","seo":"2s0","social":"2s0"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52627",{"primary":"2s3"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2s5"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2s7"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2s9"},{"analysis":"2s6","citations":"2s8","verdict":"2sa"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"2nh","authors":"2nv","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"2ru","date":"2rx","description":"2rz","headline":"2s1","presentation":"2s2","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"2s4","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"2sb","replies":"2sc"},"rcrd52625",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"258"},["2sf"],["25e"],{"primary":"25h"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"2si","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"25l","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"25n","primary":"25n","slug":"25o"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25q"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25s"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25u"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25y"},["2sn","2so","2sp","2sq","2sr"],[],{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"262"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"264"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"267"},["2su","2sv","2sw","2sx"],{"bio":"2sg","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"25b","id":"25c","email":"25d","jobTitle":"2sh","name":"25g","primaryImage":"2sj","publisher":"2sk","socialMediaProfiles":"2sl","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"2sm","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"2ss","educationAndExpertise":"2st","awards":"2sy"},["2sz"],"WarnockÂ got a standing ovation after he called for peace in Israel and Gaza.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2t1"},"âI need my neighborâs children to be OK so that my children will be OK,\" he said before he launched into an impassioned plea for justice.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2t3"},"\"I need the poor children of Israel and the poor children of Gaza, I need Israelis and Palestinians ... those in Ukraine, I need American children on both sides of the tracks to be OK,\" he said as the crowd erupted in applause. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2t5"},["2t2","2t4","2t6"],["2t1","2t3","2t5"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2t7","text":"2t8"},"2024-08-20T03:17:21.142Z","2024-08-20T03:20:35.741Z",{"createdAt":"2ta","publishedAt":"2ta","modifiedAt":"2tb"},"WarnockÂ got a standing ovation after he called for peace in Israel and Gaza. âI need my neighborâs children to be OK so that my children will be OK,\" he said",{"primary":"2td","seo":"2td"},"WarnockÂ delivers impromptu sermon on Israel, Gaza",{"primary":"2tf","seo":"2tf","social":"2tf"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52625",{"primary":"2ti"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2tk"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2tm"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"2to"},{"analysis":"2tl","citations":"2tn","verdict":"2tp"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"2se","authors":"2t0","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"2t9","date":"2tc","description":"2te","headline":"2tg","presentation":"2th","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"2tj","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"2tq","replies":"2tr"},"rcrd52622",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1x9"},["2tu"],["1j4"],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1xh","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1xj","primary":"1xj","slug":"1xk"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xm"},["2u0"],[],[],{"bio":"2tv","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1xc","id":"1xd","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"2tw","name":"1xf","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"2tx","socialMediaProfiles":"2ty","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"2tz","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"2u1","educationAndExpertise":"2u2","awards":"2u3"},["2u4"],"Sen. Raphael Warnock, D-Ga., suggested Trump ought to \"try reading\" the Bible in remarks tonight that took aim at the former president for what Warnock described as efforts to divide Americans. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2u6"},"\"He is a clear and present threat to the precious covenant we share with one another. And yes, I saw him. I saw him holding the Bible and endorsing a Bible as if it needed his endorsement. He should try reading it,\" Warnock, a Baptist pastor, said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2u8"},"NBC News <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trump-owns-1-million-crypto-made-300k-branded-bibles-financial-disclos-rcna166850\" target=\"_blank\">reported last week</a> that the former president's financial disclosure showed that he had made $300,000 onÂ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/business/business-news/trumps-deals-sell-bibles-sneakers-perfume-are-unprecedented-presidenti-rcna145637\" target=\"_blank\">branded Bibles</a>.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2ua"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"2uc","presentation":"2ud"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"2ue","publisher":"2uf"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"2ug"},"mmvo217500741835","PT13M28S","Tue Aug 20 2024 03:19:40 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T03:19:37.000Z",{"publishedAt":"2ul","createdAt":"2ul"},"217500741835","f_mo_dnc_warnock_bible_240819",{"id":"2un","guid":"2uo","externalAdvertiserId":"2uo"},"Sen. his speech, Warnock also referred to the Capitol riot and efforts in the wake of Trump's 2020 electoral defeat to change election laws. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2xx"},"\"Behind the big lie was an even bigger lie. It is the lie that this increasingly diverse American electorate does not get to determine the future of the country, the lie and the logic of Jan. 6 is a sickness,\" Warnock said. \"It is a kind of cancer that then metastasized into dozens of voter suppression laws, all across our country.\"  ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2xz"},"The Georgia election board today approved an effort that could allow county election administrators more paths to <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52484\" target=\"_blank\">delay the certification</a> of the vote. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2y1"},["2u7","2u9","2ub","2uh","2xw","2xy","2y0","2y2"],"NBC News reported last week that the former president's financial disclosure showed that he had made $300,000 onÂ branded Bibles.","The Georgia election board today approved an effort that could allow county election administrators more paths to delay the certification of the vote. Jasmine Crockett, D-Texas, who went viral last year after she used colorful language to describe Trumpâs hoarding of classified documents, was back at it tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2zd"},"âShe became a career prosecutor, while he became a career criminal with 34 felonies, two impeachments and one porn star to prove it,â Crockett said of Harris and Trump.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2zf"},"âShe presides over the Senate, while he keeps national secrets next to his thinking chair â yâall know what I said <a href=\"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v8zemW5JeUc\" target=\"_blank\">the other time</a> â in Mar-a-Lago,\" she added.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"2zh"},"mmvo217499717550","PT9M53S","Tue Aug 20 2024 02:46:37 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T02:46:30.000Z",{"publishedAt":"2zm","createdAt":"2zm"},"217499717550","f_mo_dnc_crockett_harris_240819",{"id":"2zo","guid":"2zp","externalAdvertiserId":"2zp"},"Rep. Jasmine Crockett, D-Texas, recounts Kamala Harris' experience as a prosecutor and California's attorney "1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"32f","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"32g","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"32h","authors":"32i","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["32q","32r"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"32e","primaryImage":"32j","url":"32k","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"32l","description":"32m","publisher":"32n","source":"32o","closedCaptioning":"32p","videoAssets":"32s"},["311","31h","31x","32d","32t"],{"headline":"30l","videos":"32u"},{"id":"2zj","type":"198","duration":"2zk","dateBroadcast":"2zl","date":"2zn","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"2zq","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"2zs","description":"2zu","url":"2zx","closedCaptioning":"300","videoAssets":"308","primaryImage":"30f","teaseImage":"30k","associatedVideoPlaylist":"32v"},{"type":"196","video":"32w"},"Crockett said that when she took office, she was nervous and doubted her place in Congress. She said Harris saw her in distress and comforted her when they met for the first time.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"32y"},"âThe most powerful woman in the world wiped my tears and listened,â Crockett said, tearing up onstage. âThe brief but impactful interaction gave me my legislative legs, and Iâve been running ever since.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"330"},["2ze","2zg","2zi","32x","32z","331"],"âShe presides over the Senate, while he keeps national secrets next to his thinking chair â yâall know what I said the other time â in Mar-a-Lago,\" she added.",["2zd","2zf","333","32y","330"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"332","text":"334"},"2024-08-20T02:58:21.143Z","2024-08-20T03:00:24.747Z",{"createdAt":"336","publishedAt":"336","modifiedAt":"337"},"Rep.",{"primary":"339","seo":"339"},"Rep. Jasmine Crockett jokes about viral moment ",{"primary":"33b","seo":"33b","social":"33b"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52618",{"primary":"33e"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"33g"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"33i"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"33k"},{"analysis":"33h","citations":"33j","verdict":"33l"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"2yq","authors":"2zc","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"335","date":"338","description":"33a","headline":"33c","presentation":"33d","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"33f","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"33m","replies":"33n"},"rcrd52619",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["33q"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"33t","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["33y"],[],[],{"bio":"33r","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"33s","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"33u","publisher":"33v","socialMediaProfiles":"33w","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"33x","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"33z","educationAndExpertise":"340","awards":"341"},["342"],"Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear began his remarks by saying Hadley Duvall was one of the bravest people he has met.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"344"},"Duvall had spoken out in a pro-Beshear advertisement about surviving sexual abuse, and many credited the ad with having a large impact on Beshear's being re-elected as a Democratic governor in a deep red state.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"346"},"Beshear said that women should have \"freedom over their own bodies,\" arguing that freedom should include whether women want to pursue in vitro fertilization or have children.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"348"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"34a","presentation":"34b"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"34c","publisher":"34d"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"34e"},"mmvo217498693757","PT5M20S","Tue Aug 20 2024 03:07:28 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T03:07:23.000Z",{"publishedAt":"34j","createdAt":"34j"},"217498693757","f_mo_dnc_andy_beshear_240819",{"id":"34l","guid":"34m","externalAdvertiserId":"34m"},"negative","Gov. Andy Beshear calls for protecting reproductive freedom at the DNC",{"primary":"34p","seo":"34p"},"During the first day of the Democratic National Convention, Governor Andy Beshear of Kentucky spoke about the importance of this 2024 election in protecting the reproductive freedom of all also made an appeal to people across the political spectrum, telling them \"you are welcome here,\" while adding that Democrats want to move beyond \"us versus them.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"37w"},"Beshear was initially reported to have been considered to be Harris' running Gov. Andy Beshear highlights women's rights",{"primary":"387","seo":"387","social":"387"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52619",{"primary":"38a"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"38c"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"38e"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"38g"},{"analysis":"38d","citations":"38f","verdict":"38h"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"33p","authors":"343","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"382","date":"385","description":"386","headline":"388","presentation":"389","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"38b","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"38i","replies":"38j"},"rcrd52617",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["38m"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"38p","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["38u"],[],[],{"bio":"38n","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"38o","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"38q","publisher":"38r","socialMediaProfiles":"38s","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"38t","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"38v","educationAndExpertise":"38w","awards":"38x"},["38y"],"mmvo217499717923","PT6M1S","Tue Aug 20 2024 03:05:08 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T03:05:05.000Z",{"publishedAt":"393","createdAt":"393"},"217499717923","f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819",{"id":"395","guid":"396","externalAdvertiserId":"396"},"noAdsUpsettingContent","Women share stories of being denied emergency abortions at Democratic National Convention",{"primary":"399","seo":"399"},"Four people whose say their lives were jeopardized because of abortion bans enacted at the state level shared their personal stories at the Democratic National Convention. Included in the speakers is Amanda Zurawski, who unsuccessfully sued Texas when her request for an emergency abortion was denied.",{"primary":"39b"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/women-share-stories-of-being-denied-emergency-abortions-at-democratic-national-convention-217499717923","women-share-stories-of-being-denied-emergency-abortions-at-democratic-national-convention-217499717923",{"canonical":"39d","primary":"39d","slug":"39e"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724123087903_f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724123087903_f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819.vtt",{"srt":"39g","webvtt":"39h"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",361.431,4235000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"39j","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"39k","bitrate":"39l"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724123087903_f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819_6.mp4",4235612,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"39n","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"39k","bitrate":"39o"},["39m","39p"],"vidimg411269145",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724123087903_f_mo_dnc_abortion_stories_240819_1920x1080-vpklke.jpg",{"primary":"39t"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"39r","headline":"39s","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"39u","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"39v","authors":"39w","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"39t"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"39r","headline":"39y","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"39z","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3a0","authors":"3a1","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primar
