"videoAssets":"3bu"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"3bx","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3by","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3bz","authors":"3c0","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["3c8","3c9"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"3bw","primaryImage":"3c1","url":"3c2","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3c3","description":"3c4","publisher":"3c5","source":"3c6","closedCaptioning":"3c7","videoAssets":"3ca"},["3aj","3az","3bf","3bv","3cb"],{"headline":"3a3","videos":"3cc"},{"id":"390","type":"198","duration":"391","dateBroadcast":"392","date":"394","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"397","sentiment":"398","videoType":"1b2","headline":"39a","description":"39c","url":"39f","closedCaptioning":"39i","videoAssets":"39q","primaryImage":"39x","teaseImage":"3a2","associatedVideoPlaylist":"3cd"},{"type":"196","video":"3ce"},"Four people whose lives were jeopardized because of abortion bans enacted at the state level since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade shared their personal stories with the delegates.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3cg"},"Democrats have sought to put human faces on the debate over reproductive freedom as the Harris-Walz campaign goes after Trump for appointing three of the five conservative justices who voted to reverse Roe.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ci"},"The speakers included Hadley Duvall, a Kentucky woman who was raped and impregnated by her stepfather. Duvall has been featured in ads from Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear, who spoke after her remarks.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ck"},["3cf","3ch","3cj","3cl"],["3cg","3ci","3ck"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3cm","text":"3cn"},"2024-08-20T02:54:15.377Z","2024-08-20T03:09:51.595Z",{"createdAt":"3cp","publishedAt":"3cp","modifiedAt":"3cq"},"Four people whose lives were jeopardized because of abortion bans enacted at the state level since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe",{"primary":"3cs","seo":"3cs"},"Women share personal stories of abortion onstage",{"primary":"3cu","seo":"3cu","social":"3cu"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52617",{"primary":"3cx"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3cz"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3d1"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3d3"},{"analysis":"3d0","citations":"3d2","verdict":"3d4"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"38l","authors":"38z","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3co","date":"3cr","description":"3ct","headline":"3cv","presentation":"3cw","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3cy","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3d5","replies":"3d6"},"rcrd52616",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1gv"},["3d9"],["1h1"],{"primary":"1h5"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"3dc","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1ha","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1hd","primary":"1hd","slug":"1he"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1hg"},["3dh"],[],[],{"bio":"3da","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1gy","id":"1gz","email":"1h0","jobTitle":"3db","name":"1h3","primaryImage":"3dd","publisher":"3de","socialMediaProfiles":"3df","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3dg","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3di","educationAndExpertise":"3dj","awards":"3dk"},["3dl"],"The convention just showed an emotional video of a woman discussing how she was denied emergency abortions because of state abortion bans.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3dn"},"\"I was punished for three days having to wait for either my baby to die or me to die or both,\" a mother named Amanda Zurawski says in the video. \"I almost died because doctors were forced to follow Trump's abortion ban.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3dp"},"Zurawski's story has been featured in news media and Democratic campaign ads. She says doctors told her her pregnancy was no longer viable but wouldn't provide the medical care she says she needed because of the state's near-total ban on abortion. She <a href=\"https://19thnews.org/2024/08/dnc-amanda-zurawski-kaitlyn-joshua-hadley-duvall-speakers/\" target=\"_blank\">unsuccessfully sued the state</a> in response. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3dr"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"3dt","presentation":"3du"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"3dv","publisher":"3dw"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"3dx"},"Amanda and her husband, Josh, appeared on the convention stage, both sharing their stories, warning that a second Trump term would lead to even more restrictions on abortion and reproductive freedom. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3dz"},"Kaitlyn Joshua and Hadley Duvall, two other women who have shared their stories in recent years, <a href=\"https://19thnews.org/2024/08/dnc-amanda-zurawski-kaitlyn-joshua-hadley-duvall-speakers/\" target=\"_blank\">also spoke</a>. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3e1"},["3do","3dq","3ds","3dy","3e0","3e2"],"Zurawski's story has been featured in news media and Democratic campaign ads. She says doctors told her her pregnancy was no longer viable but wouldn't provide the medical care she says she needed because of the state's near-total ban on abortion. She unsuccessfully sued the state in response. ","Kaitlyn Joshua and Hadley Duvall, two other women who have shared their stories in recent years, also spoke. ",["3dn","3dp","3e4","3dz","3e5"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3e3","text":"3e6"},"2024-08-20T02:51:43.556Z","2024-08-20T02:57:16.693Z",{"createdAt":"3e8","publishedAt":"3e8","modifiedAt":"3e9"},"The convention just showed an emotional video of a woman discussing how she was denied emergency abortions because of state abortion bans. \"I was punished for",{"primary":"3eb","seo":"3eb"},"Democrats hit Trump on abortion with women who say they were denied emergency abortions",{"primary":"3ed","seo":"3ed","social":"3ed"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52616",{"primary":"3eg"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3ei"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3ek"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3em"},{"analysis":"3ej","citations":"3el","verdict":"3en"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3d8","authors":"3dm","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3e7","date":"3ea","description":"3ec","headline":"3ee","presentation":"3ef","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3eh","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3eo","replies":"3ep"},"rcrd52612",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["3es"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"3ev","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["3f0"],[],[],{"bio":"3et","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"3eu","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"3ew","publisher":"3ex","socialMediaProfiles":"3ey","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3ez","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3f1","educationAndExpertise":"3f2","awards":"3f3"},["3f4"],"mmvo217499205523","PT7M31S","Tue Jamie Raskin recalls hearing pounding on House door during Jan. 6",{"primary":"3fe","seo":"3fe"},"Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., recalled hearing pounding on the House chamber doors on Jan. 6. Raskin called out former President Donald Trump for election suppression and inciting a violent :"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1cr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1cp","headline":"3h6","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3h7","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3h8","authors":"3h9","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1cw","primary":"1cw","slug":"1cx"},{"primary":"1d0","seo":"1d1"},{"primary":"1d3"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1d7","webvtt":"1d8"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1da","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1dc"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1de","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1df"},["3hh","3hi"],{"type":"198","id":"1cl","mpxMetadata":"3h5","primaryImage":"3ha","url":"3hb","duration":"1cz","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3hc","description":"3hd","publisher":"3he","source":"3hf","closedCaptioning":"3hg","videoAssets":"3hj"},{"id":"1dk","guid":"1dl","externalAdvertiserId":"1dl"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1dp"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1dn","headline":"3hm","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3hn","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3ho","authors":"3hp","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1du","primary":"1du","slug":"1dv"},{"primary":"1dy","seo":"1dy"},{"primary":"1e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1e4","webvtt":"1e5"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1e7","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1e9"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1eb","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1ec"},["3hx","3hy"],{"type":"198","id":"1dj","mpxMetadata":"3hl","primaryImage":"3hq","url":"3hr","duration":"1dx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3hs","description":"3ht","publisher":"3hu","source":"3hv","closedCaptioning":"3hw","videoAssets":"3hz"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"3i2","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3i3","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3i4","authors":"3i5","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["3id","3ie"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"3i1","primaryImage":"3i6","url":"3i7","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3i8","description":"3i9","publisher":"3ia","source":"3ib","closedCaptioning":"3ic","videoAssets":"3if"},["3go","3h4","3hk","3i0","3ig"],{"headline":"3g8","videos":"3ih"},{"id":"3f6","type":"198","duration":"3f7","dateBroadcast":"3f8","date":"3fa","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"3fd","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3ff","description":"3fh","url":"3fk","closedCaptioning":"3fn","videoAssets":"3fv","primaryImage":"3g2","teaseImage":"3g7","associatedVideoPlaylist":"3ii"},{"type":"196","video":"3ij"},"Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., recounted the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol and laid blame at Trump's feet, calling him a \"career criminal.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3il"},"He highlighted how the rioters called to \"hang Mike Pence,\" noting that Pence, Trump's vice president, did not endorse him. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3in"},"Raskin served on the House Jan. 6 committee. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ip"},"\"Are we going to go back to the days of election suppression and violent insurrection?\" he asked. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ir"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"3it","presentation":"3iu"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"3iv","publisher":"3iw"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"3ix"},"\"No!\" the crowd yelled before breaking into chants of \"not going back.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3iz"},"Raskin criticized Trump's saying he would pardon convicted Jan. 6 rioters as the crowd booed in response. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3j1"},["3ik","3im","3io","3iq","3is","3iy","3j0","3j2"],["3il","3in","3ip","3ir","3iz","3j1"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3j3","text":"3j4"},"2024-08-20T02:37:19.168Z","2024-08-20T02:46:30.687Z",{"createdAt":"3j6","publishedAt":"3j6","modifiedAt":"3j7"},"Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., recounted the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S.",{"primary":"3j9","seo":"3j9"},"Rep. Jamie Raskin recounts Jan. 6 attack",{"primary":"3jb","seo":"3jb","social":"3jb"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52612",{"primary":"3je"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3jg"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3ji"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3jk"},{"analysis":"3jh","citations":"3jj","verdict":"3jl"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3er","authors":"3f5","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3j5","date":"3j8","description":"3ja","headline":"3jc","presentation":"3jd","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3jf","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3jm","replies":"3jn"},"rcrd52611",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["3jq"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"3jt","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["3jy"],[],[],{"bio":"3jr","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"3js","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"3ju","publisher":"3jv","socialMediaProfiles":"3jw","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3jx","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3jz","educationAndExpertise":"3k0","awards":"3k1"},["3k2"],"A video pastiche of the introduction to the television show \"Law & Order\" mocked Trump for his felony conviction.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3k4"},"It was a marked shift in tone for Democrats, who have shed the \"take the high road\" approach to Trump and have repeatedly sought to lambaste him for his criminal conviction during the first day of the convention. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3k6"},"\"In the criminal justice system, the people are represented by two separate yet equally important groups: the police, who investigate crime, and the district attorneys, who prosecute the offenders. This is the story of Donald Trump,\" the narrator said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3k8"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"3ka","presentation":"3kb"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"3kc","publisher":"3kd"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"3ke"},"The video continued: \"His entire life, Trump has believed he's above the law, but no one would ever dare hold him accountable. He lies. He rips off workers. He sexually abuses women ... in business. He cheated on his wife with a porn star and paid her off so the American people wouldn't find out during an election. But in the criminal justice system, ordinary Americans have had the courage to find him accountable time and time again: guilty, guilty, guilty. Donald Trump guilty on all 34 felony counts.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3kg"},"It finished by saying voters have to \"render our own verdict\" on Trump in November. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ki"},["3k5","3k7","3k9","3kf","3kh","3kj"],["3k4","3k6","3k8","3kg","3ki"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3kk","text":"3kl"},"2024-08-20T02:29:28.847Z","2024-08-20T04:59:51.221Z",{"createdAt":"3kn","publishedAt":"3kn","modifiedAt":"3ko"},{"primary":"3k4","seo":"3k4"},"'Law & Order' pastiche mocks Trump's being a convicted felon",{"primary":"3kr","seo":"3kr","social":"3kr"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52611",{"primary":"3ku"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3kw"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3ky"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3l0"},{"analysis":"3kx","citations":"3kz","verdict":"3l1"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3jp","authors":"3k3","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3km","date":"3kp","description":"3kq","headline":"3ks","presentation":"3kt","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3kv","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3l2","replies":"3l3"},"rcrd52609",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["3l6"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"3l9","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["3le"],[],[],{"bio":"3l7","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"3l8","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"3la","publisher":"3lb","socialMediaProfiles":"3lc","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3ld","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3lf","educationAndExpertise":"3lg","awards":"3lh"},["3li"],"A top Biden ally, Rep. James Clyburn, D-S.C., used part of his speech to thank the president, saying, \"We owe him a great debt of gratitude,\" before he delivered forceful praise of Harris.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3lk"},"âAnd weâre all grateful for one of the best decisions he made: selecting Kamala Harris as his vice president and endorsing her to succeed him,\" he said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3lm"},"mmvo217498181794","Tue Aug 20 2024 02:36:40 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T02:36:34.000Z",{"publishedAt":"3lq","createdAt":"3lq"},"217498181794","f_mo_dnc_jim_clyburn_240819",{"id":"3ls","guid":"3lt","externalAdvertiserId":"3lt"},"'Restore American can-do spirit': Rep. Jim Clyburn praises Biden and Harris administration","Rep. Jim Clyburn praises Biden and Harris administration at DNC",{"primary":"3lv","seo":"3lw"},"Rep. Jim Clyburn praises the Biden administration and President Joe Biden's lifetime legacy of public service, saying, \"We owe him a great debt of gratitude,\" during his remarks at the Democratic National i"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"3ok","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3ol","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3om","authors":"3on","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["3ov","3ow"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"3oj","primaryImage":"3oo","url":"3op","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3oq","description":"3or","publisher":"3os","source":"3ot","closedCaptioning":"3ou","videoAssets":"3ox"},["3n6","3nm","3o2","3oi","3oy"],{"headline":"3mq","videos":"3oz"},{"id":"3lo","type":"198","duration":"34h","dateBroadcast":"3lp","date":"3lr","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"3lu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3lx","description":"3lz","url":"3m2","closedCaptioning":"3m5","videoAssets":"3md","primaryImage":"3mk","teaseImage":"3mp","associatedVideoPlaylist":"3p0"},{"type":"196","video":"3p1"},"Clyburn is often credited with helping revive Bidenâs 2020 campaign during the primary season. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3p3"},"\"Our great democracy has been tested, and so has the basic goodness of the American people,\" Clyburn said, adding that Americans would continue to work toward \"a more perfect union.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3p5"},["3ll","3ln","3p2","3p4","3p6"],["3lk","3lm","3p3","3p5"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3p7","text":"3p8"},"2024-08-20T02:21:30.423Z","2024-08-20T02:40:54.925Z",{"createdAt":"3pa","publishedAt":"3pa","modifiedAt":"3pb"},"A top Biden ally, Rep.",{"primary":"3pd","seo":"3pd"},"Rep. James Clyburn expresses gratitude for Biden",{"primary":"3pf","seo":"3pf","social":"3pf"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52609",{"primary":"3pi"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3pk"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3pm"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3po"},{"analysis":"3pl","citations":"3pn","verdict":"3pp"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3l5","authors":"3lj","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3p9","date":"3pc","description":"3pe","headline":"3pg","presentation":"3ph","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3pj","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3pq","replies":"3pr"},"rcrd52610","I am the politics managing editor for NBC News and oversee the team running digital coverage on the White House, Congress, the Supreme Court, campaigns and everything else going on in politics around the country.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3pu"},["3pv"],"Politics Managing Editor","Amanda Terkel is politics managing editor for NBC News Digital.","ncpn1300953","amanda.terkel@nbcuni.com",["3px"],"Amanda Terkel headshot","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_28/3654616/240613-amanda-terkel.jpg",{"primary":"3q3"},{"altText":"3q2","height":"1h4","url":"3q4","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@aterkel",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"3q7","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/amanda-terkel-ncpn1300953","amanda-terkel-ncpn1300953",{"canonical":"3q9","primary":"3q9","slug":"3qa"},"I spent 12 years at HuffPost, where I reported on politics and served as Washington bureau chief and editorial director. I was a frequent guest on radio and television and moderated one of the largest candidate forums in the 2020 Democratic presidential primary. Before that, I was a reporter at the site ThinkProgress. My bylines have appeared in The New York Times, Politico, The Daily Beast, The Guardian and other publications. I attended Colgate University and grew up in western New York.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3qc"},["3qd"],[],"The Hillman Prize for Journalism, Washingtonian Women in Journalism Award",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3qg"},["3qh"],{"bio":"3pw","liveBlogShortBio":"3px","shortBio":"3py","id":"3pz","email":"3q0","jobTitle":"3q1","name":"2bk","primaryImage":"3q5","publisher":"3q6","socialMediaProfiles":"3q8","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3qb","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3qe","educationAndExpertise":"3qf","awards":"3qi"},["3qj"],"Clintonâs speech was full of Easter eggs for her fans, with some of her biggest applause lines calling back to her past speeches and work.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ql"},"She referred to shattering the highest glass ceiling â a theme of her 2016 presidential campaign. She also talked about how âit takes a villageâ â a throwback to her famous 1996 book. She turned her âthe future is femaleâ line into âthe future is here,â adding, âI wish my mother and Kamalaâs mother were here to see this.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3qn"},"And as she left the stage, âFight Songâ played â the earworm that was the theme of her 2016 run and will now be stuck in everyoneâs head all night.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3qp"},["3qm","3qo","3qq"],["3ql","3qn","3qp"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3qr","text":"3qs"},"2024-08-20T02:17:08.155Z","2024-08-20T02:17:46.152Z",{"createdAt":"3qu","publishedAt":"3qu","modifiedAt":"3qv"},{"primary":"3ql","seo":"3ql"},"Clinton plays the hits",{"primary":"3qy","seo":"3qy","social":"3qy"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52610",{"primary":"3r1"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3r3"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3r5"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3r7"},{"analysis":"3r4","citations":"3r6","verdict":"3r8"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3pt","authors":"3qk","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3qt","date":"3qw","description":"3qx","headline":"3qz","presentation":"3r0","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3r2","reportingFrom":"1vv","factCheckContent":"3r9","replies":"3ra"},"rcrd52604",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["3rd"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"3rg","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["3rl"],[],[],{"bio":"3re","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"3rf","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"3rh","publisher":"3ri","socialMediaProfiles":"3rj","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3rk","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3rm","educationAndExpertise":"3rn","awards":"3ro"},["3rp"],"Hillary Clinton said in her remarks that it was the honor of her life to accept the Democratic Party's nomination for president in 2016. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3rr"},"\"And nearly 66 million Americans voted for a future where there are no ceilings on our dreams,\" she said, alluding to her winning the popular vote in that election. \"Afterwards we refused to give up on America. Millions marched. Many ran for office. We kept our eyes on the future. Well, my friends, the future is here.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3rt"},"mmvo217496645584","PT15M23S","Tue Aug 20 2024 02:16:03 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T02:16:00.000Z",{"publishedAt":"3ry","createdAt":"3ry"},"217496645584","f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819",{"id":"3s0","guid":"3s1","externalAdvertiserId":"3s1"},"Watch Hillary Clinton's full address to the 2024 Democratic National Convention",{"primary":"3s3","seo":"3s3"},"Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton spoke to the Democratic National Convention, thanked President Biden for his years of service and praised Vice President Harris' \"character, experience and vision.\" Clinton warned that \"progress is possible but not guaranteed\" but said America was close to breaking the \"highest, hardest glass ceiling.\"",{"primary":"3s5"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/watch-hillary-clinton-s-full-address-to-the-2024-democratic-national-convention-217496645584","watch-hillary-clinton-s-full-address-to-the-2024-democratic-national-convention-217496645584",{"canonical":"3s7","primary":"3s7","slug":"3s8"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819.vtt",{"srt":"3sa","webvtt":"3sb"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",923.364,4301000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"3sd","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"3se","bitrate":"3sf"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_6.mp4",4301489,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"3sh","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"3se","bitrate":"3si"},["3sg","3sj"],"vidimg999557513",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724120116947_f_mo_dnc_clinton_full_240819_1920x1080-8g4zai.jpg",{"primary":"3sn"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"3sl","headline":"3sm","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3so","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3sp","authors":"3sq","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"3sn"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"3sl","headline":"3ss","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3st","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3su","authors":"3sv","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","s d":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"3ur","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"3us","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"3ut","authors":"3uu","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["3v2","3v3"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"3uq","primaryImage":"3uv","url":"3uw","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3ux","description":"3uy","publisher":"3uz","source":"3v0","closedCaptioning":"3v1","videoAssets":"3v4"},["3td","3tt","3u9","3up","3v5"],{"headline":"3sx","videos":"3v6"},{"id":"3rv","type":"198","duration":"3rw","dateBroadcast":"3rx","date":"3rz","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"3s2","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"3s4","description":"3s6","url":"3s9","closedCaptioning":"3sc","videoAssets":"3sk","primaryImage":"3sr","teaseImage":"3sw","associatedVideoPlaylist":"3v7"},{"type":"196","video":"3v8"},"Clinton said she wishes her mother and Harris' mother were there to see them â \"they would say keep going.\" She said people like Shirley Chisholm, who paved the way for women running for president, would say keep going.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3va"},"\"Families, buildings that are lives, parents stretching to afford child care, young people struggling to pay the rent. Theyâre all asking us to keep going,\" she said. \"With faith in each other and joy in our hearts, letâs send Kamala Harris and Tim Walz to the White House.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3vc"},["3rs","3ru","3v9","3vb","3vd"],["3rr","3rt","3va","3vc"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3ve","text":"3vf"},"2024-08-20T02:09:46.014Z","2024-08-20T02:30:39.956Z",{"createdAt":"3vh","publishedAt":"3vh","modifiedAt":"3vi"},"Hillary Clinton said in her remarks that it was the honor of her life to accept the Democratic Party's nomination for president in 2016.  \"And nearly 66",{"primary":"3vk","seo":"3vk"},"Hillary Clinton says 'the future is here' and Democrats have to 'keep going' ",{"primary":"3vm","seo":"3vm","social":"3vm"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52604",{"primary":"3vp"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3vr"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3vt"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3vv"},{"analysis":"3vs","citations":"3vu","verdict":"3vw"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3rc","authors":"3rq","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3vg","date":"3vj","description":"3vl","headline":"3vn","presentation":"3vo","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3vq","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3vx","replies":"3vy"},"rcrd52605",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["3w1"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"3w4","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["3w9"],[],[],{"bio":"3w2","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"3w3","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"3w5","publisher":"3w6","socialMediaProfiles":"3w7","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3w8","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3wa","educationAndExpertise":"3wb","awards":"3wc"},["3wd"],"Clinton took aim at Trump's legal woes, mocking him for appearing to fall asleep at his hush money trial in New York. \"When he woke up,\" she said, \"he made his own kind of history: the first person to run for president with 34 felony convictions.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3wf"},"The crowd went wild and started chanting: \"Lock him up!\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3wh"},"Eight years ago, Trump supporters routinely chanted \"Lock her up!\" at rallies in reference to Clinton as Trump vowed to put her jail if he was elected. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3wj"},"Harris has sought to tamp down \"Lock him up\" chants at her rallies. Clinton tried to talk over the crowd for a moment when the chant began. But as the chants continued, she stood at the podium until the audience calmed. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3wl"},["3wg","3wi","3wk","3wm"],["3wf","3wh","3wj","3wl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3wn","text":"3wo"},"2024-08-20T02:07:18.697Z","2024-08-20T02:14:28.772Z",{"createdAt":"3wq","publishedAt":"3wq","modifiedAt":"3wr"},"Clinton took aim at Trump's legal woes, mocking him for appearing to fall asleep at his hush money trial in New York. \"When he woke up,\" she said, \"he made his",{"primary":"3wt","seo":"3wt"},"Clinton nods while crowd chants 'Lock him up' â a reference to the anti-Clinton chant in 2016 ",{"primary":"3wv","seo":"3wv","social":"3wv"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52605",{"primary":"3wy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3x0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3x2"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3x4"},{"analysis":"3x1","citations":"3x3","verdict":"3x5"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3w0","authors":"3we","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3wp","date":"3ws","description":"3wu","headline":"3ww","presentation":"3wx","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3wz","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3x6","replies":"3x7"},"rcrd52603",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1mc"},["3xa"],[],{"primary":"1mj"},{"altText":"1mi","height":"1h4","url":"3xd","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1mo","primary":"1mo","slug":"1mp"},[],[],[],{"bio":"3xb","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1mf","email":"1mg","jobTitle":"3xc","name":"1mi","primaryImage":"3xe","publisher":"3xf","socialMediaProfiles":"3xg","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3xh","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3xi","educationAndExpertise":"3xj","awards":"3xk"},["3xl"],"Amid chants of \"keep going\" during Hillary Clinton's speech, Gwen Walz cried as she cheered for the 2016 nominee.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3xn"},["3xo"],["3xn"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3xp","text":"3xq"},"2024-08-20T02:05:36.172Z","2024-08-20T03:03:20.393Z",{"createdAt":"3xs","publishedAt":"3xs","modifiedAt":"3xt"},{"primary":"3xn","seo":"3xn"},"Gwen Walz moved to tears during Hillary Clinton's speech",{"primary":"3xw","seo":"3xw","social":"3xw"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52603",{"primary":"3xz"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3y1"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3y3"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3y5"},{"analysis":"3y2","citations":"3y4","verdict":"3y6"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"3x9","authors":"3xm","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"3xr","date":"3xu","description":"3xv","headline":"3xx","presentation":"3xy","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"3y0","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"3y7","replies":"3y8"},"rcrd52599",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jm"},["3yb"],[],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1ju","primary":"1ju","slug":"1jv"},[],[],[],{"bio":"3yc","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1jp","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"3yd","name":"1jr","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"3ye","socialMediaProfiles":"3yf","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"3yg","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"3yh","educationAndExpertise":"3yi","awards":"3yj"},["3yk"],"Clinton walked onto the stage to thunderous applause. Everyone was on their feet, and Pelosi beamed with admiration. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3ym"},"It was the longest sustained applause of the convention so far. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3yo"},"But Walz seemed seriously starstruck as the camera caught him mouthing the word \"Wow!\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3yq"},["3yn","3yp","3yr"],["3ym","3yo","3yq"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"3ys","text":"3yt"},"2024-08-20T02:03:00.000Z","2024-08-20T02:05:23.062Z",{"createdAt":"3yv","publishedAt":"3yv","modifiedAt":"3yw"},"Clinton walked onto the stage to thunderous applause. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3zv"},"Biden will address the convention later tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3zx"},"\"Thank you, Joe, for your lifetime of service and leadership,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"3zz"},"The audience broke into chants of \"thank you, Joe.\" Nancy Pelosi appeared to mouth, \"Thank you, Joe,\" too.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"401"},["3zu","3zw","3zy","400","402"],["3zt","3zv","3zx","3zz","401"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"403","text":"404"},"2024-08-20T02:01:01.156Z","2024-08-20T02:02:51.953Z",{"createdAt":"406","publishedAt":"406","modifiedAt":"407"},"Clinton ":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"45c","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"45d","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"45e","authors":"45f","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["45n","45o"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"45b","primaryImage":"45g","url":"45h","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"45i","description":"45j","publisher":"45k","source":"45l","closedCaptioning":"45m","videoAssets":"45p"},["43y","44e","44u","45a","45q"],{"headline":"43i","videos":"45r"},{"id":"42f","type":"198","duration":"42g","dateBroadcast":"42h","date":"42j","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"42m","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"42p","description":"42r","url":"42u","closedCaptioning":"42x","videoAssets":"435","primaryImage":"43c","teaseImage":"43h","associatedVideoPlaylist":"45s"},{"type":"196","video":"45t"},"Johnson-Batiste retold a story about a boy in their class who broke a sculpture she made. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"45v"},"\"Kamala jumped in between him and me and said something that made him so mad he picked up a rock or something and hit her on the head,\" Johnson-Batiste said. \"Blood came streaming down.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"45x"},"The stitches left a scar that Harris still has, Johnson-Batiste said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"45z"},"\"That's the kind of person Kamala has always been, from the very beginning. Someone who doesn't hesitate to stand up for what's right, to take up for the underdog and to stand up to bullies,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"461"},"Johnson said, \"Kamala, your mom would be so proud of you.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"463"},["426","428","42e","45u","45w","45y","460","462","464"],["425","427","45v","45x","45z","461","463"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"465","text":"466"},"2024-08-20T01:52:37.048Z","2024-08-20T02:03:19.320Z",{"createdAt":"468","publishedAt":"468","modifiedAt":"469"},"Stacey Johnson-Batiste, Harris' childhood friend who wrote \"Friends From the Beginning: The Berkeley Village That Raised Kamala and Me,\" spoke with her mother,",{"primary":"46b","seo":"46b"},"Kamala Harris' childhood friend and her mother speak: 'Your mom would be so proud'",{"primary":"46d","seo":"46d","social":"46d"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52594",{"primary":"46g"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"46i"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"46k"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"46m"},{"analysis":"46j","citations":"46l","verdict":"46n"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"41r","authors":"424","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"467","date":"46a","description":"46c","headline":"46e","presentation":"46f","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"46h","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"46o","replies":"46p"},"rcrd52592",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["46s"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"46v","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["470"],[],[],{"bio":"46t","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"46u","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"46w","publisher":"46x","socialMediaProfiles":"46y","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"46z","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"471","educationAndExpertise":"472","awards":"473"},["474"],"Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., said in her remarks that Harris is \"working tirelessly\" to secure a cease-fire deal in Gaza that would also bring the hostages home. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"476"},"\"In Kamala Harris, I see a leader who understands. I see a leader with a real commitment to a better future for working families and Chicago. We have to help her win, because we know that Donald Trump would sell this country for $1 if it meant lining his own pockets and greasing the palms of his Wall Street friends,\" Ocasio-Cortez said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"478"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"47a","presentation":"47b"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"47c","publisher":"47d"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"47e"},"mmvo217493573728","PT7M17S","Tue Aug 20 2024 02:02:13 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T02:02:08.000Z",{"publishedAt":"47j","createdAt":"47j"},"217493573728","f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819",{"id":"47l","guid":"47m","externalAdvertiserId":"47m"},"AOC calls Harris a 'leader who understands' working class concerns",{"primary":"47o","seo":"47o"},"Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., also said in her DNC remarks that Kamala Harris is \"working tirelessly\" to secure a cease-fire deal in Gaza.",{"primary":"47q"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/aoc-calls-harris-a-leader-who-understands-working-class-concerns-217493573728","aoc-calls-harris-a-leader-who-understands-working-class-concerns-217493573728",{"canonical":"47s","primary":"47s","slug":"47t"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819.vtt",{"srt":"47v","webvtt":"47w"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",437.074,4401000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"47y","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"47z","bitrate":"480"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_6.mp4",4401326,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"482","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"47z","bitrate":"483"},["481","484"],"vidimg354663109",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724119302093_f_mo_dnc_aoc_harris_240819_1920x1080-qylgkd.jpg",{"primary":"488"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"486","headline":"487","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"489","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"48a","authors":"48b","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"488"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"486","headline":"48d","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"48e","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"48f","authors":"48g","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1at"},{"publishedAt ary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"4ac","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"4ad","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"4ae","authors":"4af","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["4an","4ao"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"4ab","primaryImage":"4ag","url":"4ah","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"4ai","description":"4aj","publisher":"4ak","source":"4al","closedCaptioning":"4am","videoAssets":"4ap"},["48y","49e","49u","4aa","4aq"],{"headline":"48i","videos":"4ar"},{"id":"47g","type":"198","duration":"47h","dateBroadcast":"47i","date":"47k","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"47n","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"47p","description":"47r","url":"47u","closedCaptioning":"47x","videoAssets":"485","primaryImage":"48c","teaseImage":"48h","associatedVideoPlaylist":"4as"},{"type":"196","video":"4at"},"She said she's tired of hearing Trump, \"a union buster,\" thinking \"of himself as more of a patriot than the woman who fights every single day.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4av"},"\"The truth is, Don, you cannot love this country if you only fight for the wealthy and big business,\" she continued. \"To love this country is to fight for its people, all people, working people, everyday Americans, like bartenders and factory workers and fast food cashiers who punch a clock and are on their feet all day in some of the toughest jobs out there.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4ax"},"Ocasio-Cortez finished her speech by saying that they can't send just Harris and Walz alone to the White House. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4az"},"\"We must also elect strong Democratic majorities in the House and in the Senate so that we can deliver on an ambitious agenda for the people,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4b1"},["477","479","47f","4au","4aw","4ay","4b0","4b2"],["476","478","4av","4ax","4az","4b1"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4b3","text":"4b4"},"2024-08-20T01:48:42.595Z","2024-08-20T02:08:38.322Z",{"createdAt":"4b6","publishedAt":"4b6","modifiedAt":"4b7"},{"primary":"339","seo":"339"},"AOC calls for an Israel-Hamas cease-fire deal in her remarks ",{"primary":"4ba","seo":"4ba","social":"4ba"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52592",{"primary":"4bd"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4bf"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4bh"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4bj"},{"analysis":"4bg","citations":"4bi","verdict":"4bk"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"46r","authors":"475","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"4b5","date":"4b8","description":"4b9","headline":"4bb","presentation":"4bc","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"4be","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"4bl","replies":"4bm"},"rcrd52593","Mike he conducted his walk-through at the United Center, Biden has spent some of his downtime back at his hotel preparing for tonightâs address â but also catching up with some of his longest-term supporters.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4c9"},"At his downtown hotel, Biden surprised some of the several dozen supporters who flew on a chartered plane from Delaware today to attend his speech.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4cb"},"Biden âworked the room like he was still running for office,â joked the Rev. Christopher Bullock, the pastor of Canaan Baptist Church in New Castle.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4cd"},["4ca","4cc","4ce"],["4c9","4cb","4cd"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4cf","text":"4cg"},"2024-08-20T01:42:09.160Z","2024-08-20T01:45:20.441Z",{"createdAt":"4ci","publishedAt":"4ci","modifiedAt":"4cj"},"After he conducted his walk-through at the United Center, Biden has spent some of his downtime back at his hotel preparing for tonightâs address â but also",{"primary":"4cl","seo":"4cl"},"Biden stopped by reception with longtime Delaware supportersÂ tonight",{"primary":"4cn","seo":"4cn","social":"4cn"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52593",{"primary":"4cq"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4cs"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4cu"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4cw"},{"analysis":"4ct","citations":"4cv","verdict":"4cx"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"4bo","authors":"4c8","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"4ch","date":"4ck","description":"4cm","headline":"4co","presentation":"4cp","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"4cr","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"4cy","replies":"4cz"},"rcrd52591",[],"Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., decided to sing one of Trump's favorite campaign rally songs: \"You Can't Always Get What You Want.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4d3"},"mmvo217492549908","PT54S","Tue Aug 20 2024 01:35:11 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T01:35:07.000Z",{"publishedAt":"4d8","createdAt":"4d8"},"217492549908","now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819",{"id":"4da","guid":"4db","externalAdvertiserId":"4db"},"Schumer sings a message to Trump: 'You can't always get what you want'","Schumer shares his excitement for the DNC and a message for Trump",{"primary":"4dd","seo":"4de"},"NBC News' Tom Llamas spoke to Sen. Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., about his excitement for the Democratic National Convention on its first night and sang a message to former President Trump that, \"you can't always get what you want.\"",{"primary":"4dg"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/schumer-shares-his-excitement-for-the-dnc-and-a-message-for-trump-217492549908","schumer-shares-his-excitement-for-the-dnc-and-a-message-for-trump-217492549908",{"canonical":"4di","primary":"4di","slug":"4dj"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724117692594_now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724117692594_now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819.vtt",{"srt":"4dl","webvtt":"4dm"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",53.854,4474000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"4do","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"4dp","bitrate":"4dq"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724117692594_now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819_6.mp4",4474835,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"4ds","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"4dp","bitrate":"4dt"},["4dr","4du"],"vidimg1212686843",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724117692594_now_llamas_schumer_trump_240819_1920x1080-j72m1d.jpg",{"primary":"4dy"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"4dw","headline":"4dx","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"4dz","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"4e0","authors":"4e1","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"4dy"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"4dw","headline":"4e3","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"4e4","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"4e5","authors":"4e6","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{" Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., decided to sing one of Trump's favorite campaign rally songs: \"You Can't Always Get What You Want.\"",{"primary":"4gr","seo":"4gr"},"Schumer sings a message to Trump: âYou canât always get what you wantâ Fain, the president of the United Auto Workers, praised Harris and Walz for standing \"shoulder to shoulder with the working class\" â and dissed Trump and Vance as \"two lapdogs for the billionaire class who only serve themselves.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4hm"},"\"It's real simple: Kamala Harris is one of us,\" Fain said to cheers. \"She's a fighter for the working class â and Donald Trump is a scab!\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4ho"},"mmvo217494085898","PT9M13S","Tue Aug 20 2024 01:51:09 GMT+0000 crowd broke out into loud chants of \"Trump's a scab\" â union slang for a person who refuses to join up or go on strike. Fain later removed his jacket to reveal a red T-shirt that read: \"Trump Is A Scab. Vote Harris.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4l5"},"The influential UAW has roughly 370,000 members nationwide, including in key Midwestern battleground states like Michigan and Wisconsin.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4l7"},["4hn","4hp","4l4","4l6","4l8"],["4hm","4ho","4l5","4l7"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4l9","text":"4la"},"2024-08-20T01:35:14.033Z","2024-08-20T01:56:52.052Z",{"createdAt":"4lc","publishedAt":"4lc","modifiedAt":"4ld"},"Shawn scab': UAW head throws muscle behind Harris-Walz Tony Goldwyn, of \"Scandal\" fame, rolled out the proverbial Hollywood red carpet after Harris' surprise address.  ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4mi"},"He touted her vision of unity, optimism and opportunity, saying, \"Americas are not a cynical people.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4mk"},"\"We are not small-minded,\" he added. \"We can dream as big as we want.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4mm"},["4mj","4ml","4mn"],["4mi","4mk","4mm"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4mo","text":"4mp"},"2024-08-20T01:32:50.409Z","2024-08-20T01:38:58.539Z",{"createdAt":"4mr","publishedAt":"4mr","modifiedAt":"4ms"},"Actor Tony Goldwyn, of \"Scandal\" fame, rolled out the proverbial Hollywood red carpet after Harris' surprise address.   He touted her vision of unity, optimism",{"primary":"4mu","seo":"4mu"},"Hollywood takes the stage ",{"primary":"4mw","seo":"4mw","social":"4mw"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52587",{"primary":"4mz"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4n1"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4n3"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4n5"},{"analysis":"4n2","citations":"4n4","verdict":"4n6"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"4lv","authors":"4mh","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"4mq","date":"4mt","description":"4mv","headline":"4mx","presentation":"4my","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"4n0","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"4n7","replies":"4n8"},"rcrd52567",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jm"},["4nb"],[],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1ju","primary":"1ju","slug":"1jv"},[],[],[],{"bio":"4nc","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1jp","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"4nd","name":"1jr","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"4ne","socialMediaProfiles":"4nf","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"4ng","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"4nh","educationAndExpertise":"4ni","awards":"4nj"},["4nk"],"Fresh off of coaching Team USA's men's basketball squad to a gold medal at the Paris Olympics, legendary NBA coach Steve Kerr endorsed Harris and Walz and brought a hopeful tone to the convention.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4nm"},"\"Think about what our team achieved with 12 Americans in Paris â putting aside rivalries to represent our country. Now imagine what we could do with all 350 million of us playing on the same team,\" Kerr said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4no"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"4nq","presentation":"4nr"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"4ns","publisher":"4nt"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"4nu"},"mmvo217491013768","PT6M39S","Tue he stepped into the political arena, his remarks focused on the qualities of what it takes to lead, including dignity, commitment to the truth andÂ an ability to laugh at yourself â attributes he said both Harris and Walz have. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4rb"},"\"They have devoted their lives to serving other people, whether Vice President Harris was defending her community in the courtroom or Gov. Walz was inspiring the next generation in the classroom, or on the field, for that matter.\"Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4rd"},"Walz was an assistant football coach at Mankato West High School and helped bring back a winning tradition to the school in the form of a state championship.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4rf"},"\"Coach to coach: That guy's awesome,\" Kerr said, though he joked that Walz had \"way too much reliance on the blitz\" as a coach.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4rh"},"And, he added, quoting <a href=\"https://www.nbcsportsbayarea.com/paris-2024-summer-olympics/steph-curry-night-draymond-green-dagger/1769252/\" target=\"_blank\">\"the great Steph Curry: </a>We can tell Donald Trump, night night.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4rj"},["4nn","4np","4nv","4ra","4rc","4re","4rg","4ri","4rk"],"And, he added, quoting \"the great Steph Curry: We can tell Donald Trump, night Harris nomination boosted by Black women strategists who call themselves 'the colored girls'","Kamala Harris nomination promoted by Black women political strategists who call themselves âthe colored girlsâ",{"primary":"4v4","seo":"4v5"},"Joy Reid met with the powerful group of Black women political strategists, who call themselves âthe colored girls,â on their work regarding Vice President Kamala Harris attaining the Democratic presidential nomination, during the 2024 Democratic National Convention. Yolanda Caraway, Founder of The Caraway Group, Tina Flournoy, former chief of staff to VP Kamala Harris, Bishop Leah Caughtry, CEO of the 2008 and 2016 DNC Committees, Donna Brazile, Democratic strategist, and Minyon Moore, 2024 DNC Committee Chair, share their historic political experiences in this full, exclusive interview.",{"primary":"4v7"},{"name":"21j"},"The what shook Trump the most: As Harris surges at DNC, 'Obama's DJ' on how music may power Harris",{"primary":"4wy","seo":"4wy"},"MSNBC's Ari Melber interviews DJ Cassidy about his groundbreaking DNC Roll Call set, with music representing all 50 states, and the two discuss the evolving role of music in politics.",{"primary":"4x0"},{"name":"21j"},"The Beat with Trump lose to Harris? Aides see 'lost mojo' as Harris soars with DNC",{"primary":"4xv","seo":"4xv"},"The Democrats' convention reached millions of viewers on TV and online, and Donald Trump is reportedly struggling to adapt his campaign to face off with Kamala Harris. Ari Melber reports on the evidence and discusses with Columbia Dean Jelani Cobb and The Daily Beast's Joanna Coles.",{"primary":"4xx"},{"name":"21j"},{"name":"4x3"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724715839855_n_ari_harris_20240826.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724715839855_n_ari_harris_20240826.vtt",{"srt":"4y1","webvtt":"4y2"},"http://link.theplatform.com/s/rksNhC/UiyTp_rfUEpK",727.634,4121000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"4y4","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"4y5","bitrate":"4y6"},"http://link.theplatform.com/s/rksNhC/OsuGpJA42YNG",4121632,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"4y8","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"4y5","bitrate":"4y9"},["4y7","4ya"],{"type":"198","id":"4xg","mpxMetadata":"4xj","primaryImage":"4xq","url":"4xt","duration":"4xu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"4xw","description":"4xy","publisher":"4xz","source":"4y0","closedCaptioning":"4y3","videoAssets":"4yb"},["4uo","4vl","4wi","4xf","4yc"],{"headline":"4tq","videos":"4yd"},{"id":"4sn","type":"198","duration":"4so","dateBroadcast":"4sp","date":"4sr","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"4su","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"4sw","description":"4sy","url":"4t1","closedCaptioning":"4t4","videoAssets":"4tc","primaryImage":"4tj","teaseImage":"4to","associatedVideoPlaylist":"4ye"},{"type":"196","video":"4yf"},"Walz said in a brief interview with MSNBC that it's an \"important night for Democrats tonight to honor Joe Biden.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4yh"},"Asked about his role as the VP candidate, Walz said, \"I can tell you this ticket, feeling that energy ... just a privilege.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4yj"},"Walz said of the campaign's bus tour in Pennsylvania over the weekend that there was \"energy out there\" and that it was \"exciting.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4yl"},["4yg","4yi","4yk","4ym"],["4yh","4yj","4yl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4yn","text":"4yo"},"2024-08-20T01:24:33.969Z","2024-08-20T01:26:09.687Z",{"createdAt":"4yq","publishedAt":"4yq","modifiedAt":"4yr"},"Walz said in a brief interview with MSNBC that it's an \"important night for Democrats tonight to honor Joe Biden.\" Asked about his role as the VP candidate, Wal",{"primary":"4yt","seo":"4yt"},"Walz says it's an important night to honor Biden",{"primary":"4yv","seo":"4yv","social":"4yv"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52582",{"primary":"4yy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4z0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4z2"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"4z4"},{"analysis":"4z1","citations":"4z3","verdict":"4z5"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"4s8","authors":"4sm","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"4yp","date":"4ys","description":"4yu","headline":"4yw","presentation":"4yx","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"4yz","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"4z6","replies":"4z7"},"rcrd52575",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["4za"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"4zd","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["4zi"],[],[],{"bio":"4zb","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"4zc","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"4ze","publisher":"4zf","socialMediaProfiles":"4zg","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"4zh","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"4zj","educationAndExpertise":"4zk","awards":"4zl"},["4zm"],"Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton will use her speech tonight to highlight Harris' \"heart and her integrity,\" underscoring how Harris' experience sets her apart.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4zo"},"\"We both got our start as young lawyers helping children who were abused or neglected. That kind of work changes you,\" Clinton will say, according to selected prepared remarks released by the Democratic National Convention Committee. \"Those kids stay with you. Kamala carries with her the hopes of every child she protected, every family she helped, every community she served.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4zq"},"Clinton, who lost to Trump in 2016, will argue that Harris \"has the character, experience and vision to lead us forward.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4zs"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"4zu","presentation":"4zv"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"4zw","publisher":"4zx"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"4zy"},"She will also take jabs at Trump, arguing that Harris \"cares about kids, families and America\" but that \"Donald only cares about himself.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"500"},"\"On her first day in court, Kamala said five words that guide her still: âKamala Harris, for the people,'\" Clinton will say, according to the prepared remarks. \"Thatâs something Donald Trump will never understand.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"502"},["4zp","4zr","4zt","4zz","501","503"],["4zo","4zq","4zs","500","502"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"504","text":"505"},"2024-08-20T01:20:11.122Z","2024-08-20T01:24:06.893Z",{"createdAt":"507","publishedAt":"507","modifiedAt":"508"},"Former made a surprise early appearance tonight, speaking for a few minutes and thanking Biden for his \"historic leadership\" and service.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"54j"},"\"We are forever grateful to you,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"54l"},"Harris said that \"this is going to be a great week,\" emphasizing later that in November \"we are moving forward.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"54n"},"She closed her brief remarks with her frequent refrain: \"When we fight, we win.\" The audience joined in on the final two words.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"54p"},["54i","54k","54m","54o","54q"],["54j","54l","54n","54p"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"54r","text":"54s"},"2024-08-20T01:16:24.687Z","2024-08-20T01:29:21.072Z",{"createdAt":"54u","publishedAt":"54u","modifiedAt":"54v"},"Harris surprise early appearance, thanks Biden for his Harris campaign responded to Trumpâs saying today in an interview with CBS News that he has \"no regrets\" about having played a major role in the Supreme Court's reversal of Roe v. Wade.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"55s"},"âDonald Trump overturnedÂ <em>Roe v. Wade</em>, ripped away womenâs freedoms in all 50 states, and wears it like a badge of honor. Give him the chance, and heâll go even further and ban abortion nationwide,\" campaign spokesperson Sarafina Chitika said in a statement. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"55u"},"âThe American people have no regrets about making Donald a one-term president. Theyâll make him a two-time loser this November,\" she said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"55w"},["55t","55v","55x"],"âDonald Trump overturnedÂ Roe v. Wade, ripped away womenâs freedoms in all 50 states, and wears it like a badge of honor. Give him the chance, and heâll go even further and ban abortion nationwide,\" campaign spokesperson Sarafina Chitika said in a statement. York Gov. Kathy Hochul slammed Trump in her remarks, depicting him as a fraudster who doesn't understand working-class Americans.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5bk"},"\"Trust me, America: If you think you're tired of Donald Trump, talk to a New Yorker,\" Hochul said to cheers. \"Weâve had to deal with him for 78 long years.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5bm"},"\"The fraud, the tax-dodging, the sham university, the shady universities. We've seen him stiff contractors, rip off workers,\" Hochul said. \"He abuses women, brags about it and then takes away their rights â and New Yorkers are sick of it.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5bo"},"br",{"type":"192","element":"5bq","html":"1a8"},["5bj","5bl","5bn","5bp","5br"],["5bk","5bm","5bo"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5bs","text":"5bt"},"2024-08-20T01:09:30.516Z","2024-08-20T01:30:53.662Z",{"createdAt":"5bv","publishedAt":"5bv","modifiedAt":"5bw"},"New Foxx, a blogger and activist, became the first influencer to speak at the convention â <a href=\"https://www.nytimes.com/2024/08/18/us/politics/democratic-convention-harris-social-media-influencers.html\" target=\"_blank\">one of several </a>this week as the Harris campaign <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/tech/tech-news/progressive-content-creators-kamala-harris-reaction-rcna162967\" target=\"_blank\">courts young voters</a>. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5cz"},"Foxx, who worked with Harris' presidential campaign in 2019 and now posts regularly about the election to her<a href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/@deja_foxx?lang=en\" target=\"_blank\"> 140,000 TikTok followers,</a> spoke about reproductive rights and her upbringing as a \"free lunch kid.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5d1"},["5d0","5d2"],"Deja Foxx, a blogger and activist, became the first influencer to speak at the convention â one of several this week as the Harris campaign courts young voters. g singer-songwriter Jason Isbell performed tonight at the convention.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ei"},"Aside from his solo career, Isbell, a native Alabamian, is known for his work with the 400 Unit and as a former member of the Drive-By Truckers.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ek"},"He has been politically outspoken for some time, having performed a concert for former Sen. Doug Jones, a Democrat, during the 2017 special election in Alabama, which Jones the former governor of Rhode Island, discussed her own work in turning around the state's economy with a \"pro-business, pro-worker agenda.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5kh"},"\"Kamala Harris has that same agenda,\" she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5kj"},"She said \"Kamala Harris gets it\" when it comes to understanding that many Americans work very hard but are \"barely getting by, and that's not right.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5kl"},["5h1","5kg","5ki","5kk","5km"],["5h0","5kh","5kj","5kl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5kn","text":"5ko"},"2024-08-20T01:04:44.193Z","2024-08-20T01:26:55.220Z",{"createdAt":"5kq","publishedAt":"5kq","modifiedAt":"5kr"},"Commerce key Harris ally, Sen. Laphonza Butler, of California, echoed the vice president's previous remarks about \"knowing the type\" in reference to Trump and his ilk. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5lw"},"\"We deserve a president who is tough, not just tough-talking; one who shatters the boundaries of what's possible, not the boundaries of what's legal; one who wipes the floor with cheats and fraudsters because, well, Democrats, she knows the type,\" Butler said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ly"},"mmvo217492037566","PT4M45S","Tue Aug 20 2024 01:23:41 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T01:23:38.000Z",{"publishedAt":"5m3","createdAt":"5m3"},"217492037566","f_mo_dnc_butler_harris_240819",{"id":"5m5","guid":"5m6","externalAdvertiserId":"5m6"},"Sen. said Harris, a former prosecutor, has always \"understood the assignment\" and never doubted the future would be brighter. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5pf"},"\"Every time she walked into a courtroom she would say 'Kamala Harris for the people.' That's not exactly the case â while Trump and his allies have deep ties to the Heritage Foundation's policy road map, Trump has furiously tried to distance himself from it in recent weeks. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ql"},"My colleagues Vaughn Hillyard and Alexandra Marquez dove deeper into those ties between Project 2025 and Trump, what the plan says and who's involved last month. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5qn"},"ncwd999999","IFRAMELY_EXTERNAL_EMBED","https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/project-2025-trump-heritage-foundation-what-know-rcna161338","Former Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., the former House speaker, tonight addressed the tension between her and Biden and his White House aides after she played a key role in his decision to drop his re-election bid.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5s3"},"She was asked in a CNN interview to respond to longtime Biden adviser Anita Dunn's saying earlier on CNN that ânobody wants to have a fight with Nancy Pelosi at this time\" and whether Pelosi has spoken to Biden since he withdrew from the race.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5s5"},"\"Sometimes you just have to take a punch for the children,\" said Pelosi, who didn't say whether she has spoken to Biden but said recently that she hasn't spoken to him since he dropped out.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5s7"},"\"He made the decision for the country. My concern was not about the president. It was about his campaign,\" Pelosi said tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5s9"},["5s4","5s6","5s8","5sa"],["5s3","5s5","5s7","5s9"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5sb","text":"5sc"},"2024-08-20T00:46:54.385Z","2024-08-20T00:59:50.722Z",{"createdAt":"5se","publishedAt":"5se","modifiedAt":"5sf"},{"primary":"339","seo":"339"},"Pelosi large pile of fancy metal water bottles, which are prohibited from entering the United Center, stands in silent vigil to the unquenched thirsts of those inside.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ta"},"The Secret Service would not allow metal bottles inside, but plastic disposable water bottles are OK â even if they are filled with water (unlike at airports).",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5tc"},"rcim301428",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"A pile of metal waters bottles behind security outside the convention.","A pile of metal waters bottles seen behind security outside of the DNC in Chicago on water bottles left behind",{"primary":"5u1","seo":"5u1","social":"5u1"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52550",{"primary":"5u4"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5u6"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5u8"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5ua"},{"analysis":"5u7","citations":"5u9","verdict":"5ub"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"5sw","authors":"5t9","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"5tv","date":"5ty","description":"5u0","headline":"5u2","presentation":"5u3","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"5u5","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"5uc","replies":"5ud"},"rcrd52555","I cover state legislatures, politics and policy â and how those topics coalesce into and intersect with national political trends. Given what state lawmakers have focused on in recent years, my coverage areas tend to veer into reproductive rights, voting rights and education policy. I was born and raised in Milwaukee, and I try to make my native state proud by covering as many of its fascinating political stories as I can.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["5uh"],"Adam Edelman is a politics reporter for NBC News. ","ncpn777046","adam.edelman@nbcuni.com",["1j4"],"Adam Edelman","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_26/3653050/190618-adam-edelman.jpg",{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"5up","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@abedelman",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/adam-edelman-ncpn777046","adam-edelman-ncpn777046",{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},"Iâve been at NBC News since 2017. In addition to state politics, I also covered the Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden presidential campaigns in 2020. My work in 2024 has focused largely on the changing legal landscape for abortion rights in states, including the growing efforts to put this issue directly to voters via proposed constitutional amendments. Previously, I worked as a politics reporter for the New York Daily News and as a spot news editor for the Dow Jones Newswires. Bylines include The New York Times, USA Today, The Wall Street Journal and the Wisconsin Jewish Chronicle. I attended the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Columbia School of Journalism.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["5uy"],[],[],{"bio":"5ui","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"5um","name":"5un","primaryImage":"5uq","publisher":"5ur","socialMediaProfiles":"5ut","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"5uw","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"5uz","educationAndExpertise":"5v0","awards":"5v1"},["5v2"],"Justin Cheong was among the protesters who quickly dipped into the street barrier that became exposed after some protesters tore down security fencing at Park 578 today.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5v4"},"Cheong said he and some other protesters went inside what had been a protected buffer street for a few minutes and chanted, âBiden, Harris, you canât hide, stop funding the genocide.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5v6"},"âThen we left and went on with the route,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5v8"},"rcim301427",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Justin Cheong in Chicago on Monday.","dnc protester politics political ","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-protest-justin-cheong-ac-841p-52ca10.jpg",{"primary":"5ve"},1667,"2024-08-20T00:42:07.104Z",{"publishedAt":"5vh","createdAt":"5vh","modifiedAt":"5vh"},{"name":"5un"},["5vj"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"5va","headline":"5vb","caption":"5vc","altText":"5vd","url":"5vf","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5tk","width":"5vg","date":"5vi","authors":"5vk","source":"5vl"},{"type":"1v2","image":"5vm"},"Cheong, who said he didnât know who was responsible for tearing down the security fencing, said the moment of defiance made him feel âmore connected to the intifadaâ â a word that refers to the Palestiniansâ uprising against Israel.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5vo"},"He said he was emboldened by being even closer to the United Center and chanting at DNC attendees inside an arena several hundred yards away.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5vq"},"âThey had to listen and not take us for granted,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5vs"},["5v5","5v7","5v9","5vn","5vp","5vr","5vt"],["5v4","5v6","5v8","5vo","5vq","5vs"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"5vu","text":"5vv"},"2024-08-20T00:46:25.840Z","2024-08-20T00:50:30.673Z",{"createdAt":"5vx","publishedAt":"5vx","modifiedAt":"5vy"},"Justin
