(UTC)","2024-08-20T00:51:16.000Z",{"publishedAt":"5wx","createdAt":"5wx"},"217488965743","f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819",{"id":"5wz","guid":"5x0","externalAdvertiserId":"5x0"},"Michigan state senator uses large copy Project 2025 to criticize its 'Republican blueprint'","Michigan state senator brings out giant copy of Project 2025 at the DNC",{"primary":"5x2","seo":"5x3"},"Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow brought out a large copy of Project 2025, what she described as a \"Republican blueprint\" for former President Trump's potential second term. She warned those in attendance that the policies it lays out are \"so much worse\" than what they may have heard.",{"primary":"5x5"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/michigan-state-senator-brings-out-giant-copy-of-project-2025-at-the-dnc-217488965743","michigan-state-senator-brings-out-giant-copy-of-project-2025-at-the-dnc-217488965743",{"canonical":"5x7","primary":"5x7","slug":"5x8"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819.vtt",{"srt":"5xa","webvtt":"5xb"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",286.188,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"5xd","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"5xe","bitrate":"303"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_6.mp4",4323539,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"5xg","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"5xe","bitrate":"5xh"},["5xf","5xi"],"vidimg139265948",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115059882_f_mo_dnc_mcmorrow_book_240819_1920x1080-ozn3ek.jpg",{"primary":"5xm"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"5xk","headline":"5xl","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"5xn","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"5xo","authors":"5xp","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"5xm"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"5xk","headline":"5xr","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"5xs","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"5xt","authors":"5xu","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary 1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1cr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1cp","headline":"5yu","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"5yv","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"5yw","authors":"5yx","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1cw","primary":"1cw","slug":"1cx"},{"primary":"1d0","seo":"1d1"},{"primary":"1d3"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1d7","webvtt":"1d8"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1da","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1dc"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1de","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1df"},["5z5","5z6"],{"type":"198","id":"1cl","mpxMetadata":"5yt","primaryImage":"5yy","url":"5yz","duration":"1cz","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"5z0","description":"5z1","publisher":"5z2","source":"5z3","closedCaptioning":"5z4","videoAssets":"5z7"},{"id":"1dk","guid":"1dl","externalAdvertiserId":"1dl"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1dp"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1dn","headline":"5za","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"5zb","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"5zc","authors":"5zd","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1du","primary":"1du","slug":"1dv"},{"primary":"1dy","seo":"1dy"},{"primary":"1e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1e4","webvtt":"1e5"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1e7","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1e9"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1eb","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1ec"},["5zl","5zm"],{"type":"198","id":"1dj","mpxMetadata":"5z9","primaryImage":"5ze","url":"5zf","duration":"1dx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"5zg","description":"5zh","publisher":"5zi","source":"5zj","closedCaptioning":"5zk","videoAssets":"5zn"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"5zq","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"5zr","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"5zs","authors":"5zt","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["601","602"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"5zp","primaryImage":"5zu","url":"5zv","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"5zw","description":"5zx","publisher":"5zy","source":"5zz","closedCaptioning":"600","videoAssets":"603"},["5yc","5ys","5z8","5zo","604"],{"headline":"5xw","videos":"605"},{"id":"5wu","type":"198","duration":"5wv","dateBroadcast":"5ww","date":"5wy","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"5x1","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"5x4","description":"5x6","url":"5x9","closedCaptioning":"5xc","videoAssets":"5xj","primaryImage":"5xq","teaseImage":"5xv","associatedVideoPlaylist":"606"},{"type":"196","video":"607"},"Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow is speaking, and she has a giant book titled \"Project 2025\" with her, calling it \"the Republican blueprint for a second Trump term.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"609"},"\"That's right, they went ahead and wrote down all the extreme things that Donald Trump wants to do in the next four years, and then they just tweeted it out, putting it out on the internet for everybody to read,\" McMorrow said. \"So we read it.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"60b"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"60d","presentation":"60e"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"60f","publisher":"60g"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"60h"},"McMorrow flipped to a page in the book, saying she wanted to tell the crowd about Project 2025's plan to \"turn Donald Trump into a dictator.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"60j"},"\"They're talking about replacing the entire federal government with an army of loyalists who answer only to Donald Trump,\" she said. \"Under Project 2025 Donald Trump would be able to weaponize the Department of Justice to go after his political opponents. He could even turn the FBI into his own personal police force.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"60l"},"\"That is not how it works in America,\" McMorrow said to cheers.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"60n"},"McMorrow concluded by saying she would return the next night to explain what Project 2025 would mean for people's pocketbooks.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"60p"},["608","60a","60c","60i","60k","60m","60o","60q"],["609","60b","60j","60l","60n","60p"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"60r","text":"60s"},"2024-08-20T00:45:32.932Z","2024-08-20T00:59:32.879Z",{"createdAt":"60u","publishedAt":"60u","modifiedAt":"60v"},"Michigan state Sen.",{"primary":"60x","seo":"60x"},"Speaker reads from giant Project 2025 book, saying 'that is not how it works in America.'",{"primary":"60z","seo":"60z","social":"60z"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52556",{"primary":"612"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"614"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"616"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"618"},{"analysis":"615","citations":"617","verdict":"619"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"5wg","authors":"5wt","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"60t","date":"60w","description":"60y","headline":"610","presentation":"611","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"613","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"61a","replies":"61b"},"rcrd52551",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["61e"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"61h","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["61m"],[],[],{"bio":"61f","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"61g","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"61i","publisher":"61j","socialMediaProfiles":"61k","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"61l","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"61n","educationAndExpertise":"61o","awards":"61p"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["61r"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"61u","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["61z"],[],[],{"bio":"61s","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"61t","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"61v","publisher":"61w","socialMediaProfiles":"61x","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"61y","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"620","educationAndExpertise":"621","awards":"622"},["61q","623"],"Four state politicians took the stage to vouch for the Biden-Harris administrationâs impact on their states. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"625"},"Pennsylvania Lt. Gov. Austin Davis focused on infrastructure, arguing that Harris is âlooking forwardâ and \"committed to keeping our infrastructure safe and modern.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"627"},"Wisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez, a former nurse and health care executive, focused her remarks on the Harris-Walz health agenda. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"629"},"Rodriguez touted Harris' support for women's reproductive rights, her pledges to protect Medicare and Medicare and the Biden administration's cap on the price of insulin for seniors.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"62b"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"62d","presentation":"62e"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"62f","publisher":"62g"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"62h"},"\"It's about freedom, the freedom to make your own choices and the freedom to get the care you need without worrying about the cost. Kamala Harris is fighting for that healthy future,\" Rodriguez said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"62j"},"Lina Hidalgo, the judge, or executive, of Harris County, Texas, touted the Biden-Harris administration's work to address extreme weather and climate change. She also said that when the Texas power grid went dark, Harris called her personally to make sure Texans had what they needed.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"62l"},"California Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis recounted her friendship with Harris and told a story about Harris' giving her advice when she dealt with sexism in the workplace. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"62n"},"mmvo217489477976","PT3M16S","Tue Aug 20 2024 00:58:48 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T00:58:44.000Z",{"publishedAt":"62s","createdAt":"62s"},"217489477976","f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819",{"id":"62u","guid":"62v","externalAdvertiserId":"62v"},"California Lt. Gov. Kounalakis says Harris was a mentor in her career","California Lt. Gov. Kounalakis says Harris was a mentor in her careerÂ ",{"primary":"62x","seo":"62y"},"California Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis and friend of Vice President Kamala Harris shared stories of the two in their early careers. Kounalakis touted Harrisâ work for California homeowners and mentorship.Â ",{"primary":"630"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/california-lt-gov-kounalakis-says-harris-was-a-mentor-in-her-career-217489477976","california-lt-gov-kounalakis-says-harris-was-a-mentor-in-her-career-217489477976",{"canonical":"632","primary":"632","slug":"633"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819.vtt",{"srt":"635","webvtt":"636"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",195.797,4424000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"638","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"639","bitrate":"63a"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_6.mp4",4424292,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"63c","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"639","bitrate":"63d"},["63b","63e"],"vidimg2214325456",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/1724115505480_f_mo_dnc_eleni_mentor_240819_1920x1080-q87gf5.jpg",{"primary":"63i"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"63g","headline":"63h","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"63j","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"63k","authors":"63l","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"63i"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"63g","headline":"63n","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"63o","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"63p","authors":"63q","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"prim state politicians took the stage to vouch for the Biden-Harris administrationâs impact on their states.  Pennsylvania Lt. Gov.",{"primary":"66b","seo":"66b"},"Four state politicians vouch for Democrats' impact on their states",{"primary":"66d","seo":"66d","social":"66d"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52551",{"primary":"66g"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"66i"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"66k"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"66m"},{"analysis":"66j","citations":"66l","verdict":"66n"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"61d","authors":"624","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"667","date":"66a","description":"66c","headline":"66e","presentation":"66f","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"66h","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"66o","replies":"66p"},"rcrd52546",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"258"},["66s"],["25e"],{"primary":"25h"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"66v","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"25l","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"25n","primary":"25n","slug":"25o"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25q"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25s"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25u"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25y"},["670","671","672","673","674"],[],{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"262"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"264"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"267"},["677","678","679","67a"],{"bio":"66t","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"25b","id":"25c","email":"25d","jobTitle":"66u","name":"25g","primaryImage":"66w","publisher":"66x","socialMediaProfiles":"66y","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"66z","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"675","educationAndExpertise":"676","awards":"67b"},["67c"],"Harris and Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass have a lot of things in common, starting with their shared history of shattering ceilings. Both ascended to be the first women to hold their respective offices, and both did so while championing the next generation of leaders, Bass said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"67e"},"\"Kamala knows that each generation has an obligation to the next,\" Bass said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"67g"},"mmvo217487941576","PT2M51S","Tue Aug 20 2024 00:33:47 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T00:33:43.000Z",{"publishedAt":"67l","createdAt":"67l"},"217487941576","f_mo_dnc_harris_youth_bass_240819",{"id":"67n","guid":"67o","externalAdvertiserId":"67o"},"L.A. Bass was speaker of the California Assembly and Harris was a prosecutor, they fought to address youth homelessness and reform the child welfare system, she said. When Harris was state attorney general, she supported reforms to the juvenile justice system that are still in place today.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ay"},"\"You can feel her heart, and you can feel her fearlessness,\" Bass went on.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6b0"},["67f","67h","6ax","6az","6b1"],["67e","67g","6ay","6b0"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6b2","text":"6b3"},"2024-08-20T00:35:26.864Z","2024-08-20T00:41:38.861Z",{"createdAt":"6b5","publishedAt":"6b5","modifiedAt":"6b6"},"Harris and Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass have a lot of things in common, starting with their shared history of shattering ceilings.",{"primary":"6b8","seo":"6b8"},"L.A mayor touts Harris' commitment to next generation",{"primary":"6ba","seo":"6ba","social":"6ba"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52546",{"primary":"6bd"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6bf"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6bh"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6bj"},{"analysis":"6bg","citations":"6bi","verdict":"6bk"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"66r","authors":"67d","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6b4","date":"6b7","description":"6b9","headline":"6bb","presentation":"6bc","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6be","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"6bl","replies":"6bm"},"rcrd52547",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1mc"},["6bp"],[],{"primary":"1mj"},{"altText":"1mi","height":"1h4","url":"6bs","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1mo","primary":"1mo","slug":"1mp"},[],[],[],{"bio":"6bq","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1mf","email":"1mg","jobTitle":"6br","name":"1mi","primaryImage":"6bt","publisher":"6bu","socialMediaProfiles":"6bv","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6bw","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6bx","educationAndExpertise":"6by","awards":"6bz"},"Michelle Garcia is the editorial director of NBCBLK",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6c1"},["6c2"],"ncpn1237383",[],"Michelle Garcia","Michelle Garcia headshot","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_14/3644400/240407-michelle-garcia-byline-headshot-vl-322p.jpg",{"primary":"6c8"},{"altText":"6c7","height":"1h4","url":"6c9","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/michelle-garcia-ncpn1237383","michelle-garcia-ncpn1237383",{"canonical":"6cd","primary":"6cd","slug":"6ce"},[],[],[],{"bio":"6c3","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"6c4","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"6c5","name":"6c6","primaryImage":"6ca","publisher":"6cb","socialMediaProfiles":"6cc","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6cf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6cg","educationAndExpertise":"6ch","awards":"6ci"},["6c0","6cj"],"Country singer Mickey Guyton sang \"All American,\" a unity anthem.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6cl"},"\"James Brown and James Dean,\" the song goes. \"Weâre cold beer, champagne, millionaires, spare some change. ... Ain't we all American?\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6cn"},"Guyton grew up in Texas listening to her grandma play Dolly Parton and decided to pursue country music after she heard LeAnn Rimes sing the national anthem at a Texas Rangers baseball game when she was 8 years old. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6cp"},"Guytonâs career didnât gain the momentum she wanted it to, which she largely attributes to her being held to a different set of standards as a Black woman in the industry.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6cr"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"6ct","presentation":"6cu"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"6cv","publisher":"6cw"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"6cx"},"âI had heard so many noes. Iâd heard people say, âOh, I donât know if you can do that.â âYou canât sing that.â âThatâs a little too pop,ââ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/country-music-typically-white-space-mickey-guyton-ready-change-it-n1234821\" target=\"_blank\">Guyton told NBC News in 2020</a>. âMeanwhile, Iâm seeing all these dudes with trap beats and R&B melodies in their songs, making all this money and selling out tours, but Iâm not allowed to do that.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6cz"},"Guyton signed with Capitol Records in 2011, becoming the only Black female country artist signed to a major label. However, she didn't have her <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/country-music-typically-white-space-mickey-guyton-ready-change-it-n1234821\" target=\"_blank\">breakout moment</a> until 2020 after she released âBlack Like Meâ in the wake of the death of George Floyd.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6d1"},"Sheâs made a name for herself since then, blazing a trail as a Black country star in Nashville. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6d3"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/nbcblk/country-music-typically-white-space-mickey-guyton-ready-change-it-n1234821\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>For more on Guyton, check our 2020 profile. </em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6d5"},["6cm","6co","6cq","6cs","6cy","6d0","6d2","6d4","6d6"],"âI had heard so many noes. Iâd heard people say, âOh, I donât know if you can do that.â âYou canât sing that.â âThatâs a little too pop,ââ Guyton told NBC News in 2020. âMeanwhile, Iâm seeing all these dudes with trap beats and R&B melodies in their songs, making all this money and selling out tours, but Iâm not allowed to do that.â","Guyton signed with Capitol Records in 2011, becoming the only Black female country artist signed to a major label. However, she didn't have her breakout moment until 2020 after she released âBlack Like Meâ in the wake of the death of George Floyd.","For more on Guyton, check our 2020 profile. ",["6cl","6cn","6cp","6cr","6d8","6d9","6d3","6da"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6d7","text":"6db"},"2024-08-20T00:33:04.139Z","2024-08-20T00:41:10.787Z",{"createdAt":"6dd","publishedAt":"6dd","modifiedAt":"6de"},"Country singer Mickey Guyton sang \"All American,\" a unity anthem. \"James Brown and James Dean,\" the song goes. \"Weâre cold beer, champagne, millionaires, spare",{"primary":"6dg","seo":"6dg"},"Country singer Mickey Guyton performs",{"primary":"6di","seo":"6di","social":"6di"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52547",{"primary":"6dl"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6dn"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6dp"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6dr"},{"analysis":"6do","citations":"6dq","verdict":"6ds"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6bo","authors":"6ck","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6dc","date":"6df","description":"6dh","headline":"6dj","presentation":"6dk","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6dm","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"6dt","replies":"6du"},"rcrd52545","I am an award-winning journalist covering national and international issues for NBC News, with a focus on immigration and education.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6dx"},["6dy"],"Daniella Silva is a national reporter for NBC News, focusing on immigration and education.","ncpn211","daniella.silva@nbcuni.com",["25e"],"Daniella Silva","Image: Daniella Silva","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2019_29/2934766/190619-daniella-silva-byline2558.jpg",{"primary":"6e6"},{"altText":"6e5","height":"1h4","url":"6e7","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@DaniellaLSilva",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"6ea","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/daniella-silva-ncpn211","daniella-silva-ncpn211",{"canonical":"6ec","primary":"6ec","slug":"6ed"},"I have traveled to the <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/migrants-el-paso-say-rumors-urged-crossing-title-42-ended-rcna83712\" target=\"_blank\">U.S.-Mexico border</a>, as well as <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/trapped-tijuana-migrants-face-long-dangerous-wait-claim-asylum-n981721\" target=\"_blank\">Mexico</a> and <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/venezuela-s-ongoing-crisis-leaves-children-caught-life-or-death-n1058676\" target=\"_blank\">Venezuela</a>, for on-the-ground coverage of immigration. I have covered multiple natural disasters, <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/storyline/puerto-rico-crisis/puerto-ricans-hard-hit-arecibo-everything-was-lost-n807896\" target=\"_blank\">traveling to Puerto Rico</a> to cover Hurricanes <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/storyline/puerto-rico-crisis/anger-grows-hope-fades-puerto-rico-s-ground-zero-remains-n833421\" target=\"_blank\">Maria</a> and <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/lack-power-puerto-rico-creates-life-death-situations-medical-needs-rcna49151\" target=\"_blank\">Fiona</a> and the Bahamas to cover <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/abaco-islands-letter-d-marks-site-grim-recovery-effort-n1052166\" target=\"_blank\">Hurricane Dorian</a>. Recently, Iâve reported from New York, Chicago and Denver to cover how those cities are <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/migrants-housing-crisis-chicago-eviction-process-rcna135688\" target=\"_blank\">dealing with an increase of migrants</a> who were <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/denver-asylum-seekers-hopeful-work-training-program-starts-completely-rcna156126\" target=\"_blank\">bused in from Texas</a> beginning in 2022. I have also written about how the pandemic affected education around the country and how schools dealt with and attempted to recover from the unprecedented disruption in schooling. I have been with NBC News since 2013.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ef"},["6eg"],[],"I received a Deadline Club Award in 2021 in the category âNewspaper or Digital Enterprise Reportingâ for âLured to America â then trapped,â an investigation into abuses of a federal visa program for temporary farm workers that left legal workers vulnerable to labor trafficking and other abuse with little oversight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ej"},"My work on the destructive impact of Hurricanes Laura and Delta hitting Louisiana just weeks apart received an American Photography award in 2020.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6el"},["6ek","6em"],{"bio":"6dz","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"6e0","id":"6e1","email":"6e2","jobTitle":"6e3","name":"6e4","primaryImage":"6e8","publisher":"6e9","socialMediaProfiles":"6eb","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6ee","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6eh","educationAndExpertise":"6ei","awards":"6en"},["6eo"],"Chicago's top cop said tonight that while the police department was ânot going to tolerateâ vandalism and acts of violence after a small group of protesters breached a security barrier and encountered police, âIâm not going to associate this with the march as a whole.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6eq"},"âYou have people who just wanted to have their voices heard,â Police Superintendent Larry Snelling said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6es"},"âThey did that, but you had a portion of that group who decided that they were going to stand behind and breach the fence and try to get to the other side â and we cannot let that happen,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6eu"},"He said officers âresponded swiftlyâ to make sure the group of protesters was not able to reach the inner perimeter separating them from the arena where the convention is taking place.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ew"},"âWe have no idea what they would have done if they had gotten onto the other side, but as I said before, weâre not going to tolerate anyone who is going to vandalize things in our city,â Snelling said. âWeâre not going to tolerate anyone who is going to commit acts of violence, and we will act swiftly on that. As you saw today, our officers acted professionally.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ey"},"âOur job here is to make sure that we keep the DNC safe, keep our city safe and keep our people safe,â he said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6f0"},["6er","6et","6ev","6ex","6ez","6f1"],["6eq","6es","6eu","6ew","6ey","6f0"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6f2","text":"6f3"},"2024-08-20T00:29:29.695Z","2024-08-20T00:42:24.371Z",{"createdAt":"6f5","publishedAt":"6f5","modifiedAt":"6f6"},"Chicago's ",{"primary":"6fa","seo":"6fa","social":"6fa"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52545",{"primary":"6fd"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6ff"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6fh"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6fj"},{"analysis":"6fg","citations":"6fi","verdict":"6fk"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6dw","authors":"6ep","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6f4","date":"6f7","description":"6f9","headline":"6fb","presentation":"6fc","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6fe","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"6fl","replies":"6fm"},"rcrd52543",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["6fp"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"6fs","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["6fx"],[],[],{"bio":"6fq","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"6fr","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"6ft","publisher":"6fu","socialMediaProfiles":"6fv","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6fw","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6fy","educationAndExpertise":"6fz","awards":"6g0"},["6g1"],"mmvo217487941524","PT9M45S","Tue heads of some of the country's largest and most influential labor unions took the stage tonight to tout the economic agenda and accomplishments of the Biden-Harris administration and rail against Trump, painting him as a foe of organized labor.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ji"},"Trump's appeal to working-class voters has been key to his political appeal since his 2016 campaign, but Democrats have been aggressively courting union members this cycle, championing populist economic policies and workers' rights.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6jk"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"6jm","presentation":"6jn"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"6jo","publisher":"6jp"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"6jq"},"Labor leaders at tonight's convention session included:",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6js"},"ul","<li>Lee Saunders,Â president of the American Federation of State, County, and Municipal Employees</li><li>April Verrett, president of the Service Employees International Union</li><li>Brent Booker, general president of the Laborersâ International Union of North America</li><li>Kenneth Cooper, international president of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers</li><li>Claude Cummings Jr., president of the Communications Workers of America</li><li>Elizabeth Shuler,Â president of the AFL-CIO</li>",{"type":"192","element":"6ju","html":"6jv"},"Noticeably absent: Teamsters head Sean O'Brien, who gave a fiery speech at the Republican National Convention last month assailing corporatism. O'Brien has not endorsed a candidate in the presidential race.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6jx"},"rcim301426",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Day one of the Democratic National Convention in Chicago.","DNC day one - heads of some of the country's largest and most influential labor unions took the stage tonight to tout the economic agenda and accomplishments of the Biden",{"primary":"6kl","seo":"6kl"},"'Union Yes!': Labor leaders rally behind Harris-Walz ticket",{"primary":"6kn","seo":"6kn","social":"6kn"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52543",{"primary":"6kq"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6ks"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6ku"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6kw"},{"analysis":"6kt","citations":"6kv","verdict":"6kx"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6fo","authors":"6g2","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6kh","date":"6kk","description":"6km","headline":"6ko","presentation":"6kp","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6kr","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"6ky","replies":"6kz"},"rcrd52541",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["6l2"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"6l5","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["6la"],[],[],{"bio":"6l3","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"6l4","name":"5un","primaryImage":"6l6","publisher":"6l7","socialMediaProfiles":"6l8","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6l9","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6lb","educationAndExpertise":"6lc","awards":"6ld"},["6le"],"While the situation that unfolded in Park 578 stole a lot of attention from the Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest, the march continued beyond the park afterward and ended peacefully where it started: in Union Park.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6lg"},"After it became clear at Park 578 that a breakaway group of protesters was looking to tear down security fencing, organizers urged demonstrators to exit the park and continue on the march route.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6li"},"Most did. After leaving Park 578, marchers walked for another 45 minutes, chanting pro-Palestinian messages. They returned to Union Park around 5:45 p.m. local time, just a bit later than they had planned, and ended the day with speeches.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6lk"},"Despite the chaos at Park 578, organizers said they were pleased with how things went.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6lm"},"âExtremely happyâ is how Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the coalitionâs main organizers, put it.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6lo"},"rcim301420",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the Coalition to March on the DNCâs main organizers.","Hatem Abudayyeh, one of the Coalition to March on the DNCâs main organizers","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Hatem-Abudayyeh-ew-809p-634d1c.jpg",{"primary":"6lu"},2412,"2024-08-20T00:11:40.658Z",{"publishedAt":"6lx","createdAt":"6lx","modifiedAt":"6lx"},{"name":"5un"},["6lz"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"6lq","headline":"6lr","caption":"6ls","altText":"6lt","url":"6lv","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"6lw","width":"6lw","date":"6ly","authors":"6m0","source":"6m1"},{"type":"1v2","image":"6m2"},"Abudayyeh and other organizers said they believe the people responsible for the violent behavior in Park 578 were not part of any of the groups involved with the coalition.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6m4"},"âI have no idea who those people were,â Abudayyeh said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6m6"},"He acknowledged that the protest dwindled after Park 578 and that it lost numbers during the melee after people âscattered,â but he said, âWe still came back to Union Park in big numbers.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6m8"},"By 6:45 local time, a few hundred protesters remained in Union Park, mostly celebrating the protest and cleaning up.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ma"},["6lh","6lj","6ll","6ln","6lp","6m3","6m5","6m7","6m9","6mb"],["6lg","6li","6lk","6lm","6lo","6m4","6m6","6m8","6ma"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6mc","text":"6md"},"2024-08-20T00:11:55.464Z","2024-08-20T00:38:11.677Z",{"createdAt":"6mf","publishedAt":"6mf","modifiedAt":"6mg"},"While the situation that unfolded in Park 578 stole a lot of attention from the Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest, the march continued beyond the park",{"primary":"6mi","seo":"6mi"},"Coalition to March on the DNCâs protest ends peacefully where it began",{"primary":"6mk","seo":"6mk","social":"6mk"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52541",{"primary":"6mn"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6mp"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6mr"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6mt"},{"analysis":"6mq","citations":"6ms","verdict":"6mu"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6l1","authors":"6lf","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6me","date":"6mh","description":"6mj","headline":"6ml","presentation":"6mm","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6mo","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"6mv","replies":"6mw"},"rcrd52540",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["6mz"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"6n2","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["6n7"],[],[],{"bio":"6n0","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"6n1","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"6n3","publisher":"6n4","socialMediaProfiles":"6n5","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6n6","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6n8","educationAndExpertise":"6n9","awards":"6na"},["6nb"],"mmvo217485381834","PT4M10S","Tue Joyce Beatty, D-Ohio, criticized Vance, saying he \"ran away\" from his home state to go to Yale and Silicon Valley the moment he could.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6qs"},"She argued that Trump and Vance like to \"talk about states like Ohio\" but that \"Kamala and Joe actually get stuff done for us.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6qu"},["6qr","6qt","6qv"],["6qs","6qu"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6qw","text":"6qx"},"2024-08-20T00:11:04.352Z","2024-08-20T00:26:51.119Z",{"createdAt":"6qz","publishedAt":"6qz","modifiedAt":"6r0"},{"primary":"6qs","seo":"6qs"},"Rep. Joyce Beatty says Democrats have helped Ohio more than Vance has",{"primary":"6r3","seo":"6r3","social":"6r3"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52540",{"primary":"6r6"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6r8"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6ra"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6rc"},{"analysis":"6r9","citations":"6rb","verdict":"6rd"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6my","authors":"6nc","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6qy","date":"6r1","description":"6r2","headline":"6r4","presentation":"6r5","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6r7","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"6re","replies":"6rf"},"rcrd52539",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["6ri"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"6rl","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["6rq"],[],[],{"bio":"6rj","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"6rk","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"6rm","publisher":"6rn","socialMediaProfiles":"6ro","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6rp","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6rr","educationAndExpertise":"6rs","awards":"6rt"},["6ru"],"mmvo217487429567","PT3M45S","Tue Aug 20 2024 00:21:40 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-20T00:21:37.000Z",{"publishedAt":"6rz","createdAt":"6rz"},"217487429567","f_mo_dnc_durbin_trump_240819",{"id":"6s1","guid":"6s2","externalAdvertiserId":"6s2"},"Durbin at DNC: Trump 'like a bad boss,' his record 'defined by failure'","Durbin attacks Trump's manufacturing record at DNC",{"primary":"6s4","seo":"6s5"},"Sen. "},{"primary":"1cr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1cp","headline":"6tx","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6ty","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6tz","authors":"6u0","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1cw","primary":"1cw","slug":"1cx"},{"primary":"1d0","seo":"1d1"},{"primary":"1d3"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1d7","webvtt":"1d8"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1da","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1dc"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1de","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1df"},["6u8","6u9"],{"type":"198","id":"1cl","mpxMetadata":"6tw","primaryImage":"6u1","url":"6u2","duration":"1cz","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6u3","description":"6u4","publisher":"6u5","source":"6u6","closedCaptioning":"6u7","videoAssets":"6ua"},{"id":"1dk","guid":"1dl","externalAdvertiserId":"1dl"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1dp"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1dn","headline":"6ud","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6ue","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6uf","authors":"6ug","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1du","primary":"1du","slug":"1dv"},{"primary":"1dy","seo":"1dy"},{"primary":"1e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1e4","webvtt":"1e5"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1e7","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1e9"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1eb","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1ec"},["6uo","6up"],{"type":"198","id":"1dj","mpxMetadata":"6uc","primaryImage":"6uh","url":"6ui","duration":"1dx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6uj","description":"6uk","publisher":"6ul","source":"6um","closedCaptioning":"6un","videoAssets":"6uq"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"6ut","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6uu","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6uv","authors":"6uw","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["6v4","6v5"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"6us","primaryImage":"6ux","url":"6uy","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6uz","description":"6v0","publisher":"6v1","source":"6v2","closedCaptioning":"6v3","videoAssets":"6v6"},["6tf","6tv","6ub","6ur","6v7"],{"headline":"6sz","videos":"6v8"},{"id":"6rw","type":"198","duration":"6rx","dateBroadcast":"6ry","date":"6s0","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"6s3","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6s6","description":"6s8","url":"6sb","closedCaptioning":"6se","videoAssets":"6sm","primaryImage":"6st","teaseImage":"6sy","associatedVideoPlaylist":"6v9"},{"type":"196","video":"6va"},"Sen. Dick Durbin, D-Ill., said in his convention remarks that Trump had promised to bring back manufacturing jobs and to deliver infrastructure \"but he failed.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6vc"},"\"His record was defined by failure. To put it another way, Donald Trump is like a bad boss. You want time off to take care of your sick parents? Ask Donald Trump. Denied. In Donald Trump's America, there is no paid family leave. Want to have a child but need IVF? Too bad; that's shut down. ... Want a pay raise? Too bad; the boss just gave himself one, so there's nothing left for you.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ve"},"Durbin quipped that Trump did make history and should be given credit: \"He is one of only two presidents in the history of the United States to leave office with fewer Americans working than when he started.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6vg"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"6vi","presentation":"6vj"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"6vk","publisher":"6vl"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"6vm"},"He then praised the Biden administration's record, saying, \"Today, more roads are getting fixed, more factories are being built, more Americans are working construction, and more autoworkers are making cars than on any month when Trump was president.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6vo"},"Durbin said Harris and Walz would \"fight for the places that are too often left behind.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6vq"},["6vb","6vd","6vf","6vh","6vn","6vp","6vr"],["6vc","6ve","6vg","6vo","6vq"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6vs","text":"6vt"},"2024-08-20T00:06:28.360Z","2024-08-20T00:28:33.314Z",{"createdAt":"6vv","publishedAt":"6vv","modifiedAt":"6vw"},{"primary":"2ry","seo":"2ry"},"Sen. Dick Durbin says Trump is 'like a bad boss'",{"primary":"6vz","seo":"6vz","social":"6vz"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52539",{"primary":"6w2"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6w4"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6w6"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"6w8"},{"analysis":"6w5","citations":"6w7","verdict":"6w9"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6rh","authors":"6rv","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"6vu","date":"6vx","description":"6vy","headline":"6w0","presentation":"6w1","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"6w3","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"6wa","replies":"6wb"},"rcrd52533",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1x9"},["6we"],["1j4"],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1xh","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1xj","primary":"1xj","slug":"1xk"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xm"},["6wk"],[],[],{"bio":"6wf","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1xc","id":"1xd","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"6wg","name":"1xf","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"6wh","socialMediaProfiles":"6wi","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"6wj","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"6wl","educationAndExpertise":"6wm","awards":"6wn"},["6wo"],"mmvo217483333843","PT4M31S","Mon Aug 19 2024 23:56:36 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-19T23:56:33.000Z",{"publishedAt":"6wt","createdAt":"6wt"},"217483333843","f_mo_dnc_garcia_covid_240819",{"id":"6wv","guid":"6ww","externalAdvertiserId":"6ww"},"Rep. Garcia reflects on losing his mother and stepfather during the Covid pandemic",{"primary":"6wy","seo":"6wy"},"Rep. Robert Garcia, D-Calif., spoke at the Democratic National Convention to criticize former President Trump's handling of the Covid pandemic and share his story of losing his mother and stepfather.",{"primary":"6x0"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-garcia-reflects-on-losing-his-mother-and-stepfather-during-the-covid-pandemic-217483333843","rep-garcia-reflects-on-losing-his-mother-and-stepfather-during-the-covid-pandemic-217483333843",{"canonical":"6x2","primary":"6x2","slug":"6x3"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724111777695_f_mo_dnc_garcia_covid_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724111777695_f_mo_dnc_garcia_covid_240819.vtt",{"srt":"6x5","webvtt":"6x6"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_garcia_covid_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",270.706,4337000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"6x8","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"6x9","bitrate":"6xa"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724111777695_f_mo_dnc_garcia_covid_240819_6.mp4",4337524,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"6xc","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"6x9","bitrate":"6xd"},["6xb","6xe"],"vidimg2336599900",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-robert-garcia-ac-1006p__826562-eu0gvc.jpg",{"primary":"6xi"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"6xg","headline":"6xh","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6xj","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6xk","authors":"6xl","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"6xi"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"6xg","headline":"6xn","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6xo","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6xp","authors":"6xq","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8"," d":"1cn"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1cr"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1cp","headline":"6yq","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6yr","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6ys","authors":"6yt","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1cw","primary":"1cw","slug":"1cx"},{"primary":"1d0","seo":"1d1"},{"primary":"1d3"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1d7","webvtt":"1d8"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1da","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1dc"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1de","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1db","bitrate":"1df"},["6z1","6z2"],{"type":"198","id":"1cl","mpxMetadata":"6yp","primaryImage":"6yu","url":"6yv","duration":"1cz","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6yw","description":"6yx","publisher":"6yy","source":"6yz","closedCaptioning":"6z0","videoAssets":"6z3"},{"id":"1dk","guid":"1dl","externalAdvertiserId":"1dl"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1dp"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1dn","headline":"6z6","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6z7","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6z8","authors":"6z9","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1du","primary":"1du","slug":"1dv"},{"primary":"1dy","seo":"1dy"},{"primary":"1e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1c7"},{"srt":"1e4","webvtt":"1e5"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1e7","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1e9"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1eb","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1e8","bitrate":"1ec"},["6zh","6zi"],{"type":"198","id":"1dj","mpxMetadata":"6z5","primaryImage":"6za","url":"6zb","duration":"1dx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6zc","description":"6zd","publisher":"6ze","source":"6zf","closedCaptioning":"6zg","videoAssets":"6zj"},{"id":"1eh","guid":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"6zm","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"6zn","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"6zo","authors":"6zp","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["6zx","6zy"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"6zl","primaryImage":"6zq","url":"6zr","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6zs","description":"6zt","publisher":"6zu","source":"6zv","closedCaptioning":"6zw","videoAssets":"6zz"},["6y8","6yo","6z4","6zk","700"],{"headline":"6xs","videos":"701"},{"id":"6wq","type":"198","duration":"6wr","dateBroadcast":"6ws","date":"6wu","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"6wx","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"6wz","description":"6x1","url":"6x4","closedCaptioning":"6x7","videoAssets":"6xf","primaryImage":"6xm","teaseImage":"6xr","associatedVideoPlaylist":"702"},{"type":"196","video":"703"},"Rep. Robert Garcia, D-Calif., tonight talked about how Harris called him after his mother and stepfather died from Covid.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"705"},"\"I will never forget when Kamala Harris called me after my parents died,\" Garcia said. \"She told me about her own story, about losing her own mother, and that she was praying for me at that very moment.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"707"},"Garcia criticized Trump over his handling of the virus, pointing to his suggestion that the <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trump-suggests-injection-disinfectant-beat-coronavirus-clean-lungs-n1191216\" target=\"_blank\">âinjectionâ of disinfectant</a> might help clean the lungs and defeat the virus.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"709"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"70b","presentation":"70c"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"70d","publisher":"70e"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"70f"},"Garcia also described his experience immigrating to the U.S. as a young child.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"70h"},"\"Iâll never forget the day that I became a United States citizen. I raised my right hand and I pledge an oath to protect and to love this country. It was the proudest day of my life,\" Garcia said, adding that his mother instilled in him the notion that true patriotism \"is not about screaming and yelling America first.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"70j"},["704","706","708","70a","70g","70i","70k"],"Garcia criticized Trump over his handling of the virus, pointing to his suggestion that the âinjectionâ of disinfectant might help clean the lungs and defeat the virus.",["705","707","70m","70h","70j"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"70l","text":"70n"},"2024-08-19T23:56:03.017Z","2024-08-20T00:05:30.781Z",{"createdAt":"70p","publishedAt":"70p","modifiedAt":"70q"},{"primary":"339","seo":"339"},"Rep. Robert Garcia recalls Harris conversation after his parents died of Covid",{"primary":"70t","seo":"70t","social":"70t"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52533",{"primary":"70w"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"70y"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"710"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"712"},{"analysis":"70z","citations":"711","verdict":"713"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"6wd","authors":"6wp","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"70o","date":"70r","description":"70s","headline":"70u","presentation":"70v","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"70x","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"714","replies":"715"},"rcrd52535",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["718"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"71b","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["71g"],[],[],{"bio":"719","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"71a","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"71c","publisher":"71d","socialMediaProfiles":"71e","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"71f","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"71h","educationAndExpertise":"71i","awards":"71j"},["71k"],"Rich Logis once styled himself as an \"ultra-MAGA\" conservative commentator and Trump defender. He started a pro-Trump podcast, wrote for conservative media outlets and regularly assailed liberal Democrats.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"71m"},"But as Logis told Democratic delegates in a recorded video tonight, he \"finally stepped outside the MAGA echo chamber\" and \"looked around with my own eyes.\" He determined that Trump was a serial liar who failed the country in the early months of the Covid crisis.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"71o"},"Logis, speaking straight to the camera, delivered a pointed message to \"all the Republicans and independents\" watching the convention: \"I made a grave mistake, but it's never too late to change your mind.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"71q"},"He called on anti-Trump Republicans and independents to vote for the Harris-Walz ticket.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"71s"},["71n","71p","71r","71t"],["71m","71o","71q","71s"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"71u","text":"71v"},"2024-08-19T23:54:46.680Z","2024-08-20T00:01:19.102Z",{"createdAt":"71x","publishedAt":"71x","modifiedAt":"71y"},"Rich Logis once styled himself as an \"ultra-MAGA\" conservative commentator and Trump defender.",{"primary":"720","seo":"720"},"Ex-MAGA commentator calls on Republicans to leave 'MAGA echo chamber'",{"primary":"722","seo":"722","social":"722"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52535",{"primary":"725"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"727"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"729"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"72b"},{"analysis":"728","citations":"72a","verdict":"72c"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"717","authors":"71l","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"71w","date":"71z","description":"721","headline":"723","presentation":"724","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"726","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"72d","replies":"72e"},"rcrd52537",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6dx"},["72h"],["25e"],{"primary":"6e6"},{"altText":"6e5","height":"1h4","url":"72k","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"6ea","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"6ec","primary":"6ec","slug":"6ed"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ef"},["72p"],[],{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ej"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6el"},["72s","72t"],{"bio":"72i","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"6e0","id":"6e1","email":"6e2","jobTitle":"72j","name":"6e4","primaryImage":"72l","publisher":"72m","socialMediaProfiles":"72n","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"72o","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"72q","educationAndExpertise":"72r","awards":"72u"},["72v"],"Four people were arrested after the security breach during the March on the DNC protest this evening, Tom Ahern, the deputy director of communications for the Chicago Police Department, told NBC Chicago. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"72x"},["72y"],["72x"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"72z","text":"730"},"2024-08-19T23:53:42.077Z","2024-08-20T00:02:02.649Z",{"createdAt":"732","publishedAt":"732","modifiedAt":"733"},"Four people were arrested after the security breach during the March on the DNC protest this evening, Tom Ahern, the deputy director of communications for the C",{"primary":"735","seo":"735"},"4 arrests made after security breach during March on the DNC protest",{"primary":"737","seo":"737","social":"737"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52537",{"primary":"73a"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"73c"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"73e"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"73g"},{"analysis":"73d","citations":"73f","verdict":"73h"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"72g","authors":"72w","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"731","date":"734","description":"736","headline":"738","presentation":"739","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"73b","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"73i","replies":"73j"},"rcrd52532",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1gv"},["73m"],["1h1"],{"primary":"1h5"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"73p","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1ha","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1hd","primary":"1hd","slug":"1he"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1hg"},["73u"],[],[],{"bio":"73n","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1gy","id":"1gz","email":"1h0","jobTitle":"73o","name":"1h3","primaryImage":"73q","publisher":"73r","socialMediaProfiles":"73s","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"73t","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"73v","educationAndExpertise":"73w","awards":"73x"},["73y"],"It's rare to see a political discussion about Covid policy these days. Most Americans clearly want to turn the page, and the debate over pandemic response is a thorny one for both sides that usually has them on the defensive (Democrats over accusations that some of their policies infringed too much on personal freedoms and Republicans over the effort by many in their party to downplay the pandemic's impact and to cast doubt on the efficacy of vaccines). ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"740"},"That's why Monday's part of convention programming devoted to the Covid pandemic stuck out, showing how Democrats could try to go on offense on the issue if they chose to. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"742"},"Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan gave remarks with a nod to her brother, who she said was the \"second person to die of Covid in the state of Tennessee,\" remembering how she couldn't hold a proper memorial for him. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"744"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"746","presentation":"747"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"748","publisher":"749"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"74a"},"\"Our communities were suffering, our economy was struggling, and Donald Trump was playing games. Our country was brought to the brink by his failure to respond, but the Biden-Harris administration stepped in,\" she said. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"74c"},"Shortly after, the convention played a video featuring a series of comments by Trump downplaying the risk of the virus, floating the possibility of injecting disinfectant and tangling with an Axios reporter before saying: \"They are dying, it's true. It is what it is.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"74e"},"The video then pivots to Harris declaring that \"help is on the way,\" outlining the Biden-Harris administration's vaccine rollout and the return to normal that came with it for public life and businesses. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"74g"},"It's a road map for how Democrats could try to prosecute the Covid case against Trump and for their candidate if they want to. But it's also worth noting this discussion came before 8 p.m. ET, well before the prime-time coverage begins.  ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"74i"},{"type":"192","element":"5bq","html":"1a8"},["741","743","745","74b","74d","74f","74h","74j","74k"],["740","742","744","74c","74e","74g","74i"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"74l","text":"74m"},"2024-08-19T23:53:05.389Z","2024-08-20T00:03:38.400Z",{"createdAt":"74o","publishedAt":"74o","modifiedAt":"74p"},"It's rare to see a political discussion about Covid policy these days.",{"primary":"74r","seo":"74r"},"Covid takes a turn at center stage, but at a very early hour",{"primary":"74t","seo":"74t","social":"74t"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52532",{"primary":"74w"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"74y"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"750"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"752"},{"analysis":"74z","citations":"751","verdict":"753"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"73l","authors":"73z","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"74n","date":"74q","description":"74s","headline":"74u","presentation":"74v","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"74x","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"754","replies":"755"},"rcrd52525",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1iy"},["758"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1j7"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"75b","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1jb","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1jd","primary":"1jd","slug":"1je"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1jg"},["75g"],[],[],{"bio":"759","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1j1","id":"1j2","email":"1j3","jobTitle":"75a","name":"1j6","primaryImage":"75c","publisher":"75d","socialMediaProfiles":"75e","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"75f","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"75h","educationAndExpertise":"75i","awards":"75j"},["75k"],"Rep. Lauren Underwood, D-Ill., drew a contrast between the Trump administration's response to Covid and that of the Biden-Harris White House in her convention remarks.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"75m"},"She said that Trump \"failed us\" on Covid but that the Biden-Harris administration \"got it under control.\" She also argued that Trump turned Covid \"into a catastrophe.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"75o"},"mmvo217482309852","PT3M9S","Mon Aug 19 2024 23:57:58 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-19T23:57:55.000Z",{"publishedAt":"75t","createdAt":"75t"},"217482309852","f_mo_dnc_underwood_covid_crisis_240819",{"id":"75v","guid":"75w","externalAdvertiserId":"75w"},"Rep. Underwood: Trump turned Covid crisis into âcatastropheâ","Rep. Lauren Underwood criticizes Trump's Covid handling",{"primary":"75y","seo":"75z"},"Rep. Lauren Underwood criticized how former President Donald Trump handled the Covid-19 health crisis. Underwood said the Biden-Harris administration had it under control.Â ",{"primary":"761"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/now/video/rep-lauren-underwood-criticizes-trump-s-covid-handling-217482309852","rep-lauren-underwood-criticizes-trump-s-covid-handling-217482309852",{"canonical":"763","primary":"763","slug":"764"},"https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724111857802_f_mo_dnc_underwood_covid_crisis_240819.srt","https://nbcnewsdigital-static.nbcuni.com/media/captions/NBC_News_Digital/2024/08/1724111857802_f_mo_dnc_underwood_covid_crisis_240819.vtt",{"srt":"766","webvtt":"767"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/f_mo_dnc_underwood_covid_crisis_240819/1/abs/index.m3u8",188.857,4290000,{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"769","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"76a","bitrate":"76b"},"https://prodamdnewsencoding.akamaized.net/NBC_News_Digital/nbcnews/video/2024/08/1724111857802_f_mo_dnc_underwood_covid_crisis_240819_6.mp4",4290666,{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"76d","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"76a","bitrate":"76e"},["76c","76f"],"vidimg1691886755",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/mpx/2704722219/2024_08/240819-1920x1080-chicago-dnc-lauren-underwood-ac-955p__865244-1n7fp0.jpg",{"primary":"76j"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"76h","headline":"76i","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"76k","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"76l","authors":"76m","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"76j"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"76h","headline":"76o","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"76p","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"76q","authors":"76r","source":"1a8"},{"primary":"1al"},{"id":"1ao","guid":"1ap","externalAdvertiserId":"1ap"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","s d":"1ei","externalAdvertiserId":"1ei"},{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},{"primary":"1em"},{"publishedAt":"1ac","createdAt":"1ac","modifiedAt":"1ac"},[],{"id":"1ek","headline":"78n","caption":"1a8","altText":"1a8","url":"78o","encodingFormat":"1a8","height":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"78p","authors":"78q","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["78y","78z"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"78m","primaryImage":"78r","url":"78s","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"78t","description":"78u","publisher":"78v","source":"78w","closedCaptioning":"78x","videoAssets":"790"},["779","77p","785","78l","791"],{"headline":"76t","videos":"792"},{"id":"75q","type":"198","duration":"75r","dateBroadcast":"75s","date":"75u","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"75x","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"760","description":"762","url":"765","closedCaptioning":"768","videoAssets":"76g","primaryImage":"76n","teaseImage":"76s","associatedVideoPlaylist":"793"},{"type":"196","video":"794"},"Underwood drew on her experience as a registered nurse and brought up that she had a pre-existing condition. She also highlighted that she was the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, noting that she was \"painfully aware\" that Black women \"were more likely to die from Covid.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"796"},["75n","75p","795","797"],["75m","75o","796"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"798","text":"799"},"2024-08-19T23:45:36.156Z","2024-08-20T00:05:57.717Z",{"createdAt":"79b","publishedAt":"79b","modifiedAt":"79c"},{"primary":"339","seo":"339"},"Rep. Lauren Underwood: Trump 'failed us' on Covid",{"primary":"79f","seo":"79f","social":"79f"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52525",{"primary":"79i"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"79k"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"79m"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"79o"},{"analysis":"79l","citations":"79n","verdict":"79p"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"757","authors":"75l","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"79a","date":"79d","description":"79e","headline":"79g","presentation":"79h","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"79j","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"79q","replies":"79r"},"rcrd52528",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1x9"},["79u"],["1j4"],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1xh","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1xj","primary":"1xj","slug":"1xk"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1xm"},["7a0"],[],[],{"bio":"79v","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1xc","id":"1xd","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"79w","name":"1xf","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"79x","socialMediaProfiles":"79y","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"79z","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7a1","educationAndExpertise":"7a2","awards":"7a3"},["7a4"],"Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan heralded the convention's kickoff as a \"historic night\" in her convention speech tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7a6"},"\"We remember those who came before us, who fought and prayed this moment into existence, the suffragists and the abolitionists, the activists who fought for our rights, the leader who â the leaders who â paved the way for us,\" Flanagan said. \"Their memory reminds us that the fight for freedom always passes from one generation to the next.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7a8"},"rcim301414",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Minnesota Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan speaks at the convention.","Image: peggy flanagan politics political politician dnc","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-chicago-dnc-peggy-flanagan-ac-749p-adbe4e.jpg",{"primary":"7ae"},"2024-08-19T23:50:22.114Z",{"publishedAt":"7ag","createdAt":"7ag","modifiedAt":"7ag"},"J. Scott Applewhite",{"name":"7ai"},["7aj"],"AP",{"name":"7al"},{"id":"7aa","headline":"7ab","caption":"7ac","altText":"7ad","url":"7af","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5vg","width":"5tk","date":"7ah","authors":"7ak","source":"7am"},{"type":"1v2","image":"7an"},"Flanagan, <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-walz-win-make-minnesotas-peggy-flanagan-first-native-american-rcna165389\" target=\"_blank\">who also paid homage to her Native American heritage,</a> spoke fondly of Walz, whom she said she had worked with for nearly six years, describing him as a public servant who \"does it all with a big heart, a buffalo plaid jacket and a bottomless bag of snacks, Nutter Butters, cheese curds and diet Dew.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7ap"},"\"Any time we meet, he brings something for me, because heâs always got my back, and when heâs vice president, he will always have yours,\" she added.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7ar"},["7a7","7a9","7ao","7aq","7as"],"Flanagan, who also paid homage to her Native American heritage, spoke fondly of Walz, whom she said she had worked with for nearly six years, describing him as a public servant who \"does it all with a big heart, a buffalo plaid jacket and a bottomless bag of snacks, Nutter Butters, cheese curds and diet Dew.\" ",["7a6","7a8","7au","7ar"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7at","text":"7av"},"2024-08-19T23:44:30.797Z","2024-08-20T00:04:27.666Z",{"createdAt":"7ax","publishedAt":"7ax","modifiedAt":"7ay"},"Minnesota Lt. Gov.",{"primary":"7b0","seo":"7b0"},"Minnesotaâs lieutenant governor describes 'historic night,' praises Walz",{"primary":"7b2","seo":"7b2","social":"7b2"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52528",{"primary":"7b5"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7b7"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7b9"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7bb"},{"analysis":"7b8","citations":"7ba","verdict":"7bc"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"79t","authors":"7a5","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"7aw","date":"7az","description":"7b1","headline":"7b3","presentation":"7b4","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"7b6","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"7bd","replies":"7be"},"rcrd52529",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["7bh"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"7bk","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["7bp"],[],[],{"bio":"7bi","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"7bj","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"7bl","publisher":"7bm","socialMediaProfiles":"7bn","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"7bo","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7bq","educationAndExpertise":"7br","awards":"7bs"},["7bt"],"There won't be a formal roll call vote at the convention this week to nominate Harris for president because <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/dnc-chair-says-majority-delegates-voted-give-harris-democratic-nominat-rcna164743\" target=\"_blank\">delegates had done so virtually earlier this month</a>. Instead, the Rules Committee chair re-affirmed their nominations tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7bv"},"Tuesdayâs nominationÂ rollÂ callÂ votes will also include both in-person and remote elements designed to highlight the diversity of the party.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7bx"},"According to the convention organizers, theÂ rollÂ callÂ will begin with Delaware, as a tribute to  Biden, and end with California and Minnesota, home states of  Harris and Walz, respectively. There will be a âdiverse mix of storytellersâ participating in the delegation-by-delegation voting, some in person and some at remote sites. (Remember âCalamari Guyâ from Rhode Island four years ago?)",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7bz"},"Note that the convention isÂ calling this a âceremonialâ and âcelebratoryâÂ rollÂ call, after they held a virtualÂ rollÂ callÂ to make Harris the official nominee that concluded earlier this month..",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7c1"},["7bw","7by","7c0","7c2"],"There won't be a formal roll call vote at the convention this week to nominate Harris for president because delegates had done so virtually earlier this month. Instead, the Rules Committee chair re-affirmed their nominations tonight.",["7c4","7bx","7bz","7c1"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7c3","text":"7c5"},"2024-08-19T23:39:47.175Z","2024-08-20T00:53:01.044Z",{"createdAt":"7c7","publishedAt":"7c7","modifiedAt":"7c8"},"There won't be a formal roll call vote at the convention this week to nominate Harris for president because delegates had done so virtually earlier this month.",{"primary":"7ca","seo":"7ca"},"DNC won't formally vote to nominate Harris or Walz because it was done virtually ",{"primary":"7cc","seo":"7cc","social":"7cc"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52529",{"primary":"7cf"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7ch"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7cj"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7cl"},{"analysis":"7ci","citations":"7ck","verdict":"7cm"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"7bg","authors":"7bu","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"7c6","date":"7c9","description":"7cb","headline":"7cd","presentation":"7ce","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"7cg","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"7cn","replies":"7co"},"rcrd52530","Kevin
