Collier.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_41/3665021/241008-kevin-collier.jpg",{"primary":"7cy"},{"altText":"7cx","height":"1h4","url":"7cz","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/kevin-collier-ncpn1110251","kevin-collier-ncpn1110251",{"canonical":"7d3","primary":"7d3","slug":"7d4"},[],[],[],{"bio":"7ct","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"7cu","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"7cv","name":"7cw","primaryImage":"7d0","publisher":"7d1","socialMediaProfiles":"7d2","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"7d5","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7d6","educationAndExpertise":"7d7","awards":"7d8"},["7d9"],"The U.S. government has formally endorsed Trumpâs claim that Iran hacked his campaign.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7db"},"In aÂ <a href=\"https://www.fbi.gov/news/press-releases/joint-odni-fbi-and-cisa-statement-on-iranian-election-influence-efforts\" target=\"_blank\">joint statement</a>Â today, the FBI, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence said Iran was behind attempts this year to hack presidential campaigns of both political parties.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7dd"},"The same hackers were alleged by Google to have targeted the Biden-Harris campaign before President Joe Biden ended his run for re-election, but itâs not clear whether they were breached. Democratic nominee Kamala Harrisâ campaign previously said it had no indication it was hacked.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7df"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/tech/security/us-confirms-trump-campaign-claim-was-breached-iranian-hackers-rcna167285\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7dh"},["7dc","7de","7dg","7di"],"In aÂ joint statementÂ today, the FBI, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence said Iran was behind attempts this year to hack presidential campaigns of both political parties.","Read the full story here.",["7db","7dk","7df","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7dj","text":"7dm"},"2024-08-19T23:38:36.898Z","2024-08-19T23:40:55.672Z",{"createdAt":"7do","publishedAt":"7do","modifiedAt":"7dp"},{"primary":"7db","seo":"7db"},"U.S. confirms Trump campaign claim it was breached by Iranian hackers Rules Committee co-chair, Bishop Leah Daughtry,Â joked in her remarks that Walz is a \"little occupied this evening\" but said, \"It's good to know that serving as co-chair of the Rules Committee is a ladder for promotion.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7el"},"Walz was a co-chair of the convention Rules Committee before Harris selected him to be her running ":"1a8","width":"1a8","date":"7iu","authors":"7iv","source":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1er","primary":"1er","slug":"1es"},{"primary":"1ev","seo":"1ev"},{"primary":"1ex"},{"name":"1b7"},{"name":"1f0"},{"srt":"1f2","webvtt":"1f3"},{"assetType":"19t","format":"19u","publicUrl":"1f5","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1f7"},{"assetType":"1a1","format":"1a2","publicUrl":"1f9","height":"19w","width":"19x","assetDuration":"1f6","bitrate":"1fa"},["7j3","7j4"],{"type":"198","id":"1eg","mpxMetadata":"7ir","primaryImage":"7iw","url":"7ix","duration":"1eu","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"7iy","description":"7iz","publisher":"7j0","source":"7j1","closedCaptioning":"7j2","videoAssets":"7j5"},["7he","7hu","7ia","7iq","7j6"],{"headline":"7gy","videos":"7j7"},{"id":"7g0","type":"198","duration":"75r","dateBroadcast":"7g1","date":"7g3","liveVideoStatus":"19d","playable":"18x","mpxMetadata":"7g6","sentiment":"19h","videoType":"1b2","headline":"7g8","description":"7ga","url":"7gd","closedCaptioning":"7ge","videoAssets":"7gl","primaryImage":"7gs","teaseImage":"7gx","associatedVideoPlaylist":"7j8"},{"type":"196","video":"7j9"},"Waters said Hammer was 22 years old when she arrived with the group from Mississippi. She told the people in the room about the violence she endured at the hands of police when she demanded the right to vote. When she asked the convention, \"Is this America?\" she did not get the answer she hoped for, Waters said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7jb"},"Sixty years later, as Democrats prepare to nominate the country's first Black woman to be the party's nominee, Hamer's legacy can serve as a reminder of how far we've come, Waters said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7jd"},"\"We will be able to ask ourselves, 'Is this America?' And we will be able to say loudly and proudly â 'Youâre damn right it is.'\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7jf"},["7fz","7ja","7jc","7je","7jg"],["7fy","7jb","7jd","7jf"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7jh","text":"7ji"},"2024-08-19T23:26:29.648Z","2024-08-19T23:51:25.347Z",{"createdAt":"7jk","publishedAt":"7jk","modifiedAt":"7jl"},{"primary":"339","seo":"339"},"Rep. Maxine Waters pays tribute to civil rights icon",{"primary":"7jo","seo":"7jo","social":"7jo"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52523",{"primary":"7jr"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7jt"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7jv"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7jx"},{"analysis":"7ju","citations":"7jw","verdict":"7jy"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"7fb","authors":"7fx","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"7jj","date":"7jm","description":"7jn","headline":"7jp","presentation":"7jq","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"7js","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"7jz","replies":"7k0"},"rcrd52524",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["7k3"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"7k6","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["7kb"],[],[],{"bio":"7k4","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"7k5","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"7k7","publisher":"7k8","socialMediaProfiles":"7k9","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"7ka","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7kc","educationAndExpertise":"7kd","awards":"7ke"},["7kf"],"The Rev. Jesse Jackson, an icon of the American civil rights movement and a former Democratic presidential contender, took the stage to sustained applause and standing ovations.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7kh"},"Jackson, 82, was seated in a wheelchair and accompanied by other prominent Black leaders, including the Rev. Al Sharpton (who hosts a show on MSNBC) and NAACP President Derrick Johnson.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7kj"},"mmvo217480773951","PT1M40S","Mon Aug 19 2024 23:29:08 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-19T23:29:05.000Z",{"publishedAt":"7ko","createdAt":"7ko"},"217480773951","f_mo_dnc_revjackson_appear_240819",{"id":"7kq","guid":"7kr","externalAdvertiserId":"7kr"},"Rev. Jesse Jackson met with a standing ovation at the Democratic National Convention",{"primary":"7kt","seo":"7kt"},"Rev. Jesse Jackson made an appearance at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago surrounded by fellow civil rights did not deliver remarks, but he smiled and waved to the crowd. He appeared after a short video highlighting the party's legacy on civil rights.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7o0"},"Jackson and Biden were both presidential candidates in the 1988 Democratic presidential primaries. Jackson came in third in the primaries; Biden dropped out before voting started amid accusations of plagiarism. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7o2"},["7ki","7kk","7nz","7o1","7o3"],["7kh","7kj","7o0","7o2"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7o4","text":"7o5"},"2024-08-19T23:21:29.709Z","2024-08-19T23:40:27.249Z",{"createdAt":"7o7","publishedAt":"7o7","modifiedAt":"7o8"},"The must all understand Black history is American history. And in this historic moment, we will write the next chapter together,\" he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7sn"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"7sp","presentation":"7sq"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"7sr","publisher":"7ss"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"7st"},"During the June presidential debate, Trump said of immigrants: \"Theyâre taking Black jobs, and theyâre taking Hispanic jobs, and you havenât seen it yet, but youâre going to see something thatâs going to be the worst in our history.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7sv"},"Melanie Campbell, president and CEO of the National Coalition on Black Civic Participation, said tonight, \"We have come this far by faith, and for Black women, this moment has been a long time coming.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7sx"},"Campbell said that Harris' path to the nomination was paved by Black women like Shirley Chisholm, Ella Baker and Diane Nash.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7sz"},["7p6","7p8","7sm","7so","7su","7sw","7sy","7t0"],"NAACP President Derrick Johnson began his convention remarks by taking a dig at one of Trump's recent remarks.",["7t2","7p7","7sn","7sv","7sx","7sz"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7t1","text":"7t3"},"2024-08-19T23:18:00.296Z","2024-08-19T23:49:14.465Z",{"createdAt":"7t5","publishedAt":"7t5","modifiedAt":"7t6"},"NAACP President Derrick Johnson began his convention remarks by taking a dig at one of Trump's recent remarks. \"I'm here to do my Black job,\" Johnson said. \"We",{"primary":"7t8","seo":"7t8"},"NAACP president says he's here to do his 'Black job'",{"primary":"7ta","seo":"7ta","social":"7ta"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52521",{"primary":"7td"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7tf"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7th"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7tj"},{"analysis":"7tg","citations":"7ti","verdict":"7tk"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"7oq","authors":"7p4","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"7t4","date":"7t7","description":"7t9","headline":"7tb","presentation":"7tc","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"7te","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"7tl","replies":"7tm"},"rcrd52520",[],"ncpn1002876",[],"Freddie Tunnard",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},[],[],[],{"bio":"7tp","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"7tq","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"7tr","name":"7ts","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"7tt","socialMediaProfiles":"7tu","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1a8","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7tv","educationAndExpertise":"7tw","awards":"7tx"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1mc"},["7tz"],[],{"primary":"1mj"},{"altText":"1mi","height":"1h4","url":"7u2","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1mo","primary":"1mo","slug":"1mp"},[],[],[],{"bio":"7u0","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1mf","email":"1mg","jobTitle":"7u1","name":"1mi","primaryImage":"7u3","publisher":"7u4","socialMediaProfiles":"7u5","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"7u6","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7u7","educationAndExpertise":"7u8","awards":"7u9"},["7ty","7ua"],"The buses bringing delegates to the Democratic National Convention this evening were delayed by protests, according to a DNC official riding one of the buses.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7uc"},"Demonstrators breached part of the anti-scaling fencing on the outer perimeter near the United Center, the DNC Public Safety Joint Information Center said in a joint statement. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7ue"},"\"Law enforcement personnel were immediately on-scene and contained the situation,\" the statement read. \"At no point was the inner perimeter breached, and there was no threat to any protectees.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7ug"},"Per the statement, there are multiple \"redundancies\" in the security plan, one of which is the outer perimeter.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7ui"},"\"The Chicago Police Department remains on-scene and is working to clear the area,\" the statement read.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7uk"},["7ud","7uf","7uh","7uj","7ul"],["7uc","7ue","7ug","7ui","7uk"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7um","text":"7un"},"2024-08-19T23:06:41.924Z","2024-08-19T23:41:57.783Z",{"createdAt":"7up","publishedAt":"7up","modifiedAt":"7uq"},{"primary":"7uc","seo":"7uc"},"Delegate buses arriving at the DNC delayed by protests; outer security perimeter breached",{"primary":"7ut","seo":"7ut","social":"7ut"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52520",{"primary":"7uw"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7uy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7v0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7v2"},{"analysis":"7uz","citations":"7v1","verdict":"7v3"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"7to","authors":"7ub","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"7uo","date":"7ur","description":"7us","headline":"7uu","presentation":"7uv","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"7ux","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"7v4","replies":"7v5"},"rcrd52518",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["7v8"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"7vb","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["7vg"],[],[],{"bio":"7v9","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"7va","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"7vc","publisher":"7vd","socialMediaProfiles":"7ve","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"7vf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7vh","educationAndExpertise":"7vi","awards":"7vj"},["7vk"],"A pair of leaders from the Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation Tribal CouncilÂ began the night of speeches by praising the Biden-Harris administration for what it did to help their people reclaim land. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7vm"},"rcim301406",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Lorrie Melchior, tribal council secretary of the Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation, and tribal council Vice Chairman Zach Pahmahmie during the first day of the Democratic National Convention in Chicago on Monday.","Image: 2024 Democratic National Convention: Day 1 Lorrie Melchior Zach Pahmahmie ","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Lorrie-Melchior-Zach-Pahmahmie-dnc-ac-706p-522ad9.jpg",{"primary":"7vs"},"2024-08-19T23:07:49.408Z",{"publishedAt":"7vu","createdAt":"7vu","modifiedAt":"7vu"},"Chip Somodevilla",{"name":"7vw"},["7vx"],"Getty Images",{"name":"7vz"},{"id":"7vo","headline":"7vp","caption":"7vq","altText":"7vr","url":"7vt","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5vg","width":"5tk","date":"7vv","authors":"7vy","source":"7w0"},{"type":"1v2","image":"7w1"},"Zach Pahmahmi, vice chair of the council, said that in 1849, an illegal auction by the U.S. government forcibly removed the tribe from its homeland. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7w3"},"\"Since then, we have been working to reclaim it. Finally, this year, the Department of the Interior placed some of our ancestral lands west of Chicago into a trust,\" he said. \"Thanks to the resolve of our tribal community and the Biden-Harris administration, we reclaimed a piece of our home. We became the only federally recognized tribal nation in Illinois in 175 years.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7w5"},["7vn","7w2","7w4","7w6"],["7vm","7w3","7w5"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7w7","text":"7w8"},"2024-08-19T22:49:29.942Z","2024-08-19T23:43:23.847Z",{"createdAt":"7wa","publishedAt":"7wa","modifiedAt":"7wb"},"A pair of leaders from the Prairie Band Potawatomi Nation Tribal CouncilÂ began the night of speeches by praising the Biden-Harris administration for what it",{"primary":"7wd","seo":"7wd"},"Tribal leaders begin night of speeches by praising Biden-Harris administration",{"primary":"7wf","seo":"7wf","social":"7wf"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52518",{"primary":"7wi"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7wk"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7wm"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"7wo"},{"analysis":"7wl","citations":"7wn","verdict":"7wp"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"7v7","authors":"7vl","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"7w9","date":"7wc","description":"7we","headline":"7wg","presentation":"7wh","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"7wj","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"7wq","replies":"7wr"},"rcrd52517",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"258"},["7wu"],["25e"],{"primary":"25h"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"7wx","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"25l","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"25n","primary":"25n","slug":"25o"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25q"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25s"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25u"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25y"},["7x2","7x3","7x4","7x5","7x6"],[],{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"262"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"264"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"267"},["7x9","7xa","7xb","7xc"],{"bio":"7wv","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"25b","id":"25c","email":"25d","jobTitle":"7ww","name":"25g","primaryImage":"7wy","publisher":"7wz","socialMediaProfiles":"7x0","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"7x1","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"7x7","educationAndExpertise":"7x8","awards":"7xd"},["7xe"],"The convention is officially kicking off, albeit 15 minutes late, with remarks by convention Chair Minyon Moore and Democratic National Committee Chairman Jaime Harrison. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7xg"},"In her opening remarks, Moore paid tribute to Biden in \"passing the torch\" to Harris as the presumptive party nominee.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7xi"},"rcim301400",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Jaime Harrison, chairman of the Democratic National Committee, and Minyon Moore, chair of the Democratic National Convention Committee, officially open the first day of the Democratic convention.","Image: 2024 Democratic National Convention: Day convention is officially kicking off, albeit 15 minutes late, with remarks by convention Chair Minyon Moore and Democratic National Committee Chairman Jaime",{"primary":"7y3","seo":"7y3"},"DNC starts 15 minutes â Vice President Kamala Harris is calling for raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, her first major proposal to raise revenues and finance expensive plans she wants to pursue as president.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7yy"},"rcim300751",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Kamala Harris in Raleigh, N.C., on Friday.","Kamala campaign spokesman James Singer told NBC News that she would push for a 28% corporate tax rate, calling it âa fiscally responsible way to put money back in the pockets of working people and ensure billionaires and big corporations pay their fair share.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7ze"},"âAs President, Kamala Harris will focus on creating an opportunity economy for the middle class that advances their economic security, stability, and dignity,â Singer wrote in an email.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"7zg"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-proposes-raising-corporate-tax-rate-28-rolling-back-trump-law-rcna167208\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story raising the corporate tax rate to 28%, rolling back a Trump law told a CBS news reporter tonight that he plans to release his medical records. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"80l"},"The Republican presidential nominee, who has not released a medical report since the attempt on his life last month, made the commitment during <a href=\"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-insults-harris-intelligence-medical-records-tv-exclusive/?ftag=CNM-00-10aab7e&linkId=555037424\" target=\"_blank\">an interview in Pennsylvania</a>, where he is campaigning.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"80n"},"rcim301031",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Former President Donald Trump, in Wilkes-Barre, Pa., on Saturday","Trump in Pennsylvania","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-trump-mb-1325-c4e098.jpg",{"primary":"80t"},"2024-08-19T12:26:18.204Z","2024-09-05T02:39:41.155Z",{"publishedAt":"80v","createdAt":"80v","modifiedAt":"80w"},"Carolyn Kaster",{"name":"80y"},["80z"],"AP file",{"name":"811"},{"id":"80p","headline":"80q","caption":"80r","altText":"80s","url":"80u","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5vg","width":"5tk","date":"80x","authors":"810","source":"812"},{"type":"1v2","image":"813"},"âYou will release your medical records to the public?â CBS News reporter Caitlin Huey-Burns asked the former president.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"815"},"Trump replied: âOh, sure, I would do that very gladly, sure.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"817"},"He said he just had a medical exam and received a \"perfect score,\" as well as two cognitive tests, which he said he \"aced.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"819"},"Trump has faced pressure to release his medical records throughout the election cycle. He did not specify when or how he would transmit the records to the public. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"81b"},["80m","80o","814","816","818","81a","81c"],"The Republican presidential nominee, who has not released a medical report since the attempt on his life last "82k","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"82l","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"82n","educationAndExpertise":"82o","awards":"82r"},["82d","82s"],"Police with helmets and batons approached a group of breakaway protesters demonstrating outside the DNC venue in Chicago.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"82u"},"They ordered the protesters who breached the barricade to leave. Dozens did, but dozens remained and were pushed to the left and crushed upon by police in riot gear.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"82w"},"Some protesters threw signs at the riot police while the riot police continued to advance on the group of several dozen protesters. After that, it appeared police made at least one arrest.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"82y"},"Police cleared the entire area between both barriers, but protesters on the outside continued to yell at riot police and continued to attempt to take down the gates.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"830"},"rcim301386",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Police with helmets and batons approach the breakaway group of protesters in Chicago breached a barricade and refused to leave",{"primary":"83p","seo":"83p","social":"83p"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52513",{"primary":"83s"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"83u"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"83w"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"83y"},{"analysis":"83v","citations":"83x","verdict":"83z"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"820","authors":"82t","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"83j","date":"83m","description":"83o","headline":"83q","presentation":"83r","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"83t","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"840","replies":"841"},"rcrd52459","I am an award-winning reporter and New York Times-bestselling author covering national politics for NBC News. I am currently focused on the 2024 presidential campaign and also contribute coverage of the White House, Congress and national political issues.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"844"},["845"],"Jonathan Allen is a senior national politics reporter for NBC News. ","ncpn802641","jon.allen@nbcuni.com","Senior National Politics Reporter",["84a"],"Jonathan Allen","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_26/3653033/230226-jonathan-allen.jpg",{"primary":"84d"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"84e","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"https://www.instagram.com/jonallendc/","@jonallendc",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"84h","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"84i","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/jonathan-allen-ncpn802641","jonathan-allen-ncpn802641",{"canonical":"84k","primary":"84k","slug":"84l"},"I am a co-author of three books on politics â \"HRC,\" \"Shattered\" and \"Lucky\" âÂ  a former Washington bureau chief for Bloomberg News and a former White House bureau chief for Politico. Before those gigs, I spent more than a decade covering Capitol Hill for Congressional Quarterly, The Hill and Politico. In addition to reporting and writing books, I am an adjunct professor at Northwestern University. I appear frequently on MSNBC and News Now.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"84n"},["84o"],[],"I am a recipient of the National Press Foundation's Everett McKinley Dirksen Award and the National Press Club's Sandy Hume Award.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"84r"},["84s"],{"bio":"846","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"847","id":"848","email":"849","jobTitle":"84b","name":"84c","primaryImage":"84f","publisher":"84g","socialMediaProfiles":"84j","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"84m","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"84p","educationAndExpertise":"84q","awards":"84t"},["84u"],"Before she became the presumptive Democratic nominee for president, there was a perception of <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/kamala-harris\" target=\"_blank\">Harris</a>Â among party elites and Washington insiders that she might not have what it takes to mobilize voters.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"84w"},"Her approval ratings were low. Sheâd been criticized not just by Republicans, but also by fellow Democrats, for miscues in her early days in the No. 2 job in government. She couldnât keep staff.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"84y"},"But while the Beltway set cemented its take on her, Harris built<strong>Â </strong>a formidable political network across the country and online. Her direct engagement with tens of thousands of political activists and voters â particularly through a tour of college campuses, events promoting reproductive rights and pushing an economic-empowerment agenda tilted toward the Black community â positioned Harris to<strong>Â </strong>energize her party when she was tapped to top the ticket.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"850"},"In other words, there was a ready core of Harris supporters ready to jump into action.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"852"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/president-harris-built-ground-force-travels-rcna165105\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"854"},["84x","84z","851","853","855"],"Before she became the presumptive Democratic nominee for president, there was a perception of HarrisÂ among party elites and Washington insiders that she might not have what it takes to mobilize voters.","But while the Beltway set cemented its take on her, Harris builtÂ a formidable political network across the country and online. Her direct engagement with tens of thousands of political activists and voters â particularly through a tour of college campuses, events promoting reproductive rights and pushing an economic-empowerment agenda tilted toward the Black community â positioned Harris toÂ energize her party when she was tapped to top the ticket.",["857","84y","858","852","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"856","text":"859"},"2024-08-19T22:00:35.027Z","2024-08-19T22:03:26.333Z",{"createdAt":"85b","publishedAt":"85b","modifiedAt":"85c"},"Before she became the presumptive Democratic nominee for president, there was a perception of HarrisÂ among party elites and Washington insiders that she might",{"primary":"85e","seo":"85e"},"How Harris built her political network as vice president singer-songwriter and self-described \"lifelong Democrat\" James Taylor is slated to perform Monday night following first lady Jill Biden's address. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"86h"},"Taylor played at the DNC in 2012 when then President Barack Obama ran for a second term. Speaking to reporters after his performance, Taylor said supporting Democrats has been a big part of his life and career.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"86j"},["86i","86k"],["86h","86j"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"86l","text":"86m"},"2024-08-19T21:54:29.685Z","2024-08-19T21:58:42.971Z",{"createdAt":"86o","publishedAt":"86o","modifiedAt":"86p"},"Legendary singer-songwriter and self-described \"lifelong Democrat\" James Taylor is slated to perform Monday night following first lady Jill Biden's address.",{"primary":"86r","seo":"86r"},"James Taylor to close out first night of DNC",{"primary":"86t","seo":"86t","social":"86t"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52510",{"primary":"86w"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"86y"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"870"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"872"},{"analysis":"86z","citations":"871","verdict":"873"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"85u","authors":"86g","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"86n","date":"86q","description":"86s","headline":"86u","presentation":"86v","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"86x","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"874","replies":"875"},"rcrd52512",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["878"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"87b","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["87g"],[],[],{"bio":"879","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"87a","name":"5un","primaryImage":"87c","publisher":"87d","socialMediaProfiles":"87e","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"87f","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"87h","educationAndExpertise":"87i","awards":"87j"},["87k"],"Police were closing in on a breakaway group after some protesters took down a barrier and crossed it, putting them a block away from the DNC arena.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"87m"},"Protest organizers continued to attempt to usher people out of the area and back onto the marchâs planned route â but they were unsuccessful.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"87o"},"In the area between two barricades distancing the protesters from the arena, a group of several dozen police officers have emerged and have formed a wall of bodies apparently designed to prevent the protesters from advancing forward.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"87q"},"The official march then began walkingÂ again. It appearred to be an effort by organizers to move the growing crowd away from the barricades. The effort was not successful as the breakaway group of protesters locked arms and was in a stand off with police.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"87s"},["87n","87p","87r","87t"],["87m","87o","87q","87s"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"87u","text":"87v"},"2024-08-19T21:53:49.960Z",{"createdAt":"87x","publishedAt":"87x","modifiedAt":"87x"},{"primary":"87m","seo":"87m"},"Police officers form wall to block breakaway protesters ",{"primary":"880","seo":"880","social":"880"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52512",{"primary":"883"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"885"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"887"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"889"},{"analysis":"886","citations":"888","verdict":"88a"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"877","authors":"87l","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"87w","date":"87y","description":"87z","headline":"881","presentation":"882","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"884","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"88b","replies":"88c"},"rcrd52508",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1kv"},["88f"],["1l1"],{"primary":"1l5"},{"altText":"1l4","height":"1h4","url":"88i","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1l9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1lb","primary":"1lb","slug":"1lc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1le"},["88n"],[],[],{"bio":"88g","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1ky","id":"1kz","email":"1l0","jobTitle":"88h","name":"1l3","primaryImage":"88j","publisher":"88k","socialMediaProfiles":"88l","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"88m","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"88o","educationAndExpertise":"88p","awards":"88q"},["88r"],"Fresh off winning an Olympic gold medal, Golden State Warriors coach and nine-time NBA champion Steve Kerr is slated to address the convention tonight, according to a program schedule.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"88t"},"Kerr, who has endorsed the Harris-Walz ticket, frequently uses his public platform to weigh in on political issues. He has criticized Trump for incendiary comments about women and people of color. He has lobbied for tighter federal gun control measures and advocated for racial justice.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"88v"},"Chicago happens to be symbolically meaningful for Kerr, who won three NBA championships as a player on the Chicago Bulls. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"88x"},"Kerr most recently coached the U.S. men's basketball team to its fifth consecutive gold medal at the Paris Olympics. He is slated to speak before remarks from United Automobile Workers president Shawn Fain and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"88z"},["88u","88w","88y","890"],["88t","88v","88x","88z"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"891","text":"892"},"2024-08-19T21:45:03.998Z",{"createdAt":"894","publishedAt":"894","modifiedAt":"894"},"Fresh off winning an Olympic gold medal, Golden State Warriors coach and nine-time NBA champion Steve Kerr is slated to address the convention tonight,",{"primary":"896","seo":"896"},"NBA great Steve Kerr on the speakers lineup tonight",{"primary":"898","seo":"898","social":"898"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52508",{"primary":"89b"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"89d"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"89f"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"89h"},{"analysis":"89e","citations":"89g","verdict":"89i"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"88e","authors":"88s","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"893","date":"895","description":"897","headline":"899","presentation":"89a","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"89c","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"89j","replies":"89k"},"rcrd52509",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["89n"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"89q","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["89v"],[],[],{"bio":"89o","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"89p","name":"5un","primaryImage":"89r","publisher":"89s","socialMediaProfiles":"89t","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"89u","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"89w","educationAndExpertise":"89x","awards":"89y"},"Selina Guevara is an NBC News field producer, based in Chicago.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8a0"},["8a1"],"ncpn1302441","Selina.Guevara@nbcuni.com","Associate producer",["8a5"],"Selina Guevara",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@selinaguevaraTV",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"8a9","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/selina-guevara-ncpn1302441","selina-guevara-ncpn1302441",{"canonical":"8ab","primary":"8ab","slug":"8ac"},[],[],[],{"bio":"8a2","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"8a3","email":"8a4","jobTitle":"8a6","name":"8a7","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"8a8","socialMediaProfiles":"8aa","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8ad","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8ae","educationAndExpertise":"8af","awards":"8ag"},["89z","8ah"],"After aggressively shaking the security barrier on the southern edge of Park #578 â the last point of the park before a parking lot adjacent to the United Center â a few dozen protesters have taken down part of the barrier.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8aj"},"Protesters have climbed up a jersey barrier and continue to jostle the security fence loose. Several dozen police are looking on.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8al"},"rcim301381",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Protesters gather inside of Park #578, just a block from the United Center.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protests-se-544p-f9fa2e.jpg",{"primary":"8aq"},1666,"2024-08-19T21:45:02.971Z",{"publishedAt":"8at","createdAt":"8at","modifiedAt":"8at"},{"name":"5un"},["8av"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"8an","headline":"8ao","caption":"8ap","altText":"1ac","url":"8ar","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"8as","width":"5tk","date":"8au","authors":"8aw","source":"8ax"},{"type":"1v2","image":"8ay"},"Protesters have now entered through the barrier into a street. On the other side of the street is another barrier. Police are on the other side of that barrier.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8b0"},"West Washington Blvd was protected on both sides by security fences to serve as a buffer between Park 578 and the United Center where the DNC is taking place.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8b2"},"The group of protesters took down the fencing on the south side of the street and took over that protected street.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8b4"},"March organizers are demanding that the protesters who have taken down the barriers stop their activity and continue marching.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8b6"},"Two protesters are now throwing bottles of water over the second fence at police officers.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8b8"},["8ak","8am","8az","8b1","8b3","8b5","8b7","8b9"],["8aj","8al","8b0","8b2","8b4","8b6","8b8"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ba","text":"8bb"},"2024-08-19T21:40:05.966Z","2024-08-19T22:25:20.745Z",{"createdAt":"8bd","publishedAt":"8bd","modifiedAt":"8be"},"After aggressively shaking the security barrier on the southern edge of Park #578 â the last point of the park before a parking lot adjacent to the United Cente",{"primary":"8bg","seo":"8bg"},"Protesters take down part of barrier separating march from DNC arena",{"primary":"8bi","seo":"8bi","social":"8bi"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52509",{"primary":"8bl"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8bn"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8bp"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8br"},{"analysis":"8bo","citations":"8bq","verdict":"8bs"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"89m","authors":"8ai","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8bc","date":"8bf","description":"8bh","headline":"8bj","presentation":"8bk","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8bm","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"8bt","replies":"8bu"},"rcrd52460","I Santos.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8bx"},["8by"],"Dareh Gregorian is a politics reporter for NBC News.","ncpn925686","Dareh.Gregorian@nbcuni.com",["1j4"],"Dareh Gregorian","Image: Dareh worked at the New York Post and Daily News, where I mainly covered courts and major breaking news events, including the 9/11 terror attack and its aftermath.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8cf"},["8cg"],[],"I've been a part of teams that have won numerous awards from the New York Associated Press Association for in-depth, spot and online Rubin is a senior legal reporter at MSNBC and a former litigator. Previously, she was the off-air legal analyst for âThe Rachel Maddow Showâ and âAlex Wagner Tonight.âÂ ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8cn"},["8co"],"ncpn1134441",[],"Lisa Jarrett is a senior legal correspondent for NBC News.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8d9"},["8da"],"ncpn1302443","Laura.Jarrett@nbcuni.com",[],"Laura Jarrett",2756,"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_07/3638982/240215-laura-jarrett-headshot-mb-1422.jpg",{"primary":"8dh"},4134,{"altText":"8df","height":"8dg","url":"8di","width":"8dj"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/laura-jarrett-ncpn1302443","laura-jarrett-ncpn1302443",{"canonical":"8dn","primary":"8dn","slug":"8do"},[],[],[],{"bio":"8db","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"8d9","id":"8dc","email":"8dd","jobTitle":"8de","name":"8df","primaryImage":"8dk","publisher":"8dl","socialMediaProfiles":"8dm","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8dp","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8dq","educationAndExpertise":"8dr","awards":"8ds"},["8cm","8d8","8dt"],"Prosecutors from the Manhattan district attorneyâs office said today they will defer to the judge on former President Donald Trumpâs bid to<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/trump-attorneys-ask-delay-sentencing-hush-money-case-election-rcna166751\" target=\"_blank\"> delay, </a>until after the election,<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/trump-attorneys-ask-delay-sentencing-hush-money-case-election-rcna166751\" target=\"_blank\"> his sentencing </a>on falsifying business records charges.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8dv"},"The sentencing hearing is scheduled for Sept. 18 â two days after New York state Judge Juan Merchan is expected to rule on Trumpâs motion to toss out his conviction in May in light of the U.S. Supreme Courtâs <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/supreme-court/supreme-court-rules-trump-may-immunity-federal-election-inter-rcna149135\" target=\"_blank\">decision on presidential immunity</a> in a different case. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8dx"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"8dz","presentation":"8e0"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"8e1","publisher":"8e2"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"8e3"},"Prosecutors said they would âdefer to the Court on the appropriate post-trial schedule that allows for adequate time to adjudicate defendantâs CPL Â§ 330.30 motion while also pronouncing sentence âwithout unreasonable delay,ââ referring to Trumpâs motion to set aside the verdict.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8e5"},"They noted that Trumpâs request is about evidentiary issues, not immunity from prosecution, and that the Supreme Court did not address whether evidentiary rulings that touch on immunity are immediately appealable. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8e7"},"They also flagged that the logistical and security measures the court would have to take to prepare for Trumpâs sentencing could be upended if, as Trump has suggested he would, he seeks appellate intervention right after Merchan rules on Sept. 16 on the request to set aside the verdict.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8e9"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/prosecutors-trump-sentencing-delay-hush-money-election-rcna166813\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8eb"},["8dw","8dy","8e4","8e6","8e8","8ea","8ec"],"Prosecutors from the Manhattan district attorneyâs office said today they will defer to the judge on former President Donald Trumpâs bid to delay, until after the election, his sentencing on falsifying business records charges.","The sentencing hearing is scheduled for Sept. 18 â two days after New York state Judge Juan Merchan is expected to rule on Trumpâs motion to toss out his conviction in May in light of the U.S. Supreme Courtâs decision on presidential immunity in a different case. ",["8ee","8ef","8e5","8e7","8e9","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ed","text":"8eg"},"2024-08-19T21:21:10.386Z","2024-08-19T21:26:24.492Z",{"createdAt":"8ei","publishedAt":"8ei","modifiedAt":"8ej"},"Prosecutors from the Manhattan district attorneyâs office said today they will defer to the judge on former President Donald Trumpâs bid to delay, until after",{"primary":"8el","seo":"8el"},"Prosecutors defer to judge on Trump sentencing delay in hush money case",{"primary":"8en","seo":"8en","social":"8en"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52460",{"primary":"8eq"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8es"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8eu"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ew"},{"analysis":"8et","citations":"8ev","verdict":"8ex"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8bw","authors":"8du","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8eh","date":"8ek","description":"8em","headline":"8eo","presentation":"8ep","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8er","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"8ey","replies":"8ez"},"rcrd52506",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["8f2"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"8f5","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["8fa"],[],[],{"bio":"8f3","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"8f4","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"8f6","publisher":"8f7","socialMediaProfiles":"8f8","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8f9","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8fb","educationAndExpertise":"8fc","awards":"8fd"},["8fe"],"In a walk-through of the convention hall this afternoon, Biden briefly responded to shouted questions from reporters as he stood at the podium onstage.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8fg"},"Asked if it was a bittersweet moment for him, Biden said, \"It's a memorable moment.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8fi"},"And when asked what he makes of Trump's claims that Biden was pushed out of the presidential race in what amounts to a coup, the president said, âHis stability is still in question.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8fk"},"Biden also said he is also ready to pass the torch to Harris, saying, \"I am.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8fm"},["8fh","8fj","8fl","8fn"],["8fg","8fi","8fk","8fm"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8fo","text":"8fp"},"2024-08-19T21:14:40.631Z","2024-08-19T21:27:10.958Z",{"createdAt":"8fr","publishedAt":"8fr","modifiedAt":"8fs"},{"primary":"8fg","seo":"8fg"},"In walk-through ahead of convention speech, Biden says this is a 'memorable moment' ",{"primary":"8fv","seo":"8fv","social":"8fv"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52506",{"primary":"8fy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8g0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8g2"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8g4"},{"analysis":"8g1","citations":"8g3","verdict":"8g5"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8f1","authors":"8ff","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8fq","date":"8ft","description":"8fu","headline":"8fw","presentation":"8fx","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8fz","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"8g6","replies":"8g7"},"rcrd52505",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["8ga"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"8gd","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["8gi"],[],[],{"bio":"8gb","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"8gc","name":"5un","primaryImage":"8ge","publisher":"8gf","socialMediaProfiles":"8gg","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8gh","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8gj","educationAndExpertise":"8gk","awards":"8gl"},["8gm"],"Sean Parmelee, 36, is marching with a sign that reads, âWeâre trying to help you, Kamala.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8go"},"He means it earnestly.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8gq"},"âIâm voting for her â but many people here are not,â said Parmelee, a Chicago resident. âHonestly, she is making it very hard for them.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8gs"},"âLook at all this energy. She can have it all if she chooses,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8gu"},"Parmelee said heâs protesting because pushing for a cease-fire and an arms embargo with Israel âis the right thing to do.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8gw"},"âAnd itâs the right strategy for Kamala Harris,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8gy"},"As Parmelee spoke, a protest organizer wielding a megaphone led the crowd in a loud chant of, âHarris, Harris, what do you say, how many kids have you killed today?â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8h0"},"rcim301365",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Sean Parmelee.","Protester Sean Parmelee holds a sign that reads \"We're Trying to Help You Kamala\" during a protest in Chicago on the first day of the DNC","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-dnc-protester-Sean-Parmelee-se-507p-8bc5fa.jpg",{"primary":"8h6"},"2024-08-19T21:09:05.955Z","2024-08-20T21:09:27.841Z",{"publishedAt":"8h8","createdAt":"8h8","modifiedAt":"8h9"},{"name":"5un"},["8hb"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"8h2","headline":"8h3","caption":"8h4","altText":"8h5","url":"8h7","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5vg","width":"5tk","date":"8ha","authors":"8hc","source":"8hd"},{"type":"1v2","image":"8he"},["8gp","8gr","8gt","8gv","8gx","8gz","8h1","8hf"],["8go","8gq","8gs","8gu","8gw","8gy","8h0"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8hg","text":"8hh"},"2024-08-19T21:12:51.897Z","2024-08-19T21:58:36.289Z",{"createdAt":"8hj","publishedAt":"8hj","modifiedAt":"8hk"},"Sean Parmelee, 36, is marching with a sign that reads, âWeâre trying to help you, Kamala.â He means it earnestly. âIâm voting for her â but many people here",{"primary":"8hm","seo":"8hm"},"Protester at march: 'Weâre trying to help you, Kamala'",{"primary":"8ho","seo":"8ho","social":"8ho"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52505",{"primary":"8hr"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ht"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8hv"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8hx"},{"analysis":"8hu","citations":"8hw","verdict":"8hy"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8g9","authors":"8gn","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8hi","date":"8hl","description":"8hn","headline":"8hp","presentation":"8hq","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8hs","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"8hz","replies":"8i0"},"rcrd52504",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["8i3"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"8i6","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["8ib"],[],[],{"bio":"8i4","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"8i5","name":"5un","primaryImage":"8i7","publisher":"8i8","socialMediaProfiles":"8i9","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8ia","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8ic","educationAndExpertise":"8id","awards":"8ie"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6dx"},["8ig"],["25e"],{"primary":"6e6"},{"altText":"6e5","height":"1h4","url":"8ij","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"6ea","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"6ec","primary":"6ec","slug":"6ed"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ef"},["8io"],[],{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6ej"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"6el"},["8ir","8is"],{"bio":"8ih","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"6e0","id":"6e1","email":"6e2","jobTitle":"8ii","name":"6e4","primaryImage":"8ik","publisher":"8il","socialMediaProfiles":"8im","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8in","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8ip","educationAndExpertise":"8iq","awards":"8it"},["8if","8iu"],"The march reached park #578, just one city block from the United Center, the home of the official DNC proceedings this week.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8iw"},"Protesters are now technically within âsight and soundâ of the arena â which had been their goal during the arduous rounds of litigation with the city of Chicago to determine the march route.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8iy"},"Protesters have paused at the southernmost gate of park #578 â their closest point to the United Center â to yell their chants.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8j0"},"The DNC will kick off with speakers at 5:15 p.m. local time, and President Joe Biden will end the night with a speech and show of support for Harris.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8j2"},["8ix","8iz","8j1","8j3"],["8iw","8iy","8j0","8j2"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8j4","text":"8j5"},"2024-08-19T21:08:31.708Z","2024-08-19T21:11:32.985Z",{"createdAt":"8j7","publishedAt":"8j7","modifiedAt":"8j8"},{"primary":"8iw","seo":"8iw"},"Protesters a block away from the DNC arena ",{"primary":"8jb","seo":"8jb","social":"8jb"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52504",{"primary":"8je"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8jg"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ji"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8jk"},{"analysis":"8jh","citations":"8jj","verdict":"8jl"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8i2","authors":"8iv","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8j6","date":"8j9","description":"8ja","headline":"8jc","presentation":"8jd","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8jf","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"8jm","replies":"8jn"},"rcrd52500",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1ue"},["8jq"],[],{"primary":"1ul"},{"altText":"1uk","height":"1h4","url":"8jt","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1uq","primary":"1uq","slug":"1ur"},[],[],[],{"bio":"8jr","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"1uh","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"8js","name":"1uj","primaryImage":"8ju","publisher":"8jv","socialMediaProfiles":"8jw","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8jx","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8jy","educationAndExpertise":"8jz","awards":"8k0"},["8k1"],"At a progressive event on the sidelines of the DNC, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders praised Biden as \"the most progressive president in modern history\" and said he largely \"kept his word\" to be the most progressive executive since FDR.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8k3"},"Sanders was speaking at an event billed as Progressive Central 2024 hosted by the Chicago Teachers Union and Progressive Democrats of America. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8k5"},"When he was asked how much liberals should work within the Democratic Party, Sanders defended Biden and Harris from left-flank critiques, telling the audience that they need to \"do anything we can to make sure\" Harris wins in November.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8k7"},"He also joked that Harris and her running mate Tim Walz are \"unfortunately\" not as liberal as Fox News makes them out to be.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8k9"},["8k4","8k6","8k8","8ka"],["8k3","8k5","8k7","8k9"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8kb","text":"8kc"},"2024-08-19T20:57:32.143Z","2024-08-19T21:09:39.318Z",{"createdAt":"8ke","publishedAt":"8ke","modifiedAt":"8kf"},"At a progressive event on the sidelines of the DNC, Vermont Sen.",{"primary":"8kh","seo":"8kh"},"Sanders calls Biden 'the most progressive president in modern history'",{"primary":"8kj","seo":"8kj","social":"8kj"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52500",{"primary":"8km"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ko"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8kq"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ks"},{"analysis":"8kp","citations":"8kr","verdict":"8kt"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8jp","authors":"8k2","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8kd","date":"8kg","description":"8ki","headline":"8kk","presentation":"8kl","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8kn","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"8ku","replies":"8kv"},"rcrd52499",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["8ky"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"8l1","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["8l6"],[],[],{"bio":"8kz","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"8l0","name":"5un","primaryImage":"8l2","publisher":"8l3","socialMediaProfiles":"8l4","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8l5","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8l7","educationAndExpertise":"8l8","awards":"8l9"},["8la"],"Protesters with the Coalition to March on the DNC are marching west on Washington Blvd. in northwest Chicago.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8lc"},"Leaders are directing the crowd of several thousand in loud call-and-repeat chants of âNo justice, no peace,â âFree Palestine,â âFrom the river to the sea,â and several other slogans.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8le"},"There is a robust police presence at the peaceful protest. The streets are closed to traffic and hundreds of police on bicycles have created a barrier separating the street, where the protesters are, from the sidewalks.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8lg"},"There is a cacophony of sounds at the head of the protest. A helicopter is loudly buzzing overhead while reporters from all over the world â part of the cadre of hundreds of media members keeping pace with the march â speak in different languages. The elevated train at Paulina Street and Washington Boulevard screeches by every few moments.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8li"},"A protester is periodicallyÂ releasing a flare of green smoke â sending a trove of thirsty photographers every few minutes scrambling for the perfect shot of it blowing in the wind.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8lk"},["8ld","8lf","8lh","8lj","8ll"],["8lc","8le","8lg","8li","8lk"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8lm","text":"8ln"},"2024-08-19T20:34:02.595Z","2024-08-19T20:51:58.149Z",{"createdAt":"8lp","publishedAt":"8lp","modifiedAt":"8lq"},{"primary":"8lc","seo":"8lc"},"Protesters march and chant 'Free Palestine'",{"primary":"8lt","seo":"8lt","social":"8lt"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52499",{"primary":"8lw"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8ly"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8m0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8m2"},{"analysis":"8lz","citations":"8m1","verdict":"8m3"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8kx","authors":"8lb","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8lo","date":"8lr","description":"8ls","headline":"8lu","presentation":"8lv","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8lx","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"8m4","replies":"8m5"},"rcrd52497",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1sw"},["8m8"],["1j4"],{"primary":"1t5"},{"altText":"1t4","height":"1h4","url":"8mb","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1t9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"1tb","primary":"1tb","slug":"1tc"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"1te"},["8mg"],[],[],{"bio":"8m9","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1sz","id":"1t0","email":"1t1","jobTitle":"8ma","name":"1t3","primaryImage":"8mc","publisher":"8md","socialMediaProfiles":"8me","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8mf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8mh","educationAndExpertise":"8mi","awards":"8mj"},["8mk"],"Trump blasted Harris and her economic policy proposals in lengthy remarks this afternoon from York, Pennsylvania.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8mm"},"At a machine manufacturing plant, Trump said Harrisâ economic agenda rewards companies that outsource jobs and âpunishes American workers by making it economically impossible to manufacture in America.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8mo"},"âWe donât need lectures on the economy from a candidate pushing communist price controls,\" he said. \"Kamala has no idea what the hell sheâs doing. Her father is a Marxist professor, and I believe he taught her well, you know, heâs a Marxist professor. Can you imagine?â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8mq"},"mmvo217465925822","PT1M37S","Mon Aug 19 2024 21:01:45 GMT+0000 (UTC)","2024-08-19T21:01:41.000Z","2024-08-19T21:01:40.000Z",{"publishedAt":"8mv","createdAt":"8mw"},"217465925822","f_mo_trump_weird_proposals_240819",{"id":"8my","guid":"8mz","externalAdvertiserId":"8mz"},"webExtra","Trump blasts Harris and her economic policy proposals",{"primary":"8n2","seo":"8n2"},"Former President Donald Trump blasted Vice President Kamala Harris and her economic policy proposals. also addressed attacks by Harris and her running mate, Tim Walz, on him and JD Vance calling them \"weird.\" ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8sp"},"âI wonder if they knew where she comes from, where she came from, what her ideology is. But you could see it a little bit by this whack job. You know, he said, weâre weird,\" Trump said. \"I think weâre extremely normal people like you ... Did you ever see him go on the stage and go like crazy? Itâs like he, between his movement and her laugh, thereâs a lot of craziness.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8sr"},["8mn","8mp","8mr","8si","8so","8sq","8ss"],["8mm","8mo","8mq","8sp","8sr"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8st","text":"8su"},"2024-08-19T20:25:53.759Z","2024-08-19T21:06:21.761Z",{"createdAt":"8sw","publishedAt":"8sw","modifiedAt":"8sx"},{"primary":"8mm","seo":"8mm"},"Trump protesters appeared on the stage and floor at the DNC welcome party in Chicago last night and urged attendees to call for a cease-fire in Gaza, <a href=\"https://x.com/codepink/status/1825357088266031497\" target=\"_blank\">according to a video posted on X </a>by the anti-war group CODEPINK, which says it organized the demonstration.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8vh"},"In the video, a protester can be heard yelling on the floor at the DNC welcome event: âThe Democratic administration is supporting an ongoing genocide in Gaza. Shame on them! Shame on them! Shame on them! Make sure you go to the convention and call for accountability. Call for peace and call for a cease-fire!â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8vj"},["8vi","8vk"],"Pro-Palestinian protesters appeared on the stage and floor at the DNC welcome party in Chicago last night and urged attendees to call for a cease-fire in Gaza, according to a video posted on X by the anti-war group CODEPINK, which says it organized the demonstration.",["8vm","8vj"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8vl","text":"8vn"},"2024-08-19T19:42:21.496Z","2024-08-19T19:55:21.707Z",{"createdAt":"8vp","publishedAt":"8vp","modifiedAt":"8vq"},"Pro-Palestinian am a politics reporter with a focus on the 2028 Democratic presidential primary.Â  I sometimes focus on how the White House's policies impact Americans, which has included reporting on ICE and Border Patrol.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8w9"},["8wa"],"Natasha Korecki is a senior national political reporter for NBC News.","ncpn1286792","Natasha.Korecki@nbcuni.com",["84a"],"Natasha Korecki",1050,"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2023_04/3591706/korecki_21_76_copy_copy.png",{"primary":"8wi"},750,{"altText":"1a8","height":"8wh","url":"8wj","width":"8wk"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@natashakorecki",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"8wn","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/natasha-korecki-ncpn1286792","natasha-korecki-ncpn1286792",{"canonical":"8wp","primary":"8wp","slug":"8wq"},"I worked as a journalist for more than two decades. Before NBC News, I worked at Politico as a White House reporter and a national correspondent. Prior to that, I launched the Illinois Playbook after leaving the Chicago Sun-Times where I covered federal courts for nearly a decade before moving to politics. I am the author of <a href=\"https://www.amazon.com/Only-Chicago-Blagojevich-Engulfed-Enthralled/dp/1572841443\" target=\"_blank\">\"Only in Chicago: How the Rod Blagojevich Scandal Engulfed Illinois and Enthralled the Nation.\"</a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8ws"},["8wt"],[],"Sigma Delta Chi Award, Livingston Award Finalist, IRE Award, University of Illinois College of Media Hall of Fame inductee, University of Illinois Public Affairs Reporting Hall of Fame inductee, Illinois Journalist of the Year.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8ww"},["8wx"],{"bio":"8wb","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"8wc","id":"8wd","email":"8we","jobTitle":"8wf","name":"8wg","primaryImage":"8wl","publisher":"8wm","socialMediaProfiles":"8wo","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"8wr","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"8wu","educationAndExpertise":"8wv","awards":"8wy"},["8wz"],"CHICAGO â Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro said antisemitism played no role in his not becoming the Democratic Partyâs vice presidential nominee, as Donald Trump has charged.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8x1"},"Shapiro said Trump was the âleast credible personâ when it came to standing up against hatred and bigotry.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8x3"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"8x5","presentation":"8x6"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"8x7","publisher":"8x8"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"8x9"},"âHeâs trying to use me and heâs trying to use other Jews to divide Americans further,â Shapiro said after concluding remarks to the Pennsylvania delegation at the Democratic convention this morning.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8xb"},"Shapiro then said he wanted to be clear: âAntisemitism played absolutely no role in my dialogue with the vice president. Absolutely none. It is also true that antisemitism is present in our commonwealth, in our country and in some areas within our party, and we have to stand up and speak out against that.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8xd"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/josh-shapiro-says-antisemitism-played-no-role-vp-discussions-slams-tru-rcna167167\" Friedman, 73, from Los Angeles, was part of an organization in 1968 called the Student Mobilization Committee to end the war. During the DNC in 1968, he protested against the Vietnam War on his college campus in Boston.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8yp"},"Heâs not sure who he is voting for yet but hopes a Labor Party candidate comes forward. In 2020, he voted for the socialist ticket.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8yr"},"Friedman said the big difference between the 1968 and 2024 protests is âthe city is not planning on physically attacking the demonstrations.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8yt"},"âNone of us have come here with the intention of disrupting activities of the Democrat National Convention, but rather influencing the positions of the Democratic Party to defend abortion rights, to defend immigrant rights, to end the blockade of Cuba, to recognize Palestine and to stop sending U.S. military aid to Israel,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8yv"},"rcim301318",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Mark Friedman, 73, from Los Angeles.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-Mark-Friedman-ew-301p-3c511c.jpg",{"primary":"8z0"},"2024-08-19T19:05:28.962Z",{"publishedAt":"8z2","createdAt":"8z2","modifiedAt":"8z2"},{"name":"8ya"},["8z4"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"8yx","headline":"8yy","caption":"8yz","altText":"8yz","url":"8z1","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5tk","width":"5tk","date":"8z3","authors":"8z5","source":"8z6"},{"type":"1v2","image":"8z7"},["8yq","8ys","8yu","8yw","8z8"],["8yp","8yr","8yt","8yv"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8z9","text":"8za"},"2024-08-19T19:31:24.530Z","2024-08-19T19:49:48.580Z",{"createdAt":"8zc","publishedAt":"8zc","modifiedAt":"8zd"},"Mark for DNC protest",{"primary":"8zh","seo":"8zh","social":"8zh"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52489",{"primary":"8zk"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8zm"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8zo"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"8zq"},{"analysis":"8zn","citations":"8zp","verdict":"8zr"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8y3","authors":"8yo","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"8zb","date":"8ze","description":"8zg","headline":"8zi","presentation":"8zj","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"8zl","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"8zs","replies":"8zt"},"rcrd52491",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["8zw"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"8zz","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["904"],[],[],{"bio":"8zx","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"8zy","name":"5un","primaryImage":"900","publisher":"901","socialMediaProfiles":"902","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"903","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"905","educationAndExpertise":"906","awards":"907"},["908"],"Fred Schein, a 76-year-old lifelong Chicago resident, was inside Lincoln Park during the 1968 DNC protests when police came in aggressively and chased him and his fellow demonstrators out.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"90a"},"He says todayâs march is nothing like that.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"90c"},"In fact, the whole scene this year â which has drawn comparisons to the 1968 DNC â is entirely different from the one here 56 years ago, Schein said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"90e"},"âThis is nothing like â68,â he said. âThey wouldnât even let us stay in the park,â he said, referring to Chicago police.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"90g"},"rcim301320",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Fred Schein.","Fred Schein holds a sign that reads, \"Stand with Palestine! End US Aid to Israel\"","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Protester-Fred-Schein-se-305p-7d02b5.jpg",{"primary":"90m"},3112,2490,"2024-08-19T19:09:00.301Z",{"publishedAt":"90q","createdAt":"90q","modifiedAt":"90q"},{"name":"5un"},["90s"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"90i","headline":"90j","caption":"90k","altText":"90l","url":"90n","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"90o","width":"90p","date":"90r","authors":"90t","source":"90u"},{"type":"1v2","image":"90v"},"In contrast, police have worked to keep Union Park protected and peaceful today, while also declining to have officers wear riot gear proactively.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"90x"},"More generally, Schein continued, ââ68 was much more broadly cultural.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"90z"},"âThis is strictly about politics,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"911"},"Conversely, when it came to exactly what demonstrators were protesting against in 1968, âit was one thing: End the Vietnam War,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"913"},"While this yearâs protests do center on the war in Gaza, âthey also are really wrapping in quite a lot of issues,â he said, listing off reproductive rights, climate change and immigrant rights as a few examples.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"915"},"âTrump is a fascist and I would never vote for him, but the Democrats are the ones in power during this war,â Schein said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"917"},["90b","90d","90f","90h","90w","90y","910","912","914","916","918"],["90a","90c","90e","90g","90x","90z","911","913","915","917"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"919","text":"91a"},"2024-08-19T19:11:10.659Z","2024-08-19T19:45:46.302Z",{"createdAt":"91c","publishedAt":"91c","modifiedAt":"91d"},"Fred Chicago resident reflects on 1968 DNC protests compared to today",{"primary":"91h","seo":"91h","social":"91h"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52491",{"primary":"91k"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"91m"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"91o"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"91q"},{"analysis":"91n","citations":"91p","verdict":"91r"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"8zv","authors":"909","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"91b","date":"91e","description":"91g","headline":"91i","presentation":"91j","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"91l","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"91s","replies":"91t"},"rcrd52488",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["91w"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"91z","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["924"],[],[],{"bio":"91x","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"91y","name":"5un","primaryImage":"920","publisher":"921","socialMediaProfiles":"922","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"923","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"925","educationAndExpertise":"926","awards":"927"},["928"],"March organizers had said as recently as Sunday that they were expecting as many as 20,000 people to attendÂ todayâsÂ protest.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"92a"},"As of now, theyÂ donât seem close to that. Police officers at the protest estimate there are around 3,000 to 6,000 people present. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"92c"},"March organizers this afternoon disputed the police estimates andÂ claimed that 15,000Â people were here.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"92e"},"At least a dozen piles of hundreds of unused protest signs dotted the softball fields in Union Park. It wasÂ a clear indication that attendance for today's protestÂ âÂ which had been billed as the largest of six major demonstrations scheduled to occur this weekÂ âÂ fell short of expectations.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"92g"},"rcim301331",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Unused protest signs in Chicago on Monday.","Protest signs on the ground","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-DNC-Unused-Protest-Signs-se-334p-e3039a.jpg",{"primary":"92m"},"2024-08-19T19:36:44.143Z","2024-08-23T18:52:21.059Z",{"publishedAt":"92o","createdAt":"92o","modifiedAt":"92p"},{"name":"5un"},["92r"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"92i","headline":"92j","caption":"92k","altText":"92l","url":"92n","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"5tl","width":"5tk","date":"92q","authors":"92s","source":"92t"},{"type":"1v2","image":"92u"},["92b","92d","92f","92h","92v"],["92a","92c","92e","92g"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"92w","text":"92x"},"2024-08-19T18:41:54.981Z","2024-08-19T19:41:19.543Z",{"createdAt":"92z","publishedAt":"92z","modifiedAt":"930"},{"primary":"92a","seo":"92a"},"Police say between 3,000 and 6,000 protesters are here for
