am a bilingual journalist covering national news with a focus on immigration for NBC News Digital.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"93i"},["93j"],"Nicole Acevedo is a news reporter for NBC News.","ncpn384476","Nicole.Acevedo@nbcuni.com","News reporter",["93o"],"Nicole Acevedo ","Image: Nicole Acevedo","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2019_29/2934411/190618-nicole-acevedo-byline2043.jpg",{"primary":"93s"},{"altText":"93r","height":"1h4","url":"93t","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"https://www.instagram.com/nicoleacevedorodz/","@Nicolemarie_A",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"93w","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"93x","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/nicole-acevedo-ncpn384476","nicole-acevedo-ncpn384476",{"canonical":"93z","primary":"93z","slug":"940"},"I was previously a reporter for NBC Latino, specializing in issues affecting Latino communities in the U.S., the Caribbean and Latin America.Throughout my career, Iâve producedÂ hundreds of stories across digital, radio and broadcast platforms throughout my career â reporting on everything from elections, natural disasters and immigration to pop culture trends, social justice issues and breaking news. Iâm best known for my coverage of theÂ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/puerto-rico-outraged-residents-power-outages-rcna156941\" target=\"_blank\" data-stringify-link=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/puerto-rico-outraged-residents-power-outages-rcna156941\" data-sk=\"tooltip_parent\">crises affecting Puerto Rico</a>, including itsÂ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/puerto-rico-hurricane-maria-anniversary-power-grid-rcna47729\" target=\"_blank\" data-stringify-link=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/puerto-rico-hurricane-maria-anniversary-power-grid-rcna47729\" data-sk=\"tooltip_parent\">reconstruction process after Hurricane Maria</a>, the islandâs financial crisis and more. After graduating from the Newhouse School of Public Communications at Syracuse University with a bachelorâs degree in broadcast and digital journalism in 2016, I joined the inaugural cohort of students who helped launch the Spanish-language bilingual journalism masterâs program at the Craig Newmark Graduate School of Journalism at CUNY.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"942"},["943"],[],"I was a 2024 finalist for the NAHJ/University of Florida award in investigative journalism for my reporting uncovering the challenges <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/puerto-rico-fastest-aging-population-young-migrate-rcna81080\">Puerto Rican families face in caring for their elders</a>, given that the islandâs population is aging faster than most places on Earth and fragmented by migration.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"946"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"25w"},"I served as the lead reporter and writer of NBC News' 2022 Hispanic Heritage Month project â<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/specials/who-s-latino-amid-growing-numbers-the-definition-is-expanding/index.html\">Whoâs Latino? Amid growing numbers the definition is expanding</a>,â which was awarded an NAHJ Ã Award for best Latino issues story for print/digital.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"949"},["947","948","94a"],{"bio":"93k","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"93l","id":"93m","email":"93n","jobTitle":"93p","name":"93q","primaryImage":"93u","publisher":"93v","socialMediaProfiles":"93y","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"941","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"944","educationAndExpertise":"945","awards":"94b"},["94c"],"As the DNC kicked off Monday, the Harris campaign launched a new WhatsAppÂ <a href=\"https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/joebiden.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6b693f24f8d92d026e0c2d2&id=9ad140fd9f&e=20efa93dd3__;!!PIZeeW5wscynRQ!oNNHsCwPojcZ3s0NrxYnCePsLY9V-xklDDWK2gdJGoiuHiVmrcQkRl9EMw524ul8MBruPmcCuD3_B9kxPMSKMGl3aQ$\" target=\"_blank\">channel</a> aimed at bilingual Latino voters who could be consequential in the presidential race.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"94e"},"Itâs the first time a presidential campaign has created a channel to specifically engage with Latinos on the platform, said<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/raised-front-lines-labor-activism-bidens-new-campaign-manager-brings-l-rcna82912\" target=\"_blank\">Â Julie Chavez RodrÃ­guez</a>, manager of the Harris campaign, in a selfie-styleÂ welcome <a href=\"https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/joebiden.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6b693f24f8d92d026e0c2d2&id=750bff993d&e=20efa93dd3__;!!PIZeeW5wscynRQ!oNNHsCwPojcZ3s0NrxYnCePsLY9V-xklDDWK2gdJGoiuHiVmrcQkRl9EMw524ul8MBruPmcCuD3_B9kxPMSgCOBxOA$\" target=\"_blank\">video</a>Â message. The channel will be a place where users âcan go to get behind-the-scenes infoâ about the campaign and what itâs doing for Latino families, she added.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"94g"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"94i","presentation":"94j"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"94k","publisher":"94l"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"94m"},"WhatsApp is more popular among Hispanics than all other U.S. demographic groups, with <a href=\"https://www.pewresearch.org/internet/2024/01/31/americans-social-media-use/\" target=\"_blank\">54% of Hispanic adults reporting they use the app</a>. But Latinosâ greater reliance on messaging platforms such as WhatsApp hasÂ also <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/latinos-likely-get-consume-share-online-misinformation-fake-news-rcna2622\" target=\"_blank\">disproportionately exposed them to misinformation</a>Â in both English and Spanish, since there are few effective tools to crack down on the large volume of false information shared bilingually across encrypted private group chats, according toÂ <a href=\"https://www.nielsen.com/insights/2021/inclusion-information-and-intersection/?utm_campaign=Diversity_Equity_Inclusion&utm_content=DIS_Latino&utm_id=NLSN_10_01_2021&utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=Organic_Social/\" target=\"_blank\">a 2021 Nielsen report</a>.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"94o"},"Latino voters, especially those living in battleground states, stand to reshape the race in ways that are hard to predict sinceÂ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/harris-poll-latino-voter-support-rcna166532\" target=\"_blank\">many of them are young people and newly registered voters</a>, according toÂ <a href=\"https://www.weareequis.us/research/xssaug2024bgmemo#about-the-polling\" target=\"_blank\">a memo</a>Â on a recentÂ <a href=\"https://www.weareequis.us/research/xssaug2024bgtoplines\" target=\"_blank\">Equis Research poll</a>.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"94q"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/kamala-harris-latino-voters-whatsapp-channel-rcna167176\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"94s"},["94f","94h","94n","94p","94r","94t"],"As the DNC kicked off Monday, the Harris campaign launched a new WhatsAppÂ channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters who could be consequential in the presidential race.","Itâs the first time a presidential campaign has created a channel to specifically engage with Latinos on the platform, saidÂ Julie Chavez RodrÃ­guez, manager of the Harris campaign, in a selfie-styleÂ welcome videoÂ message. The channel will be a place where users âcan go to get behind-the-scenes infoâ about the campaign and what itâs doing for Latino families, she added.","WhatsApp is more popular among Hispanics than all other U.S. demographic groups, with 54% of Hispanic adults reporting they use the app. But Latinosâ greater reliance on messaging platforms such as WhatsApp hasÂ also disproportionately exposed them to misinformationÂ in both English and Spanish, since there are few effective tools to crack down on the large volume of false information shared bilingually across encrypted private group chats, according toÂ a 2021 Nielsen report.","Latino voters, especially those living in battleground states, stand to reshape the race in ways that are hard to predict sinceÂ many of them are young people and newly registered voters, according toÂ a memoÂ on a recentÂ Equis Research poll.",["94v","94w","94x","94y","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"94u","text":"94z"},"2024-08-19T18:40:58.068Z","2024-08-19T19:24:08.956Z",{"createdAt":"951","publishedAt":"951","modifiedAt":"952"},"As the DNC kicked off Monday, the Harris campaign launched a new WhatsAppÂ channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters who could be consequential in the",{"primary":"954","seo":"954"},"Harris campaign launches WhatsApp channel aimed at bilingual Latino voters",{"primary":"956","seo":"956","social":"956"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52487",{"primary":"959"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"95b"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"95d"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"95f"},{"analysis":"95c","citations":"95e","verdict":"95g"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"93h","authors":"94d","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"950","date":"953","description":"955","headline":"957","presentation":"958","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"95a","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"95h","replies":"95i"},"rcrd52484",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8cn"},["95l"],[],{"primary":"8cv"},{"altText":"8ct","height":"8cu","url":"95o","width":"8cx"},{"name":"21j","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"8d0","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"8d2","primary":"8d2","slug":"8d3"},[],[],[],{"bio":"95m","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"8cq","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"95n","name":"8cs","primaryImage":"95p","publisher":"95q","socialMediaProfiles":"95r","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"95s","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"95t","educationAndExpertise":"95u","awards":"95v"},["95w"],"The Georgia Election Board adopted a new rule today that could give county election administrators additional options to delay certification.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"95y"},"Specifically, the rule known colloquially as the âGrubbs Ruleâ for its proponent, Cobb County GOP Chair Salleigh Grubbs, requires county boards to do whatâs being described as a precinct-by-precinct âreconciliationâ of votes in which they âcompare the total number of ballots cast to the total number of unique voter ID numbers.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"960"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"962","presentation":"963"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"964","publisher":"965"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"966"},"The rule further requires that if any discrepancy exists, no matter how small or non-outcome-determinative, âno votes shall be counted from that precinctâ until an investigation is conducted and presented to the board.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"968"},"The rule also empowers county-level election commissioners to âexamine all election-related documentation created during the conduct of elections prior to certification of results.âÂ ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"96a"},"Although the rule also demands that the countyâs consolidated returns be certified by the superintendent no later than 5 p.m. on the Monday following the election and âimmediately transmitted to the Secretary of State,â various Georgia election workers, residents and advocates raised concerns that the reconciliation processes and investigations would prevent counties from reporting results by the time required by Georgia law.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"96c"},"The full text of the proposed rule is available at the end ofÂ <a href=\"https://sos.ga.gov/sites/default/files/forms/Petition%20-%20Grubbs_Redacted.pdf\" target=\"_blank\">this petition</a>.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"96e"},["95z","961","967","969","96b","96d","96f"],"The full text of the proposed rule is available at the end ofÂ this petition.",["95y","960","968","96a","96c","96h"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"96g","text":"96i"},"2024-08-19T18:25:49.835Z","2024-08-19T19:15:08.413Z",{"createdAt":"96k","publishedAt":"96k","modifiedAt":"96l"},"The Georgia Election Board adopted a new rule today that could give county election administrators additional options to delay certification.",{"primary":"96n","seo":"96n"},"Georgia Election Board adopts another rule that could delay certification of votes",{"primary":"96p","seo":"96p","social":"96p"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52484",{"primary":"96s"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"96u"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"96w"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"96y"},{"analysis":"96v","citations":"96x","verdict":"96z"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"95k","authors":"95x","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"96j","date":"96m","description":"96o","headline":"96q","presentation":"96r","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"96t","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"970","replies":"971"},"rcrd52470",[],"ncpn1236168",[],"Kevin Breuninger, CNBC",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},[],[],[],{"bio":"974","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"975","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"976","name":"977","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"978","socialMediaProfiles":"979","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1a8","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"97a","educationAndExpertise":"97b","awards":"97c"},["97d"],"Shares of former PresidentÂ <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/donald-trump/\" target=\"_blank\">Donald Trump</a>âs social media company on Monday touched their lowest price since they began publicÂ <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/04/17/trump-media-shares-rise-in-early-trading-after-days-of-declines.html\" target=\"_blank\">trading</a>Â on theÂ <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/18/stock-market-today-live-updates.html\" target=\"_blank\">Nasdaq</a>Â nearly five months ago after a merger.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"97f"},"<a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/DJT/\" target=\"_blank\">Trump Media</a>, the company that owns the Republican presidential nomineeâs preferred social messaging platformÂ <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/04/08/trump-media-how-much-truth-social-app-executives-make.html\" target=\"_blank\">Truth Social</a>, traded below $22.40 per share before noon ET.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"97h"},"The previous low point for the stock, which trades under theÂ <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/03/26/trump-media-stock-ticker-djt-debuts-after-dwac-merger.html\" target=\"_blank\">DJT</a>Â ticker, was in mid-April, when the price plummeted to $22.55 following the companyâs slingshot rise in its frenzied public trading debut.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"97j"},"The notoriously volatile stockâs downward trajectory over the past month coincided with a swirl of seismic developments for Trump, who is both the majority stakeholder of Trump Media and a main draw for Truth Social users. The share price surged on July 15, the first trading day after Trump was nearly<a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/07/13/trump-rushed-off-stage-by-secret-service-at-rally-after-loud-cracking-noises.html\" target=\"_blank\">Â assassinated</a>Â at a campaign rally in western Pennsylvania.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"97l"},"<a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/19/trump-media-djt-stock-harris-earnings.html\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"97n"},["97g","97i","97k","97m","97o"],"Shares of former PresidentÂ Donald Trumpâs social media company on Monday touched their lowest price since they began publicÂ tradingÂ on theÂ NasdaqÂ nearly five months ago after a merger.","Trump Media, the company that owns the Republican presidential nomineeâs preferred social messaging platformÂ Truth Social, traded below $22.40 per share before noon ET.","The previous low point for the stock, which trades under theÂ DJTÂ ticker, was in mid-April, when the price plummeted to $22.55 following the companyâs slingshot rise in its frenzied public trading debut.","The notoriously volatile stockâs downward trajectory over the past month coincided with a swirl of seismic developments for Trump, who is both the majority stakeholder of Trump Media and a main draw for Truth Social users. The share price surged on July 15, the first trading day after Trump was nearlyÂ assassinatedÂ at a campaign rally in western Pennsylvania.",["97q","97r","97s","97t","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"97p","text":"97u"},"2024-08-19T18:21:01.875Z",{"createdAt":"97w","publishedAt":"97w","modifiedAt":"97w"},"Shares of former PresidentÂ Donald Trumpâs social media company on Monday touched their lowest price since they began publicÂ tradingÂ on theÂ NasdaqÂ nearly five",{"primary":"97y","seo":"97y"},"Trump Media stock sinks to new post-merger low ",{"primary":"980","seo":"980","social":"980"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52470",{"primary":"983"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"985"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"987"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"989"},{"analysis":"986","citations":"988","verdict":"98a"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"973","authors":"97e","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"97v","date":"97x","description":"97z","headline":"981","presentation":"982","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"984","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"98b","replies":"98c"},"rcrd52481",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["98f"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"98i","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["98n"],[],[],{"bio":"98g","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"98h","name":"5un","primaryImage":"98j","publisher":"98k","socialMediaProfiles":"98l","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"98m","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"98o","educationAndExpertise":"98p","awards":"98q"},["98r"],"Annie Weiler, a 28-year-old marketing manager who traveled to Chicago from Knoxville, succinctly summed up why she came today.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"98t"},"âIf you have a voice, use it,â she said. âYou see the images [of destruction in Gaza] and at this point itâs hard to not get involved.â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"98v"},"rcim301273",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Annie Weiler.","Annie Weiler holds a sign outside that says \"Stand With Palestine! End U.S. Aid To Israel!\"","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-weiler-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-e5f22b.jpg",{"primary":"991"},2133,1600,"2024-08-19T18:14:20.221Z",{"publishedAt":"995","createdAt":"995","modifiedAt":"995"},{"name":"5un"},["997"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"98x","headline":"98y","caption":"98z","altText":"990","url":"992","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"993","width":"994","date":"996","authors":"998","source":"999"},{"type":"1v2","image":"99a"},"She said she hoped the robust protest effort might help guide the Harris campaign to pivot not just on tone, but on policy regarding the war.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"99c"},"âRight now, Kamala Harris still has the option to help stop funding this war,â she said.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"99e"},"Weiler said she still wasnât sure who she would vote for in the fall â but added it wouldnât be Trump â though she also rejected that withholding a vote for Harris amounted to a vote for Trump.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"99g"},"âI am a Democrat, but it is hard to support Kamala Harris when she is openly supporting Israel in this conflict,â she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"99i"},["98u","98w","99b","99d","99f","99h","99j"],["98t","98v","99c","99e","99g","99i"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"99k","text":"99l"},"2024-08-19T18:11:05.093Z","2024-08-19T18:14:36.679Z",{"createdAt":"99n","publishedAt":"99n","modifiedAt":"99o"},"Annie Weiler, a 28-year-old marketing manager who traveled to Chicago from Knoxville, succinctly summed up why she came today. âIf you have a voice, use it,â",{"primary":"99q","seo":"99q"},"Protester: âHarris still has the option to help stop funding this warâ",{"primary":"99s","seo":"99s","social":"99s"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52481",{"primary":"99v"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"99x"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"99z"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9a1"},{"analysis":"99y","citations":"9a0","verdict":"9a2"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"98e","authors":"98s","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"99m","date":"99p","description":"99r","headline":"99t","presentation":"99u","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"99w","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"9a3","replies":"9a4"},"rcrd52479",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8a0"},["9a7"],["8a5"],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"8a9","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"8ab","primary":"8ab","slug":"8ac"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9a8","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"8a3","email":"8a4","jobTitle":"9a9","name":"8a7","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"9aa","socialMediaProfiles":"9ab","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9ac","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9ad","educationAndExpertise":"9ae","awards":"9af"},["9ag"],"Chicagoâs top cop thanked protest organizers for keeping protests on Sunday peaceful and said their officers were able to respond in the way they were trained.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ai"},"âWe were able to talk to the organizers,â Chicago Police Superintendent Larry Snelling said during a news conference Monday. âThere was mutual respect there, and because of that, we didnât have any incidents.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ak"},"Snelling added that they hope for the same outcome at every protest going forward and âif that occurs, then weâve had the most successful Democratic National Convention that we can imagine.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9am"},"As Chicago police gear up for future protests, Snelling said his department has proven they can respond to First Amendment activity without it turning violent. âAs far as riot gear, we donât need officers out there in riot gear if people are protesting peacefully.â Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ao"},"Other police departments, including Milwaukee, Capitol Police and departments from across Illinois, are helping to staff DNC infrastructure so Chicago police are freed up to patrol the city theyâve been extensively trained on, Snelling added.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9aq"},"A 23-year-old woman was arrested on Sunday on charges of defacement of property and obstruction of a police officer, but Snelling noted she was not part of the protest imprint.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9as"},"âWe would prefer not to have clashes. We would prefer not to have to make arrests if we donât have to, and we will avoid those things as long as weâre not committing acts of vandalism or violence,â Snelling said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9au"},["9aj","9al","9an","9ap","9ar","9at","9av"],["9ai","9ak","9am","9ao","9aq","9as","9au"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9aw","text":"9ax"},"2024-08-19T18:07:51.765Z","2024-08-19T19:02:25.533Z",{"createdAt":"9az","publishedAt":"9az","modifiedAt":"9b0"},{"primary":"9ai","seo":"9ai"},"Chicago police superintendent says officers won't need riot gear if protests stay peaceful",{"primary":"9b3","seo":"9b3","social":"9b3"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52479",{"primary":"9b6"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9b8"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9ba"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9bc"},{"analysis":"9b9","citations":"9bb","verdict":"9bd"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9a6","authors":"9ah","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9ay","date":"9b1","description":"9b2","headline":"9b4","presentation":"9b5","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9b7","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"9be","replies":"9bf"},"rcrd52477",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"4bp"},["9bi"],[],{"primary":"4bw"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9bl","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"4c1","primary":"4c1","slug":"4c2"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9bj","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"4bs","email":"4bt","jobTitle":"9bk","name":"4bv","primaryImage":"9bm","publisher":"9bn","socialMediaProfiles":"9bo","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9bp","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9bq","educationAndExpertise":"9br","awards":"9bs"},["9bt"],"Biden has had a major role in Democratic conventions for decades â heâs only missed one since 1972: 1988, after he suffered a brain aneurysm.Â Still, less than a month after he dropped his bid for a second term, his 2024 appearance now will serve as more of a valedictory address rather than one laying out his vision for four more years in the Oval Office.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9bv"},"A senior Biden adviser said the president is viewing this moment without regret. âHe makes a decision and moves on,â they said. âIs it hard for other people? Yes. But itâs not like being president is a part-time job. Thereâs a lot on his plate that heâs focused on.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9bx"},"That includes making sure Harris is elected to replace him. While the vice president has embraced the positive energy around her candidacy to push a campaign message about the future, Biden still sees it as a critical mission to ensure voters understand whatâs at risk if Donald Trump returns to the White House.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9bz"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"9c1","presentation":"9c2"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"9c3","publisher":"9c4"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"9c5"},"Biden will cast Trump as a threat to democracy and urge all Democrats, and all Americans, to focus on whatâs needed to be done to defeat him. He will say that now that heâs made the decision he needed to make, itâs up to others to help him ensure that we are âcontinuing the progress we have made.âÂ Â Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9c7"},"âThe most important thing they can do is vote,â the adviser said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9c9"},"Biden advisers had had initial conversations about his convention speech prior to his politically fatal June 27 debate performance, but not yet begun to âput much on paper,â the adviser said. Tonightâs speech is expected to build on the themes of his Oval Office address explaining his decision to step aside.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9cb"},"With speeches and other tributes leading up to Bidenâs remarks, the president wants to share his belief that his accomplishments were not his alone. He will note the dire situation he inherited when he came into office in 2021, and how he believes the country was able to recover beyond anyoneâs expectations because of the determination of the American people.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9cd"},"âThatâs a big distinction between Joe Biden and Donald Trump. He believes this is what we can do together. Trump says he alone can do it,â the adviser said. âAny time he talks about accomplishments, itâs really about what the country did.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9cf"},"Biden will also argue that Harris has been an important partner in progress, and how likeminded they are in fighting for ordinary Americans.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ch"},"âHeâs fully supportive of her,â the adviser said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9cj"},["9bw","9by","9c0","9c6","9c8","9ca","9cc","9ce","9cg","9ci","9ck"],["9bv","9bx","9bz","9c7","9c9","9cb","9cd","9cf","9ch","9cj"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9cl","text":"9cm"},"2024-08-19T17:47:19.300Z","2024-08-19T18:44:00.078Z",{"createdAt":"9co","publishedAt":"9co","modifiedAt":"9cp"},"Biden has had a major role in Democratic conventions for decades â heâs only missed one since 1972: 1988, after he suffered a brain aneurysm.",{"primary":"9cr","seo":"9cr"},"Biden to cast Trump as a threat to democracy in his convention speech ",{"primary":"9ct","seo":"9ct","social":"9ct"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52477",{"primary":"9cw"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9cy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9d0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9d2"},{"analysis":"9cz","citations":"9d1","verdict":"9d3"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9bh","authors":"9bu","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9cn","date":"9cq","description":"9cs","headline":"9cu","presentation":"9cv","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9cx","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9d4","replies":"9d5"},"rcrd52465","I am a journalist covering technology for NBC News. I write about a wide array of subjects, including Elon Muskâs expansive business empire, the latest in anti-drone defense systems and the intersection of tech and national political campaigns. Based in our San Francisco bureau, I also sometimes write about whatâs happening in Americaâs tech hub and most interesting city.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9d8"},["9d9"],"David Ingram is a tech reporter for NBC News.","ncpn890161","david.ingram@nbcuni.com","Tech Reporter",["9de"],"David Ingram",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"https://www.facebook.com/davidingramwrites/","@David_Ingram",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"9di","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"9dj","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/david-ingram-ncpn890161","david-ingram-ncpn890161",{"canonical":"9dl","primary":"9dl","slug":"9dm"},"Readers are interested in technology from many angles, including how tech is upending politics, why the internet is swallowing the economy and what people are doing to hold Silicon Valley accountable. Luckily, I have experience as a politics reporter, business reporter and legal reporter. I started at newspapers in North Carolina, where I wrote about state government and political campaigns. I covered Roy Cooper and Thom Tillis before they were on the national stage, and I investigated corruption among members of both parties. Later I turned to writing about our legal system, first for the Legal Times newspaper and then Reuters. I landed exclusive interviews with people from the White House and Justice Department and covered the courts from top to bottom, including Supreme Court rulings, nomination hearings and antitrust class actions. I first approached tech from a business perspective, writing about Facebook for Reuters at a crucial time for the company and its core advertising model. Now I look at the whole tech industry, using all my previous assignments in journalism to find stories that are distinctive and essential for NBC News. I have a bachelorâs degree in political science from Duke University, where I was the editor of the daily student-run newspaper, The Chronicle.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9do"},["9dp"],[],[],{"bio":"9da","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"9db","id":"9dc","email":"9dd","jobTitle":"9df","name":"9dg","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"9dh","socialMediaProfiles":"9dk","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9dn","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9dq","educationAndExpertise":"9dr","awards":"9ds"},["9dt"],"Defend the Vote, a Democratic-aligned group that raises money for voting rights, wants the Justice Department to investigation Elon Muskâs America PAC over an allegedly misleading voter registration website. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9dv"},"In <a href=\"https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/25051099-defend-the-vote-letter-to-doj-august-2024\" target=\"_blank\">a letter over the weekend</a>, Defend the Vote said it believed Muskâs PAC may have violated a federal law that makes it a crime to conspire to threaten civil rights, such as the right to vote. CNBC <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/02/elon-musk-pac-voter-data-trump-harris.html\" target=\"_blank\">reported earlier this month</a> that the website collected personal data from users but failed to direct them to voter registration help if they entered a ZIP code from a battleground state. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9dx"},"âA scheme to trick people into believing that they have successfully registered to vote would put those individuals at risk of being unable to exercise their constitutional right to vote in future elections,â wrote Brian Lemek, Defend the Voteâs executive director.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9dz"},"Election officials in <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/05/trump-elon-musk-pac-election-north-carolina.html\" target=\"_blank\">Michigan and North Carolina</a> have said they're investigating America PAC's website for potential violations of state law. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9e1"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"9e3","presentation":"9e4"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"9e5","publisher":"9e6"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"9e7"},"Musk and America PAC did not immediately respond to requests for comment. The Justice Department also did not immediately respond to a request for comment. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9e9"},"America PAC says <a href=\"https://www.fec.gov/data/committee/C00879510/?tab=spending\" target=\"_blank\">in regulatory filings</a> that it supports Trump. Last month, the former president said he expected Musk to support him with $45 million a month in campaign funds, though Musk later said <a href=\"https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/08/trump-musk-crypto-harris-election.html\" target=\"_blank\">the amount would be lower</a>. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9eb"},["9dw","9dy","9e0","9e2","9e8","9ea","9ec"],"In a letter over the weekend, Defend the Vote said it believed Muskâs PAC may have violated a federal law that makes it a crime to conspire to threaten civil rights, such as the right to vote. CNBC reported earlier this month that the website collected personal data from users but failed to direct them to voter registration help if they entered a ZIP code from a battleground state. ","Election officials in Michigan and North Carolina have said they're investigating America PAC's website for potential violations of state law. ","America PAC says in regulatory filings that it supports Trump. Last month, the former president said he expected Musk to support him with $45 million a month in campaign funds, though Musk later said the amount would be lower. ",["9dv","9ee","9dz","9ef","9e9","9eg"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9ed","text":"9eh"},"2024-08-19T17:46:10.395Z","2024-08-19T18:38:36.987Z",{"createdAt":"9ej","publishedAt":"9ej","modifiedAt":"9ek"},"Defend the Vote, a Democratic-aligned group that raises money for voting rights, wants the Justice Department to investigation Elon Muskâs America PAC over an",{"primary":"9em","seo":"9em"},"Voting rights group asks DOJ to investigate Elon Muskâs PAC",{"primary":"9eo","seo":"9eo","social":"9eo"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52465",{"primary":"9er"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9et"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9ev"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9ex"},{"analysis":"9eu","citations":"9ew","verdict":"9ey"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9d7","authors":"9du","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9ei","date":"9el","description":"9en","headline":"9ep","presentation":"9eq","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9es","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9ez","replies":"9f0"},"rcrd52475",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["9f3"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9f6","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["9fb"],[],[],{"bio":"9f4","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"9f5","name":"5un","primaryImage":"9f7","publisher":"9f8","socialMediaProfiles":"9f9","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9fa","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9fc","educationAndExpertise":"9fd","awards":"9fe"},["9ff"],"Some march attendees were more openly aligned with the Democratic Party and clearer about their intentions to vote for Harris in November â explaining that they felt their presence at todayâs protest was an act of service in helping steer the party.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9fh"},"Mariana Espana, a 17-year-old student in Chicago who will be old enough to vote by Election Day, said that she was here to help push Harris specifically to âact on a cease-fire for Palestineâ because âitâs such a tragedy to see these kids dying.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9fj"},"rcim301268",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Mariana Espana.","Mariana Espana stands outside on a lawn","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-espana-dnc-chicago-vl-201p-d1d8fe.jpg",{"primary":"9fp"},2000,"2024-08-19T18:11:14.999Z",{"publishedAt":"9fs","createdAt":"9fs","modifiedAt":"9fs"},{"name":"5un"},["9fu"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"9fl","headline":"9fm","caption":"9fn","altText":"9fo","url":"9fq","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"1h4","width":"9fr","date":"9ft","authors":"9fv","source":"9fw"},{"type":"1v2","image":"9fx"},"âI personally support Kamala. A Trump presidency would be a disaster. But I feel itâs important to push Kamala to push for a cease-fire,â she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9fz"},"âI think it would help her campaign because it would help rally this wing of the party,â she said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9g1"},["9fi","9fk","9fy","9g0","9g2"],["9fh","9fj","9fz","9g1"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9g3","text":"9g4"},"2024-08-19T17:43:51.455Z","2024-08-19T18:23:15.170Z",{"createdAt":"9g6","publishedAt":"9g6","modifiedAt":"9g7"},"Some march attendees were more openly aligned with the Democratic Party and clearer about their intentions to vote for Harris in November â explaining that",{"primary":"9g9","seo":"9g9"},"Harris voters at protest hope to shape her platform on Gaza",{"primary":"9gb","seo":"9gb","social":"9gb"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52475",{"primary":"9ge"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9gg"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9gi"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9gk"},{"analysis":"9gh","citations":"9gj","verdict":"9gl"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9f2","authors":"9fg","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9g5","date":"9g8","description":"9ga","headline":"9gc","presentation":"9gd","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9gf","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"9gm","replies":"9gn"},"rcrd52457",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8y4"},["9gq"],[],{"primary":"8yb"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9gt","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"8yf","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"8yh","primary":"8yh","slug":"8yi"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9gr","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"8y7","email":"8y8","jobTitle":"9gs","name":"8ya","primaryImage":"9gu","publisher":"9gv","socialMediaProfiles":"9gw","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9gx","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9gy","educationAndExpertise":"9gz","awards":"9h0"},["9h1"],"Sarah Martin, 84, came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9h3"},"She was in her 20s during the 1968 DNC protests. She said the 1968 protests inspired her to protest the DNC, explaining that âthere really are parallels.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9h5"},"rcim301152",{"primary":"1a8","tease":"1a8","seo":"1a8","social":"1a8"},"Sarah Martin came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/rockcms/2024-08/240819-sarah-martin-wc-1637-760169.jpg",{"primary":"9ha"},2690,"2024-08-19T15:39:10.846Z",{"publishedAt":"9hd","createdAt":"9hd","modifiedAt":"9hd"},{"name":"8ya"},["9hf"],{"name":"1c7"},{"id":"9h7","headline":"9h8","caption":"9h9","altText":"9h9","url":"9hb","encodingFormat":"1v8","height":"9hc","width":"1va","date":"9he","authors":"9hg","source":"9hh"},{"type":"1v2","image":"9hi"},"Martin says back then, she had just become involved in activism and remembers watching the protests on TV and being âhorrifiedâ by the police response. She said, âWeâre here to remind Kamala and Tim Walz that remember 1968 and being timid on the issue of U.S. war is not a good thing. Doesnât lead to a good result politically for you.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9hk"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"9hm","presentation":"9hn"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"9ho","publisher":"9hp"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"9hq"},"Martin says she is not sure who she is voting for yet, saying, âA lot of it depends on what happens between now and the election.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9hs"},"When asked whether she thinks a Trump-Vance administration would be better for this issue, she said, âHeavens no, theyâd be much worse.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9hu"},["9h4","9h6","9hj","9hl","9hr","9ht","9hv"],["9h3","9h5","9hk","9hs","9hu"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9hw","text":"9hx"},"2024-08-19T17:41:18.699Z","2024-08-19T18:21:21.389Z",{"createdAt":"9hz","publishedAt":"9hz","modifiedAt":"9i0"},"Sarah Martin, 84, came from Minneapolis to be part of the March on the DNC. She was in her 20s during the 1968 DNC protests.",{"primary":"9i2","seo":"9i2"},"DNC protester says she was inspired by 1968 protests",{"primary":"9i4","seo":"9i4","social":"9i4"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52457",{"primary":"9i7"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9i9"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9ib"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9id"},{"analysis":"9ia","citations":"9ic","verdict":"9ie"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9gp","authors":"9h2","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9hy","date":"9i1","description":"9i3","headline":"9i5","presentation":"9i6","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9i8","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9if","replies":"9ig"},"rcrd52466","Summer Concepcion was a former politics reporter for NBC News Digital.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ij"},["9ik"],"ncpn1298519",[],"Summer Concepcion","Summer Concepcion.","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2022_46/3581078/summer-concepcion-byline-jm.jpg",{"primary":"9iq"},{"altText":"9ip","height":"1h4","url":"9ir","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519","summer-concepcion-ncpn1298519",{"canonical":"9iv","primary":"9iv","slug":"9iw"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9il","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"9im","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"9in","name":"9io","primaryImage":"9is","publisher":"9it","socialMediaProfiles":"9iu","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9ix","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9iy","educationAndExpertise":"9iz","awards":"9j0"},["9j1"],"Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig, who publicly <a href=\"https://www.msnbc.com/deadline-white-house/deadline-legal-blog/luttig-pence-subpoena-jack-smith-rcna72223\" target=\"_blank\">advised former Vice President Mike Pence to defy Trumpâs demands </a>to unconstitutionally block the certification of the 2020 election results, announced his endorsement of Harris in an <a href=\"https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/19/politics/conservative-republican-endorses-harris-calls-trump-a-threat-to-democracy?cid=ios_app\" target=\"_blank\">interview</a> with CNN.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9j3"},"âIn the presidential election of 2024 there is only one political party and one candidate for the presidency that can claim the mantle of defender and protector of Americaâs Democracy, the Constitution, and the Rule of Law,â Luttig said in a statement provided to CNN. âAs a result, I will unhesitatingly vote for the Democratic Partyâs candidate for the Presidency of the United States, Vice President of the United States, Kamala Harris.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9j5"},"Luttig, whose expected vote for Harris would mark his first time voting for a Democrat, told the news outlet that partisanship must be set aside heading into the November election to block Trump, whom he described as âsingularly unfit,â from winning the election.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9j7"},{"displayShowMore":"18x","type":"28u"},{"size":"1hw","alignment":"28w","style":"1ac"},{"embed":"9j9","presentation":"9ja"},{"name":"1b7"},{"id":"1ho","type":"1hp","name":"1hq","properties":"9jb","publisher":"9jc"},{"type":"1hn","widget":"9jd"},"âIn voting for Vice President Harris, I assume that her public policy views are vastly different from my own, but I am indifferent in this election as to her policy views on any issues other than Americaâs Democracy, the Constitution, and the Rule of Law, as I believe all Americans should be,â Luttig said, according to CNN.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9jf"},"Luttig emerged as a<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/video/luttig-calls-trump-a-clear-and-present-danger-to-american-democracy-142272069847\" target=\"_blank\"> vocal critic of Trump</a> after his efforts to overturn the 2020 election results. The former federal judge <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/live-blog/january-6-hearings-day-three-live-updates-rcna32981/rcrd2840?canonicalCard=true\" target=\"_blank\">testified before the House Jan. 6 committee</a>, warning that Trump and his allies were a âclear and present danger to American democracyâ because they continued to cast doubt on the legitimacy of the election process.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9jh"},["9j4","9j6","9j8","9je","9jg","9ji"],"Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig, who publicly advised former Vice President Mike Pence to defy Trumpâs demands to unconstitutionally block the certification of the 2020 election results, announced his endorsement of Harris in an interview with CNN.","Luttig emerged as a vocal critic of Trump after his efforts to overturn the 2020 election results. The former federal judge testified before the House Jan. 6 committee, warning that Trump and his allies were a âclear and present danger to American democracyâ because they continued to cast doubt on the legitimacy of the election process.",["9jk","9j5","9j7","9jf","9jl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9jj","text":"9jm"},"2024-08-19T17:38:20.194Z","2024-08-19T18:14:17.045Z",{"createdAt":"9jo","publishedAt":"9jo","modifiedAt":"9jp"},"Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig, who publicly advised former Vice President Mike Pence to defy Trumpâs demands to unconstitutionally block",{"primary":"9jr","seo":"9jr"},"Retired conservative federal judge Michael Luttig endorses Harris",{"primary":"9jt","seo":"9jt","social":"9jt"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52466",{"primary":"9jw"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9jy"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9k0"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9k2"},{"analysis":"9jz","citations":"9k1","verdict":"9k3"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9ii","authors":"9j2","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9jn","date":"9jq","description":"9js","headline":"9ju","presentation":"9jv","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9jx","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9k4","replies":"9k5"},"rcrd52474",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["9k8"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9kb","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["9kg"],[],[],{"bio":"9k9","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"9ka","name":"5un","primaryImage":"9kc","publisher":"9kd","socialMediaProfiles":"9ke","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9kf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9kh","educationAndExpertise":"9ki","awards":"9kj"},["9kk"],"The DNC hasnât even formally kicked off downtown, but the protests this week are already far larger than any that occurred during the RNC last month.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9km"},"Attendees at todayâs march â many who identified as progressives â offered different reasons on why they felt it was crucial to protest the Democrats but not necessarily the Republicans.Â Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ko"},"âI want to push the Democratic Party on a lot of issues,â said Jacob Smith, a 32-year-old software engineer, who traveled from Detroit to attend todayâs event. He listed âstopping the genocide in Gazaâ and achieving a âpermanent cease-fireâ as chief among them. He said he felt both the Democratic Party and the GOP were âequally beholden to special and corporate interests.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9kq"},"âTheyâre both basically right-wing parties at this point,â he said, adding â âbut in general Democrats are a little better than Republicans.âÂ ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ks"},"âThey both equally support the police and they both equally donât truly care about the people,â he said. Smith said he hasnât decided who he wants to vote for yet and wouldnât offer who heâs considering, other than that it âwonât be Trump.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ku"},"Smith said he felt that it's more pertinent to protest the Biden-Harris administration because âitâs the administration that has aided and abetted an ongoing, visible genocide.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9kw"},"âThe country is run by Democrats right now, this is happening on their watch,â he said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ky"},"Smith explained that he was hopeful that Democratic Party leaders would be more likely to listen to such protest efforts âbecause progressive voters are part of their base â maybe theyâll be more likely to listen to usâ than Republicans.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9l0"},"Smith did not attend any of the far smaller protests at the RNC.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9l2"},"âObviously protesting Republican policies is a good thing,â he said, âbut how much of a policy change is really realistic to expect would happen that way.â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9l4"},"âItâs about efficacy in a lot of ways,â Smith added. âWhere are your actions going to be most effective?â",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9l6"},["9kn","9kp","9kr","9kt","9kv","9kx","9kz","9l1","9l3","9l5","9l7"],["9km","9ko","9kq","9ks","9ku","9kw","9ky","9l0","9l2","9l4","9l6"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9l8","text":"9l9"},"2024-08-19T17:36:50.908Z","2024-08-19T18:07:42.731Z",{"createdAt":"9lb","publishedAt":"9lb","modifiedAt":"9lc"},{"primary":"9km","seo":"9km"},"DNC protest much larger than those at RNC ",{"primary":"9lf","seo":"9lf","social":"9lf"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52474",{"primary":"9li"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9lk"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9lm"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9lo"},{"analysis":"9ll","citations":"9ln","verdict":"9lp"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9k7","authors":"9kl","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9la","date":"9ld","description":"9le","headline":"9lg","presentation":"9lh","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9lj","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"9lq","replies":"9lr"},"rcrd52472",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ug"},["9lu"],["1j4"],{"primary":"5uo"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9lx","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"5us","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"5uu","primary":"5uu","slug":"5uv"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"5ux"},["9m2"],[],[],{"bio":"9lv","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"5uj","id":"5uk","email":"5ul","jobTitle":"9lw","name":"5un","primaryImage":"9ly","publisher":"9lz","socialMediaProfiles":"9m0","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9m1","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9m3","educationAndExpertise":"9m4","awards":"9m5"},["9m6"],"Thousands have already gathered in Union Park, on the Northwest side of Chicago, for todayâs Coalition to March on the DNC protest â the biggest planned protest event this week.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9m8"},"A stage is set up on the west end of the park, where several speakers, from the dozens of groups that are part of the organizing coalition, will begin speaking shortly, ahead of the march.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ma"},"Middle Eastern music blared from speakers, while protesters banging drums were already parading through the large park, chanting slogans in support of Palestinians.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9mc"},"Todayâs event will feature advocates from an array of progressive causes â but it has been billed most prominently as a demonstration for Palestinians and against the war in Israel and Gaza.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9me"},["9m9","9mb","9md","9mf"],["9m8","9ma","9mc","9me"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9mg","text":"9mh"},"2024-08-19T17:32:09.273Z","2024-08-19T17:58:32.721Z",{"createdAt":"9mj","publishedAt":"9mj","modifiedAt":"9mk"},"Thousands have already gathered in Union Park, on the Northwest side of Chicago, for todayâs Coalition to March on the DNC protest â the biggest planned",{"primary":"9mm","seo":"9mm"},"Thousands gather for Coalition to March on the DNC protest",{"primary":"9mo","seo":"9mo","social":"9mo"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52472",{"primary":"9mr"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9mt"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9mv"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9mx"},{"analysis":"9mu","citations":"9mw","verdict":"9my"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9lt","authors":"9m7","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9mi","date":"9ml","description":"9mn","headline":"9mp","presentation":"9mq","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9ms","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"9mz","replies":"9n0"},"rcrd52437","Charlotte Kwan is an intern on NBC Newsâs Asia Desk.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9n3"},["9n4"],"ncpn1310003",[],"Charlotte Kwan",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9n5","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"9n6","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"9n7","name":"9n8","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"9n9","socialMediaProfiles":"9na","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1a8","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9nb","educationAndExpertise":"9nc","awards":"9nd"},["9ne"],"Former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern will attend the Democratic National Convention this week, <a href=\"https://www.nzherald.co.nz/nz/politics/lets-do-this-jacinda-ardern-heads-to-chicago-for-democratic-national-convention/HFDZAIPLDRE7TGRDSCJMCD5PHY/\" target=\"_blank\">The New Zealand Herald reported</a>, citing a spokesperson.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ng"},"Though she wonât speak on the main stage, Ardern will participate in a panel discussion on âhealing the nationâ organized by the Center for American Progress Action Fund, a progressive think tank. According to New Zealand media, she is the first former New Zealand prime minister to speak at the DNC.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ni"},"Ardern, who became a global progressive icon after taking office in 2017, <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/jacinda-ardern-says-will-resign-new-zealand-prime-minister-rcna66437\" target=\"_blank\">announced her resignation as prime minister</a> early last year, saying she no longer had âenough in the tank to do it justice.â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9nk"},"She has been living in the United States after being <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/former-new-zealand-prime-minister-jacinda-ardern-join-harvard-rcna81503\" target=\"_blank\">appointed to multiple fellowships at Harvard</a>.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9nm"},["9nh","9nj","9nl","9nn"],"Former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern will attend the Democratic National Convention this week, The New Zealand Herald reported, citing a spokesperson.","Ardern, who became a global progressive icon after taking office in 2017, announced her resignation as prime minister early last year, saying she no longer had âenough in the tank to do it justice.â ","She has been living in the United States after being appointed to multiple fellowships at Harvard.",["9np","9ni","9nq","9nr"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9no","text":"9ns"},"2024-08-19T17:30:10.146Z",{"createdAt":"9nu","publishedAt":"9nu","modifiedAt":"9nu"},"Former New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern will attend the Democratic National Convention this week, The New Zealand Herald reported, citing a",{"primary":"9nw","seo":"9nw"},"Former New Zealand leader Jacinda Ardern to attend Democratic convention",{"primary":"9ny","seo":"9ny","social":"9ny"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52437",{"primary":"9o1"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9o3"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9o5"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9o7"},{"analysis":"9o4","citations":"9o6","verdict":"9o8"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9n2","authors":"9nf","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9nt","date":"9nv","description":"9nx","headline":"9nz","presentation":"9o0","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9o2","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9o9","replies":"9oa"},"rcrd52471","Alex Tabet","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_31/3656890/240729-alex-tabet.jpg",{"primary":"9ok"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9ol","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@AlexanderTabet",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"9oo","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/alex-tabet-ncpn1237627","alex-tabet-ncpn1237627",{"canonical":"9oq","primary":"9oq","slug":"9or"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9of","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"9og","email":"9oh","jobTitle":"9oi","name":"9oj","primaryImage":"9om","publisher":"9on","socialMediaProfiles":"9op","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9os","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9ot","educationAndExpertise":"9ou","awards":"9ov"},["9ow"],"Leaders from the March on the DNC coalition criticized Vice President Kamala Harris in a news conference ahead of their march to protest the convention in Chicago on Monday.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9oy"},"âKamala Harrisâ candidacy, while historic, does not alter the partyâs ongoing support for the Israeli genocide,â said Omar Yunes, co-founder of Jisoor, a pro-Palestinian organization.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9p0"},"âAt her rallies, she has attempted to silence pro-Palestinian protesters, and she, just like Biden, continues to be unwilling to listen to the outcries of the Palestinian people,â Yunes said in reference to Harrisâ response to a protest during one of her rallies in Detroit on Aug. 7.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9p2"},"Hatem Abudayyeh, executive director of the Arab American Action Network, said he and his organization will take no responsibility if Harris loses the election in November.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9p4"},"âThe responsibility is on âgenocide Joeâ and on Kamala Harris and on the Democratic Party. If they lose this election to Trump, they are responsible only. Their policies around Palestine are responsible only, and nobody else,â Abudayyeh said.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9p6"},"The organizers also used their time to praise Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for being sympathetic to their movement.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9p8"},"âWeâre in a city in which we have a mayor who says I am from the movement, a mayor who says I am an organizer, a mayor who says that people have the right to protest and express their First Amendment rights,â he said, praising Johnson. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9pa"},["9oz","9p1","9p3","9p5","9p7","9p9","9pb"],["9oy","9p0","9p2","9p4","9p6","9p8","9pa"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9pc","text":"9pd"},"2024-08-19T17:29:05.278Z","2024-08-19T17:51:27.090Z",{"createdAt":"9pf","publishedAt":"9pf","modifiedAt":"9pg"},"Leaders from the March on the DNC coalition criticized Vice President Kamala Harris in a news conference ahead of their march to protest the convention in Chica",{"primary":"9pi","seo":"9pi"},"March on DNC coalition leaders call out Harris ahead of pro-Palestinian march",{"primary":"9pk","seo":"9pk","social":"9pk"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52471",{"primary":"9pn"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9pp"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9pr"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9pt"},{"analysis":"9pq","citations":"9ps","verdict":"9pu"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9oc","authors":"9ox","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9pe","date":"9ph","description":"9pj","headline":"9pl","presentation":"9pm","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9po","reportingFrom":"22c","factCheckContent":"9pv","replies":"9pw"},"rcrd52469","Nicole Moeder is a production assistant for Andrea Mitchell Reports based in Washington, D.C.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9pz"},["9q0"],"Nicole Moeder is a desk assistance based in Washington, D.C. ","ncpn1306878","nicole.moeder@nbcuni.com",[],"Nicole Moeder",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"1a8","youtube":"1a8"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9q1","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"9q2","id":"9q3","email":"9q4","jobTitle":"9q5","name":"9q6","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"9q7","socialMediaProfiles":"9q8","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"1a8","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9q9","educationAndExpertise":"9qa","awards":"9qb"},"I am an intern on the digital politics team at NBC News.Â When not writing articles,Â IÂ focus onÂ breaking news, contributing toÂ live blogs and helping with fact-checking presidential debates.Â Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9qd"},["9qe"],"Elleiana Green is a Digital Politics intern with NBC News","ncpn1310109","elleiana.green@nbcuni.com","Digital Politics Intern",["9qj"],"Elleiana Green",{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@elleianagreen",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"9qn","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/elleiana-green-ncpn1310109","elleiana-green-ncpn1310109",{"canonical":"9qp","primary":"9qp","slug":"9qq"},"I am currently an undergraduate student at Northwestern University studying journalism and political science.Â AÂ native ofÂ Omaha, Nebraska, I am interested in writing about battleground states. At Northwestern, I have been part of the Medill on the Hill program, where I had the opportunity to be a full-time reporter on Capitol Hill. WhileÂ there, I covered Title IX protections, Supreme Court oral arguments and congressional hearings about free speech on college campuses. MyÂ work has appeared in UPI, Sojourners and the Albany Times Union.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9qs"},["9qt"],[],[],{"bio":"9qf","liveBlogShortBio":"9qg","shortBio":"9qg","id":"9qh","email":"9qi","jobTitle":"9qk","name":"9ql","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"9qm","socialMediaProfiles":"9qo","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9qr","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9qu","educationAndExpertise":"9qv","awards":"9qw"},["9qc","9qx"],"Jill Biden's communications director, Elizabeth Alexander, told MSNBC that the first lady is \"very excited to pay tribute to her husband, his character, his empathy, his leadership and how he has always put country first\" in her speech tonight.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9qz"},"Alexander added, \"She knows him better than anyone. She knows his capacity for empathy, but sheâs also seen him on the world stage for those 50 years, so sheâs seen his accomplishments up front.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9r1"},["9r0","9r2"],["9qz","9r1"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9r3","text":"9r4"},"2024-08-19T17:25:53.369Z",{"createdAt":"9r6","publishedAt":"9r6","modifiedAt":"9r6"},"Jill Biden's communications director, Elizabeth Alexander, told MSNBC that the first lady is \"very excited to pay tribute to her husband, his character, his",{"primary":"9r8","seo":"9r8"},"First lady is 'excited' to pay tribute to her husband, communications director says",{"primary":"9ra","seo":"9ra","social":"9ra"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52469",{"primary":"9rd"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9rf"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9rh"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9rj"},{"analysis":"9rg","citations":"9ri","verdict":"9rk"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9py","authors":"9qy","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9r5","date":"9r7","description":"9r9","headline":"9rb","presentation":"9rc","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9re","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9rl","replies":"9rm"},"rcrd52467","Andrea Mitchell is chief Washington correspondent and chief foreign affairs correspondent for NBC News.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9rp"},["9rq"],"ncpn3416","NBC Chief Foreign Affairs Correspondent; Host, 'Andrea Mitchell Reports'",["9rt"],"Andrea Mitchell",1000,"https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2018_03/2300566/andrea_mitchell1.jpg",{"primary":"9rx"},{"altText":"9rv","height":"9rw","url":"9ry","width":"9rw"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@mitchellreports",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"9s1","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/andrea-mitchell-ncpn3416","andrea-mitchell-ncpn3416",{"canonical":"9s3","primary":"9s3","slug":"9s4"},[],[],[],{"bio":"9rr","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"1a8","id":"9rs","email":"1a8","jobTitle":"9ru","name":"9rv","primaryImage":"9rz","publisher":"9s0","socialMediaProfiles":"9s2","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9s5","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9s6","educationAndExpertise":"9s7","awards":"9s8"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9qd"},["9sa"],["9qj"],{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"9qn","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"9qp","primary":"9qp","slug":"9qq"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9qs"},["9sg"],[],[],{"bio":"9sb","liveBlogShortBio":"9qg","shortBio":"9qg","id":"9qh","email":"9qi","jobTitle":"9sc","name":"9ql","primaryImage":"1a8","publisher":"9sd","socialMediaProfiles":"9se","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9sf","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9sh","educationAndExpertise":"9si","awards":"9sj"},["9s9","9sk"],"When asked about Harris' decision not to focus as much on breaking the glass ceiling if elected president as Hillary Clinton did in her 2016 presidential campaign, Sen. Amy Klobuchar, D-Minn., told MSNBC that Harris had decided to emphasize the merit of her candidacy, adding that it was the right choice. ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9sm"},"\"It's not to minimize that she'd be the first woman president. She's already been the first woman vice president,\" Klobuchar said, adding, \"But I think this is her own decision to emphasize the merit of her candidacy as well as what she wants to do in the future.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9so"},"\"She is bringing the receipts,\" Klobuchar said in the interview. \"She has been an international leader as well as a national leader. She has, as I noted, in just 28 days, done everything flawlessly, including picking an excellent running mate from the state of Minnesota, where we just love our vice presidents.\"",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9sq"},["9sn","9sp","9sr"],["9sm","9so","9sq"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9ss","text":"9st"},"2024-08-19T17:23:18.356Z","2024-08-19T17:46:05.691Z",{"createdAt":"9sv","publishedAt":"9sv","modifiedAt":"9sw"},"When asked about Harris' decision not to focus as much on breaking the glass ceiling if elected president as Hillary Clinton did in her 2016 presidential",{"primary":"9sy","seo":"9sy"},"Klobuchar: Harris is downplaying breaking the glass ceiling to focus on the merits of her candidacy",{"primary":"9t0","seo":"9t0","social":"9t0"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52467",{"primary":"9t3"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9t5"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9t7"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9t9"},{"analysis":"9t6","citations":"9t8","verdict":"9ta"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9ro","authors":"9sl","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9su","date":"9sx","description":"9sz","headline":"9t1","presentation":"9t2","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9t4","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9tb","replies":"9tc"},"rcrd52441",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8w9"},["9tf"],["84a"],{"primary":"8wi"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"8wh","url":"9ti","width":"8wk"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"8wn","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"8wp","primary":"8wp","slug":"8wq"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8ws"},["9tn"],[],{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"8ww"},["9tq"],{"bio":"9tg","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"8wc","id":"8wd","email":"8we","jobTitle":"9th","name":"8wg","primaryImage":"9tj","publisher":"9tk","socialMediaProfiles":"9tl","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9tm","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9to","educationAndExpertise":"9tp","awards":"9tr"},"Peter Nicholas is senior White House reporter for NBC News digital.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9tt"},["9tu"],"Peter Nicholas is a senior White House reporter for NBC News.","ncpn1287244","peter.nicholas@nbcuni.com","Senior White House Reporter",["9tz"],"Peter Nicholas","https://media-cldnry.s-nbcnews.com/image/upload/newscms/2024_26/3653064/230223-peter-nicholas.jpg",{"primary":"9u2"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"1h4","url":"9u3","width":"1h4"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},"@petereporter",{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"9u6","youtube":"1a8"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/author/peter-nicholas-ncpn1287244","peter-nicholas-ncpn1287244",{"canonical":"9u8","primary":"9u8","slug":"9u9"},"I've covered the White House for NBC News, The Atlantic, The Wall Street Journal and the Los Angeles Times. A special interest of mine is how personal character and temperament influence a president's performance in the job. I am also focused on the expansion of presidential power over the years and the extent to which presidents can shape public opinion in carrying out their agenda.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9ub"},["9uc"],[],"Selden Ring Award for Investigative Reporting",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9uf"},["9ug"],{"bio":"9tv","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"9tw","id":"9tx","email":"9ty","jobTitle":"9u0","name":"9u1","primaryImage":"9u4","publisher":"9u5","socialMediaProfiles":"9u7","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9ua","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9ud","educationAndExpertise":"9ue","awards":"9uh"},["9ts","9ui"],"CHICAGO â It will not be the convention President Joe Biden planned.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9uk"},"A month ago, Biden was poised to conclude the Democratsâ party by accepting the nomination with bold pronouncements about how his second term would build on the successes of his first. Instead, he will open the convention Monday to make the case that Vice President Kamala Harris is the one to carry the torch.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9um"},"It is a turnabout that Democrats are greeting with jubilation, melancholy, lingering hard feelings and, for some, outright anger.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9uo"},"The complicated dynamic has left convention planners and party leaders delicately navigating a display of respect to an outgoing president whileÂ <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/harris-democratic-convention-hot-ticket-rcna165249\" target=\"_blank\">building on newfound exuberanceÂ </a>within the party over Harrisâ ascent.Â ",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9uq"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/joe-biden-heads-democratic-convention-large-task-heaps-admiration-part-rcna165955\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9us"},["9ul","9un","9up","9ur","9ut"],"The complicated dynamic has left convention planners and party leaders delicately navigating a display of respect to an outgoing president whileÂ building on newfound exuberanceÂ within the party over Harrisâ ascent.Â ",["9uk","9um","9uo","9uv","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9uu","text":"9uw"},"2024-08-19T15:24:13.730Z","2024-08-19T16:36:00.000Z","2024-08-19T17:40:23.103Z",{"createdAt":"9uy","publishedAt":"9uz","modifiedAt":"9v0"},"It will not be the convention President Joe Biden planned.",{"primary":"9v2","seo":"9v2"},"Biden heads to the Democratic convention with a large task and heaps of admiration from a party ready to move on ",{"primary":"9v4","seo":"9v4","social":"9v4"},{"style":"1fr"},"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/live-blog/dnc-2024-live-updates-rcna165226#rcrd52441",{"primary":"9v7"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9v9"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9vb"},[],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9vd"},{"analysis":"9va","citations":"9vc","verdict":"9ve"},[],{"nativeAd":"18s","id":"9te","authors":"9uj","isHeadlineHidden":"18s","content":"9ux","date":"9v1","description":"9v3","headline":"9v5","presentation":"9v6","primaryImage":"1a8","teaseImage":"1a8","url":"9v8","reportingFrom":"1a8","factCheckContent":"9vf","replies":"9vg"},"rcrd52436",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"22n"},["9vj"],["22t"],{"primary":"22x"},{"altText":"1a8","height":"22w","url":"9vm","width":"22w"},{"name":"1b7","subType":"1a8","type":"1h8"},{"email":"1a8","facebook":"1a8","instagram":"1a8","pinterest":"1a8","snapchat":"1a8","twitter":"231","youtube":"1a8"},{"canonical":"233","primary":"233","slug":"234"},{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"236"},["9vr"],[],[],{"bio":"9vk","liveBlogShortBio":"1ac","shortBio":"22q","id":"22r","email":"22s","jobTitle":"9vl","name":"22v","primaryImage":"9vn","publisher":"9vo","socialMediaProfiles":"9vp","subType":"1a8","type":"1hc","url":"9vq","worksFor":"1a8","experience":"9vs","educationAndExpertise":"9vt","awards":"9vu"},["9vv"],"The most unusual Democratic convention in generations is set to kick off Monday and make history by nominating <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/kamala-harris\" target=\"_blank\">Kamala Harris</a> for president just one month after Joe Biden ended his re-election campaign.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9vx"},"Vice President Harris rapidly unified the party and locked up the nomination, even though she didnât compete in any primaries at the top of the ticket â and her campaign has since surged into a statistical tie or narrow leads in national and battleground surveys against <a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump\" target=\"_blank\">Donald Trump</a>.",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9vz"},"<a href=\"https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2024-election/dnc-what-watch-for-harris-biden-democratic-convention-rcna165264\" target=\"_blank\"><strong><em>Read the full story here.</em></strong></a>",{"type":"192","element":"193","html":"9w1"},["9vy","9w0","9w2"],"The most unusual Democratic convention in generations is set to kick off Monday and make history by nominating Kamala Harris for president just one month after Joe Biden ended his re-election campaign.","Vice President Harris rapidly unified the party and locked up the nomination, even though she didnât compete in any primaries at the top of the ticket â and her campaign has since surged into a statistical tie or narrow leads in national and battleground surveys against Donald Trump.",["9w4","9w5","7dl"],{"markupAndEmbeds":"9w3","text":"9w6"},"2024-08-19T16:01:02.492Z",{"createdAt":"9w8","publishedAt":"9w8","modifiedAt":"9w8"},"The most unusual Democratic convention in
